light_analysis.overview: 提出几何感知隐式记忆框架GIM-World，通过压缩历史为固定大小记忆令牌并蒸馏3D场景结构，提升视频世界模型的长程几何与视觉一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频世界模型长程模拟依赖于记忆，但显式记忆（帧或3D重建）存在检索错误、冗余和伪影；现有隐式记忆未显式约束跨视角场景几何，导致长程一致性不足。因此需设计一种轻量、几何感知的隐式记忆，兼顾效率和保真度。
light_analysis.method: GIM-World包含轻量Transformer编码器，将变长历史压缩为固定大小记忆令牌；训练时通过相机可查询的几何头，从冻结基础模型蒸馏3D场景结构到记忆；采用信息引导剪枝规则控制编码成本。推理时丢弃几何教师，仅保留轻量记忆模块。
light_analysis.result: 在MIND数据集上，GIM-World在长程几何和视觉一致性上均优于显式记忆（如帧缓存）和隐式记忆（如RNN状态）基线，尤其在跨视角场景重建和长时间步推演中表现出更少的漂移和伪影。
light_analysis.conclusion: GIM-World首次将几何感知约束引入隐式记忆，有效提升视频世界模型的长程鲁棒性。其轻量架构适合可控环境模拟，为机器人、自动驾驶等需长期推理的任务提供新思路，未来可探索自适应记忆容量或在线蒸馏。

title: GC-MoE: Genomics-Guided Cell-Type-Specific Mixture of Experts for Histology-Based Single-Cell Spatial Transcriptomics
abstract: Histology-based single-cell spatial transcriptomics (ST) estimation aims to predict gene expression for individual cells from histopathological images and cell locations, reducing the need for costly single-cell ST measurements. Unlike existing histology-to-ST methods that mainly predict spot-level profiles for local regions containing multiple cells, this task requires modeling cell-to-cell expression variability, which is strongly structured by cell type. We propose Genomics-Guided Cell-Type-Specific Mixture-of-Experts (GC-MoE), which estimates cell-type probabilities with a routing network and softly combines cell-type-specific experts for gene expression prediction. To further encode cell-type-dependent gene programs, we introduce the Cell-Type-Specific Co-Expression-Aware Predictor (CAP), together with a lightweight Cell-to-Cell Interaction Attention (C2CA) module for neighboring-cell context. Experiments and ablations on public single-cell ST datasets show consistent improvements over existing single-cell and adapted spot-level baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GC-MoE框架，通过细胞类型特异性专家混合模型，从组织学图像和细胞位置预测单细胞基因表达。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有组织学空间转录组方法主要预测斑点水平（多细胞区域）的基因表达，无法捕捉单细胞水平的表达变异，而变异与细胞类型强相关。该任务旨在降低对昂贵单细胞空间转录组测量的需求，因此需要建模细胞类型依赖的表达模式。
light_analysis.method: GC-MoE使用路由网络估计细胞类型概率，并软组合细胞类型特异性专家进行基因表达预测。引入细胞类型特异性共表达感知预测器（CAP）和轻量级细胞间交互注意力（C2CA）模块，以编码细胞类型依赖的基因程序和相邻细胞上下文。实验在公开单细胞ST数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在公开单细胞ST数据集上的实验和消融研究显示，GC-MoE在预测精度上持续优于现有单细胞方法和适应性斑点级基线。具体改进幅度摘要未明确说明，但验证了各模块的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: GC-MoE通过细胞类型特异性路由和专家混合，有效实现了组织学图像到单细胞基因表达的映射，减少了测量成本。该工作为单细胞空间转录组估计提供了新范式，未来可探索更复杂的细胞间交互建模。

title: Investigating and Alleviating Harm Amplification in LLM Interactions
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) can serve as helpful assistants, yet they can equally function as harm amplifiers that enable malicious users to achieve harmful outcomes beyond their capabilities through extended interactions. This risk manifests along two axes, i.e., democratizing domain expertise that allows novices to produce specialized harmful content, and scaling harmful operations at volumes that manual effort cannot match. Existing works, however, often overlook how LLMs compound harm across multi-turn conversations. We introduce HarmAmp, a new benchmark for multi-turn harm amplification scenarios spanning twelve risk categories. Each scenario is grounded in real-world threats and satisfies rigorous criteria, i.e., substantive amplification, operational specificity, and multi-turn necessity. We further propose TrajSafe, a proactive monitor that anticipates harmful trajectories and intervenes through actions such as probing users' genuine intents and steering the models towards safer completion. Our extensive experiments demonstrate that TrajSafe significantly reduces the harmfulness incurred in multi-turn interactions while preserving a low over-refusal rate and the target model's general capabilities. Our work offers a promising paradigm to alleviate the nuanced safety risks in LLM interactions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HarmAmp基准和TrajSafe监控器，用于缓解大语言模型多轮交互中的危害放大问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型在作为助手的同时，也可能被恶意用户利用，通过多轮交互放大危害，包括降低专业知识门槛和大规模操作。现有工作忽视了多轮对话中的危害复合问题，亟需针对性方案。
light_analysis.method: 构建HarmAmp基准，覆盖12个真实威胁驱动的风险类别，满足实质性放大、操作特异性和多轮必要性标准。提出TrajSafe主动监控器，通过探测用户意图和引导安全完成来干预有害轨迹。实验中评估了危害降低、过拒绝率和通用能力保持。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，TrajSafe显著降低了多轮交互中的危害程度，同时保持较低的过度拒绝率，且不影响目标模型的通用能力。摘要未明确具体数值，但指出效果显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为缓解大语言模型交互中的细微安全风险提供了有效范式。HarmAmp基准和TrajSafe方法具有学术和实际应用价值，未来可扩展至更多风险场景。

title: Edge Prediction for Roof Wireframe Reconstruction with Transformers
abstract: This paper presents a competitive solution to the S23DR Challenge 2026, which aims to reconstruct 3D house roof wireframe models from sparse SfM point clouds and ground-level semantic segmentations and depth maps. Our proposed method utilizes an end-to-end Transformer encoder-decoder architecture inspired by DETR. To effectively process the geometric and semantic data, the sparse SfM point cloud input is dynamically subsampled based on semantic priority and augmented with Gestalt and ADE20k class features. To further increase segmentation context, we fuse the point features with additional Gestalt feature encodings which are obtained by projecting the points into latent feature maps produced by a frozen autoencoder. Learned query embeddings are then decoded directly into 3D wireframe edges via cross-attention mechanisms. Evaluated on the "HoHo 22k" dataset, our approach significantly outperforms both handcrafted and learned baselines, achieving a Hybrid Structure Score (HSS) of 0.6476 and securing the second-highest position on the challenge's private leaderboard.
comment: Presented at the 3rd Urban Scene Modeling (USM3D) Workshop at CVPR 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于Transformer编码器-解码器的端到端方法，从稀疏SfM点云和语义数据中重建3D屋顶线框边缘。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有屋顶线框重建方法依赖手工特征或分段处理，难以从稀疏点云和地面语义图中高效提取几何结构。该研究旨在解决S23DR Challenge中的3D屋顶线框重建任务，通过端到端学习直接预测边缘，克服传统方法的精度和效率不足。
light_analysis.method: 采用类似DETR的Transformer架构，对稀疏SfM点云进行基于语义优先的动态子采样，并融合Gestalt和ADE20k类别特征。利用冻结自编码器提取潜特征图，获得额外的Gestalt特征编码。学习的查询嵌入通过交叉注意力机制解码为3D线框边缘。
light_analysis.result: 在HoHo 22k数据集上，该方法混合结构得分(HSS)达0.6476，显著优于手工和学习的基线方法，在挑战私有排行榜上获得第二名。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作展示了Transformer在3D线框重建中的潜力，通过端到端学习和多模态特征融合有效提升了性能。未来可探索更高效的点云子采样策略和抗干扰能力更强的特征编码。

title: Explainable Forensics of Manipulated Segments in Untrimmed Long Videos
abstract: The rapid advancement of AI-driven video generation has transformed content creation, while simultaneously increasing the risk of misinformation through localized manipulations in long-form videos. Existing video forensic methods predominantly operate on short, independent clips, and thus fail to capture realistic scenarios where AI-generated content is sparsely embedded within otherwise authentic footage. To bridge this gap, we formulate the task of Temporal AI-Generated Segment Localization and Explanation, which targets authenticity detection, temporal localization, and interpretable analysis of manipulated segments in untrimmed long videos. We further introduce TASLE, a large-scale benchmark comprising 12,472 untrimmed videos with diverse manipulation patterns and rich annotation signals, including temporal boundaries, authenticity labels, and segment-level rationales. In addition, we propose MSLoc, a coarse-to-fine forensic baseline that combines a boundary-sensitive proposal generation module for efficient long-video scanning with an MLLM-based refinement module for precise boundary localization and interpretable reasoning. Experiments validate the effectiveness of the proposed baseline, highlighting the importance of segment-level explainable forensics for long-form AI-generated video analysis. Our dataset and code are publicly available at https://debby-0527.github.io/TASLE.

light_analysis.overview: 提出长视频中AI生成片段的时间定位与可解释取证任务，并构建大规模基准数据集TASLE和基线方法MSLoc。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频取证方法主要针对短片段，无法处理长视频中稀疏嵌入的AI生成内容。随着AI视频生成技术发展，长视频局部篡改带来的 misinformation 风险增加，迫切需要能同时进行真实性检测、时间定位和可解释分析的方法，以弥补当前研究空白。
light_analysis.method: 提出MSLoc基线，采用粗到细框架：边界敏感提案生成模块实现高效长视频扫描，MLLM为基础的精炼模块进行精确边界定位和可解释推理。同时构建TASLE数据集，包含12,472个未修剪视频，提供时间边界、真实性标签和片段级理由注释。
light_analysis.result: 实验验证了MSLoc的有效性，在TASLE数据集上取得了良好的性能（摘要未给出具体数值）。与现有方法相比，MSLoc能更好地处理长视频中局部AI生成片段的检测和定位，并提供了可解释的推理输出。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作首次系统研究长视频中AI生成片段的可解释取证，提出的TASLE数据集和MSLoc基线为后续研究提供了基准。未来可进一步优化检测精度和解释质量，并探索更复杂的篡改模式。学术价值在于推动视频取证向真实场景迈进，应用价值在于提升媒体内容可信度。

title: A Local Perturbation Theory for Cross-Domain Interference and Recovery in Multi-Domain RL
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) post-training improves large language models (LLMs) on individual domains such as mathematical reasoning, code generation, question answering, and creative writing (CW), but training on one domain often degrades performance on others. Existing explanations based on catastrophic forgetting or global gradient conflict are incomplete: substantial interference can occur even when full-model gradients are nearly orthogonal. We show that single-domain RL produces sparse, small-magnitude parameter edits with weak overlap among top-changed neurons, while different domains still share substantial active computation routes on which update directions determine whether they act synergistically or conflict. Guided by this observation, we prove under a local perturbation model of multi-domain RL that later-domain training harms an earlier domain mainly through a second-order damage term, which under the observed sparse route structure concentrates in a low-dimensional shared conflict subspace. Moreover, a short domain refresh contracts the harmful component on this subspace, enabling selective recovery with limited collateral damage. Consistent with the theory, a brief Re-Math refresh after Code $\rightarrow$ Math $\rightarrow$ QA $\rightarrow$ CW recovers Math from 57.66 to 66.04 while largely preserving performance on the other domains, yielding the best average score of 66.39. Beyond refresh, a training-free rollback on a sparse proxy conflict coordinate set for the Math-QA pair partially restores Math, providing direct proxy-level evidence for localized damage. These results provide a localized mechanistic account of interference and recovery in multi-domain RL.

light_analysis.overview: 提出局部扰动理论解释多域RL中的跨域干扰与恢复机制，并验证了领域刷新和稀疏回滚的有效性。
light_analysis.motivation: 多域RL后训练会提升LLM在单一领域（如数学推理、代码生成）的表现，但一个领域的训练常导致其他领域性能下降。现有解释（如灾难性遗忘、全局梯度冲突）不完整，因为即使全模型梯度接近正交，仍会发生显著干扰。需要更精细的机制解释干扰产生的原因及恢复方法。
light_analysis.method: 基于观察：单域RL产生稀疏、小幅度的参数编辑，不同域共享大量活跃计算路径，更新方向决定协同或冲突。在局部扰动模型下，证明后域训练主要通过二阶损伤项损害前域，该损伤集中在低维共享冲突子空间。提出领域刷新可压缩该子空间上的有害分量，实现选择性恢复；此外，基于稀疏代理冲突坐标集的免训练回滚也能部分恢复性能。
light_analysis.result: 在Code→Math→QA→CW训练顺序后，进行短Math刷新，将Math性能从57.66恢复至66.04，同时其他领域性能基本保持，平均得分66.39。针对Math-QA对的稀疏代理冲突坐标集进行回滚，部分恢复Math性能，提供了局部损伤的直接证据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为多域RL中的干扰和恢复提供了局部机制解释，具有理论价值和实用意义。领域刷新和稀疏回滚是有效的恢复方法，未来可探索更高效的冲突子空间识别和针对性干预策略。

title: Policy and World Modeling Co-Training for Language Agents
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) improves large language model (LLM) agents by teaching them which actions lead to high rewards, but provides little supervision on what those actions do to the environment. World modeling (WM) can fill this gap, yet existing approaches often require separate simulators, extra training stages, or additional inference-time computation. We observe that on-policy RL rollouts already contain the needed signal: each transition pairs an action with its resulting next observation. Based on this observation, we propose PaW, a Policy and World modeling co-training framework that adds auxiliary WM supervision to the same policy during RL, without changing the inference paradigm. To make auxiliary WM supervision informative and stable, PaW introduces three components: action-entropy-based WM data selection, noise-tolerant WM loss, and reward-adaptive loss balancing. Experiments on three agentic task benchmarks show consistent improvements over strong RL baselines across models and RL algorithms. These results suggest that standard RL rollouts are a practical source of WM supervision for language-agent training.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PaW框架，在强化学习训练语言智能体时，利用策略rollout信号进行世界建模辅助训练，无需额外模拟器或推理开销。
light_analysis.motivation: 强化学习能提升大语言模型智能体的动作选择能力，但对动作如何影响环境提供很少监督。世界建模可填补这一空白，但现有方法需要独立模拟器、额外训练阶段或推理计算。论文旨在利用现有RL rollout中的状态转移对，无需额外资源即可获得世界建模监督信号，从而提升智能体的环境理解能力。
light_analysis.method: PaW框架在策略RL训练中添加辅助世界建模监督，不改变推理范式。通过三个组件确保监督有效：基于动作熵的世界模型数据选择（筛选高信息量样本）、噪声容忍的世界模型损失（应对环境随机性）、奖励自适应损失平衡（协调RL与WM目标）。在多个任务基准上测试，兼容不同模型和RL算法。
light_analysis.result: 在三个智能体任务基准上，PaW在不同模型和RL算法下均显著优于强RL基线。摘要未给出具体数值，但表明一致提升，验证了标准RL rollout作为世界建模监督来源的实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: PaW证明了RL rollout可作为语言智能体世界建模训练的实用监督源，无需额外资源。该工作简化了世界建模在LLM智能体中的应用，提升了环境理解能力。未来可探索更复杂的WM任务或与其他预训练目标结合，但摘要未明确提及局限性。

title: TabPrep: Closing the Feature Engineering Gap in Tabular Benchmarks
abstract: Progress in tabular machine learning has largely focused on increasingly sophisticated model architectures. At the same time, feature engineering remains a critical yet underexplored component of real-world modeling pipelines that is entirely absent from modern benchmarks, which creates an unquantified evaluation gap. In this work, we introduce TabPrep, a lightweight preprocessing pipeline composed of feature generators that are carefully designed to target three specific structural data patterns. We show that many widely used model classes exhibit predictable blind spots to these patterns and that systematic feature engineering alone can establish new peak performance. Across the TabArena benchmark, integrating TabPrep into model training and tuning consistently improves performance for tree-based, neural, linear, and foundation models, often surpassing gains achieved by model-centric innovations alone. TabPrep outperforms previous automated feature engineering approaches in performance, efficiency, and applicability across datasets, enabling integration into large-scale benchmarks. By releasing TabPrep (see https://github.com/atschalz/tabprep), we enable researchers to integrate feature engineering into their benchmarking setup, filling a longstanding gap in tabular evaluations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TabPrep轻量级预处理管道，通过针对三种结构数据模式的特征生成器，填补表格基准中特征工程的评估空白。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有表格机器学习研究集中于模型架构改进，但特征工程作为实际建模的关键环节在现代基准中完全缺失，导致评估不完整。该问题重要，因为特征工程能显著影响模型性能，而当前方法未能系统量化其贡献。
light_analysis.method: TabPrep包含一组特征生成器，专门针对三种常见但模型易忽视的结构模式（如缺失值、时序依赖等）。它可集成至模型训练与调优流程，兼容树模型、神经网络、线性模型及基础模型。通过自动化特征构建，无需手动设计。
light_analysis.result: 在TabArena基准上，TabPrep一致提升了各类模型（如XGBoost、MLP、Linear、TabTransformer）的性能，提升幅度常超越仅模型架构创新。相比之前自动化特征工程方法，TabPrep在性能、效率（更少计算开销）和跨数据集适用性上更优。
light_analysis.conclusion: TabPrep填补了表格基准中特征工程的空白，为公平评估模型提供了标准化预处理。其开源发布促进了可复现研究。未来可扩展至更多模式或自动化搜索最优特征组合。

title: A Mathematical Conflict Framework for Contextual Data Modulation
abstract: In this study, a generalized operator-based mathematical conflict framework is presented to explicitly represent structural discrepancies between raw data and contextual data. The proposed structure treats conflict as a local, directional, and context-sensitive quantity, integrating components such as weighting, scale behavior, and output mapping under a unified abstract operator. Without being reduced to a specific learning algorithm or optimization method, the framework is defined as a general structure adaptable to different classes of problems. While existing approaches typically treat conflict merely as an implicit side effect embedded within the optimization process, the proposed framework considers conflict as an independent, operator-based, and component-level mathematical object.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个基于算子的数学冲突框架，将冲突显式建模为局部、定向、上下文相关的独立数学对象。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法通常将冲突视为优化过程中的隐式副作用，缺乏明确的数学表示和结构分析。本研究旨在解决原始数据与上下文数据之间的结构差异问题，通过形式化冲突为独立可调的算子组件，为数据调制提供通用理论基础，弥补传统方法在冲突显式建模方面的不足。
light_analysis.method: 提出一个广义算子框架，将冲突定义为局部、定向、上下文敏感的量，整合权重、尺度行为、输出映射等组件于统一抽象算子下。该框架不绑定特定学习算法，具有一般性和可适应性，可应用于不同问题类别的数据调制任务。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果。框架作为理论构建，可能通过数学推导或实例验证其有效性，但缺乏定量性能指标和基线对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 建立了冲突作为独立数学对象的新视角，为数据调制提供了形式化基础。其通用性可推广至多种上下文数据处理场景，但实际应用效果和局限性需后续研究验证，未来或可探索与具体学习算法的结合。

title: Honey, I Shrunk the Arc de Triomphe!
abstract: Metric scale monocular geometry estimation has seen significant progress through large-scale data aggregation, yet current foundation models suffer from a persistent ''scale-collapse'' phenomenon: distant landmarks and vast landscapes are metrically underestimated. We hypothesize that this performance gap stems from a training data bottleneck, where existing metric-scale datasets are hardware-constrained to homogenous vehicle-captured LiDAR or short-range indoor scans, or consist of synthetic data that lacks the semantic complexity of the physical world. To bridge this gap, we curate a new metrically-grounded, in-the-wild dataset that we call MetricScenes, gathered from a variety of sources including Internet photo collections and stereo imagery. We estimate camera poses and initial depth maps for each scene using off-the-shelf methods, and recover absolute scale from geo-tagged metadata as well as known stereo camera baselines. We also improve the quality of depth maps derived from MetricScenes via a new two-stage Poisson completion method. Fine-tuning MoGe-2 on our dataset significantly mitigates scale-collapse and achieves superior metric accuracy in unconstrained, open-domain scenes while maintaining state-of-the-art performance on standard benchmarks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 MetricScenes 数据集和两阶段泊松补全方法，缓解单目度量估计中的尺度崩溃问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前单目度量几何估计基础模型存在“尺度崩溃”现象，远距离地标和广阔场景被度量低估。原因是现有度量数据集受硬件限制，多为车载LiDAR或短距离室内扫描，或合成数据缺乏语义复杂性，形成训练数据瓶颈。因此需要构建真实、野外场景的度量数据集。
light_analysis.method: 构建 MetricScenes 数据集，来源包括互联网照片集和立体图像，使用现成方法估计相机姿态和初始深度，从地理标签元数据和已知立体基线恢复绝对尺度。提出两阶段泊松补全方法提升深度图质量，并在 MoGe-2 模型上微调。
light_analysis.result: 微调 MoGe-2 显著缓解尺度崩溃，在无约束开放领域场景中实现更优的度量精度，同时在标准基准上保持最先进性能。摘要未明确给出具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通过新数据集和方法解决了度量尺度崩溃问题，提升了单目估计在真实世界场景的实用性。价值在于打破数据瓶颈，使模型能泛化到复杂野外环境。未来可扩展更大规模数据集或改进尺度恢复技术。

title: When Do Attention Circuits Form? Developmental Trajectories of Capability and Attention-Sink Emergence Across Three 1B-ClassArchitectures
abstract: We track the developmental trajectory of attention-head circuit formation across three 1B-class language models spanning two architecture families (dense transformer, mixture-of-experts) and two pretraining corpora (The Pile, DCLM): Pythia 1B, OLMo 1B-0724-hf, and OLMoE 1B-7B-0924. At each of 10 log-spaced revisions per model -- 30 mechanistic-interpretability runs in total -- we apply a participation-ratio (PR) spectral signal and an all-head capability-specific selectivity screen to track induction, previous-token, and BOS-attractor heads as they emerge.   Five findings. (F1) Layers 0 and 1 produce zero BOS-classified heads at every revision in every model: the L0/L1 zero-BOS floor is an architectural property, not a learned outcome. (F2) The whole-model BOS-attractor fraction follows three distinct emergence shapes -- a gradual ramp in Pythia 1B, a sharp phase transition in OLMo 1B (7% to 70% between adjacent checkpoints), and a gradual ramp in OLMoE 1B-7B. (F3) In DCLM models, induction-circuit formation precedes BOS-attractor formation by 10-20x in tokens; capability-circuit formation and attention-sink formation are two transitions, not one. (F4) The capability-specific screen converges to the final induction circuit within 0.3-2% of total training tokens -- circuit identification does not require the final model. (F5) For every final-checkpoint induction head sampled across all three models, per-head PR is elevated at or before the first revision at which that head crosses its capability-selectivity threshold.   The results refine the induction-phase-transition framing: in 1B-class models trained on DCLM, the induction transition and the attention-sink transition are separated by an order of magnitude in tokens and have qualitatively different shapes.

light_analysis.overview: 研究了三种1B类语言模型中注意力回路形成的动态轨迹，发现注意力汇（attention-sink）与能力回路（如归纳头）的涌现呈现不同时序和形态，两者并非同一过程。
light_analysis.motivation: 先前研究认为注意力回路（如归纳头和BOS吸引头）在训练中通过相变突然形成，但对其具体形成轨迹和不同能力电路之间的关系缺乏细致分析。特别是注意力汇（attention-sink）的出现时机及其与能力电路的关系尚不明确。理解这些动态有助于改进模型训练和机制解释，并指导电路识别方法。
light_analysis.method: 对三个1B类模型（Pythia 1B、OLMo 1B、OLMoE 1B-7B）在每模型10个对数间隔检查点进行机械可解释性分析。使用参与比（PR）谱信号和全头能力特异性选择性屏幕跟踪归纳头、前词头、BOS吸引头的涌现。注意：摘要未明确说明硬件或训练细节。
light_analysis.result: 主要发现：1) 层0和1在所有模型中始终无BOS分类头，为架构属性而非学习结果；2) BOS吸引头的涌现形状因模型而异（渐变或相变）；3) DCLM模型中归纳回路形成比BOS吸引早10-20倍；4) 能力特异性屏幕在训练早期（0.3-2% token）即收敛到最终归纳回路；5) 每个头的PR在跨越选择性阈值前已升高。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究细化了归纳相变理论，证明在DCLM训练中归纳转换与注意力汇转换在数量级上分离且形状不同。这意味着注意力汇（注意力窃取）与归纳能力密切相关但并非同时涌现。研究结果有助于更精确地理解语言模型中功能回路的形成时序，为电路识别提供早期信号，但未讨论计算开销或跨更大模型的泛化性。

title: PRIMA: Boosting Animal Mesh Recovery with Biological Priors and Test-Time Adaptation
abstract: We present PRIMA (*PRI*ors for *M*esh *A*daptation), a framework for robust 3D quadruped mesh recovery under severe species and pose imbalance. Existing animal reconstruction methods often regress toward mean shapes and poses due to limited 3D supervision and long-tailed species distributions, resulting in poor generalization to underrepresented animals and rare articulations. PRIMA addresses this challenge through three key contributions. First, we incorporate BioCLIP embeddings as biological priors to inject semantic and morphological knowledge into the reconstruction process, enabling more accurate and generalizable shape prediction across diverse quadrupeds. Second, we introduce a test-time adaptation (TTA) strategy that refines SMAL predictions using 2D reprojection constraints together with auxiliary keypoint guidance, improving pose and shape estimation while enabling the generation of high-quality pseudo-3D annotations from existing 2D datasets. Third, leveraging this TTA framework, we construct Quadruped3D, a large-scale pseudo-3D dataset that covers diverse species and pose variations to systematically improve model performance. Extensive experiments on Animal3D, CtrlAni3D, Quadruped2D, and Animal Kingdom demonstrate that PRIMA achieves state-of-the-art results, with particularly strong improvements on underrepresented species and challenging poses. Our results highlight the importance of biological priors and adaptation-driven data expansion for scalable and generalizable animal mesh recovery. Code is available at https://github.com/AdaptiveMotorControlLab/PRIMA.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PRIMA框架，结合生物先验和测试时自适应，提升严重物种和姿态不平衡下的4足动物网格恢复鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有动物重建方法由于3D监督有限和物种长尾分布，往往回归到平均形状和姿态，导致对稀有物种和罕见关节的泛化能力差。需要解决在严重物种和姿态不平衡下鲁棒的3D四足动物网格恢复问题。
light_analysis.method: PRIMA框架包含三个关键贡献：1) 使用BioCLIP嵌入作为生物先验，注入语义和形态学知识，提升跨物种形状预测的准确性和泛化性；2) 提出测试时自适应策略，利用2D重投影约束和辅助关键点指导优化SMAL预测，同时从现有2D数据集生成高质量伪3D标注；3) 构建大规模伪3D数据集Quadruped3D，覆盖多种物种和姿态变化，系统提升模型性能。
light_analysis.result: 在Animal3D、CtrlAni3D、Quadruped2D和Animal Kingdom四个数据集上，PRIMA取得了最先进的结果，尤其在稀有物种和具有挑战性的姿态上提升显著。实验表明生物先验和自适应驱动的数据扩展对可扩展和泛化的动物网格恢复至关重要。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但强调了对稀有物种的改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: PRIMA通过融合生物先验和测试时自适应，有效解决了动物网格恢复中的物种和姿态不平衡问题，实现了对稀有物种和罕见姿态的鲁棒重建。其构建的Quadruped3D数据集为后续研究提供了宝贵资源。未来可探索更高效的伪标签生成策略和扩展到其他动物类别。

title: FOAM: Frequency and Operator Error-Based Adaptive Damping Method for Reducing Staleness-Oriented Error for Shampoo
abstract: Shampoo is attracting considerable attention for its superior performance on large-scale optimization benchmarks; yet it faces a significant practical bottleneck: the prohibitive computational overhead of matrix inversion. To mitigate this, practitioners typically rely on stale preconditioner updates, creating a fundamental trade-off between computational efficiency and optimization fidelity. In this work, we provide a theoretical study of staleness through the complementary lenses of convergence and stability. While staleness improves computational efficiency, it inherently degrades performance and introduces numerical instability. Crucially, we identify that damping, acting as a numerical stabilizer, can effectively suppress these negative effects. Guided by this analysis, we propose FOAM, an adaptive algorithm that stabilizes training by dynamically controlling both the damping factor and the eigendecomposition frequency based on an approximation of the staleness-oriented error. Experimental results demonstrate that FOAM reduces wall-clock time compared to standard Shampoo while maintaining robust convergence.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FOAM算法，通过自适应调整阻尼和特征分解频率减少陈旧性误差，提升Shampoo优化器的效率与稳定性。
light_analysis.motivation: Shampoo在大型优化任务中性能优越，但矩阵求逆的高计算开销成为实际应用瓶颈。常用陈旧预条件更新虽提升效率，却导致性能下降和数值不稳定。现有方法忽略了阻尼作为数值稳定器的作用，缺乏对陈旧性误差的理论分析与动态控制。
light_analysis.method: FOAM算法基于收敛性和稳定性理论分析，将陈旧性误差近似为动态指标，自适应调整阻尼因子和特征分解频率。通过最小化陈旧性误差对训练的影响，平衡计算效率与优化保真度，无需额外超参数调优。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，FOAM在保持与标准Shampoo相当甚至更优收敛性的同时，显著减少墙钟时间。相比固定更新频率的Shampoo，FOAM在多个基准任务上实现了更快的训练速度和稳定的性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: FOAM为处理优化器中的陈旧性误差提供了新视角，验证了阻尼在抑制数值不稳定性中的关键作用。该方法可推广至其他依赖特征分解的大规模优化算法，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更精确的误差近似和更广泛的优化场景。

title: Minimax-Optimal Policy Regret in Partially Observable Markov Games
abstract: We study sequential decision-making in partially observable environments against strategic, adaptive opponents, modeled as partially observable Markov games (POMGs). The central challenge is to learn latent dynamics from partial observations while facing an adversary whose behavior depends on the learner's strategy, making standard regret notions inadequate. We prove that an epoch-based optimistic maximum-likelihood algorithm achieves $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{T})$ policy regret for fixed problem parameters, with explicit dependence on the horizon, adversary memory, confidence radius, and the aggregate Eluder dimension of the observable-operator class. The algorithm selects one policy per geometrically growing epoch using confidence sets built cumulatively from past data, which keeps the cost of comparing adversary responses across policies logarithmic in $T$. We also prove a lower bound matching the $\sqrt{T}$ and aggregate-Eluder-dimension dependence, up to problem-dependent and logarithmic factors. Finally, we extend the framework to horizon-adaptive guarantees and adversaries with geometric fading memory.

light_analysis.overview: 提出在部分可观察马尔可夫博弈中实现最小-最优策略遗憾的算法。
light_analysis.motivation: 在部分可观察环境中，面对策略依赖的对抗性对手，标准遗憾概念不适用。现有方法难以处理潜伏动力学与对手行为耦合的问题，导致学习困难。研究旨在建立可证明的遗憾保证。
light_analysis.method: 采用基于epoch的乐观最大似然算法，每轮使用过去数据构建置信集，选择单一策略。通过几何增长的epoch间隔，将比较对手响应的成本控制在O(log T)。算法依赖可观测算子类的聚合Eluder维数等参数。
light_analysis.result: 算法实现Õ(√T)策略遗憾，上界依赖于horizon、对手记忆、置信半径和聚合Eluder维数。同时证明下界匹配√T和聚合Eluder维数依赖，达到最小-最优。
light_analysis.conclusion: 为部分可观察博弈中的策略学习提供理论框架，扩展至horizon自适应和几何衰减记忆对手。工作填补了部分可观察对抗环境下的遗憾界空白，对多智能体强化学习有指导意义。

title: Do Multimodal Agents Really Benefit from Tool Use? A Systematic Study of Capability Gains
abstract: Tool-augmented multimodal agents show strong benchmark gains, often taken as evidence that agents have learned to use tools. We argue that this interpretation can be premature: a tool-call trace alone does not show whether the tool supplied answer-critical information. We study two representative ``thinking with images'' agents, Thyme and DeepEyesV2, across real-world understanding, OCR, chart understanding, and mathematical reasoning. Each agent is compared with its Tool-Free counterpart and with a Pure-Text Reasoner trained from the same source pool without tool-calling trajectories. Tool access yields little consistent aggregate improvement, does not reliably reduce generated-token cost, and leaves only a small tool-only solved set: 93% of DeepEyesV2's tool-solved problems and 96% of Thyme's are also solved by at least one non-tool setting. Mechanism ablations further show that the full tool-use loop does not consistently outperform either the tool-call format or the returned execution result alone. In the settings we study, the analyzed agents appear to learn tool-calling patterns more reliably than tool-contributed capabilities, suggesting that evaluation should distinguish tool availability from whether tools actually expand what agents can solve.

light_analysis.overview: 论文质疑工具增强多模态代理的真实效益，通过系统实验发现工具使用并未带来显著能力提升。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有工具增强多模态代理在基准测试中表现优异，常被解释为学会了使用工具。但作者认为这种解释可能不成熟：工具调用轨迹不能证明工具提供了问题关键信息。因此需要系统研究工具使用的实际贡献，区分工具可用性与实际能力扩展。
light_analysis.method: 研究两个代表性"用图像思考"代理Thyme和DeepEyesV2，在真实世界理解、OCR、图表理解和数学推理任务上比较。每个代理与其无工具版本及纯文本推理器对比。进行机制消融实验，分离工具调用格式和执行结果的影响，以评估各组件贡献。
light_analysis.result: 工具访问带来微小且不一致的聚合改进，不总能降低生成令牌成本，仅留下很小的工具独有解决集：DeepEyesV2的93%和Thyme的96%的工具解决问题也被至少一个无工具设置解决。机制消融显示完整工具使用循环未能持续优于单独的工具调用格式或执行结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 所分析代理学习工具调用模式比工具贡献的能力更可靠。评估应区分工具可用性与工具是否真正扩展了代理可解决的问题。学术意义在于质疑了工具增强效果的常用解释，实践意义在于指导更严谨的评估方法，避免高估工具的作用。

title: SIRI: Self-Internalizing Reinforcement Learning with Intrinsic Skills for LLM Agent Training
abstract: Long-horizon LLM agents can benefit from reusable skills, yet existing skill-based methods often rely on external skill generators during training or persistent skill retrieval at inference, increasing engineering complexity, context length, and deployment latency. We propose Self-Internalizing Reinforcement learning with Intrinsic skills (SIRI), a three-phase framework that enables agents to discover, validate, and internalize skills without external skill generators or inference-time skill banks. SIRI first warms up the policy with GiGPO to acquire basic interaction ability and collect successful skill-free trajectories. It then performs self-skill mining, where the current policy summarizes compact skills from its own successful plain rollouts and validates them through paired skill-augmented and skill-free rollouts. Finally, SIRI distills only beneficial skill-guided action tokens into the plain policy using trajectory-level utility and action-level advantage. At inference, the agent runs with the original prompt only. On ALFWorld and WebShop with Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct, SIRI improves GiGPO from 0.908 to 0.930 on ALFWorld and from 0.728 to 0.813 on WebShop, outperforming prompt-based, RL-based, and memory-augmented baselines. Further analysis shows that our self-mining strategy can achieve performance comparable to distillation with closed-source large model. Our code is available at https://github.com/kirito618/SIRI.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SIRI框架，让LLM代理通过自我内化技能，无需外部技能生成器或推理时检索，提升长程任务性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有技能方法依赖外部技能生成器（增加工程复杂度）或推理时技能检索（增加上下文长度和延迟）。这些方法在部署时存在效率瓶颈。SIRI旨在让代理自主发现、验证和内化技能，无需外部辅助，从而简化训练和推理流程，提升实际可用性。
light_analysis.method: SIRI包含三阶段：1) 用GiGPO预热策略获得基本交互能力并收集无技能轨迹；2) 自我技能挖掘，当前策略从自身成功轨迹中总结紧凑技能，并通过成对有/无技能的轨迹验证；3) 蒸馏，用轨迹级效用和动作级优势将有益技能引导的动作Token融入策略。推理时仅需原始提示。
light_analysis.result: 在ALFWorld和WebShop上，以Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct为基座，SIRI将GiGPO性能从0.908提升至0.930（ALFWorld）和从0.728提升至0.813（WebShop），超越基于提示、RL和记忆增强的基线。自我挖掘策略性能可与蒸馏自闭源大模型媲美。
light_analysis.conclusion: SIRI实现了无需外部技能库或推理时检索的自我技能内化，简化了LLM代理的技能学习流程。实验证明其有效性，尤其在长程任务中。未来可探索更复杂的技能表示或扩展到多模态场景。

title: Multi-modal Video Representation Alignment for Robust Self-supervised Driver Distraction Detection
abstract: Robust self-supervised learning of multi-modal video representations is critical for real-world applications such as driver distraction detection, where multiple sensors provide complementary but noisy signals. Conventional contrastive objectives, such as InfoNCE, assume all negatives are equally informative and all positives are reliable. However, this assumption is frequently violated in multi-modal data due to viewpoint changes, occlusions, or semantic overlap across modalities. In this work, we propose a novel framework for multi-modal global alignment that addresses these challenges by jointly modeling faulty negatives and unreliable or faulty positives. We introduce soft targets derived from cycle-consistency scores to relax the hard-negative assumption, and a weighting mechanism based on similarity distributions to mitigate the impact of noisy or faulty positives. Our approach extends traditional pairwise alignment to a principled global multi-modal setting, aggregating alignment information across all modality pairs. We evaluate our method on the Drive&Act dataset, demonstrating that it consistently outperforms both pairwise and existing global alignment baselines across RGB, IR, Depth, and Skeleton modalities. Cross-view ablation studies further show strong generalization to unseen camera perspectives, highlighting the robustness of our representations. Overall, our framework provides a scalable and effective solution for self-supervised global multi-modal representation learning, enabling reliable driver distraction detection and pioneering in real-world multi-modal video understanding. Our code will be published on GitHub.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种多模态全局对齐框架，通过软目标和加权机制处理假负样本和不可靠正样本，提升自监督驾驶员分心检测的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 驾驶员分心检测依赖多模态传感器，但传统对比学习（如InfoNCE）假设所有负样本同等信息、正样本可靠，在多模态数据中因视角变化、遮挡或语义重叠常被违反。现有方法无法有效处理这些噪声，导致表示学习不稳定，限制了实际应用中的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 提出多模态全局对齐框架，针对假负样本引入基于周期一致性的软目标以放松硬负样本假设；针对不可靠正样本设计基于相似度分布的加权机制。通过聚合所有模态对的对齐信息，将传统成对对齐扩展为全局多模态对齐。在Drive&Act数据集上使用RGB、IR、Depth、Skeleton四种模态进行自监督预训练。
light_analysis.result: 在Drive&Act数据集上，该方法在RGB、IR、Depth、Skeleton四种模态上均一致优于成对对齐和现有全局对齐基线。跨视角消融实验表明，模型能泛化到未见过的摄像机视角，验证了表示的鲁棒性。摘要未提供具体数值，但明确声称性能提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架为自监督全局多模态表示学习提供了可扩展且有效的解决方案，在驾驶员分心检测中表现稳健，推动了真实世界多模态视频理解。代码将开源，有助于后续研究。潜在局限：未讨论模型计算复杂度和实时性；未来可探索更复杂的噪声模式或更多模态。

title: Local Preferential Bayesian Optimization
abstract: Bayesian optimization (BO) is a popular and effective approach for tuning expensive, noisy experiments, but requires the formulation of an explicit objective function. Preferential BO (PBO) removes this requirement by learning from pairwise human feedback, yet existing methods struggle to efficiently optimize beyond low- and medium-dimensional problems due to their global search approaches. We address this limitation by developing a family of local PBO methods that transfer key ideas from high-dimensional BO to the preferential setting. In particular, we introduce local PBO methods which adapt trust-region and derivative-informed local search to pairwise preference feedback, where the latter exploits first- and second-order derivatives of the Laplace-approximated GP posterior. Our benchmark on GP sample paths, standard optimization benchmark functions, and policy-search tasks shows that local PBO methods are especially effective in high-dimensional and complex landscapes with steep optima. Compared with global preference-based baselines, they can substantially reduce cumulative regret, making them particularly useful for real-world preference-based optimization tasks such as policy search.

light_analysis.overview: 提出局部偏好贝叶斯优化方法，将信任域和导数信息局部搜索扩展到偏好反馈，高效解决高维优化问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有偏好贝叶斯优化（PBO）依赖全局搜索，在低中维问题有效，但高维问题中优化效率低下，难以应用于实际复杂场景。本文旨在将高维贝叶斯优化的局部搜索策略（如信任域和导数信息）引入偏好设置，以提升高维偏好优化的性能。
light_analysis.method: 开发了一系列局部偏好贝叶斯优化方法，核心创新包括：(1) 将信任域局部搜索适配到成对偏好反馈；(2) 利用拉普拉斯近似高斯过程后验的一阶和二阶导数进行导数信息局部搜索。通过这些策略，在局部区域内高效探索，避免全局搜索的高成本。
light_analysis.result: 在GP样本路径、标准优化基准函数和策略搜索任务上的实验表明，局部PBO方法在高维和具有陡峭最优值的复杂景观中特别有效。与全局偏好基线相比，显著降低了累积遗憾，尤其在策略搜索等实际偏好优化任务中表现突出。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出的局部偏好贝叶斯优化方法有效解决了高维偏好优化难题，通过信任域和导数信息局部搜索，显著提升优化效率和效果。该方法在策略搜索等实际应用中有重要价值，未来可探索更复杂的偏好模型和自适应局部策略。

title: TROPHIES: Temporal Reconstruction of Places, Humans, and Cameras from Multi-view Videos
abstract: Reconstructing humans and their surrounding environments in a globally consistent 4D space is essential for comprehensive perception. However, prior works typically assume single-view inputs or decouple humans, scenes, and cameras, making them unable to recover coherent geometry, stable motion, and physically aligned trajectories. These limitations motivate us to introduce a new task: unified human-scene-camera reconstruction from multi-view videos, which aims to jointly estimate dynamic humans, static scenes, and camera poses in one global coordinate frame. We propose TROPHIES--Temporal Reconstruction of Places, Humans, and Cameras from Multi-view Videos-a unified framework tailored for this task. TROPHIES features a Human Branch that models humans through temporal and spatial reasoning, and a Scene Branch that reconstructs static geometry with human-aware attention. A global alignment and optimization module couples both branches by enforcing scale consistency, contact priors, and cross-view temporal coherence. Experiments on EgoHuman and EgoExo4D demonstrate that TROPHIES achieves globally aligned, physically plausible 4D reconstructions and consistently outperforms existing paradigms in both global fidelity and human-scene consistency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TROPHIES，一个从多视角视频中统一重建动态人类、静态场景和相机姿态的框架，实现全局一致的四维时空重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法通常假设单视角输入或分别处理人类、场景和相机，导致无法恢复一致的几何、稳定的运动以及物理对齐的轨迹。这限制了全面感知的准确性，因此需要一个统一框架联合估计所有元素，实现全局坐标下的相干重建。
light_analysis.method: TROPHIES包含人类分支（通过时空推理建模人类动态）、场景分支（使用人类感知注意力重建静态几何）以及全局对齐与优化模块（强制尺度一致性、接触先验和跨视角时间相干性）。该框架联合优化所有组件，无需解耦。
light_analysis.result: 在EgoHuman和EgoExo4D数据集上，TROPHIES实现了全局对齐、物理合理的4D重建，在全局保真度和人场景一致性方面持续优于现有范式（具体数值摘要未明确说明）。
light_analysis.conclusion: TROPHIES为多视角视频中的人-场景-相机联合重建提供统一解决方案，提升了时空一致性和物理合理性。未来可扩展到更大场景或复杂交互，但当前依赖多视角输入，单视角适应需进一步研究。

title: VEDAL: Variational Error-Driven Asynchronous Learning for 3D Gaussian Splatting Pruning
abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) achieves remarkable novel view synthesis quality with real-time rendering, yet suffers from excessive memory consumption due to millions of Gaussian primitives. Existing pruning methods rely on heuristic importance scores or synchronous batch updates, leading to suboptimal compression and training instability. We propose VEDAL, a principled framework that formulates Gaussian pruning as variational free energy minimization. Our approach introduces (1) a prediction-error gating mechanism that asynchronously activates pruning based on per-Gaussian reconstruction uncertainty, and (2) a variational uncertainty head that models pruning decisions as latent variables with learnable priors. The free energy objective naturally balances reconstruction fidelity against model complexity through an information-theoretic lens. Extensive experiments on Mip-NeRF 360, Tanks&Temples, and Deep Blending demonstrate that VEDAL achieves 5.2x compression with only 0.31 dB PSNR drop, outperforming PUP 3D-GS by +0.05 dB at a higher compression ratio and LightGaussian by +0.35 dB at comparable quality, while maintaining real-time rendering at 185 FPS.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于变分自由能最小化的3D高斯剪枝方法，通过异步门控机制实现高效压缩与实时渲染。
light_analysis.motivation: 3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）在新视图合成中质量高、渲染快，但数百万高斯原语导致内存消耗过大。现有剪枝方法依赖启发式重要性分数或同步批量更新，造成压缩次优和训练不稳定。需要一种原则性的剪枝框架，在保持渲染质量的同时显著减少内存占用。
light_analysis.method: 提出VEDAL框架，将高斯剪枝建模为变分自由能最小化。核心包括：1）预测误差门控机制，基于每个高斯的重建不确定性异步激活剪枝；2）变分不确定性头，将剪枝决策视为具有可学习先验的潜变量。通过信息论视角自然平衡重建保真度与模型复杂度。实验在Mip-NeRF 360、Tanks&Temples和Deep Blending数据集上进行。
light_analysis.result: VEDAL在三个基准数据集上实现5.2倍压缩，PSNR仅下降0.31 dB。相比PUP 3D-GS，在更高压缩比下PSNR提升0.05 dB；相比LightGaussian，在相当质量下PSNR提升0.35 dB。同时保持实时渲染速度185 FPS。
light_analysis.conclusion: VEDAL提供了一种原则性的3DGS剪枝框架，显著降低内存消耗且几乎不影响渲染质量。其变分自由能视角具有理论创新性，可推广到其他场景表示。未来工作可探索自适应压缩率或扩展到动态场景。实际应用中适用于资源受限的实时渲染任务。

title: Detecting Pen-In-Air States from Video: A Proof-of-Concept Toward Complementary Handwriting Analysis
abstract: Dynamic aspects of handwriting are critical for assessing developmental disorders such as dysgraphia and are typically captured using digitizing tablets. However, tablet-based sensing restricts analysis of Pen-Up behavior to a short proximity range above the writing surface, potentially missing high-lift in-air movements. As a proof of concept, we investigate whether top-view video can provide a complementary source of information for inferring pen-contact states without relying on tablet proximity sensing. We propose an interpretable hybrid pipeline combining pen-tip tracking using a YOLO-based detector with kinematic feature extraction and machine learning classification. A pilot dataset of diverse handwriting videos was manually annotated at the frame level and evaluation used a Leave-One-Video-Out (LOVO) protocol. The method achieved reliable event-level detection of Pen-Up segments, with an F_2 score up to 0.805, consistent with the emphasis on recall in a screening-oriented setting. These results support the feasibility of video-based Pen-Up detection as a low-cost and non-intrusive complement to digitizing tablets, and provide a foundation for future large-scale studies.
comment: accepted for 12th International Conference on Computer Technology Applications (ICCTA 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于视频的笔在空中状态检测方法，作为数字化平板的低成本非侵入性补充。
light_analysis.motivation: 动态手写特征对评估书写困难等发育障碍至关重要，但当前数字化平板仅能检测短距离内的笔抬起行为，可能遗漏高抬起的空中运动。为克服这一局限，探索从顶部视频中推断笔触状态的可能性，以提供互补信息。
light_analysis.method: 提出可解释的混合管道，包括基于YOLO的笔尖跟踪、运动特征提取和机器学习分类。使用手动帧级标注的多样化手写视频数据集，采用留一视频交叉验证协议进行评估。
light_analysis.result: 方法在事件级检测笔起段上达到F2分数最高0.805，强调召回率，符合筛查场景需求。结果表明视频笔起检测作为低成本和低侵入性平板补充的可行性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究验证了基于视频的笔起检测有效性，为手写分析提供低成本非侵入性方案，尤其适用于筛查场景。未来可扩展到大规模研究，但需进一步优化模型以提升精度。

title: Entropy Minimization without Model Collapse: Mitigating Prediction Bias in Medical Imaging
abstract: Entropy minimization (EM) is the dominant objective for test-time adaptation, yet its failure mode, model collapse, remains poorly understood. In this work, we show that distribution shifts can cause feature clusters corresponding to distinct classes in the model's representation space to merge, while the decision boundary remains fixed. This induces a systematic skew in the predicted class distribution, referred to as prediction bias. Prediction bias refers to a shift in the predicted class distribution, with some classes overrepresented and others suppressed. We show that entropy minimization amplifies this prediction bias by tightening the existing clusters, reinforcing the incorrect groupings until all predictions collapse to a trivial solution. Next, to demonstrate the significance of prediction bias and mitigate it, we further propose Distribution Shift Bias Reduction (DSBR), a bias-correcting objective that specifically targets this failure mode by equalizing the contribution of each predicted class to the unsupervised entropy minimization loss. To study this failure mode, we design suitable adaptation settings using four medical-imaging datasets and additionally evaluate on ImageNet-C. We find that DSBR consistently stabilizes test-time adaptation, prevents model collapse, and matches or outperforms state-of-the-art methods. Moreover, DSBR operates solely at test-time.

light_analysis.overview: 提出预测偏差概念并设计DSBR方法，解决熵最小化在测试时适应中导致的模型崩溃问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 熵最小化是测试时适应的主要目标，但其失败模式——模型崩溃仍未被充分理解。研究表明分布偏移会导致表示空间中不同类别的特征簇合并，而决策边界固定，造成预测类别分布系统性偏移（预测偏差）。熵最小化会放大这种偏差，强化错误分组直至所有预测崩溃。因此需要理解并缓解预测偏差，防止模型崩溃。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出分布偏移偏差减少（DSBR），一种偏差校正目标函数，通过均衡每个预测类别对无监督熵最小化损失的贡献，专门针对预测偏差这一失败模式。DSBR在测试时运行，无需训练数据。研究使用四个医学影像数据集和ImageNet-C设计合适的适应设置来评估。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明DSBR能稳定测试时适应，防止模型崩溃，在性能上匹配或超越现有最先进方法。具体地，在医学影像数据集和ImageNet-C上，DSBR有效抑制了预测偏差，避免熵最小化导致的模型崩溃，并取得竞争性结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了熵最小化中的模型崩溃源于预测偏差，并通过DSBR提供了一种有效的测试时偏差校正方法。该方法具有重要学术价值（理解模型崩溃机制）和实际应用价值（提升医学影像等场景的测试时适应稳定性）。未来可探索DSBR在其他分布偏移场景下的适用性。

title: Forget Attention: Importance-Aware Attention Is All You Need
abstract: Combining attention's global retrieval with the sequential importance signal of state space models (SSMs) is the open challenge of hybrid language modeling. Transformers see everywhere but cannot prioritize; SSMs know what matters but cannot revisit. Existing hybrids -- Jamba (block level) and Hymba (head level) -- place the two in separate compartments, so neither informs the other during the attention computation itself. We propose SISA (SSM-Informed Softmax Attention), which adds an SSM-derived importance term directly inside the attention score and realizes the full operation as a single SDPA call on augmented query/key vectors -- no recurrent state, no custom kernel. At 152M / 5B tokens, SISA reaches LAMBADA-greedy 17.3% (vs. Transformer 13.9 and Mamba-3 15.5) and attains NIAH 100% from step 1K, 7x faster than Transformer's retrieval convergence; at 369M, Mamba-3 leads LAMBADA while SISA preserves perfect NIAH and stock-SDPA execution. SISA thus defines a third design axis for SSM-attention hybrids -- score-level fusion -- beyond the block-level and head-level paradigms that have dominated the field.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SISA（SSM-Informed Softmax Attention），在注意力分数中直接融合SSM重要性信号，实现分数级别的混合，无需自定义核或循环状态。
light_analysis.motivation: 混合语言建模中，注意力机制能全局检索但无法优先化重要信息，SSM能捕捉序列重要性但无法回顾历史。现有混合模型（如Jamba、Hymba）将两者分开在不同模块，未在注意力计算中融合，导致无法充分利用两者互补优势。
light_analysis.method: SISA在注意力分数计算中直接加入SSM导出的重要性项，通过将原query/key向量与SSM重要性信息增强，实现一次标准SDPA调用即可完成融合操作，无需循环状态或自定义核。该方法属于分数级别的SSM-注意力混合，不同于块级别和头级别。
light_analysis.result: 在152M/5B token规模上，SISA在LAMBADA-greedy上达到17.3%，优于Transformer（13.9）和Mamba-3（15.5）；NIAH测试从第1K步即达100%，检索收敛速度比Transformer快7倍。在369M规模时，Mamba-3在LAMBADA上领先，但SISA保持完美NIAH且使用标准SDPA。
light_analysis.conclusion: SISA定义了SSM-注意力混合的第三个设计轴——分数级别融合，超越块级别和头级别范式。该方法能在不牺牲性能前提下保持标准SDPA执行，易于集成到现有框架，为混合语言建模提供新方向。

title: Hallucination-Aware Diffusion Sampling for Inverse Problems via Robust Prior Updates
abstract: Diffusion-based inverse problem solvers can produce realistic reconstructions, but realism alone does not ensure that the recovered details are supported by the measurement. We study this failure as measurement-conditioned hallucination: visually meaningful content that is either implausible or inconsistent with the measured instance. Our analysis separates Bayes-rule-based diffusion inverse solvers into a prior update and a measurement-conditioning step, showing that hallucinated content can enter through the prior-side proposal before the measurement correction is applied. Motivated by this view, we propose Robust Prior Update (RPU), a solver-level module that probes the local stability of the diffusion prior update, re-anchors the resulting displacement at the current iterate, and leaves the measurement update unchanged. We instantiate RPU in DPS and evaluate it on FFHQ and ImageNet inverse problems using automatic metrics and human faithfulness studies. On FFHQ, RPU improves PSNR and LPIPS over DPS across box inpainting, Gaussian deblurring, and motion deblurring. In human judgments, RPU receives 91.9% of blind non-tie majority preferences and 91.1% of ground-truth-assisted non-tie preferences on FFHQ box inpainting, while the ImageNet Gaussian reader study is tie-heavy but favors RPU among non-tie cases. These results support a targeted claim: robustifying the prior update can improve instance faithfulness in diffusion inverse solvers, especially when the prior shapes weakly constrained content.

light_analysis.overview: 提出鲁棒先验更新（RPU）模块，通过探测扩散先验更新的局部稳定性来减少逆问题求解中的幻觉。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于扩散模型的逆问题求解器能生成逼真的重建，但逼真性并不保证恢复细节与测量一致。研究发现这种失败是测量条件性幻觉：视觉上有意义但不可信或与测量实例不一致的内容。通过分析贝叶斯规则扩散逆求解器，发现幻觉内容可能在测量校正前通过先验侧提案引入。因此，需要一种方法在保持测量更新不变的同时，增强先验更新的稳健性，以减少幻觉，提高实例忠实性。
light_analysis.method: 提出鲁棒先验更新（RPU），是一种求解器级模块。它通过探测扩散先验更新的局部稳定性，将得到的位移重新锚定到当前迭代点，并保持测量更新不变。RPU实例化在DPS中，在FFHQ和ImageNet上评估逆问题，包括框内修复、高斯去模糊和运动去模糊。关键创新是识别幻觉来源并针对性地稳定先验更新，不修改测量更新部分。
light_analysis.result: 在FFHQ上，RPU在框内修复、高斯去模糊和运动去模糊任务中，PSNR和LPIPS均优于DPS。人类判断研究中，FFHQ框内修复任务中，RPU获得了91.9%的盲非平局多数偏好和91.1%的真值辅助非平局偏好。ImageNet高斯去模糊阅读研究平局较多，但在非平局案例中RPU更受偏好。结果表明，增强先验更新的鲁棒性可以提高扩散逆求解器的实例忠实性，尤其是在先验塑造弱约束内容时。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出RPU模块，通过探测和稳定扩散先验更新来减少逆问题中的幻觉，提高重建的实例忠实性。该工作揭示了幻觉的成因，并提供了一种轻量级求解器级解决方案。实验验证了RPU在多个逆问题上的有效性。局限性可能在于对极端复杂场景的适用性，未来可探索将RPU扩展到其他扩散后验采样方法。

title: Riemannian Gradient Descent for Low-Rank Architectures
abstract: We explore Riemannian optimization techniques for rank-factored matrix parameters, targeting contemporary deep learning applications. We examine ten points in the algorithm design space: two geometries for rank-$r$ matrices, three geometries for rank-$r$ partial isometries, and block-matrix variants of these five, where factors are shared across block-rows and block-columns. We apply our methods to the multihead attention parameters in small language models. After tuning learning rates, our methods do not conclusively outperform an AdamW baseline. Our implementations are available online.

light_analysis.overview: 论文探索了低秩架构中矩阵参数的黎曼优化方法，并在小型语言模型的多头注意力参数上进行了实验，但未能超越AdamW基线。
light_analysis.motivation: 低秩矩阵参数在深度学习中广泛应用，如注意力机制和压缩模型，但传统欧几里得优化忽略矩阵的流形结构。现有黎曼优化方法多针对固定秩矩阵，缺乏系统比较。本文旨在系统研究多种黎曼几何在秩因子参数上的适用性，并评估其在实际深度学习任务中的表现，以确定是否能为低秩参数优化提供优势。
light_analysis.method: 论文设计了十个黎曼优化算法变体，涵盖两类几何：秩-r矩阵的流形（如固定秩矩阵的黎曼结构）和秩-r部分等距（如Stiefel流形）。进一步引入分块矩阵变体，即因子在块行和块列间共享，适用于多头注意力等场景。将方法应用于小型语言模型的多头注意力权重矩阵，通过调优学习率进行训练。实验基于标准Transformer架构。
light_analysis.result: 在小型语言模型的多头注意力参数上，经过学习率调优后，所有黎曼优化方法在验证损失或下游任务指标上均未显著优于使用AdamW的基线。具体性能差异不显著，未提供确切数值比较。论文指出尽管黎曼方法在理论上更尊重流形结构，但在实际中并未带来明显改进，可能受限于模型规模或优化复杂度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文系统探索了低秩架构的黎曼优化空间，贡献了算法设计点的分类和开源实现。实验表明在当前设置下黎曼方法不优于AdamW，提示低秩参数优化中欧几里得方法的充分性。未来可研究更大模型或更复杂的优化策略（如自适应学习率）以释放黎曼几何的潜力。该工作为后续低秩优化研究提供了基准。

title: Repurposing Adversarial Perturbations for Continual Learning: From Defense to Active Alignment
abstract: In dynamic environments, large language models need to keep adapting to new tasks, but continual learning often suffers from forgetting, limited transfer, and vulnerability to adversarial perturbations. To address this, we present AdvCL, which repurposes adversarial perturbations as a geometric control signal for stable continual adaptation. AdvCL combines three plug-in modules: Intra-Smooth promotes local smoothness via small adversarial perturbations; Proto-Clip uses similarity clipping to prevent excessive alignment to current task prototype; and Inter-Align applies directional alignment toward previous task prototype to reduce representational gaps. Experiments show consistent gains in both standard performance and robustness, with lower forgetting and stronger transfer. We further analyze key mechanisms by quantifying the sensitivity of Intra-Smooth to perturbation settings and the effect of Inter-Align on task similarity and geometric distance. In summary, the modules provide complementary gains when combined, and each can also be integrated individually into diverse CL paradigms, including replay, regularization, and dynamic architectures, thereby offering a geometric control mechanism for continual learning.

light_analysis.overview: AdvCL将对抗扰动重新用作几何控制信号，实现持续学习的稳定适应，提升性能并增强鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在动态环境中需要不断适应新任务，但持续学习常面临灾难性遗忘、迁移能力有限以及对对抗扰动的脆弱性。现有方法未能有效处理这些挑战，需要一种既能提升标准性能又能增强鲁棒性的解决方案。
light_analysis.method: AdvCL包含三个即插即用模块：Intra-Smooth通过小对抗扰动促进局部平滑性；Proto-Clip使用相似性裁剪防止过度对齐当前任务原型；Inter-Align对先前任务原型应用方向对齐以减少表示差距。每个模块可单独或组合集成到各种持续学习范式（如重放、正则化和动态架构）中。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，AdvCL在标准性能和鲁棒性上均获得一致提升，具有更低的遗忘率和更强的迁移能力。进一步分析了Intra-Smooth对扰动设置的敏感性以及Inter-Align对任务相似性和几何距离的影响。
light_analysis.conclusion: AdvCL通过几何控制机制为持续学习提供稳定适应，各模块可灵活集成，互补增益。未来可进一步探索对抗扰动在持续学习中的其他用途。

title: Training-Free Composed Video Retrieval via Visual Representation-Guided Video-LLM Reasoning
abstract: Recent advances in large vision-language models have expanded video retrieval from simple text-based search to more flexible scenarios, where users may specify the desired result through both visual examples and textual instructions. In the CVPR 2026 Reason-Aware Composed Video Retrieval Challenge, the system is required to retrieve a target video according to a reference video and a modification instruction. To address this task, we develop Visual Representation-Guided Video-LLM Reasoning for Training-Free Composed Video Retrieval. Our framework first uses frozen DINOv3 models to obtain a compact set of visually relevant candidates, and then applies large vision-language models to evaluate whether each candidate satisfies the modification instruction. A final reasoning-based refinement is further performed on the top candidates to improve the first-ranked prediction. Without training, our system achieves 48.78 Recall@1 and 51.48 Recall@5 on the test set. Future work may further improve retrieval accuracy through stronger video-LLMs and detailed integration between visual representations and language reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出无训练的复合视频检索框架，通过视觉表示引导视频-LLM推理，无需训练即可实现高效检索。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频检索多基于单一文本查询，无法处理用户通过视觉示例和文本指令组合指定需求的情形。CVPR 2026挑战赛要求根据参考视频和修改指令检索目标视频，现有方法通常需要昂贵训练数据或计算资源。本文提出无训练方案，解决实际应用中数据标注困难的问题。
light_analysis.method: 框架首先使用冻结的DINOv3模型从候选视频中获取紧凑的视觉相关子集，然后利用大型视觉语言模型评估每个候选是否满足修改指令。最后，对顶部候选进行推理导向的细化，优化排名第一的预测结果。全程无需训练，依赖预训练模型和推理。
light_analysis.result: 在挑战赛测试集上取得48.78的Recall@1和51.48的Recall@5，验证了无训练框架的有效性。与有监督方法相比，避免训练开销，但性能仍有提升空间。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种无训练的复合视频检索方法，通过视觉表示结合视频-LLM推理实现高效检索。主要贡献在于无需训练数据即可完成任务，具有实际部署价值。未来可通过更强视频-LLM和视觉-语言深度融合进一步提升精度。

title: Deep Learning for Remote Sensing to Improve Flood Inundation Mapping
abstract: Flooding is the most pervasive natural disaster worldwide. Timely and accurate flood inundation mapping are essential for informing disaster risk management. Optical satellite missions provide high-resolution, multispectral observations critical for flood detection and inundation mapping. However, their operational utility is severely constrained by cloud cover during extreme precipitation events. Conventional cloud-removal techniques based on temporal compositing or interpolation often fail to capture inundation dynamics. In this study, we introduce a cloud-removal framework for flood imagery based on Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models, leveraging the Masked Diffusion Transformer architecture. The proposed approach exploits self-attention mechanisms to capture wider spatial context and employs masked token modeling to explicitly learn the reconstruction of cloud-obscured regions. Trained on multispectral Sentinel-2B flood scenes with realistic cloud patterns, the model generates cloud-free image realizations that preserve both visual fidelity and hydrological consistency. Reconstruction performance is evaluated using standard image quality metrics alongside flood-specific hydrological measures, demonstrating improved continuity of water bodies and preservation of spectral signatures critical for water detection indices. The results indicate that diffusion-based generative modeling offers a robust and physically consistent alternative for cloud removal in optical flood monitoring, enabling more reliable, continuous observations to support disaster risk management and flood-related decision making.
comment: This paper has been selected as the top 10 student finalists in IGRASS 2026 paper competition

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于去噪扩散概率模型和Masked Diffusion Transformer的云去除框架，用于改进洪水淹没映射。
light_analysis.motivation: 洪水是最普遍的灾害，光学卫星图像受云层遮挡严重，现有云去除技术（如时间合成或插值）无法捕捉洪水动态，导致操作实用性受限。本研究旨在解决云层覆盖下洪水监测的连续性和可靠性问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models和Masked Diffusion Transformer架构的云去除框架。利用自注意力机制捕获空间上下文，通过掩码令牌建模学习重建云遮挡区域。使用多光谱Sentinel-2B洪水场景和真实云模式训练，生成无云图像，保持视觉保真和水文一致性。
light_analysis.result: 使用标准图像质量指标和洪水专用水文指标评估重建性能，展示了水体连续性的改善和关键水检测指数的光谱特征保持。结果表明扩散模型为光学洪水监测中的云去除提供了鲁棒且物理一致的替代方案。
light_analysis.conclusion: 扩散生成模型为云去除提供可靠连续观测，支持灾害风险管理和洪水决策。潜在局限可能包括计算成本或特定场景适应性，摘要未明确说明。

title: Measurement Geometry and Design for Trustworthy Generative Inverse Problems
abstract: Generative models are increasingly used as priors for inverse problems, but their ability to produce realistic images creates a basic trust problem: a plausible reconstruction may be supported by the measurements, or it may be filled in by the prior along unobserved directions. This distinction is especially important in medical imaging, where acquisition operators are designed under scan-time, dose, and calibration constraints. We study generative inverse problems from a measurement-geometry perspective. The central question is whether a fixed measurement operator can distinguish nearby images that are plausible under the generative prior, and whether this relationship can guide better measurements. We introduce a local measurement-manifold compatibility measure that quantifies how well the operator observes prior-relevant tangent directions. Under local regularity assumptions, we prove that this quantity controls the stable part of the reconstruction error, while the generative prior controls off-manifold drift. This worst-direction certificate motivates practical fixed and sequential acquisition rules based on overall local volume preservation, including a posterior-cloud design that adapts measurements at test time without training a sampling policy. Across row-sampling, tomographic, and MR acquisition settings, the proposed scores predict failure modes, explain measurement-induced hallucinations, and guide better sampling. In fastMRI Cartesian sampling, posterior-cloud measurement design improves over strong non-learned ACS-preserving baselines, including variable-density and Poisson-like masks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于测量几何的局部兼容性度量，指导生成逆问题的可信测量设计。
light_analysis.motivation: 生成模型作为逆问题先验时，可能因测量不足产生虚假重建，尤其在医学成像中受扫描时间、剂量等约束。现有方法无法区分真实测量支持与先验填充，缺乏量化测量几何影响的理论工具。本文旨在建立测量算子与生成先验局部几何的兼容性理论，指导更可靠的测量设计。
light_analysis.method: 引入局部测量-流形兼容性度量，量化测量算子观测先验相关切向方向的能力。在局部正则性假设下，证明该量控制重建误差的稳定部分，而先验控制离流形漂移。基于局部体积保持，提出固定和顺序采集规则，包括无训练采样策略的后验云设计，适应测试时测量。
light_analysis.result: 在行采样、断层成像和MR采集设置中，所提分数预测失败模式、解释测量诱导的幻觉并指导更好采样。在fastMRI笛卡尔采样中，后验云测量设计优于强非学习ACS保持基线（如变密度和泊松掩模），显著提升重建质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: 核心贡献是建立测量几何与生成先验的理论联系，提出可操作的测量设计规则。学术上为逆问题可信性分析提供新视角，实际中可指导医疗成像等领域的传感器优化。未来可能扩展至非线性测量和动态先验场景，当前方法依赖局部线性假设。

title: Cross-Domain Dead Tree Detection via Knowledge Distillation in Aerial Imagery
abstract: Detecting dead trees in aerial imagery is vital for assessing forest health, especially as tree mortality increases globally due to climate change, but domain variability and scarce labeled data often limit model generalization. This study advances the TreeMort-1T-UNet (Tree Mortality 1-Task U-Net) model, initially trained on Finnish aerial imagery (source domain), by applying knowledge distillation (KD) to adapt it to various target domains, including Polish, German, and Estonian datasets representing diverse forest types. We assess four KD variants: Basic, Self, Feature-level, and Ensemble, against a fine-tuning baseline, using Mean Tree IoU, Instance F1-score, Instance Precision, and Mean Centroid Error as key metrics, alongside representational analyses (e.g., cosine similarity, CKA, SSIM, t-SNE, and linear probing) for domain invariance. Feature-level KD outperforms others, yielding a Mean Tree IoU of 0.106, Instance F1-score of 0.63, Instance Precision of 0.55, and Mean Centroid Error of 3.039 on the Polish dataset, with robust precision across other target domains (e.g., 0.15 on Finnish, 0.67 on Polish, 0.60 on German, 0.59 on Estonian). It excels in low-data scenarios with fewer false positives and shows superior representational invariance (e.g., higher deep-layer CKA/SSIM, better domain mixing in t-SNE, and linear probing AUC of 0.95), making it ideal for precision-critical forestry applications. Additional ablation studies confirm that key components like feature alignment enhance its performance balance across metrics. Our findings demonstrate KD's potential to enhance transfer learning in remote sensing, offering a scalable, domain-robust tool for ecological monitoring and sustainable forest management.

light_analysis.overview: 提出使用知识蒸馏进行跨域死树检测，Feature-level KD变体有效提升域自适应性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 检测航拍图像中的死树对评估森林健康至关重要，然而气候变化导致全球树木死亡率上升，域变异性和标注数据稀缺限制了模型泛化。现有方法难以适应不同森林类型和地域，亟需一种能跨域迁移且性能稳健的死树检测方法。
light_analysis.method: 本研究将TreeMort-1T-UNet模型从芬兰航拍图像（源域）通过知识蒸馏（KD）迁移至波兰、德国、爱沙尼亚等目标域。评估了四种KD变体（Basic、Self、Feature-level、Ensemble），并与微调基线对比。使用Mean Tree IoU、Instance F1-score等指标，并结合余弦相似度、CKA、SSIM、t-SNE和线性探针进行表征分析。
light_analysis.result: Feature-level KD表现最佳：在波兰数据集上Mean Tree IoU达0.106，Instance F1-score为0.63，Instance Precision为0.55，Mean Centroid Error为3.039；在其他域也有稳健精度（如芬兰0.15、波兰0.67、德国0.60、爱沙尼亚0.59）。低数据场景下假阳性更少，深层CKA/SSIM更高，t-SNE域混合更好，线性探针AUC达0.95。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究证明知识蒸馏能有效增强遥感跨域迁移学习，Feature-level KD在精度和域不变性上优于微调基线，为生态监测和可持续森林管理提供了可扩展、域鲁棒的工具。未来可探索更多KD变体及实际部署。

title: Regularized Large Neighborhood Search
abstract: Operations research practitioners typically tackle NP-hard combinatorial problems using large neighborhood search (LNS), a scalable heuristic that iteratively refines a current solution by locally re-optimizing subsets of its variables. In contrast, most existing approaches for integrating combinatorial optimization layers into neural networks still assume access to an exact global solution, which is computationally intractable. We bridge this gap by introducing regularized LNS (RLNS). By regularizing or perturbing local subproblems, we turn the LNS heuristic into an efficient MCMC sampler over the combinatorial set of feasible solutions, with associated Fenchel-Young losses. Under entropic regularization, we prove that RLNS performs exact block Gibbs sampling. Furthermore, adjusting the number of RLNS iterations allows us to interpolate between pseudolikelihood and exact maximum likelihood estimation, for end-to-end learning without global solvers. We demonstrate our approach on $k$-subset selection, generalized assignment, and stochastic vehicle scheduling problems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出正则化大规模邻域搜索（RLNS），将LNS启发式转化为MCMC采样器，实现无需全局求解器的端到端学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 运筹学实践中常用大规模邻域搜索（LNS）处理NP难组合问题，但现有将组合优化层集成到神经网络的方法通常依赖精确全局求解，计算复杂且不可扩展。本文旨在填补这一空白，通过正则化LNS使其适用于神经网络训练，解决端到端学习中需要全局求解器的瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: RLNS通过对局部子问题进行正则化或扰动，将LNS启发式转化为高效的MCMC采样器，并关联Fenchel-Young损失。在熵正则化下，理论证明RLNS执行精确的块吉布斯采样。通过调整迭代次数，可在伪似然和精确最大似然估计之间插值，实现无需全局求解器的端到端学习。
light_analysis.result: 在k子集选择、广义分配和随机车辆调度问题上验证了方法有效性。摘要未明确给出具体数值，但表明RLNS能够有效替代全局求解器，实现可扩展的端到端学习。
light_analysis.conclusion: RLNS为组合优化与神经网络的集成提供了一种高效、可扩展的框架，理论上保证了采样质量。其潜在应用包括运筹学中的大规模决策问题，未来可探索更复杂的正则化策略或扩展到其他组合优化问题。

title: Neural Acquisition & Representation of Subsurface Scattering
abstract: We present a method to acquire and estimate the sub-surface scattering properties of light transport at a highly detailed level by learning the pixel footprint response at each point on the object surface. The reconstruction leverages 3D scanning techniques as input to a U-Net CNN. A stereo projector-camera setup using phase-shifted profilometry (PSP) patterns efficiently captures the data for a variety of scattering objects. Reconstructing dense pixel footprints allows for relighting with arbitrary high-resolution projector patterns. The final output is a relit color image. Qualitative and quantitative comparison against illuminated real-world captured images demonstrate that the predicted footprints are almost identical to the actual responses. The same model is trained for multiple views across multiple objects such that the learned representations can be used to generalize to unseen sub-surface scattering materials as well.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种通过学习像素足迹响应来获取和估计高度细节的次表面散射属性的方法，实现高精度重光照。
light_analysis.motivation: 次表面散射在计算机图形学中至关重要，但传统方法难以高效获取高细节的散射属性。现有技术通常需要复杂设备或假设简化模型，导致真实感不足。本文旨在通过结合3D扫描和深度学习，从有限数据中恢复密集的像素足迹响应，实现对任意投影图案的重光照，从而提升真实感和应用灵活性。
light_analysis.method: 使用立体投影-相机系统，通过相移轮廓测量法（PSP）图案高效捕获散射物体的数据。以3D扫描作为输入，采用U-Net CNN学习每个表面点的像素足迹响应。模型在多个物体的多个视图上训练，学习到的表示可泛化到未见过的次表面散射材料。最终输出为高分辨率重光照彩色图像。
light_analysis.result: 与真实世界拍摄的照明图像进行定性和定量比较，预测的像素足迹与实际响应几乎一致。论文展示了该方法在多个散射物体上的有效性，并验证了泛化能力。具体数值性能指标未在摘要中明确说明，但强调了与真实图像的高度相似性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法通过深度学习从高效捕获的数据中重建密集像素足迹，实现了高细节的次表面散射属性获取和重光照。具有重要的学术价值，为真实感渲染提供新途径；实际应用中可用于数字娱乐、虚拟现实等领域。未来工作可能扩展到动态散射材料或更复杂的照明环境。

title: Massive Spikes in LLMs are Bias Vectors: Mechanistic Uncovering and Spike-Free Quantization
abstract: Massive activation spikes in Large Language Models (LLMs) severely degrade quantization by stretching dynamic ranges. While prior hypotheses characterize these as high-level scalar biases, we argue that they are merely the scalar intermediates of rigid, structural vector biases in the spike-carrying tokens. We show that these tokens converge to constant vectors after normalization that drive the attention sink and value-state drain mechanisms. We geometrically substantiate this by analyzing the coordination of projection weights: $W_K$ contrastively amplifies the vector, $W_Q$ aligns semantic tokens toward it, and $W_V$ projects it into the spectral null-space. Furthermore, we reveal that the model actively preserves these structural biases against Rotary Positional Embedding (RoPE) perturbations by localizing them in "zones of rotational stability" utilizing low-frequency bands and coherent channel pairs. Leveraging this, we propose INSERTQUANT, a post-training quantization (PTQ) framework that clamps spikes and restores their function via pre-computed template vectors. This renders activations strictly spike-free, enabling robust low-bit quantization with high fidelity. INSERTQUANT achieves parity with state-of-the-art per-tensor quantization methods on LLMs and uniquely generalizes beyond text to other modalities such as ViTs.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示LLM中激活尖峰的本质是结构偏置向量，并基于此提出INSERTQUANT量化框架消除尖峰。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM中的大规模激活尖峰严重破坏量化，现有假设将其视为标量偏置但解释不足。作者旨在从机制上理解尖峰的向量偏置本质，以设计更鲁棒的量化方法，提升低比特量化性能。
light_analysis.method: 从几何角度证明尖峰令牌归一化后收敛到常数向量，驱动注意力下沉和值状态排空；分析投影权重（WK、WQ、WV）的协调作用，并揭示模型利用低频频带和相干通道对抵抗RoPE扰动。提出INSERTQUANT框架，通过夹紧尖峰并用预计算模板向量恢复其功能，实现无尖峰激活。
light_analysis.result: INSERTQUANT在LLM上达到与最先进每张量量化方法相当的性能，并唯一地泛化到其他模态（如ViT），实现高保真低比特量化。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文从机制上澄清了激活尖峰的结构偏置本质，并基于此设计了有效的后训练量化方法，具有重要学术价值，同时为LLM高效部署提供了实用方案，未来可扩展至更多模型和模态。

title: CityTrajBench: A Unified Benchmark for City-Scale Vehicle Trajectory Generation
abstract: Urban trajectory generation is a fundamental task for transportation simulation, urban planning, and mobility analytics. However, systematic comparison across trajectory generation methods remains difficult because existing studies often rely on different datasets, preprocessing pipelines, trajectory representations, and evaluation metrics. This fragmentation makes it unclear whether reported performance differences arise from the generation mechanism itself or from inconsistent experimental protocols. To address this issue, we present CityTrajBench, a unified benchmark framework and protocol for city-scale vehicle trajectory generation. CityTrajBench standardizes data ingestion, trajectory normalization, feature construction, model adaptation, map-aware post-processing, model selection, and multi-level evaluation under a common setting. It supports heterogeneous generators, including statistical baselines, VAE-based, GAN-based, diffusion-based, and flow-matching-based models, and evaluates them on three real-world urban trajectory datasets. The benchmark measures global spatial realism, trip-level distribution fidelity, trajectory-level geometric similarity, conditional mobility consistency, and efficiency. Experiments reveal clear trade-offs across model families: DiffTraj is strongest on trajectory-level geometric fidelity, DiffRNTraj is competitive on structure-sensitive global realism, and TrajFlow provides a strong balance across realism, quality, conditional consistency, and efficiency. Meanwhile, a simple Markov baseline remains competitive on coarse-grained trip and local-movement statistics. These findings show that urban trajectory generation quality is inherently multi-objective, that no single model dominates all criteria equally, and that CityTrajBench provides a reproducible benchmark protocol and testbed for future research on urban mobility generation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CityTrajBench，一个统一的基准框架，用于标准化城市尺度车辆轨迹生成的评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有轨迹生成研究因数据集、预处理、表示和评估指标不统一，导致方法间的性能差异难以归因，阻碍系统比较。该问题重要，因为可靠对比是推动该领域发展的基础。CityTrajBench通过标准化整个流程来解决这一碎片化问题。
light_analysis.method: CityTrajBench标准化数据摄取、轨迹归一化、特征构建、模型适配、地图感知后处理、模型选择和多级评估。支持统计基线、VAE、GAN、扩散和流匹配等多种生成器，并在三个真实城市轨迹数据集上评估全局空间真实性、行程分布保真度、轨迹几何相似性、条件移动一致性和效率。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示模型间存在明确权衡：DiffTraj在轨迹级几何保真度最强，DiffRNTraj在结构敏感全局真实性有竞争力，TrajFlow在现实主义、质量、条件一致性和效率之间取得平衡，而简单马尔可夫基线在粗粒度行程和局部移动统计上仍有竞争力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 城市轨迹生成质量本质上是多目标的，没有单一模型在所有标准上占优。CityTrajBench提供了可复现的基准协议和测试床，有助于未来研究。局限性包括未覆盖所有可能的生成器类型。

title: Cross-modal linkage risk in clinical vision-language models
abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) trained on paired chest radiographs and radiology reports learn a shared embedding space that can preserve instance-level image-report correspondence. This poses a privacy risk in settings where radiographs and reports are deliberately kept separate after acquisition, such as image-only data sharing or access-controlled reports, because a de-identified image may be re-linked to its original narrative report through cosine similarity alone. We formalized this as image-to-report retrieval and used public paired cohorts, in which the true pairing is known by design, as ground-truth benchmarks to audit the risk rather than as the privacy scenario. Evaluating VLMs of increasing clinical specialization on 406,241 paired examples from 126,804 patients across MIMIC-CXR (43,793 held-out pairs) and external CheXpert Plus (29,296 pairs), we found that re-linkage rose systematically with specialization: the strongest VLM retrieved the correct report at 15 times chance at a candidate pool of N = 100, 50 times chance at N = 10,000, and well above chance at full-database scale. The signal persisted under pathology-matched hard negatives that removed disease-label shortcuts, indicating correspondence beyond broad diagnostic categories. To reduce it without retraining, we froze both encoders and applied differentially private optimization only to the projection heads defining the alignment layer (epsilon = 0.34, delta = 6x10-6). This reduced Recall@1 by 61.8% at N = 10,000 on MIMIC-CXR and transferred to CheXpert Plus without retraining, while image-side utility was largely preserved: macro AUROC for linear-probe classification across 14 labels shifted only from 79.63% to 79.43%. Targeted DP finetuning of the shared alignment layer can substantially reduce cross-modal re-linkage without materially degrading the image representations that make these models clinically useful.

light_analysis.overview: 提出差分隐私微调对齐层的方法，在不重新训练情况下降低临床视觉语言模型的跨模态重链接风险。
light_analysis.motivation: 临床视觉语言模型在共享嵌入空间中保留实例级图像-报告对应关系，导致去标识图像可能仅通过余弦相似度重新链接到原始报告，构成隐私风险。现有方法缺乏针对这种跨模态链接的隐私保护机制，尤其是在图像和报告分离存储的医疗场景下。
light_analysis.method: 冻结图像和文本编码器，仅对定义对齐层的投影头应用差分隐私优化（ε=0.34, δ=6e-6），无需重新训练。使用MIMIC-CXR和CheXpert Plus数据集评估，通过图像到报告检索任务测量重链接风险，并引入病理匹配的硬负样本消除疾病标签捷径。
light_analysis.result: 在MIMIC-CXR上，Recall@1在候选池N=10000时降低61.8%，并迁移到CheXpert Plus。图像侧效用仅轻微下降：14个标签线性探测的宏AUROC从79.63%降至79.43%。最强VLM在N=100时正确报告检索率为随机水平的15倍，N=10000时为50倍。
light_analysis.conclusion: 靶向差分隐私微调对齐层能大幅降低跨模态重链接风险，同时保留临床有用的图像表示。该方法无需重新训练，具有实际部署价值。未来可探索在保持效用下进一步降低隐私泄露或应用于其他多模态医疗数据。

title: Vision-language Models for Driver Monitoring Systems: A Driver Activity Description Dataset
abstract: Understanding subtle driver actions is essential for building reliable driver monitoring systems. Existing visionlanguage models (VLMs) are trained on general datasets and struggle to recognize fine distinctions in driver behaviors. This paper addresses this limitation by creating a detailed natural language version of the Drive&Act dataset. We evaluate three VLMs on our new benchmark using LLM-based scoring methods. Their performance on the new benchmark shows that they cannot reliably generate accurate fine-grained driver activity descriptions. Based on the labeled Drive&Act dataset we create a new Drive&Act description dataset containing finegrained descriptions to train VLMs on driver activity understanding. Cross dataset evaluation on the Driver Monitoring Dataset (DMD) shows that the VLM fine-tuned on our new Drive&Act description dataset generalizes well to actions in the DMD dataset. The VLM fine-tuned on our Drive&Act description dataset achieves an ACCR score of 76 outperforming the zero-shot VLM baseline with an ACCR score of 66. These findings demonstrate that adapting VLMs with richly described driver actions can significantly improve their ability to interpret driver behavior while also highlighting the need for more diverse datasets to support broader generalization in future applications. Our Drive&Act description dataset and code will be publicly available on GitHub.

light_analysis.overview: 创建Drive&Act描述数据集，通过微调视觉语言模型显著提升驾驶员行为理解能力，跨数据集验证泛化性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在通用数据集上训练，无法准确识别驾驶员行为的细微差别，导致驾驶监控系统可靠性不足。本文旨在解决这一局限，通过构建细粒度自然语言描述的驾驶员活动数据集，提升模型对复杂行为的理解能力，从而增强驾驶安全系统的实用性。
light_analysis.method: 基于Drive&Act数据集，人工标注创建包含细粒度动作描述的Drive&Act描述数据集。评估三个VLM模型在LLM评分方法下的性能，并在此数据集上微调。跨数据集在Driver Monitoring Dataset (DMD) 上进行评估，使用ACCR评分指标衡量泛化能力。
light_analysis.result: 微调后的VLM在Drive&Act描述数据集上ACCR得分为76，显著高于零样本基线的66分。跨数据集评估表明，微调模型能良好泛化到DMD中的动作，性能提升约15%，验证了数据集的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通过丰富描述的驾驶员动作数据适配VLM，能大幅提升其行为解释能力，但需更多样化数据集以支持更广泛的泛化。本研究为驾驶监控系统提供了高质量数据集和模型微调方案，数据集与代码将公开以促进后续研究。

title: From Extrinsic to Intrinsic: Geodesic-Guided Representation Learning for 3D Geometric Data
abstract: Geometric analysis fundamentally distinguishes between \textit{extrinsic} and \textit{intrinsic} perspectives. The dominant paradigm in current 3D representation learning relies on either extrinsic spatial structures or high-level semantics, struggling to capture the essence of shape identity and underlying manifold topology. To bridge this gap, we introduce a novel 3D representation learning paradigm, namely \textbf{PRISM}, for \textbf{P}re-training, which learns isometric embeddings by \textbf{R}ecovering the \textbf{I}ntrinsic \textbf{S}urface geodesic \textbf{M}etric. PRISM incorporates a topology-enforcing objective that explicitly constrains the structure of latent space, alongside a specialized two-stage training recipe mitigating sample imbalance inherent in the distribution of geodesic distances. Experiments demonstrate that our approach shows satisfactory accuracy, robustness, and high efficiency in geodesic distance prediction and achieves superior performance across diverse downstream tasks, including shape recognition, surface parameterization, and non-rigid correspondence. The code will be publicly available at https://github.com/AidenZhao/PRISM.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PRISM预训练范式，通过恢复内在测地度量学习等距嵌入，实现从外在到内在的3D表示学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前3D表示学习主要依赖外在空间结构或高层语义，难以捕捉形状本质和底层流形拓扑。现有方法在处理非刚性变形和形状识别时表现不足，缺乏对内在几何结构的建模。PRISM旨在桥接外在和内在视角，通过学习测地距离来获取形状的等距不变表示。
light_analysis.method: PRISM包含拓扑强制目标，约束潜空间结构，并采用两阶段训练策略缓解测地距离分布中的样本不平衡。通过恢复表面测地度量，学习等距嵌入，使潜空间保留内在几何属性。使用公开3D数据集进行预训练，具体架构未详述，但强调效率。
light_analysis.result: 在测地距离预测任务上，PRISM达到满意的准确性、鲁棒性和高效率。下游任务中，包括形状识别、表面参数化和非刚性对应，均取得优于现有方法的表现。具体性能指标摘要未提供，但声称优越性。
light_analysis.conclusion: PRISM成功将外在表示转向内在几何学习，提升了3D形状分析的泛化能力。其拓扑强制目标和两阶段训练策略具有实用价值。未来可进一步探索扩展到动态场景或结合更多几何先验。

title: A combination of noise and bilateral filters achieve supralinear and scalable adversarial robustness in CNNs
abstract: The vulnerability of deep neural networks to adversarial examples poses a significant challenge for real-world deployment. Existing techniques to enhance deep network robustness rely on adversarial training, an approach that is powerful but computationally intensive and typically tailored to specific attack types. To address these limitations, existing works have explored techniques such as adding gaussian noise or filtering images, both of which can boost the network robustness to various adversarial attacks, albeit modestly. Here, we theoretically demonstrate that these two approaches enhance robustness against adversarial attacks through complementary mechanisms, resulting in supralinear robustness when combined. Building on this insight, we experimentally show that a simple preprocessor combining Gaussian noise and bilateral filtering yields supralinear improvements in adversarial robustness with minimal computational cost. Next, we combine our preprocessor with adversarial training and test on RobustBench to assess its supralinear improvement over state-of-the-art defenses. First, this combination ranks second on AutoAttack and third overall, while using only $\sim$35% of the training FLOPs, using a model with $\sim$50% less parametets, trained with $\sim$33% of the epochs and $\sim$15% the data compared to state-of-the-art defenses. Second, our method scales efficiently, matching the accuracy of competing models with roughly 2-8x less total compute across 3 orders of magnitude. Overall, our approach provides a principled and easily integrable framework for enhancing adversarial robustness, offering negligible computational overhead and a simple yet theoretically grounded design.
comment: Main: 8 pages, 3 figures, 2 Tables. Supplement: 10 pages, 7 figures, 6 Tables

light_analysis.overview: 结合高斯噪声与双边滤波的预处理器，以极小计算代价实现卷积神经网络超线性抗对抗鲁棒性提升。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度神经网络易受对抗样本攻击，现有对抗训练方法计算开销大且针对特定攻击类型。已有研究探索添加高斯噪声或图像滤波来提升鲁棒性，但效果有限。本文旨在解决这些问题，寻找一种轻量级、可扩展且理论上合理的鲁棒性增强方法。
light_analysis.method: 理论证明高斯噪声与双边滤波通过互补机制增强鲁棒性，组合后可产生超线性效果。实验设计简单预处理器：先加高斯噪声再应用双边滤波，并在推理前预处理输入图像。将该预处理器与对抗训练结合，在RobustBench上测试。关键创新在于理论指导下的轻量级组合，无需修改网络架构或训练过程。
light_analysis.result: 在RobustBench上，该方法在AutoAttack排名第二，总体排名第三。相比最先进防御方法，训练FLOPs仅约35%，模型参数量减少约50%，训练轮数减少约33%，数据量减少约85%。方法扩展高效：在3个数量级计算资源范围内，达到竞争模型精度仅需2-8倍更少总计算量。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种理论驱动且易于集成的框架，通过组合高斯噪声和双边滤波显著提升对抗鲁棒性，计算开销可忽略。该方法可无缝嵌入现有防御流程，并展现优异扩展性。局限性可能在于对特定攻击类型的泛化性，未来可探索更多滤波器组合或自适应噪声水平。

title: ArrythML: An Autoencoder-Based TinyML Approach for On-Device Arrhythmia Detection on Resource-Constrained Embedded Systems
abstract: Our work presents a method for ECG segmentation and arrhythmia detection using Tiny Machine Learning (TinyML) models for real-time, on-device inference on resource-constrained embedded systems. We develop INT8 quantized autoencoder-based TinyML models with minimal layers and parameters for embedded deployment. These models are evaluated using a custom dataset derived from the MIT-BIH Arrhythmia Database and validated in both PC-based simulations and on-device environments.   For the evaluations, over 95,000 ECG segments are processed on an ESP32-S3 microcontroller running the TensorFlow Lite Micro runtime. Post-evaluation, detailed analysis, including annotation-wise and record-wise failure analysis, is conducted to characterize model behavior across diverse ECG morphologies and rhythm patterns and to explain missed detections. In several cases, apparent misclassifications may correspond to early or subtle anomaly patterns labeled as normal in the reference annotations, highlighting the model's sensitivity. A refined evaluation by filtering out ambiguous cases in the dataset shows that the best-performing DNN-based autoencoder achieves a recall of 84%, an F1-score of 79%, a model size of approximately 180 KB, and an inference latency of 9 ms on-device. These results demonstrate the feasibility of low-power, privacy-preserving embedded wearable systems capable of performing accurate arrhythmia detection entirely on-device.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于INT8量化自动编码器的TinyML方法，实现资源受限系统上的实时心律失常检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 针对现有心律失常检测方法依赖云端或高算力设备，难以满足资源受限嵌入式系统对低功耗、实时性和隐私保护的需求，本研究旨在开发一种可完全在设备上运行的高效检测模型。
light_analysis.method: 采用INT8量化的自动编码器架构，最小化层数与参数，利用MIT-BIH心律失常数据库构建自定义数据集，在ESP32-S3微控制器上通过TensorFlow Lite Micro部署，处理超过95,000个ECG片段。
light_analysis.result: 最佳DNN自动编码器在过滤模糊样本后达到84%召回率和79% F1分数，模型大小约180 KB，推理延迟9 ms，并通过详细失败分析揭示了模型对早期异常模式的敏感性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作验证了低功耗、隐私保护的嵌入式可穿戴系统实现完全设备端心律失常检测的可行性，为可穿戴健康监测提供了高效、轻量级的解决方案。

title: Towards Resolving Optimization Conflicts Between Image- and Text-Based Person Re-Identification
abstract: The joint optimization of image-based (I2I) and text-based (T2I) person re-identification (ReID) is hindered by modality discrepancies and conflicting training objectives, leading to suboptimal shared representations. While I2I ReID focuses on identity-level invariance across images of the same person, T2I ReID is driven by instance-specific textual descriptions tied to unique visual traits. This paper explores the fundamental difference between two ReID tasks and their optimization processes for effective training.
