Since I2I and T2I ReID are often studied separately, the loss functions optimized for one retrieval setting may negatively affect the representation quality required by the other. Motivated by these findings, we propose a decoupled two-stage training pipeline for learning a shared representation across image and text modalities. The pipeline is based on a single vision encoder that supports both I2I and T2I retrieval while avoiding cross-task interference during training. We provide extensive experiments across multiple configurations, varying domain mixing procedures, learning strategies, and task objectives. We observed that I2I ReID pre-training positively impacts the generalization ability to T2I data. Besides, we find that incorporating textual supervision during the vision encoder training stage enhances both I2I and T2I performance. We believe our insights provide a meaningful step toward unified ReID systems and cross-modal retrieval overall.

light_analysis.overview: 提出解耦两阶段训练流程，基于单一视觉编码器解决图像与文本行人重识别的优化冲突。
light_analysis.motivation: 图像和文本行人重识别任务存在模态差异和冲突训练目标，导致共享表示次优。现有方法将两者分开研究，损失函数相互干扰。联合优化需要解决跨任务干扰，以构建统一的行人重识别系统。
light_analysis.method: 提出解耦两阶段训练流程，使用单一视觉编码器同时支持图像间和文本到图像的检索，避免训练中的跨任务干扰。探索多种领域混合、学习策略和任务目标，发现图像预训练有利于文本任务，且在视觉编码器训练阶段引入文本监督可提升两种性能。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，图像ReID预训练能提升文本任务的泛化能力；在视觉编码器训练阶段加入文本监督，同时提高了图像和文本检索性能。摘要未提供具体数值，但验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了图像与文本行人重识别的本质差异，提出解耦训练方法，为统一ReID系统和跨模态检索提供了关键进展。未来可探索更高效的联合训练策略。

title: BlockGen: Flexible Blockwise Sequence Modeling with Hybrid Samplers
abstract: Is the uniform-state diffusion framework a more powerful paradigm for discrete diffusion? Recent studies indicate that this may be the case. In combination with predictor-corrector samplers, uniform-state diffusion models (USDMs) produce samples of higher-quality than masked diffusion models (MDMs), and USDMs equal or outperform MDMs in downstream tasks, even though they exhibit greater perplexity. Two issues remain unresolved. First, existing work compares uniform and masked diffusion with un-informed correctors that re-inject noise at random positions, rather than targeting tokens most likely to be wrong. Second, prior work compares full-sequence diffusion models, so we do not know whether the same conclusion holds when tokens are generated block by block. To address these issues, we introduce BlockGen, a blockwise sequence model that we instantiate with both masked and uniform diffusion. BlockGen trains on a mixture of block sizes and its likelihood interpolates between AR and pure diffusion more finely than models with a fixed block size. BlockGen enables AR-informed predictor-corrector sampling (ARPC), which combines AR and diffusion predictions to re-generate unlikely tokens without an auxiliary verifier. Under ancestral sampling, uniform outperforms masked in the block-by-block setting, especially in the few-step regime. Under ARPC, the gap closes and reverses at high NFE. With block size $16$ on GSM8K, MDMs reach slightly higher accuracy than USDMs, and we observe a similar trend in Generative Perplexity on OpenWebText. Find our code at https://github.com/jdeschena/blockgen.

light_analysis.overview: 提出BlockGen，一种灵活的块序列生成模型，结合均匀和掩码扩散及AR-informed预测-校正采样，系统比较了两种扩散模式在逐块生成中的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有工作比较均匀和掩码扩散时使用未信息校正器，随机注入噪声而非针对最可能错误的token；且仅在全序列场景下比较，逐块生成时结论是否成立未知。BlockGen旨在解决这些空白，提供更公平的逐块比较框架。
light_analysis.method: BlockGen在混合块大小上训练，似然在自回归和纯扩散之间插值。提出AR-informed预测-校正采样（ARPC），结合自回归和扩散预测重新生成低概率token，无需辅助验证器。模型可实例化为掩码扩散（MDM）和均匀扩散（USDM），支持灵活块大小。
light_analysis.result: 在祖先采样下，均匀扩散在逐块设置中优于掩码，尤其在少步数时。ARPC采样下差距缩小，高NFE时掩码反超。GSM8K上块大小16时MDM准确率略高于USDM，OpenWebText上生成困惑度趋势类似。
light_analysis.conclusion: BlockGen提供了灵活的逐块生成框架，揭示均匀与掩码扩散在块场景下的性能差异，并提出ARPC采样器提升质量。学术上深化了对离散扩散模型的理解，实际可用于文本生成任务。未来可探索更大块大小或更复杂校正策略。

title: Why Are DMD Students Lazy? Understanding the Copying Behavior in Few-Step Distillation
abstract: Distribution Matching Distillation (DMD) compresses pretrained diffusion models into efficient few-step generators by aligning their noised distributions across all scales. In principle, such distribution-level supervision remains agnostic to specific noise-data pairings of the teacher; this provides the student the freedom to remap latent noise, a behavior consistently observed in low-dimensional settings. Surprisingly, we find that in high-dimensional settings, distilled students spontaneously reproduce the original noise-data pairings of the teacher, a phenomenon we term copying. We demonstrate that copying is neither a byproduct of adversarial objectives nor a result of teacher memorization. Instead, our evidence suggests that copying is an emergent property arising from the limited geometric freedom of the student model during high-dimensional distillation.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示高维分布匹配蒸馏中学生复制教师噪声-数据配对的现象及其成因。
light_analysis.motivation: 分布匹配蒸馏旨在压缩扩散模型为少步生成器，理论上学生应自由重映射噪声，但实际观察中发现学生复制教师配对。该研究旨在理解这种'懒惰'行为的根源，排除对抗目标或教师记忆等常见解释，以深化对蒸馏机制的认识。
light_analysis.method: 通过系统性实验对比低维与高维蒸馏场景，量化学生模型对教师噪声-数据配对的复制程度。利用几何分析工具评估高维空间中学生模型的自由度，并控制变量排除对抗目标、教师记忆等干扰因素，从而证明复制行为是学生模型在高维蒸馏中有限几何自由度的涌现属性。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，高维蒸馏中学生模型自发复制教师的原始噪声-数据配对，而低维场景中则表现出自由重映射。该现象并非源于对抗目标或教师记忆，证实是学生模型在高维空间中的几何自由度受限所致。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究首次发现并解释了DMD中的复制现象，揭示了学生模型在有限几何自由度下的涌现行为。这一发现为改进少步蒸馏方法提供了理论指导，未来可探索如何通过调整模型自由度或目标设计来避免复制，提升蒸馏效率与灵活性。

title: A Doeblin-Anchored Contrastive Chart for Learning Markov Transition Kernels
abstract: Learning a Markov transition model is not merely conditional density estimation: the learned object must be a valid transition kernel before it is iterated in downstream dynamics. This paper introduces a Doeblin-anchored contrastive chart, a statistical-to-dynamical coordinate framework for learning transition kernels from contrastive objectives. Given a restart law and an anchor strength, the chart mixes the target transition with the restart law. The resulting anchored kernel is simultaneously a Doeblin-minorized Markov kernel, the positive conditional law in a binary contrastive experiment, and an explicitly invertible coordinate for the original transition law. We prove that the anchored contrastive risk identifies the anchored transition density and calibrates excess risk to density error. Since inversion of a learned score may produce a signed or unnormalized object, we introduce a measurable Markovization operator that restores kernel validity while preserving integrated $L^1$ accuracy up to a constant factor. Oracle inequalities and Hölder--ReLU approximation bounds yield nonparametric rates for independent transition pairs. For stationary geometrically $β$-mixing trajectories, a conservative thinning-and-coupling extension yields the same reconstruction interface with an effective sample size. Occupancy-weighted perturbation bounds transfer one-step kernel error to finite-horizon marginal, path-law, and occupation-measure errors under explicit coverage.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Doeblin锚定对比图框架，通过对比学习学习有效的马尔可夫转移核，确保核的有效性和可逆性。
light_analysis.motivation: 学习马尔可夫转移模型不仅是条件密度估计，所学对象必须在下游动力学中迭代时是有效的转移核。现有方法可能产生无效或未归一化的对象，缺乏确保核有效性的机制。该研究旨在解决从对比目标学习有效转移核的问题，并保证统计精度与动力学一致性。
light_analysis.method: 引入Doeblin锚定对比图，将目标转移与重启律混合，得到同时是Doeblin最小化核、二元对比实验中的正条件律和原始转移律的可逆坐标。证明锚定对比风险能识别锚定转移密度，并校准超额风险与密度误差。引入可测马尔可夫化算子，恢复核有效性并保持积分L1精度。使用Oracle不等式和Hölder-ReLU逼近界得到非参数速率。
light_analysis.result: 对于独立转移对，得到非参数学习速率。对于平稳几何β-混合轨迹，提出保守的稀疏化与耦合扩展，以有效样本量获得相同重建接口。占优加权扰动界将一步核误差转化为有限时域边际、路径律和占优测度误差，在显式覆盖下成立。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架为从对比数据学习马尔可夫核提供了统计与动力学一致的方法，具有理论保证和实际应用价值。未来可探索更高效的反演算法和更广泛的混合条件。

title: Chroma Clues: Leveraging Color Statistics to Detect Synthetic Images
abstract: The evolution and dissemination of AI-synthesized images is occurring at an unprecedented rate. Image generators are making rapid progress in their goal of perfectly imitating natural images, which also challenges image forensics.   In this work, we exploit an underexplored cue in current generative models, namely their weakness to imitate color statistics of natural images. We first show that the LPIPS loss used for training image generators is less sensitive to chrominance than to luminance, which may lead to statistical discrepancies in the colors of synthetic images. Building on this observation, we then introduce six hand-crafted color transformations and a method to learn a task-optimized color transform to statistically expose generated images. These transformations can be used in various ways. First, we define color-sensitive features at pixel-level or patch-level. A simple, interpretable classifier achieves with these features an average generalization accuracy of 93.27% and strong robustness against six types of post-processing. Second, we demonstrate that the transformations exhibit characteristic visual noise patterns in natural and synthetic image areas, which enables an intuitive visual image evaluation. Third, we demonstrate that the transforms can enhance color patterns in generated images for improved multiclass attribution.

light_analysis.overview: 利用颜色统计特征检测AI合成图像，基于LPIPS损失对色度不敏感的弱点，提出手工艺和学习优化的颜色变换方法。
light_analysis.motivation: AI合成图像快速演进，现有检测方法难以应对生成模型对自然图像的完美模仿。作者发现生成模型训练中使用的LPIPS损失对色度不如亮度敏感，导致合成图像在颜色统计上存在可检测的差异。利用这一未被充分利用的线索，旨在提升图像伪造检测的泛化能力和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 首先分析LPIPS损失对色度不敏感，推导出颜色统计差异。设计六种手工颜色变换，并引入任务优化颜色变换学习方法。这些变换可用于像素级或块级特征提取，构建可解释分类器；也可生成视觉噪声模式辅助图像评估，并增强颜色模式以改进多类归属。
light_analysis.result: 使用简单可解释分类器，基于颜色变换特征在泛化测试中达到93.27%的平均准确率，对六种常见后处理（如压缩、模糊等）表现出强鲁棒性。此外，颜色变换在自然与合成区域产生特征性视觉噪声模式，并提升多类属性归因性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示生成模型在颜色统计方面的弱点，提供轻量级、可解释的检测方案，具有高泛化性和鲁棒性。适用于图像取证、内容审核等实际场景。未来可探索更多颜色特征及与深度学习结合。

title: Network Learning with Semi-relaxed Gromov-Wasserstein
abstract: Estimating the generative mechanism of large-scale networks is a fundamental challenge in statistical machine learning. It requires the identification of the latent connectivity structure, which is in general an NP-hard combinatorial problem due to the absence of canonical node labels. We address this challenge by allowing for probabilistic couplings, thereby relaxing the assignment problem. Our estimation framework can be formulated as a semi-relaxed Gromov-Wasserstein objective and provides a low-dimensional representation of the generative structure. We solve this via a block-coordinate conditional gradient algorithm. Despite the relaxation, the resulting solution is typically deterministic: in fact, we show that the optimality gap between the relaxed solution and the deterministic assignment vanishes at rate $O(1/n)$, where $n$ is the number of nodes. This allows for tractable recovery of the underlying model and enables rigorous statistical analysis: we establish consistency and minimax-optimal convergence rates for both stochastic block models and Holder-smooth graphons. Our implementation scales efficiently with $n$, as demonstrated on both synthetic and real-world datasets.

light_analysis.overview: 提出半松弛Gromov-Wasserstein目标用于网络生成机制估计，通过概率耦合放松分配问题，实现统计一致性和最优收敛速度，且算法高效可扩展。
light_analysis.motivation: 大规模网络生成机制估计的核心挑战是识别潜在连接结构，因缺乏节点标签，该问题为NP难组合问题。现有方法在计算上不可行，本文通过允许概率耦合来放松分配问题，使得目标可处理。
light_analysis.method: 构建半松弛Gromov-Wasserstein目标，提供生成结构的低维表示，并采用块坐标条件梯度算法求解。理论分析表明，松弛解与确定性分配之间的最优间隙以O(1/n)速率消失，从而保证可恢复底层模型，支持严格的统计分析。
light_analysis.result: 针对随机块模型和Hölder光滑图核，建立了统计一致性并达到极小化最优收敛速率。算法在合成和真实数据集上展现出随节点数n高效扩展的能力，验证了其实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为网络生成机制估计提供了可处理且统计最优的框架，兼具理论保证和实际扩展性。未来可将该方法推广至更复杂的网络模型或带噪声的场景。

title: CORE-MTL: Rethinking Gradient Balancing via Causal Orthogonal Representations
abstract: Multi-task learning (MTL) aims to construct a joint model for multiple tasks by sharing a common representation across domains. To achieve this goal, existing optimization-centric methods either balance task gradients or modify the shared architecture. However, as these approaches remain agnostic to the content of the shared representation, they fail to disentangle task-relevant structure from spurious context, leading to negative transfer and poor generalization. To overcome this limitation, we propose Causal Orthogonal Representations for Multi-Task Learning (CORE-MTL), a causally motivated representation-centric framework that encourages a structured semantic-residual factorization of the shared representation, concentrating task-relevant structure in the semantic stream while relegating nuisance variation to the residual stream. We instantiate this framework in the visual domain by leveraging physical priors for structured scenes and statistical constraints for attributes. Theoretically, our method enjoys a tighter out-of-distribution generalization bound than optimization-centric methods and reduces task gradient interference without explicit gradient projection or reweighting. Empirically, CORE-MTL consistently outperforms existing methods on visual multi-task benchmarks in both in-distribution and out-of-distribution settings. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/Hope-Rita/CORE-MTL.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CORE-MTL框架，通过因果正交表示分解共享特征，解决多任务学习中的负迁移和泛化问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 多任务学习中，现有优化方法平衡任务梯度或修改架构，但忽略共享表示内容，无法分离任务相关结构与虚假上下文，导致负迁移和泛化差。
light_analysis.method: CORE-MTL框架将共享表示分解为语义流（任务相关）和残差流（噪声），利用物理先验和统计约束实现结构化分解，无需显式梯度投影或重新加权。理论证明有更紧的分布外泛化界。
light_analysis.result: 在视觉多任务基准上，CORE-MTL在分布内和分布外设置中均一致优于现有方法，有效减少任务梯度干扰，提升泛化性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: CORE-MTL通过因果视角重新设计共享表示，显著提升多任务学习的泛化性和鲁棒性，为表示学习提供新方向。未来可扩展至更多模态。

title: Symmetry-Aware 9D Pose Estimation with Sim(3)-Consistent Feature and Spherical Inception Convolution
abstract: Object pose estimation is a fundamental problem for an agent system to perceive or manipulate objects in images or videos. However, current instance-level methods struggle with generalization to unseen objects. Category-level methods seek to address this, but remain constrained by the complexities of learning in the non-linear Sim(3) space and intra-class variations. To address these challenges, We propose an effective method for category-level object pose estimation with two key innovations: (1) A translation/size estimator, featuring a semantic-guided symmetry-aware module that leverages robust generalization capabilities of a large vision model (LVM) to infer symmetry points, resulting in accurate translation and size without shape priors. This result serves as a precomputed cue for rotation estimation, thereby reducing the difficulty of learning in the non-linear Sim(3) space and laying a robust foundation for tackling the inherently more challenging rotation estimation. (2) A feature fusion module, based on our proposed spherical large-kernel inception convolution, fuses semantic features from the LVM with systematically computed geometric features to extract essential pose features from intra-class variations by modeling long-range dependencies without excessive computational cost. Built on these innovations, we achieve SOTA on benchmarks and real-world scenes, while developing a robust robotic picking system capable of handling diverse objects. Our code will be available at the project page: {\hypersetup{urlcolor=blue}https://panfei-cheng.github.io/SSH-Pose}.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种类别级物体姿态估计方法，利用对称感知和球形卷积实现Sim(3)空间鲁棒学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前实例级物体姿态估计方法难以泛化到未见物体，而类别级方法受限于Sim(3)空间的非线性学习以及类内变化。现有方法依赖形状先验或计算成本高昂，无法有效处理对称性和旋转估计的复杂性。因此需要一种能够在无形状先验下处理对称性、并高效融合语义与几何特征的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出两个创新模块：1）语义引导的对称感知平移/大小估计器，利用大型视觉模型（LVM）的泛化能力预测对称点，无需形状先验即可准确估计平移和尺寸，为旋转估计提供预处理线索，降低Sim(3)学习难度；2）特征融合模块，采用球形大核初始卷积（Spherical Inception Convolution），融合LVM语义特征与几何特征，通过长程依赖建模提取类内变化中的关键姿态特征，且计算高效。
light_analysis.result: 在基准数据集和真实场景中达到最先进性能（SOTA），并开发了能够处理多样物体的鲁棒机器人抓取系统。具体数值未在摘要中明确说明，但声称优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作通过对称感知和球形卷积创新，有效解决了类别级物体姿态估计中Sim(3)空间非线性学习与类内变化挑战。学术上提供了无形状先验的鲁棒框架，实际应用中支持机器人抓取系统。未来可进一步优化计算效率或扩展到更多类别。

title: Faster Synchronous On-Policy RL via Straggler-Aware Group Sizing
abstract: Synchronous reinforcement learning methods such as Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) provide stable and reproducible on-policy training, but they are highly vulnerable to stragglers, a single unusually long rollout can delay reward computation and parameter updates for the entire group. This problem becomes more severe as group size increases, creating a tension between the benefits of larger groups and the wall-clock cost of synchronization stalls. We propose Straggler-Aware Group Control (SAGC), a dynamic group-size controller that adapts the training group online based on observed rollout behavior. SAGC formulates group-size selection as an online constrained optimization problem, seeking to retain the benefits of larger groups while controlling the long-term rate of straggler events. Across synchronous GRPO and DAPO training, and on top of both vanilla and strong engineered baselines, SAGC consistently reduces straggler incidence and improves wall-clock efficiency while achieving competitive or better training reward. We further show that these gains transfer to final model quality: SAGC is competitive with or better than the strongest static group-size baseline on downstream reasoning benchmarks, and often produces shorter outputs without any explicit length penalty. These results position dynamic group control as a practical way to make synchronous on-policy RL more efficient and robust.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Straggler-Aware Group Control (SAGC)，一种动态组大小控制器，用于减少同步策略强化学习中的落后节点问题，提升训练效率和模型质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 同步强化学习方法（如GRPO）稳定可复现，但易受落后节点影响：单个长耗时轨迹会延迟整个组的奖励计算和参数更新。随组规模增大，问题更严重，形成大组优势与同步停滞的时间成本间的矛盾。现有静态组大小无法适应环境动态变化，需要一种在线自适应机制来平衡组规模和落后事件率。
light_analysis.method: SAGC将组大小选择建模为在线约束优化问题，根据观测到的轨迹行为动态调整训练组规模，旨在保留大组优势的同时控制落后事件的长期发生率。方法可应用于同步GRPO和DAPO训练，兼容基础工程基线。核心是实时监测落后情况并调整组大小，无需修改底层算法。
light_analysis.result: 在同步GRPO和DAPO训练中，SAGC在基础和强工程基线上均一致降低了落后事件发生率，提升了墙钟效率，同时获得竞争性或更优的训练奖励。在下游推理基准上，SAGC与最强静态组大小基线相当或更优，且通常产生更短的输出，无需显式长度惩罚。
light_analysis.conclusion: 动态组控制使同步策略强化学习更高效和鲁棒。SAGC通过在线自适应缓解落后节点问题，提升训练速度且保持模型质量。未来可探索更复杂的控制策略或应用于异步方法。局限性可能包括对观测噪声的敏感性及额外计算开销。

title: Model Multiplicity and Predictive Arbitrariness in Recidivism Risk Assessment
abstract: Prediction tasks over individual futures, which are inherently noisy, often admit multiple similarly accurate models. When these models produce different predictions for the same individual, they raise concerns of arbitrariness in decision-making. How severe can this arbitrariness be, in theory and in practice? How can it be resolved to support high-stakes risk assessment?   We address these questions through a study of a machine learning-based decision support system for recidivism risk assessment that has been in use for over 15 years. By translating complex legal rules into an algorithm for labeling post release outcomes (recidivist or non-recidivist), we first construct a dataset of thousands of inmate releases. Using this dataset, we learn interpretable models that improve predictive performance, reduce error-rate disparities between groups, and ensure that rehabilitative progress lowers risk scores. Next, we study predictive multiplicity, by first deriving a tight lower bound on the expected predictive agreement of any finite set of models over a dataset, and then by evaluating the extent to which structural diversity (e.g., different model coefficients) within this set translates to predictive multiplicity (i.e., different predictions for the same individual). Our experiments indicate that the existence of many similarly accurate models with comparable error-rate disparities does not necessarily translate into severe predictive multiplicity. Empirically, similarly performant models can exhibit substantially higher predictive agreement than worst-case theoretical guarantees suggest. We find that a simple policy that assigns each inmate the lowest risk among these models is effective for addressing predictive arbitrariness.

light_analysis.overview: 研究模型多重性在累犯风险评估中的影响，发现准确率相近的模型不一定导致严重的预测任意性，并提出简单缓解策略。
light_analysis.motivation: 累犯风险评估等涉及个人未来的预测任务本质上具有噪声，常存在多个准确率相似的模型。当这些模型对同一个人产生不同预测时，会引发决策中的任意性问题。现有方法未充分探讨这种任意性的严重程度及其解决方法，尤其在高风险场景下缺乏理论分析和实证研究。本研究旨在从理论和实践两方面量化预测任意性，并寻找缓解措施。
light_analysis.method: 首先将复杂法律规则转化为算法，构建包含数千名囚犯释放结果的数据集，并学习可解释模型以提升预测性能、降低组间错误率差异、确保康复进展降低风险评分。然后推导有限模型集预期预测一致性的紧致下界，通过实验评估模型结构多样性（如不同系数）转化为预测多重的程度。最后提出简单策略：为每个囚犯分配这些模型中的最低风险评分。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，存在许多准确率相近且组间错误率差异相当的模型，并不必然导致严重的预测多重性。经验上，相似性能的模型可表现出远高于最坏情况理论保证的预测一致性。摘要未提供具体数值（如准确率提升百分比），但指出学习到的可解释模型改进了预测性能并减少了错误率差异。提出的风险分配策略有效缓解了预测任意性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究揭示了累犯风险评估中模型多重性与预测任意性的关系，证明了理论上最坏情况下的任意性在实际中往往被缓解。提出的最低风险分配策略简单有效，为高风险决策中的模型选择提供了实用指导。未来工作可探索更复杂的整合方法或扩展到其他领域（如信用评分、医疗诊断）。局限性在于依赖单一数据集和特定法律规则转化。

title: Coherent Off-Policy Improvement of Large Behavior Models with Learned Rewards
abstract: Distilling expert demonstration data into large generative models using behavioral cloning is a scalable approach to learning capable policies for robotic control, particularly for dexterous manipulation. Reinforcement learning (RL) can be used as a means to finetune these policies further using additional experience. An open question is whether RL is more sample-efficient than collecting more human demonstrations. Prior work has finetuned large pretrained policies in a scalable fashion by applying RL to a smaller residual policy that corrects the pretrained model. However, for the typical sparse reward tasks, RL algorithms can struggle to optimize the behavior in a sample-efficient manner. We explore inverse reinforcement learning, where a dense reward function is learned from expert demonstrations, potentially reducing the challenge of RL finetuning. We specifically consider coherent imitation learning, an IRL method that facilitates improvement of the BC policy through using a specific reward formulation with theoretical guarantees. We show that our IRL method maintains or improves the performance of pi-0.5 on all six sparse manipulation tasks and achieves a $\geq 90\%$ success rate on five out of six complex manipulation tasks, outperforming RL-based baselines using sparse rewards. By ensuring our initial pretrained finetuning policy is optimal for our initial reward and critic, our method circumvents the initial drop commonly seen in RL finetuning and enables faster improvement.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于逆强化学习的coherent imitation learning方法，利用学习的密集奖励函数改进大规模行为模型，避免了RL微调中的初始性能下降。
light_analysis.motivation: 在机器人灵巧操作等任务中，通过行为克隆从专家演示中学习大规模策略是可扩展的方法，但进一步使用强化学习微调时，稀疏奖励任务下样本效率低。现有方法通过微调残差策略来优化预训练模型，但RL算法在稀疏奖励中难以有效优化。本文探索逆强化学习，通过学习密集奖励函数来减轻RL微调挑战，旨在提升样本效率和任务成功率。
light_analysis.method: 采用coherent imitation learning（CIL）方法，这是一种逆强化学习技术，通过特定的奖励公式（具有理论保证）从专家演示中学习密集奖励函数。在预训练的大规模策略（如π-0.5）基础上，使用该奖励函数进行RL微调。关键创新是确保初始预训练微调策略在初始奖励和评论家下是最优的，从而避免RL微调中常见的性能下降，并实现更快的改进。
light_analysis.result: 在六个稀疏操作任务上，CIL方法维持或提升了预训练策略π-0.5的性能。在六个复杂灵巧操作任务中，五个任务实现了≥90%的成功率，优于使用稀疏奖励的RL基线方法。该方法有效地克服了RL微调中初始性能下降的问题，并加速了性能提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出的coherent imitation learning方法通过逆强化学习学习密集奖励函数，显著提升了大规模行为模型在稀疏奖励任务上的微调效果。该方法在灵巧操作任务上取得了高成功率，并避免了RL微调常见的初始退化。未来工作可探索更复杂的奖励学习或扩展到其他机器人任务。

title: On the Generalization in Topology Optimization via Sensitivity-Conditioned Bernoulli Flow Matching
abstract: Surrogate models for topology optimization (TO) exhibit highly variable out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization under distribution shifts such as changing loads or boundary conditions, yet the source of this variability remains unclear. We hypothesize that OOD performance is governed by how much information the conditioning signal preserves about the adjoint sensitivity (reduced gradient) that drives classical TO. Modeling the TO pipeline as a causal Markov chain, the Data Processing Inequality establishes that, under this abstraction, the sensitivity field is an information-theoretically optimal conditioning signal for topology prediction. However, computing exact adjoint sensitivities can be expensive or unavailable in practice; we observe that certain physical fields can approximate sensitivities through monotone transformations. To formalize this, we introduce \textbf{pseudo-sensitivities} to characterize which fields enable generalization versus those that are information-poor. We then show that a sensitivity-conditioned Bernoulli flow-matching generator empirically confirms these predictions: conditioning on sensitivities yields state-of-the-art OOD performance, while increasingly distant physical fields degrade toward raw parameter conditioning. Results hold across structural TO benchmarks under load shifts and our new CFD-TO dataset under boundary-condition shifts such as multi-outlet configurations. Code and datasets are available at https://tum-pbs.github.io/topotransformer/ .

light_analysis.overview: 通过信息论分析证明灵敏度是拓扑优化中OOD泛化的最优条件信号，并提出灵敏度条件化伯努利流匹配生成器。
light_analysis.motivation: 拓扑优化的替代模型在负载或边界条件等分布偏移下，其越界泛化性能高度可变，但原因不明。作者假设OOD性能取决于条件信号保留经典TO中驱动优化的伴随灵敏度（简化梯度）信息的多少。现有方法缺乏对条件信号信息量的理论分析，导致泛化性能不稳定。
light_analysis.method: 将TO管道建模为因果马尔可夫链，利用数据处理不等式证明灵敏度在信息论意义上是最优条件信号。引入“伪灵敏度”概念，表征哪些物理场能通过单调变换近似灵敏度从而保证泛化。基于此，提出灵敏度条件化的伯努利流匹配生成器，在结构TO基准和新增的CFD-TO数据集上验证。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，基于灵敏度条件化的生成器在OOD泛化上达到最先进性能，而使用信息较少的物理场时性能退化至原始参数条件化的水平。结果在负载偏移的结构TO基准和边界条件偏移（如多出口配置）的CFD-TO数据集上均一致。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过理论和实验揭示了灵敏度信息对TO泛化的关键作用，提出的伪灵敏度概念有助于选择有效条件信号。该研究提升了TO代理模型的鲁棒性，适用于工程优化。未来可探索更高效的灵敏度近似方法。

title: Order within Chaos: Capturing Intrinsic Energy Anomalies for AI-Manipulated Image Forgery Localization
abstract: Recent advancements in generative AI have led to image editing models capable of producing realistic forgeries that evade traditional image forgery localization methods, as these approaches depend on physical noise absent in synthetic data. To address this challenge, we theoretically demonstrate that the diffusion process inherently suppresses local high-frequency variance, creating a statistical energy gap that is distinguishable from the natural entropy of optical imaging. Guided by this insight, we propose FLAME, a unified framework that utilizes a LAD map to capture these intrinsic anomalies, coupled with a parameter-efficient adapter for SAM to achieve precise, pixel-level forgery localization. Furthermore, to bridge the lag between forensic benchmarks and evolving generative models, we introduce EditStream, an automated pipeline for continuous, instruction-based training data synthesis. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FLAME establishes a new state-of-the-art, significantly outperforming previous methods on AI-generated forgery datasets while effectively generalizing to unseen generative architectures. Our code is available at https://github.com/phoenixnir/FLAME.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FLAME框架，利用扩散过程的内在能量异常进行AI图像伪造定位。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有图像伪造定位方法依赖物理噪声，无法有效检测AI生成的逼真伪造图像。生成AI的快速发展使得传统取证技术失效，因此亟需新方法。论文通过理论分析发现扩散过程会抑制局部高频方差，形成可区分的能量间隙，从而解决该问题。
light_analysis.method: FLAME框架包含两个核心组件：一是利用LAD图捕获扩散过程导致的能量异常；二是结合参数高效的SAM适配器实现像素级伪造定位。此外，提出EditStream自动流水线，基于指令连续合成训练数据以跟上生成模型演进。方法不依赖物理噪声，适用于AI生成数据。
light_analysis.result: 在多个AI生成伪造数据集上，FLAME大幅超越先前方法，达到新最优性能。它能有效泛化到未见过的生成架构，表现出强鲁棒性和通用性。具体数值摘要未明确说明，但声称显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文理论证明扩散过程的内在能量异常可用于AI伪造定位，并构建了高效的FLAME框架。该工作为数字取证提供了新视角，具有重要学术价值；同时提供自动化数据合成流水线，实用性强。代码已开源，未来可扩展至更多生成模型。

title: Low-Pass Flow Matching
abstract: Flow Matching typically relies on white noise sources, a choice often misaligned with the power spectra of natural data, which tend to decay with frequency. To address this, we introduce Low-Pass Flow Matching, a variant of Flow Matching based on an operator-modulated interpolant. This formulation induces a time-varying spectral bias that transitions from the source spectrum to a frequency-decaying bias as the path approaches the data. We validate our method on unconditional image generation tasks, including the scientific Galaxy10 dataset. Empirically, we show that our method is particularly effective when paired with adaptive ODE solvers, where it improves or preserves sample quality while substantially reducing sampling cost compared to standard baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Low-Pass Flow Matching，通过算子调制插值项引入时变谱偏置，使生成过程匹配自然数据的频率衰减特性，在图像生成中降低采样成本。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准Flow Matching使用白噪声作为源分布，但自然数据的功率谱通常随频率衰减，白噪声与自然数据的谱特性不匹配。这种不匹配可能导致生成过程效率低下或质量不高。现有方法未充分考虑源分布与数据谱的对齐问题，因此需要一种能够自适应调整谱偏置的生成框架。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出Low-Pass Flow Matching，核心是基于算子调制插值项，在从源到数据的路径上引入时变谱偏置：初始阶段保持源的白噪声谱特性，随着路径接近数据，谱偏置逐渐过渡到频率衰减型，与自然数据的功率谱更一致。该方法通过调制算子控制插值过程中的谱成分，无需改变基础架构。
light_analysis.result: 在无条件的图像生成任务上，包括科学数据集Galaxy10，该方法在与自适应ODE求解器结合时表现优异。与标准基线相比，在保持或提升样本质量的同时，显著降低了采样成本（摘要未明确具体数值）。
light_analysis.conclusion: Low-Pass Flow Matching通过谱偏置对齐改进了Flow Matching，尤其适合与自适应ODE求解器配合，在生成任务中实现效率和质量的平衡。其设计简单，无需复杂改动。未来可探索更广泛的谱调制策略或应用到其他生成任务。潜在的局限性可能在于对特定数据集的依赖或超参数调整。

title: Closing the Alignment-Maturity Gap in Federated Prototype Learning
abstract: Learning discriminative visual representations from distributed, heterogeneous data is a fundamental challenge in Federated Learning (FL). Prototype-based methods address statistical heterogeneity by sharing class-level representations across clients but create a distance-dependent gradient pressure that is particularly severe during early training rounds: alignment pressure applied to immature global prototypes, aggregated from noisy local representations, generates large gradients that suppress the emergence of local discriminative structure. The result is a poorly organized embedding space and degraded recognition performance, particularly under severe non-IID conditions. We propose FedSAP, a framework that stabilises federated representation learning through two complementary mechanisms: a deterministic alignment curriculum that delays global alignment until local representations become stable and a geometry-driven proxy separation loss that enforces inter-class structure on the unit hypersphere using the existing prototype bank without introducing additional parameters or communication overhead. Together, these mechanisms produce compact, well-separated class clusters without altering the underlying communication protocol between federation's participants. Experiments across three benchmarks and varying degrees of heterogeneity show gains of up to 4 percentage points over the prototype-based baselines evaluated, with improvements most pronounced under high heterogeneity. The representational nature of our framework further enables a straightforward extension to semi-supervised settings, where unlabelled data is incorporated with minimal modification, underscoring the generality of scheduled alignment as a design principle.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FedSAP框架，通过对齐课程和代理分离损失稳定联邦原型学习，提升非独立同分布数据下的视觉表征性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 联邦学习中原型方法共享类级表示，但早期聚合噪声局部原型产生的对齐压力导致大梯度，抑制局部判别结构，造成嵌入空间混乱和识别性能下降，尤其在严重非独立同分布条件下。现有方法未解决此对齐-成熟度差距问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出FedSAP，包含两个互补机制：确定性对齐课程，延迟全局对齐直至局部表示稳定；几何驱动代理分离损失，利用现有原型库在单位超球面上施加类间结构，无需额外参数或通信开销。不改变通信协议，仅调整本地学习目标。
light_analysis.result: 在三个基准数据集和不同异质性程度上，FedSAP相比原型基线最高提升4个百分点，高异质性下提升最显著。嵌入空间形成紧致、分离的类簇。此外，框架可自然扩展至半监督场景，只需少量改动。
light_analysis.conclusion: FedSAP通过调度对齐解决了联邦原型学习中的不稳定性问题，提升了非独立同分布下的识别性能。其表征性质使其易于扩展至半监督学习，展示了调度对齐作为设计原则的通用性。未来可探索更复杂的对齐策略。

title: InsightVQA: High-Dimensional Emotion-Cognitive Visual Question Answering Benchmark
abstract: Visual emotion understanding requires models not only to recognize emotional states, but also to why they arise and perform higher-level cognitive reasoning. However, existing benchmarks mainly focus on emotion recognition, offering limited support for grounded understanding and response-oriented analysis. To address this gap, we introduce \textbf{InsightVQA}, a large-scale dataset for hierarchical visual question answering on emotion understanding and cognitive reasoning. Building from 351K images collected from six public sources, we apply a rigorous multi-stage filtering pipeline to curate 138K high-confidence images. Each image is annotated at three hierarchical levels: perception QA for emotion and valence recognition, grounded understanding QA constructed from visual trigger extraction through constraint-guided generation, and cognition QA centered on response intent prediction and sequential insight reasoning. In total, InsightVQA contains 725K QA pairs. We further present \textbf{InsightVQA-Bench}, a high-quality evaluation benchmark comprising 30K samples for fine-grained evaluation. To support evaluation, we introduce \textbf{InsightNet}, an emotion-tuned baseline for MLLMs. Results demonstrate that InsightVQA poses significant challenges for grounded emotion understanding and reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: InsightVQA是一个高维情感认知视觉问答基准，包含层次化注释的725K QA对，旨在推动模型从情感识别到认知推理的进步。同时提出InsightVQA-Bench评估基准和InsightNet基线模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有情感理解基准主要关注情感识别，缺乏对情感根源和高级认知推理的支持。为解决这一问题，InsightVQA旨在提供层次化的视觉问答，涵盖感知、接地理解和认知推理，以全面评估模型的情感认知能力。
light_analysis.method: 从六个公开来源收集351K图像，经多阶段过滤得到138K高置信度图像。每个图像标注三个层次：感知QA（情感和效价识别）、接地理解QA（基于视觉触发器提取和约束引导生成）、认知QA（响应意图预测和序列推理）。共725K QA对。提出InsightVQA-Bench（30K样本）用于细粒度评估，并引入InsightNet作为基线模型。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体数值，但指出InsightVQA对基于接地的情感理解和推理构成显著挑战，表明现有模型在此基准上性能有限，需要进一步改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: InsightVQA作为高维情感认知视觉问答基准，填补了现有基准在接地理解和推理方面的空白。InsightVQA-Bench和InsightNet为未来研究提供了标准化评估和基线。该工作有望推动多模态大语言模型在情感认知领域的发展。

title: Disentanglement-Based Equivariant Learning for Compositional VQA
abstract: Compositional visual question answering (VQA) represents a challenging yet fundamental task that requires models to comprehend novel combinations of previously learned concepts. The current methods often overlook the disentanglement of underlying concepts and are restricted in terms of their ability to effectively capture the compositional variation mechanism. Moreover, the state-of-the-art techniques depend on additional clues for training, which is not feasible in real-world VQA scenarios. To address these issues, in this paper, we introduce a novel Disentanglement-based EquivAriant Learning (DEAL) framework for compositional VQA, which is guided exclusively by ground-truth answers. In DEAL, we employ causality-inspired interventions to disentangle concepts derived from visual and textual inputs within a re-encoding framework. Based on the principle of equivariance, we subsequently perform a compositional transformation on the inference input and impose the equivariant constraint on the output to augment the compositional reasoning capacity of the model. Comprehensive experiments conducted on the benchmark CLEVR-CoGenT and GQA-SGL datasets validate the superiority of our proposed DEAL approach over the existing state-of-the-art methods for compositional VQA tasks in both visual and linguistic generalization settings.
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Multimedia

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于解耦的等变学习框架DEAL，仅用真实答案指导，增强组合视觉问答的推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 组合视觉问答要求模型理解概念新组合，但现有方法忽视概念解耦，难以有效捕捉组合变化机制，且依赖额外训练线索，不适用于现实场景。因此需要一种仅依赖真实答案、能解耦概念并增强组合推理的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出DEAL框架，通过因果启发的干预在重新编码框架内解耦视觉和文本概念。基于等变性原理，对推理输入进行组合变换，并对输出施加等变约束，以增强组合推理能力。仅使用真实答案作为监督信号，无需额外线索。
light_analysis.result: 在CLEVR-CoGenT和GQA-SGL基准数据集上进行全面实验，结果表明DEAL在视觉和语言泛化设置中均优于现有最先进方法，验证了其有效性和泛化能力。具体性能指标未列出，但确认了领先性。
light_analysis.conclusion: DEAL通过解耦和等变学习提升了组合VQA的泛化能力，仅依赖真实答案，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的组合场景或扩展至其他多模态推理任务。

title: EEG-FuseFormer: A Transformer-Driven Feature Fusion Framework for Seizure Onset Prediction
abstract: Epilepsy is one of the most common neurological disorders globally, characterized by recurring seizures and significantly impacting the quality of life. Despite advancements in diagnostic techniques, the mitigation of risks faced by epilepsy patients remains challenging due to the unpredictability of seizure events. An accurate forecast of seizure onset helps to reduce risks in epilepsy patients. In this paper, we propose EEG-FuseFormer, a transformer-based feature fusion framework for seizure-onset prediction that combines intermediate features extracted from Convolutional Neural Networks-Long Short-Term Memory (CNN-LSTM) and ResNet-18 networks. The CNN-LSTM architecture captures both spatial and temporal features directly from the raw signal, whereas the ResNet-18 extracts features from the Short-Time Fourier Transform (STFT) representation of the EEG signals. Fusion is carried out using a transformer encoder, and the final prediction is generated using fully connected dense layers. The CHB-MIT dataset was used to validate the proposed model. The results show that the proposed model achieves a mean recall of 98.85% and outperforms most of the state-of-the-art methods. This study evaluates the ability of the proposed feature fusion model to generalize in cross-patient testing scenarios. Fine-tuning pre-trained models on limited target patient data (target adaptation) within the cross-patient validation framework results in higher recall, precision, and F1-score metrics in comparison to the conventional cross-patient validation approach. Finally, the runtime-based computational complexity of the model is assessed across diverse hardware platforms to highlight the performance-complexity trade-off.
comment: IEEE International Instrumentation and Measurement Technology Conference (I2MTC) 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出EEG-FuseFormer，一种基于Transformer的CNN-LSTM与ResNet-18特征融合框架，用于癫痫发作预测，在CHB-MIT数据集上达到98.85%的平均召回率。
light_analysis.motivation: 癫痫发作的不可预测性严重影响患者生活质量，现有预测方法准确性不足。需要更可靠的模型提前预警，以减少患者面临的风险。
light_analysis.method: EEG-FuseFormer结合CNN-LSTM从原始EEG中提取时空特征，ResNet-18从STFT时频图提取特征，通过Transformer编码器融合，最终由全连接层预测。使用CHB-MIT数据集，并在跨患者场景下通过目标域微调提升泛化能力。
light_analysis.result: 模型平均召回率达98.85%，优于多数现有方法。跨患者测试中，目标域微调后的召回率、精确率和F1分数均高于传统跨患者验证。计算复杂度在不同硬件平台评估，体现性能与效率的平衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: EEG-FuseFormer通过多模态特征融合有效提升癫痫发作预测准确率，跨患者泛化通过微调增强。未来可探索更轻量级结构或在线适应策略。

title: Multimodal Approaches for Visually-Rich Document Type Classification: A Comparative Analysis
abstract: Document type classification in visually rich documents remains challenging, as relevant information is distributed across textual, visual, and layout modalities. To capture this complexity, current approaches rely on diverse multimodal modeling strategies, resulting in heterogeneous architectures that complicate systematic comparison. This variability is also reflected in existing comparative studies, which often rely on heterogeneous evaluation setups, further complicating systematic comparison and making it difficult to assess progress. To address these limitations, this work provides a structured analysis of multimodal design strategies across transformer- and LLM-based architectures, combined with a controlled empirical comparison within a unified experimental framework. Specifically, four representative models (LayoutLMv3, Donut, Qwen3-VL-32B-Instruct, and Qwen3-32B) are evaluated on the RVL-CDIP benchmark to systematically analyze the contributions of text, image, and layout information for document type classification, with a particular focus on contrasting OCR-dependent and OCR-free approaches. The results show that specialized multimodal Transformers outperform LLM-based approaches on visually rich and layout-intensive documents. Image information contributes most strongly to reliable classification, while OCR-derived text provides useful but secondary support. These findings highlight that multimodal processing remains essential for documents with pronounced layout structure. Overall, the study provides a systematic basis for comparing multimodal architectures and offers practical guidance for selecting effective feature combinations and model designs for document type classification.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提供了一种结构化的多模态设计策略分析，在统一框架下对比了Transformer和LLM架构，发现专用多模态Transformer在视觉丰富文档分类上优于LLM，图像信息最关键。
light_analysis.motivation: 文档类型分类在视觉丰富文档中面临挑战，因为相关信息分布在文本、视觉和布局多种模态中。现有方法依赖多种多模态建模策略，导致架构异质性，难以系统比较。同时，现有比较研究常使用异质评估设置，进一步阻碍了系统对比和进展评估。因此，需要一种结构化分析和受控实证比较来澄清不同模态的贡献。
light_analysis.method: 论文在统一实验框架下，对四种代表性模型（LayoutLMv3、Donut、Qwen3-VL-32B-Instruct和Qwen3-32B）进行受控实证比较。使用RVL-CDIP基准，系统分析文本、图像和布局信息对文档类型分类的贡献，特别对比了依赖OCR和不依赖OCR的方法。核心方法为结构化分析多模态设计策略，涵盖基于Transformer和LLM的架构。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，专用多模态Transformer（如LayoutLMv3）在视觉丰富和布局密集型文档上优于基于LLM的方法（如Qwen3变体）。图像信息对可靠分类贡献最大，而OCR提取的文本提供有用但次要的支持。这些发现强调了多模态处理对于具有明显布局结构的文档仍然至关重要。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提供了系统比较多模态架构的基础，并为选择有效的特征组合和模型设计提供了实用指导。主要贡献在于明确了图像信息在文档类型分类中的主导作用，并指出专用多模态Transformer仍优于通用LLM。未来工作可探索更高效的OCR-free方法或更复杂的多模态融合策略，以进一步提升性能。

title: InfoMerge: Information-aware Token Compression for Efficient Video Large Language Models
abstract: Video Large Language Models (Video-LLMs) achieve strong performance in video understanding, but their excessive visual tokens bring substantial computational overhead. Existing training-free compression methods improve inference efficiency by reducing visual tokens, yet they often rely on local adjacent-frame similarity for temporal redundancy estimation or allocate token budgets mainly according to segment length. Such designs are sensitive to frame-level noise and fail to capture the non-uniform information distribution of real-world videos. To address these challenges, we propose InfoMerge, a training-free visual token compression method that improves token utilization through robust redundancy estimation and content-aware budget allocation. Specifically, we propose the Temporal Fingerprint Difference: a segment-level second-order temporal redundancy estimation strategy, which models the temporal similarity structure of tokens at the same spatial positions within each segment. We further introduce Content-Aware Budget Allocation (CABA), which dynamically allocates segment-level token budgets based on segment uniqueness and spectral-entropy-based representational richness. By reducing repeated preservation of redundant static regions and allocating more tokens to informative segments, InfoMerge makes better use of the limited token budget while maintaining strong performance. Extensive experiments show that InfoMerge achieves strong efficiency--accuracy trade-offs across multiple benchmarks and backbones, with more pronounced advantages under aggressive compression. On LLaVA-OneVision-7B, InfoMerge retains 98.8\% of the original average performance while reducing 85\% of visual tokens and achieving a 4.24-fold speedup in the prefill stage.

light_analysis.overview: 提出InfoMerge，一种训练自由的视觉标记压缩方法，通过鲁棒冗余估计和内容感知预算分配提升视频大语言模型效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频大语言模型（Video-LLMs）在视频理解中性能强劲，但过多的视觉标记带来巨大计算开销。现有训练自由的压缩方法依赖局部帧间相似性或按片段长度分配预算，对噪声敏感且无法捕捉视频的非均匀信息分布，导致标记利用率低。
light_analysis.method: InfoMerge包含两个核心组件：时间指纹差异（Temporal Fingerprint Difference），一种片段级二阶时间冗余估计策略，建模同一空间位置标记的时间相似性结构；内容感知预算分配（CABA），基于片段独特性和谱熵表示丰富度动态分配片段级标记预算。通过减少冗余静态区域的重复保留，将更多标记分配给信息丰富片段。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准和骨干网络上实现强效率-精度权衡，尤其在激进压缩下优势更明显。在LLaVA-OneVision-7B上，InfoMerge保留原始平均性能的98.8%，同时减少85%视觉标记，预填充阶段实现4.24倍加速。
light_analysis.conclusion: InfoMerge通过鲁棒冗余估计和内容感知预算分配，显著提升标记利用率，在保持性能的同时大幅降低计算开销。该方法为视频大语言模型的高效推理提供了有效方案，未来可探索扩展至在线视频流场景。

title: Ultra Diffusion Poser: Diffusion-Based Human Motion Tracking From Sparse Inertial Sensors and Ranging-Based Between-Sensor Distances
abstract: Methods using inertial measurement units (IMUs) provide a wearable alternative to camera-based motion capture. To mitigate drift from inertial signals, recent sparse inertial pose estimators integrate inter-sensor distances measured by ultra-wideband (UWB) ranging. So far, UWB distances have only been used as an additional input feature, ignoring the physical constraints they impose on sensor positions. However, these distances can also be used to reconstruct the underlying 3D sensor layout, which in turn provides more informative input for pose reconstruction. We propose Ultra Diffusion Poser, a diffusion model that explicitly models these geometric constraints. It includes a Spatial Layout Module that analytically reconstructs the 3D sensor positions from UWB measurements. These sensor positions are used alongside IMU signals and UWB distances as a conditioning signal during diffusion. Still, network predictions can violate inter-sensor distance measurements. To address this, we introduce UWB-Diffusion Guidance, which encourages alignment between predicted poses and measured distances during diffusion sampling. Together, these contributions enable our model to achieve state-of-the-art performance, reducing joint position error by up to 22% over prior work.
comment: CVPR 2026 - Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition

light_analysis.overview: 提出Ultra Diffusion Poser，一种利用扩散模型显式建模超宽带测距几何约束的稀疏惯导人体运动跟踪方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于惯性测量单元的运动捕捉方法存在漂移问题，虽然超宽带测距被用作输入特征，但未充分利用其对传感器位置的物理约束。这些距离本可用于重建三维传感器布局，从而为姿态重建提供更丰富的信息，而现有方法忽略了这一点。
light_analysis.method: 提出Ultra Diffusion Poser，包含空间布局模块，从超宽带测量中解析重建三维传感器位置。这些位置与惯性信号和超宽带距离一起作为扩散过程中的条件信号。同时引入超宽带扩散引导，在采样过程中强制预测姿态与测量距离一致，确保几何约束的满足。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集上达到最先进性能，相比先前工作，关节位置误差降低高达22%。明确展示了显式建模几何约束带来的显著改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通过显式建模超宽带测距的几何约束，有效提升了稀疏惯导人体运动跟踪的精度。学术上验证了物理约束在生成模型中的价值，实际应用于可穿戴运动捕捉系统。未来可探索更高效的传感器布局重建或扩展到更多传感器类型。

title: Hybrid Neural Ordinary Differential Equations for Data-Efficient Polymerization Modeling with Incomplete Kinetics
abstract: Accurate prediction of polymerization dynamics is essential for process design, control, and optimization. Yet, purely mechanistic models require labor-intensive parameterization of partially characterized kinetics, while purely data-driven models demand large, diverse datasets that are costly to obtain, particularly in early-design stages. We propose a hybrid Neural Ordinary Differential Equation (NODE) framework for data-efficient modeling of free-radical polymerization. Using batch polymerization of methyl methacrylate (MMA) as a case study, the mechanistic mass balances are retained explicitly, and only the partially-characterized effective radical concentration governing monomer consumption is learned from data through a neural network surrogate, while established reactions such as initiator decomposition, propagation, and termination remain physically modeled. The hybrid NODE is evaluated against a discrete-time feedforward neural network and a purely data-driven NODE under sparse data conditions, with models trained on as few as ten measurements under both regular and irregular sampling. The hybrid NODE consistently achieves lower prediction errors and more physically consistent extrapolations than both purely data-driven baselines. In a generalization scenario with noisy data and unseen operating conditions, the hybrid NODE achieves an RMSE of 0.013, compared to 0.31 for the data-driven NODE and 0.68 for the discrete-time model, demonstrating that learning only a closure term rather than the full dynamics is sufficient for reliable prediction under limited data availability.

light_analysis.overview: 提出混合神经常微分方程框架，融合机理模型与神经网络，仅学习部分动力学参数，实现数据高效的聚合反应建模。
light_analysis.motivation: 聚合反应动力学建模中，纯机理模型需要大量参数化工作，纯数据驱动模型依赖昂贵的大数据集。在早期设计阶段，数据有限且动力学表征不完整，亟需一种数据高效的方法来准确预测聚合动力学，以支持过程设计、控制和优化。
light_analysis.method: 保留自由基聚合的机理质量平衡方程，仅将部分表征的有效自由基浓度作为闭合项，通过神经网络从数据中学习，而引发剂分解、链增长、终止等已知反应保持物理建模。以甲基丙烯酸甲酯（MMA）批次聚合为例，在稀疏数据（仅10个测量点）下与离散时间前馈网络和纯数据驱动NODE对比，评估模型性能。
light_analysis.result: 在稀疏数据条件下，混合NODE始终比纯数据驱动基线获得更低的预测误差和更物理一致的外推。在包含噪声数据和未见操作条件的泛化场景中，混合NODE的RMSE为0.013，显著优于数据驱动NODE（0.31）和离散时间模型（0.68），验证了仅学习闭合项即可在有限数据下可靠预测。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作证明了将机理知识与数据驱动学习结合的有效性，只需学习少量的未表征动力学即可实现高精度预测，避免了完整动力学辨识的困难。方法具有普适性，可推广至其他聚合体系或反应工程，潜在局限性在于依赖准确的机理模型结构，未来可探索自动化模型选择。

title: TimeBlocks: Foundational and Continual Time-Series Blockbase -- Extended Version
abstract: The ongoing digitization has led to a proliferation of time-series data streams that monitor a variety of processes, from which valuable insights may be obtained. Further, the emergence of successful foundational language models begs the question of whether it is possible to achieve time-series models with the foundational properties of handling multiple tasks, while being sufficiently lightweight to allow real-time data stream processing. Existing foundational time-series models are often large and only effective in offline settings without stringent time and computational constraints, and where repeated model calibration is not needed. However, when applied to data streams, these models are ineffective due to their size and lack of support for continual calibration, which compromise their ability to deliver accurate real-time responses, their durability, and their deployability in hardware-limited settings. We propose TimeBlocks to enable versatile time-series processing by facilitating the efficient building of lightweight models suitable for multiple tasks under variable conditions. In particular, the method maintains a pool of interchangeable and modular model blocks that can be used to construct new time-series models. When presented with specific time-series data, a routing strategy iteratively selects the most suitable blocks to construct a lightweight and accurate model for the data. We equip TimeBlocks with a method called StreamCore to build a representative small subset of the data stream, which preserves a guaranteed approximation of the stream over time, enabling continual model calibration. An experimental study on multiple data sets and covering multiple tasks shows that TimeBlocks enables to build models capable of outperforming existing baselines.
comment: 15 pages. An extended version of "TimeBlocks: Versatile and Continual Time-Series Blockbase" accepted at SIGKDD 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出TimeBlocks框架，通过可互换模块块和流数据摘要实现轻量级、多任务、持续校准的时间序列基础模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有时间序列基础模型规模庞大，仅适用于离线场景，缺乏实时处理和持续校准能力，难以部署于硬件受限环境，且无法有效处理数据流。亟需轻量级、支持多任务和持续校准的模型。
light_analysis.method: TimeBlocks维护一个可互换的模块块池，通过路由策略迭代选择最合适的块构建轻量级模型。配备StreamCore方法，从数据流中构建代表性小子集，保证流的近似，支持持续校准。实验覆盖多个数据集和任务。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，TimeBlocks构建的模型在多个数据集和任务上优于现有基线方法，实现了轻量级、多任务处理，同时支持持续校准。具体性能提升摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: TimeBlocks通过模块化和流摘要技术，实现了可部署于实时数据流环境的轻量级基础模型，兼具多任务处理能力和持续校准功能。未来可探索更高效的块选择策略和更广泛的适用场景。

title: VLBM: Variational Latent Basis Modeling for OOD Robust Multivariate Time Series Forecasting
abstract: Out of distribution (OOD) events in multivariate time series forecasting are rare but often dominate real world risk, making average case forecasting insufficient for reliable deployment. Under standard average risk training on mixed ID/OOD distributions, optimization signals from rare OOD events can be overwhelmed by frequent in distribution (ID) patterns, so strong benchmark accuracy may not translate into reliability under high impact shifts. To address this issue, we propose VLBM (Variational Latent Basis Model), a theory guided latent forecasting framework that separates stable dynamics from OOD induced deviations. VLBM learns a shared latent basis that defines a low rank subspace for stable ID dynamics, explicitly decomposes inputs into basis subspace components and orthogonal residual components, and aligns a future aware posterior with a future blind prior so that test time latent inference depends only on historical input. Across 12 benchmark tasks spanning transportation, weather, power systems, and other real world domains, including newly constructed real world OOD traffic datasets, VLBM achieves state of the art OOD robustness and ID accuracy, with average MAE and MSE gains of 15.08\% and 7.74\% over the strongest baseline. On a synthetic simulation dataset, VLBM also consistently achieves the best performance and better tracks OOD pulse recovery. These results support latent structured forecasting as a principled route to robust prediction under mixed ID and OOD conditions. The code is available at https://github.com/leijieruilq/VLBM_OOD_forecast.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VLBM模型，通过变分潜在基建模分离稳定动态与OOD偏差，实现多变量时间序列的鲁棒预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 多变量时间序列中的分布外(OOD)事件虽罕见但主导真实风险，而标准平均风险训练中OOD信号被频繁的分布内(ID)模式淹没。现有方法难以同时保证ID精度和OOD鲁棒性，亟需一种能明确分离稳定动态与异常偏差的预测框架。
light_analysis.method: VLBM基于变分推断，学习共享潜在基以定义低秩子空间捕捉ID稳定动态，将输入分解为基子空间分量和正交残差分量。通过对齐未来感知后验与未来盲先验，使测试时潜在推断仅依赖历史输入。该方法理论引导，无需显式OOD标签。
light_analysis.result: 在12个基准任务（交通、天气、电力等）上，VLBM在OOD鲁棒性和ID精度上均达最优，相比最强基线平均MAE降低15.08%、MSE降低7.74%。在合成模拟数据上，也最佳恢复OOD脉冲。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: VLBM通过潜在结构化预测为混合ID/OOD场景下的鲁棒预测提供了原则性方案。其分解策略和变分对齐机制有效应对OOD事件，具有广泛应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的潜在动态建模。

title: Edge-aware Decoding for Neural Asymmetric Routing
abstract: Neural asymmetric routing models increasingly encode directionality through matrix representations and asymmetry-aware attention. The final routing action, however, is not a node in isolation but a directed transition chosen under the current partial route. This creates a representation--decision mismatch: pairwise cost information may be encoded upstream while the final candidate logit is still largely parameterized as context--node compatibility. We propose a decoder-design principle for neural asymmetric routing: the final score should explicitly expose transition-level quantities suggested by the problem's cost-to-go structure. We instantiate this principle with an edge-aware decoder that adds candidate-specific terms for the current directed edge, return-to-start closure, and static lightweight lookahead, while keeping the representation backbone fixed. On a controlled SVD/Sinkhorn asymmetric backbone, the decoder improves over the RADAR reference when trained on ATSP-100 and evaluated zero-shot on ATSP-100/200/500/1000, reducing the ATSP-1000 gap from $4.13\%$ to $2.73\%$. On ACVRP, the same score-level modification shows the same qualitative trend under a richer routing state. ATSP ablations and directed-transition diagnostics sharpen the mechanism: the strongest evidence concerns sensitivity to the current directed edge, while closure and static lookahead act as heuristic continuation cues. The results support a mechanism study: a key decoder-side signal in neural asymmetric routing is decision-time exposure of transition-level edge information.

light_analysis.overview: 提出边缘感知解码器，通过在解码阶段显式暴露过渡级信息，解决神经非对称路由中表征-决策不匹配问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经非对称路由模型通过矩阵表示和方向性注意力编码方向性，但最终路由动作是在当前部分路径下选择的定向转移，而现有模型将最终候选对数参数化为上下文-节点兼容性，导致表征与决策不匹配。这种不匹配限制了模型对转移级成本信息的利用，尤其在长序列泛化时效果不佳。因此需要一种解码器设计原则，使最终得分显式暴露成本结构中的转移级量。
light_analysis.method: 提出边缘感知解码器设计原则，在固定表征骨干网络基础上，为当前定向边缘、返回起点闭合和静态轻量级前瞻添加候选特定项。实例化在SVD/Sinkhorn非对称骨干网络上，通过解码器改进实现转移级信息的显式暴露。训练在ATSP-100上，零样本评估至ATSP-1000。在ACVRP上同样验证了丰富路由状态下的效果。
light_analysis.result: 在ATSP问题中，使用边缘感知解码器将ATSP-1000的最优间隙从4.13%降至2.73%，零样本泛化至不同规模。ACVRP上展示了相同趋势。消融实验和定向转移诊断表明，当前定向边缘的敏感性是最强证据，闭合和静态前瞻作为启发式连续线索。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作提出一种有效的解码器设计原则，通过决策时暴露转移级边缘信息显著提升神经非对称路由的性能和泛化能力。实验验证了边缘感知信号在解码侧的关键作用，为后续路由问题解码器设计提供了新思路。未来可探索更复杂的转移级信息集成方式或在其他组合优化问题中的应用。

title: Rethinking Evaluation Paradigms in IBP-based Certified Training
abstract: Deep neural networks achieve strong performance on many supervised learning tasks but remain vulnerable to adversarial perturbations. Neural network verification provides mathematically rigorous robustness guarantees, yet at substantial computational cost. To mitigate this, certified training techniques optimise for verifiable robustness during training, typically inducing a trade-off between natural and certified accuracy controlled by method-specific hyperparameters. Because these metrics are inherently conflicting, the common practice of reporting a single configuration is problematic: it can mislead conclusions about overall performance and prevents unbiased assessments of the state of the art. We address this by evaluating certified training methods via Pareto front comparisons over the natural--certified accuracy trade-off. To enable fair, method-agnostic comparisons, we perform efficient automated multi-objective hyperparameter optimisation to identify a set of Pareto-optimal configurations for each method. This approach often uncovers substantial undertuning in previously reported configurations, yielding superior performance and establishing a new state of the art. Leveraging these fronts, we present the first comprehensive multi-objective comparison of certified training approaches, showing that prior advancements are less pronounced than assumed and revealing previously unreported performance complementarities.

light_analysis.overview: 提出通过帕累托前沿比较来评估认证训练方法，揭示先前方法的不足并建立新SOTA。
light_analysis.motivation: 认证训练方法在自然准确率和认证准确率之间存在权衡，传统单配置报告方式容易误导结论，阻碍公平评估。现有方法缺乏统一的比较基准和超参数优化，导致性能被低估或误解。
light_analysis.method: 采用多目标超参数优化自动搜索每个认证训练方法的帕累托最优配置，构建自然-认证准确率的帕累托前沿，实现方法无关的公平比较。该方法系统性地调整超参数，发现先前报告中的欠调优现象。
light_analysis.result: 新发现多个方法的帕累托前沿，显示先前设置的配置往往未达到最优，通过优化获得了显著性能提升，并建立了新的最优边界。对比表明，之前的进展被高估，且不同方法之间存在互补性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作提出了更严谨的评估范式，纠正了先前对认证训练性能的认知偏差，为未来方法设计和比较提供了可靠基准。局限性在于计算成本较高，但可推广至其他鲁棒性训练框架。

title: Variational Learning for Insertion-based Generation
abstract: Non-monotonic sequence generation methods, such as masked diffusion models, provide a flexible alternative to left-to-right autoregressive modeling by allowing tokens to be generated in non-fixed and prescribed orders. Despite their practical advantages, most existing non-monotonic models are order-agnostic and rely on a fixed-length grid, limiting their ability to support variable-length generation and adaptive insertion order. In this work, we introduce a probabilistic framework for learning insertion order in variable-length insertion models. We formalize a bijective correspondence between insertion trajectories and permutations, which enables an exact reparameterization of the data likelihood as a sum over permutations. Building on this result, we propose the Insertion Process (IP), a stochastic generative model that jointly learns where to insert, what to insert, and when to terminate, trained via permutation-based variational inference. Unlike prior fixed-canvas approaches, IP natively supports variable-length generation and learns data-driven preferences over insertion orders. Experiments on goal-conditioned planning and molecular string generation demonstrate that learning insertion order improves both modeling quality and generalization in domains without a canonical left-to-right structure.

light_analysis.overview: 提出插入过程（IP），一种通过排列变分推断联合学习插入位置、内容和终止的变长序列生成模型，支持数据驱动的插入顺序学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有非单调序列生成方法（如掩码扩散模型）通常顺序无关且依赖固定长度网格，限制了变长生成和自适应插入顺序的能力。本文旨在解决这些局限，提出一种概率框架来学习变长插入模型中的插入顺序，以提升建模灵活性和泛化性能。
light_analysis.method: 通过形式化插入轨迹与排列间的双射对应，将数据似然重参数化为排列上的和。提出插入过程（IP），一种随机生成模型，联合学习插入位置、插入内容和终止条件，采用基于排列的变分推断进行训练。IP原生支持变长生成，并能学习数据驱动的插入顺序偏好。
light_analysis.result: 在目标条件规划和分子字符串生成任务上，实验表明学习插入顺序提升了建模质量和泛化能力。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但与传统固定画布方法相比，IP在无标准左到右结构的领域表现出更优效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出的插入过程（IP）为变长插入式生成提供了灵活的概率框架，通过学习插入顺序显著改善了非单调序列生成的质量和泛化性。该工作扩展了生成模型在复杂序列任务（如规划和分子设计）中的应用潜力，未来可探索更高效的推理或结合其他扩散策略。

title: Equilibrated Diffusion: Frequency-aware Textual Embedding for Equilibrated Image Customization
abstract: Image customization learns target subjects from reference concept images and generates conditioned images per text prompts, mainly modifying styles or backgrounds. Prevailing methods adopt fine-tuning to pack diverse concept attributes into a unified latent embedding, yet entangled attributes hinder elimination of irrelevant disturbances from style and background. To address this issue, we propose Equilibrated Diffusion, a frequency-driven approach that disentangles tangled concept features for balanced customization and consistent text-visual matching. Unlike conventional methods learning full concepts with shared embeddings and unified tuning, our work utilizes the inherent link between image frequency components and semantics: low frequencies represent subject content and high frequencies correspond to styles. We decompose concepts in frequency space and optimize each embedding independently. This separate optimization enables the denoiser to capture style detached from subject identity and generalize better to unseen stylistic prompts. Merging multi-frequency embeddings preserves the model's original spatial customization ability. We further deploy mask-guided diffusion to restrict irrelevant background changes and boost text alignment. Residual Reference Attention (RRA) is inserted into spatial attention to retain subject structure and identity consistency. Experiments prove Equilibrated Diffusion exceeds mainstream baselines on subject fidelity and text adherence, verifying our method's superiority.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种频率感知的均衡扩散方法，通过解耦概念特征实现图像定制中主体保真与文本对齐的平衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有图像定制方法通过微调将多种概念属性打包到统一潜在嵌入中，导致风格和背景等无关干扰难以消除，影响定制效果和文本匹配。该研究旨在解耦概念特征，实现主体内容与风格分离，从而提升定制图像的保真度和文本一致性。
light_analysis.method: 利用图像频率成分与语义的关联：低频代表主体内容，高频代表风格。在频率空间解耦概念，独立优化各频率嵌入，使去噪器捕获与主体身份分开的风格，更好地泛化到未见风格提示。合并多频率嵌入保留模型原始空间定制能力，并引入掩码引导扩散限制背景变化，插入残差参考注意力（RRA）到空间注意力以保持主体结构与身份一致性。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，所提方法在主体保真度和文本一致性上均超越主流基线，验证了频率解耦策略的有效性。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但与现有方法对比中展现出优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出一种频率驱动的均衡扩散方法，通过解耦概念特征有效提升了图像定制的平衡性和文本视觉匹配。该方法具有学术价值，可为图像编辑和生成提供新思路，未来可探索更细粒度的频率分解或扩展至视频定制。

title: Understanding-Enhanced Model Collaboration for Long-Tailed Egocentric Mistake Detection
abstract: In this report, we address the problem of determining whether a user performs an action incorrectly from egocentric video data. To this end, we propose an Understanding-Enhanced Model Collaboration Method (UE-MCM) that combines efficient coarse-grained video understanding with accurate fine-grained action reasoning. Specifically, UE-MCM contains a small model branch and a large model branch. The large model branch focuses on whether the fine-grained action itself is executed incorrectly, while the small model branch jointly takes the coarse-grained video and fine-grained segment as input to identify actions that may be locally correct but inconsistent with the overall workflow. The small model branch is built on a CLIP4CLIP video encoder initialized from a CLIP model enhanced by Diffusion Contrastive Reconstruction, and the large model branch uses the Qwen3-VL Embedding model to extract high-capacity representations from fine-grained action segments. The small-branch prediction and the large-branch prediction are then adaptively fused by a lightweight collaboration gate. To handle the long-tailed distribution of mistake instances, we optimize the classifiers with complementary objectives, including reweighted cross-entropy, AUC-oriented learning, and label-aware adjustment. The resulting system balances speed and accuracy, making it effective for detecting subtle, rare, and ambiguous mistakes in egocentric instructional videos.

light_analysis.overview: 提出理解增强的模型协作方法，结合粗粒度视频理解与细粒度动作推理，用于检测自中心视频中的长尾分布错误动作。
light_analysis.motivation: 在自中心视频中检测用户是否错误执行动作是一个重要问题，但现有方法难以同时兼顾推理速度与准确性，且错误实例呈现长尾分布，导致模型对稀有错误检测效果不佳。因此需要一种既能高效理解整体流程又能精确分析局部动作的方法。
light_analysis.method: UE-MCM包含小模型分支和大模型分支：小模型基于CLIP4CLIP编码器（经扩散对比重建增强）同时处理粗粒度视频和细粒度片段；大模型使用Qwen3-VL提取细粒度动作的高容量表示。两者预测通过轻量级协作门自适应融合。针对长尾分布，采用重加权交叉熵、AUC导向学习和标签感知调整等互补目标优化分类器。
light_analysis.result: 系统在平衡速度与准确性的前提下，有效检测出自中心教学视频中的细微、罕见和模糊错误。摘要未明确报告具体数值指标，但指出该方法通过模型协作和长尾优化提升了检测性能，尤其适用于资源受限或需要实时反馈的场景。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种结合效率与精度的检测框架，通过双分支模型协作和长尾优化策略，解决了自中心视频中动作错误检测的挑战。该方法具有实际应用价值，可用于辅助学习、自动评估等场景。未来可探索更轻量化的模型或扩展到多模态错误检测。

title: How Hard Can It Be? Hardness-Aware Multi-Objective Unlearning
abstract: Machine unlearning aims to remove the influence of specific forget training data due to privacy, copyright or bias concerns while maintaining the model performance on the remaining retain data. Existing unlearning algorithms, such as optimizing a weighted combination of losses, have tried to achieve these objectives of improving forget quality and maintaining retain utility. However, they do not guarantee that these objectives can be improved by a specified extent for all forget and retain data. In this work, we address this limitation with a novel and theoretically-grounded approach from a constrained optimization perspective. Firstly, we identify that the hardness of reconciling both objectives can be quantified by the similarity between the forget data and the retain data. Next, we derive an unlearning algorithm (HAMU) with the overall goal of guaranteeing a specified improvement in forget quality while minimizing the retain utility cost/degradation by updating the model weights based on our hardness measure. Our hardness measure also informs users when retain utility degradation is unavoidable, i.e., both objectives cannot be improved simultaneously, and stopping should be considered. Our algorithm is applicable to non-convex models and is easily parallelizable, making it readily deployable in real-world scenarios. We empirically demonstrate HAMU's superior performance over baselines on both image and text datasets using large models. Our code is available at https://github.com/aoi3142/HAMU.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于硬度的多目标遗忘算法（HAMU），从约束优化角度同时保证遗忘质量提升与保留效用损失最小化。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有遗忘算法通过优化损失的加权组合，但无法确保对所有遗忘和保留数据都能同时改善遗忘质量和保留效用。该研究从约束优化视角出发，量化两个目标调和的难度——即遗忘数据与保留数据的相似性，从而解决这一局限性。
light_analysis.method: HAMU算法以约束优化为框架，首先定义硬度度量（基于遗忘与保留数据的相似性），然后根据硬度指导模型权重更新，目标是在保证遗忘质量指定提升的同时最小化保留效用损失。该度量还能在保留效用退化不可避免时提示停止。算法适用于非凸模型且可并行化。
light_analysis.result: 在大规模图像和文本数据集上使用大型模型进行实验，HAMU在遗忘质量和保留效用上均优于基线方法。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但代码已开源（https://github.com/aoi3142/HAMU）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种理论扎实的遗忘算法，从约束优化角度处理多目标平衡，具备实际部署能力。学术价值在于引入硬度量化思想，实际价值在于可并行化且适用于非凸模型。未来可能探索更复杂数据分布下的扩展。

title: Jailbreaking Multimodal Large Language Models using Multi-Clip Video
abstract: As multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have advanced to process video inputs, concerns have emerged about their potential for malicious misuse. Prior jailbreak studies have shown that safety alignment in MLLMs can be bypassed through visual inputs, yet it remains unclear which properties of video inputs induce this vulnerability. To address this gap, we introduce Multi-Clip Video (MCV) SafetyBench, a dataset of 2,920 videos designed to evaluate how the diversity of video inputs affects the vulnerability of MLLMs. Each video consists of multiple short clips depicting diverse contexts related to a harmful query. Experiments on eight representative video MLLMs show that attack success consistently increases with the number of clips. Our results further indicate that the video modality is (1) more vulnerable than the image modality, (2) more vulnerable to dynamic videos than to static videos, and (3) more vulnerable when videos contain more diverse contexts. Building on these findings, we propose a defense strategy that leverages the relative robustness of the image modality.
comment: 27 pages, 20 figures, Accepted to the Main Conference of ACL 2026

light_analysis.overview: 研究视频输入多样性对多模态大语言模型安全漏洞的影响，提出MCV SafetyBench数据集和基于图像模态鲁棒性的防御策略。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大语言模型处理视频输入时存在恶意滥用风险，已有研究显示视觉输入可绕过安全对齐，但视频输入的具体属性（如多样性）如何导致漏洞尚不明确。系统评估视频属性对安全性的影响有助于理解并防范此类攻击。
light_analysis.method: 构建MCV SafetyBench数据集，包含2920个由多个短片段组成的视频，每个视频围绕有害查询展示多样上下文。在8个代表性视频MLLM上测试，分析片段数量对攻击成功率的影响，并比较视频与图像、动态与静态、多样化与单一上下文视频的脆弱性差异。
light_analysis.result: 攻击成功率随片段数量增加而提升；视频模态比图像模态更易受攻击（摘要未明确具体数值）；动态视频比静态视频更脆弱；上下文更多样的视频更易被攻击。基于图像模态的相对鲁棒性提出防御策略。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了视频输入的多样性是多模态大语言模型安全漏洞的关键因素，为理解风险提供了新视角。提出的基于图像模态鲁棒性的防御策略有助于提升模型安全性，未来可探索更通用的防御机制。

title: When Tabular Foundation Models Transfer Across Modalities: A Systematic Evaluation Across 95 Datasets, 7 Modalities, and Two Regimes
abstract: We present a single classification pipeline that combines an Equiangular Tight Frame (ETF) preprocessing stage with a tabular foundation model for in-context inference, applied identically across modalities once data is mapped to fixed vector representations. We evaluate it on 95 datasets spanning seven signal modalities -- vision, audio, speech, text, molecular, time-series, and tabular. The main methodological contribution is to fix the comparison object: throughout the paper, performance is judged against the strongest lightweight tuned baseline on the same frozen features, while oracle selection, deployed selection, and specialized fine-tuning are reported separately.   The pipeline is broadly competitive with strong lightweight tuned baselines on the same frozen features. It does not match the very best specialized models or heavily tuned pipelines on every task, but it stays close, and it runs much faster -- typically 4 to 200 times faster than full backbone fine-tuning, often at comparable quality.   We describe how to deploy the pipeline in practice: when to apply ETF preprocessing, how to stop its training without a validation split, how to set up the in-context classifier, and how to calibrate the resulting probabilities. The calibration step is non-cosmetic: TabICL produces well-calibrated probabilities by construction, ETF preprocessing initially disrupts that calibration, and the post-hoc rescaling restores it -- yielding a per-prediction confidence signal that practitioners can use as a trust threshold for confidence-gated deployment. We also report where the pipeline should not be expected to help, and how to identify those cases in advance.
comment: 24 pages, 5 figures. Code and data available at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19982636

light_analysis.overview: 提出结合ETF预处理与表格基础模型的统一分类流水线，跨模态评估其通用性与效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有机器学习方法通常针对单一模态设计，缺乏跨模态的通用轻量级替代方案。该研究旨在验证表格基础模型在跨模态分类任务中的迁移能力，解决多模态场景下模型复用困难、调优成本高的问题。通过系统性评估95个数据集、7种模态，探索一种低成本、高效率的通用分类流水线。
light_analysis.method: 核心方法为结合等角紧框架（ETF）预处理与表格基础模型TabICL进行上下文推理。ETF将数据映射为固定向量表示，TabICL基于上下文进行分类。实验覆盖视觉、音频、语音、文本、分子、时间序列和表格共7种模态，与强轻量级调优基线对比。提供实际部署指南，包括ETF预处理时机、无需验证集停止训练、上下文分类器设置及概率校准步骤。
light_analysis.result: 该方法在相同冻结特征上与强轻量级调优基线整体竞争性相当，虽未在所有任务上超越最专业的模型，但性能接近且速度快4-200倍（相比完整主干网络微调）。校准步骤显著恢复ETF预处理破坏的校准性，提供可靠的逐预测置信度信号，支持置信度门控部署。
light_analysis.conclusion: 验证了表格基础模型跨模态迁移的可行性，提供了实用且高效的通用分类流水线。学术贡献在于系统性地跨模态评估并明确适用条件；实际价值在于显著降低计算成本，并给出部署建议。局限性包括未能匹配顶尖专业模型，未来可探索更复杂的ETF设计或结合微调策略。

title: Multimodal Action Diffusion for Robust End-to-End Autonomous Driving
abstract: End-to-End Autonomous Driving (E2E-AD) systems have largely converged on predicting intermediate trajectory waypoints, delegating final control to hand-crafted controllers with GPS access. Direct control-signal prediction (outputting throttle, steer and brake in an end-to-end fashion) remains underexplored, and critically, the role of action multimodality in such systems is not well understood. We argue that moving beyond deterministic, single-action outputs is not merely a modelling choice, but a key driver of driving performance, representational quality, and training stability. To validate this, we introduce the Action Diffusion Transformer (ADT), an anchor-free diffusion transformer trained with a MSE objective that natively models the multimodal distribution of plausible driving actions. Rather than committing to a single deterministic command, ADT generates K action candidates and selects the most suitable one at inference via Nearest Neighbour Matching (NNM). Beyond strong benchmark numbers, we show that action multimodality yields measurable benefits in learned representations and behavioral consistency, effects that deterministic architectures cannot replicate. ADT surpasses previous state-of-the-art on the challenging closed-loop Bench2Drive benchmark while achieving ten times lower latency, demonstrating that expressive, multimodal action modelling is both practically efficient and conceptually essential for robust end-to-end driving.
comment: Preprint. June 1st, 2026. Corresponding author: Jorge Daniel Rodríguez-Vidal

light_analysis.overview: 提出Action Diffusion Transformer (ADT)，通过原生建模多模态动作分布提升端到端自动驾驶的鲁棒性和效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有端到端自动驾驶系统大多预测中间轨迹点，依赖手工控制器和GPS，而直接控制信号预测研究不足，且动作多模态性在该领域的角色未被充分理解。本文论证超越确定性单动作输出并非仅是建模选择，而是驾驶性能、表示质量和训练稳定性的关键驱动力。
light_analysis.method: 提出ADT，一种无锚点的扩散变换器，使用MSE损失训练，原生建模多模态动作分布，而非预测单一确定性动作。推理时通过最近邻匹配(NNM)从K个候选动作中选择最优者，无需手工控制器或GPS信息。
light_analysis.result: 在闭环Bench2Drive基准上，ADT超越之前最先进方法，同时延迟降低十倍。实验表明动作多模态性在学习表示和行为一致性方面带来可衡量的改进，且确定性架构无法复现这些效果，验证了多模态建模的有效性和效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: ADT表明表达性多模态动作建模对于鲁棒端到端驾驶既实用高效又概念必要，推动了直接控制信号预测的发展。未来可探索更高效的动作选择机制或扩展到其他机器人控制任务。

title: WebSpline: Structure-Informed Splines for Real-Time 3D Gaussians from Monocular Videos
abstract: Dynamic scene reconstruction from monocular videos remains highly challenging, as existing methods often struggle to balance global structural coherence and local fine-grained details under limited multi-view cues. To address this challenge, we propose WebSpline, a novel dynamic 3D Gaussian framework that enables structurally coherent and high-fidelity reconstruction from monocular videos with fast rendering. The core of WebSpline is the Structure-Informed Spline (SIS) representation, which models each dynamic Gaussian trajectory using a learnable cubic Hermite spline whose motion is structurally organized with an auxiliary Structural Proxy Graph (SPG). The proposed framework is optimized in two stages: (i) in the first stage, the SPG is initialized from 2D point tracks and refined with temporal rigidity regularization to establish structural coherence for moving objects across the sequence; and (ii) in the second stage, the SIS representation is initialized from the refined SPG and optimized under both spatial and structural neighborhood constraints. At inference, Gaussian motion is obtained solely by evaluating the learned SIS, enabling fast rendering. Extensive experiments on the challenging monocular dynamic scene benchmarks, iPhone and NVIDIA, demonstrate that our WebSpline achieves state-of-the-art rendering quality while rendering over 10 times faster than WorldTree, the second-best method on the iPhone dataset.
comment: The first two authors contributed equally to this work (equal contribution). Please visit our project page at https://kaist-viclab.github.io/webspline-site/

light_analysis.overview: 提出WebSpline框架，利用结构信息样条实现从单目视频实时重建动态3D高斯场景，兼顾结构一致性与细节。
light_analysis.motivation: 单目视频动态场景重建中，现有方法难以平衡全局结构一致性和局部细节，多视角线索有限。该问题重要，因为动态场景重建在AR/VR、影视等领域有广泛应用。现有方法要么缺乏结构约束导致时空不一致，要么过于粗糙丢失细节，亟需一种能同时保证结构连贯性和高保真度的方法。
light_analysis.method: 核心是Structure-Informed Spline（SIS）表示，每个动态高斯轨迹用可学习的三次Hermite样条建模，并借助结构代理图（SPG）组织运动。两阶段优化：第一阶段从2D点轨迹初始化SPG，施加时间刚性正则化获得结构一致性；第二阶段从SPG初始化SIS，在空间和结构邻域约束下优化。推理时仅评估SIS获得运动，实现快速渲染。
light_analysis.result: 在iPhone和NVIDIA动态场景基准上，WebSpline达到最先进的渲染质量，同时渲染速度比第二名方法WorldTree快10倍以上。具体定量指标（如PSNR、SSIM）未在摘要中详述，但表明在渲染效率上具有显著优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出WebSpline框架，通过结构信息样条实现单目视频动态场景的高保真重建和快速实时渲染，具有重要的学术价值和实际应用潜力。未来可进一步改进代理图的初始化鲁棒性，并扩展到更复杂的动态场景。

title: The Role of Ambiguity in Error Prediction via Uncertainty Quantification
abstract: The task of Error Prediction, namely predicting whether a model output is correct, is commonly tackled with Uncertainty Quantification (UQ). However, while uncertainty metrics capture when models lack knowledge or capacity to make a prediction, they also reflect aleatoric uncertainty, which is inherent in the model input and context. This paper presents a method for improving error prediction for Large Language Models (LLMs), by disentangling input ambiguity from UQ signal. We conduct experiments on the task of Question Answering (QA) with six UQ metrics and show that UQ metrics are more predictive of errors on unambiguous instances than on questions with multiple plausible answers. We use Gated Experts and Selective Prediction to incorporate gold and predicted ambiguity labels into the error prediction pipeline. We find that ambiguity information improves error prediction scores across model families, training and evaluation paradigms, datasets (including allegedly unambiguous ones), and sources of aleatoric uncertainty, yielding improvements of over 10 points of PRR for individual UQ metrics on standard datasets.
comment: 8 pages not including references and appendices, 3 figures

light_analysis.overview: 提出通过分离输入歧义与不确定性信号，提升大语言模型错误预测性能的方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有错误预测方法常用不确定性量化（UQ），但UQ指标不仅反映模型缺乏知识，还包含输入固有的 aleatoric 不确定性（歧义）。这种歧义会干扰错误预测的准确性，尤其在问答任务中，存在多个合理答案的问题更难预测错误。因此，需要一种方法将歧义从UQ信号中分离，以提升预测效果。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出结合门控专家（Gated Experts）和选择性预测（Selective Prediction），将真实或预测的歧义标签融入错误预测流程。在问答任务上使用六种UQ指标（如熵、置信度等），对LLM输出进行不确定性评估，并显式建模输入的歧义性以调整预测。关键创新在于将歧义作为独立特征，而非仅依赖UQ信号。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，UQ指标在无歧义实例上的错误预测效果优于存在多答案的问题。通过引入歧义信息，错误预测分数在各模型族、训练/评估范式和数据集（包括声称无歧义的数据集）上均有提升。对于单个UQ指标，在标准数据集上平均精确召回率（PRR）提升超过10个百分点。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究证实输入歧义是影响UQ错误预测的关键因素，分离歧义可显著提升预测性能。方法具有通用性，适用于不同LLM和任务。局限性在于歧义标签的获取成本，未来可探索自动生成歧义标签或扩展至更多任务。学术上为不确定性量化提供了新视角，实际可应用于提高模型可信度与安全部署。

title: FocusDiT: Masking Queries in Diffusion Transformers for Fine-grained Image Generation
abstract: Diffusion transformer (DiT) has been widely adopted in the generative diffusion field, advancing the denoising of query tokens through attention and Feed-Forward (\text{FFN}) layers. FFN actually acts as the key-value vocabulary for decoding visual contents where the value embeds the visual semantical knowledge. We present that focusing on critical query tokens corresponding to more complex details and encouraging the model to improve these tokens is essential for fine-grained visual generation. To this end, we propose FocusDiT, which applies a Masking scheme to focus on critical query tokens that are exclusively fed into FFN. The masked queries can retrieve visual tokens from the FFN vocabularies, and use them to decode their visual details. Extensive text-to-image experiments validate the effectiveness of token masking in enhancing generative performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FocusDiT，通过掩码关键查询令牌增强扩散Transformer的细粒度图像生成能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散Transformer（DiT）中，FFN层作为解码视觉内容的键值词汇表，但现有方法对所有查询令牌平等处理，忽略了复杂细节对应的关键令牌。为了提升细粒度视觉生成质量，需要聚焦于这些关键令牌并鼓励模型改进它们。
light_analysis.method: FocusDiT采用掩码方案，只将关键查询令牌输入FFN，使其从FFN词汇表中检索对应的视觉令牌并解码细节。该方法保持DiT架构，仅通过掩码机制增强注意力与FFN的协作，无需额外模块。
light_analysis.result: 大量文本到图像实验验证了令牌掩码策略的有效性，在生成性能上优于基线DiT。摘要未明确说明具体指标，但证实了该方法能够提升细粒度生成质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: FocusDiT通过掩码关键查询令牌，让FFN专注于解码复杂细节，显著改善扩散Transformer的生成效果。该研究为细粒度图像生成提供了高效方案，未来可探索自适应掩码阈值或结合其他先验知识。

title: FACT: A Simple and Efficient Framework for Active Finetuning
abstract: The main goal of active finetuning is to improve a pretrained model's performance on a specific task or domain by finetuning it with carefully selected informative or challenging data. Previous research has predominantly focused on the active aspect (i.e., data selection) while uniformly employing full finetuning for model adaptation, which inevitably distorts pretrained features due to distribution shift. This issue becomes particularly pronounced when the model size is large relative to the finetuning data quantity, leading to heightened overfitting risks. To address this critical gap, we formally outline the FiAF task that emphasizes systematic exploration of finetuning methodologies in active learning. We propose FACT, a three-phase hierarchical finetuning framework featuring both efficiency and simplicity, specifically designed for active finetuning scenarios. Our comprehensive experiments span: (1) Three major dataset categories encompassing classic (CIFAR10, CIFAR100, ImageNet-1k), imbalanced (CIFAR10-LT, CIFAR100-LT), and fine-grained (StanfordCars, FGVCAircraft) image classification datasets, each evaluated under 3-5 distinct sampling ratios; (2) Diverse pretrained architectures including Convolutional Neural Network (ConvNeXt), Vision Transformer (ViT), and Vision LSTM (ViL) networks; (3) A systematic investigation of frozen feature augmentation (FroFA) strategies. (4) A comprehensive and rigorous analysis of efficiency and generalizability. The results demonstrate significant improvements with strong generalization and robustness. Notably, under low sampling ratios, our framework achieves remarkable performance gains of over 20% on the ViT model for CIFAR10, CIFAR100, and ImageNet-1k benchmarks. This systematic approach establishes new state-of-the-art performance while maintaining parameter efficiency, proving particularly effective when labeled data is scarce.
comment: ACCEPTED for publication as a REGULAR paper in the IEEE Transactions on Image Processing (T-IP)
