light_analysis.overview: 提出FACT框架，一种三阶段层次微调方法，解决主动微调中分布偏移和过拟合问题，在低采样率下取得显著性能提升。
light_analysis.motivation: 主动微调旨在通过精选数据微调预训练模型提升任务性能，但现有研究侧重数据选择而统一使用全量微调，导致大规模模型在有限数据下因分布偏移而过拟合。本文正式定义FiAF任务，强调系统探索微调方法，以解决这一关键空白。
light_analysis.method: 提出FACT框架，采用三阶段层次微调：首先冻结特征并进行增强（FroFA），然后逐步解冻部分层，最后全量微调。实验涵盖经典、不平衡和细粒度分类数据集（CIFAR10/100, ImageNet-1k, CIFAR-LT, StanfordCars, FGVCAircraft），以及ConvNeXt、ViT、ViL架构，并在3-5种采样率下评估。
light_analysis.result: 在低采样率下，FACT在ViT模型上对CIFAR10、CIFAR100、ImageNet-1k提升超过20%。整体性能达到新SOTA，同时保持参数效率，尤其在标注数据稀缺时有效。实验还系统分析了效率和泛化性。
light_analysis.conclusion: FACT框架通过层次化微调策略有效缓解分布偏移和过拟合，显著提升主动微调性能，尤其在低数据场景下。其简单高效的设计具有实用价值，为主动学习中的微调方法论提供了新方向。未来可探索更复杂的采样策略结合。

title: Beyond $\ell_2$-norm and $\ell_\infty$-norm: A Curvature-Inspired $\ell_p$-Norm Scheme for Deep Neural Networks
abstract: The existing optimizers for deep neural networks (DNNs) typically rely on either the $\ell_2$ norm or the $\ell_\infty$ norm, resulting in optimizers that do not adapt well to substantial changes in curvature across parameter dimensions. Generally, the training process of DNNs often exhibits strong curvature anisotropy in the early period, whereas in the later period, the training process of DNNs tends to move toward flatter regions with weaker anisotropy. Particularly, optimizers based on the \(\ell_2\)-norm are usually dominated by high-curvature directions, restricting updates of optimizers along with lower curvature direction and thus leading to a slower convergence rate. While optimizers based on the \(\ell_\infty\)-norm are prone to oscillations in flatter regions, due to the coordinate-wise updates of the same magnitude. To address these two extreme cases generated by $\ell_2$ and $\ell_\infty$ norms, we propose a novel $\ell_p$-norm scheme with a dynamical value of $p$ and incorporate it into stochastic gradient descent (SGD) and SGD with momentum (SGDM), leading to two novel optimizers with better generalization performance: ${\ell_p}$-SGD (LPSGD) and ${\ell_p}$-SGDM (LPSGDM). Particularly, the resulting optimizers suppress the dominance of high-curvature directions in the early period by utilizing a large $p$ ($p>2$), followed by a gradual decrease of $p$ toward 2 to enable more stable and refined updates, where the latter process is motivated by the cosine annealing strategy. We establish theoretical guarantees of the resulting algorithms and analyze that both LPSGD and LPSGDM achieve an \(O(T^{-1/2})\) convergence rate for the nonconvex setting. Extensive experiments are conducted on benchmark datasets, including CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and ImageNet-1K, with multiple DNNs such as VGG-11, ResNet-18, and ResNet-50.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种动态ℓ_p范数优化方案，通过自适应调整p值改进深度神经网络训练中的曲率适应问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有DNN优化器多基于ℓ_2或ℓ_∞范数，但ℓ_2范数在早期高曲率方向占主导导致收敛慢，ℓ_∞范数在平坦区域易振荡。实际训练中曲率各向异性动态变化，亟需自适应范数策略以平衡更新方向与幅值。
light_analysis.method: 提出ℓ_p-SGD和ℓ_p-SGDM优化器，其中p动态调整：早期p>2抑制高曲率方向，后期p逐渐降至2以稳定更新（受余弦退火启发）。将ℓ_p范数融入SGD和SGDM，理论证明非凸场景下O(T^{-1/2})收敛率。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体性能指标，但理论证明两种优化器在非凸设置下均达到O(T^{-1/2})收敛率，并在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100、ImageNet-1K上使用VGG-11、ResNet-18/50验证了有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出动态ℓ_p范数优化器，通过自适应p值解决ℓ_2与ℓ_∞范数的极端问题，提升泛化能力。理论分析与实验验证了方法的有效性，为自适应范数优化提供新思路，未来可探索p值的动态调整策略。

title: Planar Symmetric Pattern Generation
abstract: Generating objects with specific symmetries is essential in various real-world scenarios. However, adapting existing 2D continuous representations to enforce planar group symmetry remains a challenge, as the transformation of non-reflective group elements may disrupt continuity. To overcome this limitation, we propose a symmetrization framework for arbitrary planar groups. Our method transforms any 2D continuous representation into a symmetric one while preserving continuity. We provide the mathematical formulation of this representation, demonstrate its approximation capability for symmetric functions, and detail the construction methodology. We validate our approach through three visual design tasks (pattern design, paper-cutting design and stylized topology design) and one material design task. Experiments confirm that our representation enables effective symmetry control and demonstrate its broader applicability.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种适用于任意平面群的对称化框架，将2D连续表示转换为对称表示并保持连续性。
light_analysis.motivation: 在图案设计、材料设计等现实场景中，生成具有特定对称性的对象至关重要。然而，现有2D连续表示难以强制实现平面群对称性，因为非反射群元素可能破坏连续性，导致无法有效控制对称性。该研究旨在解决这一局限性，提出一种既能保持连续性又能灵活控制任意平面群对称性的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种对称化框架，通过数学公式化将任意2D连续表示转换为对称表示，并证明其具有逼近对称函数的能力。详细描述了构造方法，确保变换后表示仍保持连续性。方法适用于任意平面群，无需依赖特定对称类型。在图案设计、剪纸设计、风格化拓扑设计和材料设计任务中进行了验证。
light_analysis.result: 在三种视觉设计任务（图案设计、剪纸设计、风格化拓扑设计）和一种材料设计任务中验证了方法。实验结果表明，该表示能够有效控制对称性，并展现出广泛适用性。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但确认了任务的成功执行和对称控制的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该论文贡献了一个通用的对称化框架，解决了平面群对称性保持连续性的难题，具有坚实的数学基础。通过多个设计任务验证了其实用性和有效性，为对称图案生成、材料设计等领域提供了新工具。未来可扩展至3D对称性或其他连续表示形式，进一步探索应用场景。

title: Fast and Lightweight Novel View Synthesis with Differentiable Multiplane Image
abstract: Recently, novel view synthesis has witnessed remarkable progress, with mainstream methods such as Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) and 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) delivering impressive results. However, these approaches often struggle to balance rendering speed and model size, and their optimization-based training can be highly time-consuming. Furthermore, they typically rely on dense observations, often failing to produce satisfactory results under sparse-view conditions. Although feed-forward reconstruction significantly reduces the optimization time of 3DGS, its pixel-aligned formulation generates millions of Gaussians from a single image, severely limiting its practical deployment on mobile devices. To address these limitations, we revisit the Multiplane Image(MPI) representation, which represents scenes using a compact set of planar layers for efficient novel view synthesis. Leveraging recent advances in visual foundation models, we utilize predicted point maps for reliable geometric initialization, followed by differentiable optimization. To address the issues of holes and artifacts in sparsely initialized MPI, we introduce one-step diffusion, which participates in both the differentiable optimization of MPI and the postprocessing of rendering results. Compared with a representative GS-based method, our approach is 30.7% faster and uses only 14.8% of its model size, while achieving competitive synthesis quality on front-view scenarios

light_analysis.overview: 通过可微MPI结合视觉基础模型和一步扩散，实现快速轻量级的新视图合成。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有新视图合成方法如NeRF和3DGS难以兼顾渲染速度与模型大小，且优化耗时，在稀疏视图下表现不佳。前馈3DGS虽减少优化时间，但生成大量高斯参数，限制移动端部署。
light_analysis.method: 重新审视MPI表示，利用视觉基础模型预测的点图进行可靠几何初始化，并通过可微优化调整。引入一步扩散模型处理稀疏初始化导致的空洞和伪影，同时参与优化与后处理。
light_analysis.result: 与代表性GS方法相比，速度提升30.7%，模型大小仅14.8%，在前景场景下合成质量具有竞争力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法在渲染速度、模型紧凑性和稀疏视图适应性上取得显著进步，适用于移动设备，但评估局限于前视角场景。未来可探索更复杂场景的泛化能力。

title: Ablating Archetypes: The Stability of Archetypal SAEs is an Artifact of Initialization and Metric Design
abstract: Dictionary learning with sparse autoencoders (SAEs) produces overcomplete bases from neural network activations that are often interpretable and reduces polysemanticity. However, features from SAEs vary substantially across random seeds -- a problem known as instability. Archetypal SAEs (Fel et al., 2025) were proposed as a general dictionary-learning intervention for more reliable concept extraction, and report more stable dictionaries at the end of training. We demonstrate that the stability claimed by archetypal SAEs is a result of setting identical initialization across multiple runs. Through our analyses, we attempt to clarify two distinct notions in mechanistic interpretability that may be ambiguously used: stability is agreement between two independently trained models, whereas stabilization is the convergence of independently initialized runs toward a common solution. This distinction is critical for mechanistic interpretability of natural language processing (NLP), where feature stability is increasingly used as evidence that SAE features are reusable units of analysis. Experiments from archetypal SAEs share a deterministic k-means decoder initialization, setting inter-run dictionary distance to zero before training begins. When this initialization is removed, the archetypal constraint provides no stabilization advantage in our setting. We further identify a preprocessing-dependent cosine geometry issue that complicates interpretation of endpoint stability metrics. Overall, our study supports the value of studying SAEs within the larger dictionary-learning tradition while showing that stability claims require trajectory diagnostics and initialization ablations.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示Archetypal SAEs声称的稳定性源于固定初始化，而非算法本身。
light_analysis.motivation: 稀疏自编码器（SAE）在字典学习中产生可解释的过完备基，但特征在不同随机种子下不稳定。Archetypal SAEs声称能提取更可靠的概念，但其稳定性真实原因未明。解决稳定性问题对NLP机械可解释性至关重要，因为特征稳定性被视为可重用分析单位的证据。
light_analysis.method: 通过对比实验，移除Archetypal SAEs中确定的k-means解码器初始化，并分析预处理依赖的余弦几何问题。区分了稳定性（stability）与稳定化（stabilization）两个概念：前者指独立训练模型之间的一致性，后者指独立初始化向共同解的收敛。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，Archetypal SAEs声称的稳定性来自固定初始化（使初始字典距离为零）。去除该初始化后，archetypal约束未提供稳定化优势。此外，预处理导致的余弦几何问题干扰了端点稳定性指标的解读。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究强调SAE稳定性声明需包含轨迹诊断和初始化消融实验。支持在更大字典学习传统中研究SAE，同时澄清了机械可解释性中稳定性与稳定化的关键区别。

title: TIDES: Time-Derivative Event Simulation via Deformable Reconstruction
abstract: Event cameras emit asynchronous events in response to environmental appearance changes. The scarcity of real-world event datasets makes simulation essential. However, most simulators infer event timestamps from frame sequences, forcing many threshold crossings to share a small set of discrete times; a failure mode we term timestamp batching that worsens under fast motion and occlusion.   We present TIDES, a continuous-time event simulator built on dynamic Gaussian splatting. Because TIDES operates on an explicit 3D scene representation with learnt geometry and motion, it can derive per-pixel intensity dynamics directly from the scene, rather than by differencing rendered frames. This enables accurate threshold-crossing prediction, including multiple crossings per rendering step, without temporal upsampling or frame interpolation. The same 3D scene model reveals where objects partially occlude one another; TIDES uses this to guide adaptive time stepping, concentrating computation only in regions where occlusion dynamics make simple models of brightness change unreliable.   Finally, we model finite sensor bandwidth using a tile-level arbiter whose throughput, jitter, and event drops reproduce realistic sensor artifacts. Across paired RGB-event benchmarks, TIDES attains state-of-the-art event-stream fidelity. We also show that events simulated by TIDES transfer more effectively to real downstream tasks than competitors'.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于动态高斯泼溅的连续时间事件模拟器TIDES，通过从显式3D场景模型直接导出强度动态实现精确阈值交叉预测，避免时间戳批处理。
light_analysis.motivation: 事件相机产生异步事件，但真实数据稀缺，需模拟。现有模拟器从帧序列推断时间戳，导致时间戳批处理问题，在快速运动和遮挡下严重，限制了模拟准确性和下游任务性能。
light_analysis.method: TIDES基于动态高斯泼溅构建3D场景表示，学习几何和运动，直接从场景推导每像素强度动态，而非渲染帧差分，支持每步多次阈值交叉，无需时间上采样。利用3D模型自适应时间步长聚焦遮挡区域，并用tile级仲裁器建模传感器带宽、抖动和丢包。
light_analysis.result: 在配对的RGB-事件基准测试中，TIDES取得事件流保真度最先进结果。模拟事件在真实下游任务中的迁移有效性优于竞争对手，具体性能指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: TIDES通过连续时间模拟解决了时间戳批处理，提升了事件模拟真实性和下游任务迁移能力。学术价值在于显式3D场景表示的直接强度变化感知，实际应用为事件相机提供高质量模拟数据。未来可探索更复杂场景或计算效率优化。

title: Topological texture analysis of microscopy images of dynamic casein gelation and its relation to rheological properties
abstract: We propose a novel computational toolbox that integrates Topological Data Analysis (TDA), Differential Box Counting (DBC), Multifractal Partition (MFP), and Local Binary Patterns (LBP), applied to time-lapse super-resolution STED microscopy images of sodium caseinate gelation induced by glucono-delta-lactone (GDL) at 30 °C and 40 °C and two GDL concentrations (1.8% and 3.5% w/v).   TDA tracked topological loops, closed ring-like structures reflecting protein network interconnectivity, via max-Betti-1 curves, which revealed a lag phase of dispersed aggregates, a sharp decay coinciding with network percolation and the rheologically observed sol-gel transition, and a post-gelation increase corresponding to network rearrangements. These topological transitions were corroborated by DBC and MFP as these methods were able to resolve changes in structural complexity and spatial heterogeneity. The toolbox was validated on simulated fractal images prior to experimental application. Together, these descriptors provided sensitivity to subtle microstructural transitions that bulk rheology captured as averaged bulk mechanical responses. This integrated approach provides a robust quantitative tool for characterizing complex microstructure in food and material science with evolving microstructural dynamics. Code is available at https://github.com/Zahratabatabaei/Delifood_CV_paper.git

light_analysis.overview: 提出集成TDA、DBC、MFP和LBP的定量工具箱，用于分析显微图像中酪蛋白凝胶化的拓扑和纹理特征。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究旨在解决食品和材料科学中复杂微结构动态演化过程中，传统流变学只能提供平均力学响应、无法解析微观结构转变的难题。现有方法缺乏对蛋白质凝胶网络互联性和空间异质性的敏感表征。通过结合拓扑和纹理分析，可捕捉到与溶胶-凝胶转变和网络重排相关的细微结构变化，为理解凝胶化动力学提供新工具。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一个集成工具箱，包含四种计算方法：拓扑数据分析（TDA）通过最大Betti-1曲线跟踪拓扑循环；差分盒计数（DBC）和多重分形分割（MFP）评估结构复杂性和空间异质性；局部二值模式（LBP）表征纹理特征。应用于GDL诱导酪蛋白酸钠凝胶化的时间序列STED超分辨显微图像，在30°C和40°C及两种GDL浓度下采集。工具箱先在模拟分形图像上验证。
light_analysis.result: TDA揭示了三个阶段：分散聚集体的延迟期、与网络渗流和流变溶胶-凝胶转变对应的陡峭衰减、以及反映网络重排的后凝胶化增加。DBC和MFP成功解析了结构复杂性和空间异质性的变化。这些方法对微结构转变敏感，而这些转变在流变学中仅表现为平均机械响应。工具箱在模拟图像上的验证确认了有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该集成工具箱提供了一种稳健的定量方法，用于表征食品和材料科学中微结构动态演化，能捕捉传统流变学无法区分的细微结构变化。研究的学术价值在于建立了图像拓扑/纹理特征与宏观流变性质的联系，实际应用包括优化凝胶化条件。未来可扩展至其他复杂流体或软物质体系。

title: Attention mechanisms and transfer learning for robust peach leaf damage classification under domain shift
abstract: Artificial intelligence provides a practical framework for crop damage assessment from imagery data, supporting early decision-making in agricultural management. In peach orchards, climate change increases abiotic stress and biotic pressures, including pests and diseases, which often produce visually similar foliar symptoms. This overlap makes manual diagnosis difficult, especially across multiple fields with varying environmental conditions, highlighting the need for automated models with strong generalization ability.   We propose an image-based classification approach for peach leaf damage detection. A benchmark dataset was created through manual annotation of publicly available images, consisting of 1,366 peach leaves across six damage categories. Several deep learning architectures were evaluated. EfficientNet models achieved the best results, with EfficientNetB0 reaching 92.9 percent accuracy, EfficientNetB3 achieving 91.5 percent, and EfficientNetB5 showing the strongest performance on minority classes. DenseNet121 reached 92.6 percent accuracy. The integration of the Convolutional Block Attention Module (CBAM) improved performance in several backbones, particularly EfficientNetB5 and InceptionV3, while showing limited or negative impact in others. The CBAM-enhanced EfficientNetB5 achieved the best overall accuracy of 93.3 percent.   To evaluate robustness under realistic conditions, a local dataset of 180 images across four classes was collected, and transfer learning strategies were applied to address domain shift. Three fine-tuning strategies were tested. EfficientNetB3 combined with CBAM achieved the best performance in the local domain, reaching a 93 percent macro F1-score after transfer. Overall, attention-based models showed improved robustness for minority classes and better generalization across different field conditions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出结合注意力机制和迁移学习的桃叶损伤分类方法，利用CBAM提升模型跨域泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 气候变化加剧桃园非生物与生物胁迫，不同病害产生视觉相似叶片症状，人工诊断困难且跨域差异大。现有模型泛化性不足，需自动化方法实现多场景下稳健的叶片损伤分类。
light_analysis.method: 构建包含1366张桃叶、六类损伤的基准数据集。评估多种深度学习架构，以EfficientNet为骨干集成卷积块注意力模块（CBAM）。针对真实域迁移，收集本地数据集（180张、四类），采用三种微调策略实现跨域自适应。
light_analysis.result: EfficientNetB5+CBAM在基准集达93.3%准确率。EfficientNetB3+CBAM在本地域经迁移学习后宏F1达93%，优于其他模型，且注意力机制增强了对少数类的鲁棒性和跨域泛化。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结合CBAM注意力机制与迁移学习能有效提升桃叶损伤分类在域偏移下的性能，为农业智能监测提供可行方案。未来可探索更细粒度损伤识别及多模态数据融合。

title: Realistic noise synthesis reduces bias and improves tissue microstructure estimation with supervised machine learning
abstract: Diffusion MRI enables non-invasive probing of tissue microstructure, but accurate parameter estimation is challenged by noise-related effects. In supervised machine learning frameworks trained on simulated data, discrepancies between the noise characteristics of simulated and acquired signals introduce a form of covariate shift, whereby the input signal distribution differs between training and inference. We investigated the impact of this mismatch on microstructure parameter estimation and propose a realistic noise synthesis (RNS) framework to mitigate it. RNS incorporates both the Rician expectation and the effective post-processing noise variance into simulated training signals. The Rician expectation was modelled using a noise standard deviation estimated with MPPCA, while the effective standard deviation was derived from spherical harmonic residuals of preprocessed data. The method was evaluated using the cylinder-zeppelin and the SANDI models on simulated datasets across multiple SNR levels and on in vivo diffusion data with repeated acquisitions. Sensitivity to noise misestimation was also assessed. Ignoring magnitude-induced noise effects during training produced systematic, SNR-dependent parameter bias, particularly at low SNR. Incorporating the Rician expectation substantially reduced bias to the level of noise-aware nonlinear least-squares fitting. Modelling the effective standard deviation further improved precision. Performance was largely independent of regression architecture but sensitive to accurate noise estimation. These findings demonstrate that realistic noise modelling in simulated training data mitigates signal-domain covariate shift and is essential for unbiased supervised microstructure estimation, particularly in low-SNR regimes associated with high b-values or high spatial resolution.

light_analysis.overview: 提出现实噪声合成（RNS）框架，通过模拟训练数据中的真实噪声特性，减少监督学习中的协变量偏移，改善扩散MRI组织微结构参数估计的无偏性和精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散MRI利用监督机器学习从模拟数据中估计组织微结构参数时，模拟信号与采集信号之间的噪声特性差异会导致协变量偏移，使输入信号分布不匹配，从而引入参数偏差。现有方法忽略这种噪声失配，尤其在低信噪比（SNR）下偏差显著。该问题影响高b值或高分辨率成像的准确性，亟需解决。
light_analysis.method: 提出RNS框架，在模拟训练信号中融入Rician期望和有效后处理噪声方差。利用MPPCA估计噪声标准差建模Rician期望，从预处理数据的球谐残差推导有效标准差。采用cylinder-zeppelin和SANDI模型，在多个SNR水平模拟数据集及体内重复采集数据上评估，并分析对噪声估计误差的敏感性。
light_analysis.result: 忽略幅度噪声效应导致系统性的SNR依赖参数偏差，低SNR时尤其严重。加入Rician期望后偏差降至噪声感知非线性最小二乘拟合水平；进一步建模有效标准差提高了精度。性能对回归架构不敏感，但依赖准确的噪声估计。结果表明RNS有效缓解信号域协变量偏移。
light_analysis.conclusion: RNS通过真实噪声建模减少模拟训练数据中的协变量偏移，对低SNR场景（如高b值或高分辨率）的无偏微结构估计至关重要。研究强调了监督学习中准确噪声建模的必要性，为扩散MRI参数估计提供了实用框架，未来可能推广至其他医学成像任务。

title: Normality-Preserving Continual Industrial Anomaly Detection via Orthogonal LoRA Banks
abstract: Continual industrial anomaly detection with diffusion models suffers from historical normality prior drift and catastrophic forgetting. Existing continual diffusion methods preserve previous knowledge through replay or constrained optimization, but they lack an explicit mechanism for isolating and protecting category-specific normality priors during sequential adaptation. Although low-rank adaptation provides modular residual updates, standard LoRA neither freezes historical normality subspaces nor prevents new adapters from interfering with previous ones. To address this issue, we propose a normality-preserving continual anomaly detection framework based on two modules: History Frozen Orthogonal LoRA Bank (HF-OLB) and Hierarchical Novelty Adaptive Bank Growth module (HNABG). HF-OLB freezes both the pre-trained U-Net backbone and the learned LoRA banks, and constrains new task-specific normality residuals to the orthogonal complement of historical LoRA subspaces. HNABG further allocates layer-dependent residual capacity and expands the bank only when the residual normality novelty exceeds the expressive capacity of existing banks. Extensive experiments on MVTec and VisA demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. On the challenging VisA 2x6 setting, our method achieves 83.6/91.8 image and pixel level A-AUROC with 3.8/3.9 FM, improving pixel level A-AUROC over the state of the art by 3.2 points while reducing pixel level FM by 1.3. These results show that our method effectively preserves historical normality priors in long horizon continual category sequences.
comment: 33 pages,6 figures,Submitted to Advanced Engineering Informatics

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于正交LoRA库的持续工业异常检测框架，通过历史冻结和正交约束保留正常性先验，解决灾难性遗忘。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有持续扩散方法缺乏隔离和保护类别特定正常性先验的机制，标准LoRA无法冻结历史子空间，新适配器干扰旧适配器，导致正常性漂移和遗忘。
light_analysis.method: 提出HF-OLB模块冻结预训练U-Net和已学LoRA库，将新任务残差约束到历史子空间的正交补集；HNABG模块根据新颖性自适应扩展库，分配层依赖残差容量。
light_analysis.result: 在VisA 2x6设置下，图像/像素级A-AUROC达83.6/91.8，FM为3.8/3.9，像素级A-AUROC超SOTA 3.2点，FM降低1.3，有效保留长期历史正常性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法有效保持持续类别序列中的正常性先验，具有工业应用价值，未来可扩展至更多场景。

title: RL-ACRGNet: Reinforcement Learning-Based Chest Radiology Report Generation Network
abstract: Medical imaging interpretation is a foundational pillar of modern clinical diagnostics, yet the manual generation of radiology reports remains a time-consuming process prone to interpretation inconsistencies. Within the field of medical AI, automating these descriptions through deep learning promises to streamline clinical workflows and standardise diagnostic output. However, accurate disease detection and precise report generation remain significant challenges due to limitations in capturing fine-grained visual features and ensuring clinical coherence. To address these issues, we propose RL-ACRGNet, an improved encoder-decoder model that integrates a pre-trained DenseNet encoder with a multilevel LSTM decoder within an off-policy reinforcement learning framework. Using a dual-network approach to refine visual-semantic embeddings through a metric-based reward mechanism, we demonstrate that RL-ACRGNet consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines on the IU-Xray dataset, achieving quantitative improvements in BLEU-4 (0.47%), METEOR (0.17%) and ROUGE-L (0.518). Furthermore, comprehensive evaluations on the large-scale MIMIC-CXR data set confirm the robust generalisation of the model and its ability to generate high-quality, clinically relevant reports
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于强化学习的胸部X光报告生成网络RL-ACRGNet，通过离线策略强化学习框架结合双网络机制提升报告质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 医学影像报告的人工生成耗时且不一致，现有自动化方法在细粒度视觉特征捕获和临床连贯性方面存在不足。需要一种能准确检测疾病并生成精确、临床相关报告的模型，以提升临床工作流程效率和诊断标准化。
light_analysis.method: 采用改进的编码器-解码器架构，预训练DenseNet作为编码器，多级LSTM作为解码器，并在离线策略强化学习框架下训练。通过双网络方法优化视觉语义嵌入，并利用基于度量的奖励机制，提升报告生成的准确性和连贯性。
light_analysis.result: 在IU-Xray数据集上，RL-ACRGNet在BLEU-4（0.47%）、METEOR（0.17%）和ROUGE-L（0.518%）指标上优于现有基线。在MIMIC-CXR大规模数据集上的评估证实了模型的稳健泛化能力和高质量临床报告生成能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: RL-ACRGNet有效结合强化学习与视觉语义嵌入，显著提升胸部X光报告生成的准确性和临床相关性。该方法有望推动医学影像自动报告生成在实际临床中的应用，未来可探索更多强化学习策略或扩展到其他影像模态。

title: OpenWebRL: Demystifying Online Multi-turn Reinforcement Learning for Visual Web Agents
abstract: Building capable visual web agents requires long-horizon reasoning, precise grounding, and robust interaction with dynamic real-world websites. Despite rapid progress, the strongest systems remain largely proprietary, while open agents still depend heavily on supervised post-training over large collections of curated web trajectories. This dependence creates a major scalability bottleneck: high-quality demonstrations are expensive to collect, and static datasets offer limited coverage of the diverse, ever-changing open web. Although online RL has shown promise for text-based agents, its potential for training visual web agents directly on live websites remains largely underexplored. In this paper, we introduce OpenWebRL, an open framework for training visual web agents with online multi-turn RL on real websites. OpenWebRL covers the full training pipeline, including scalable live-browser infrastructure, supervised initialization, multimodal context management, trajectory-level success judging, and efficient multi-turn policy optimization. Using this framework, we train OpenWebRL-4B, which establishes a new open-source state of the art on challenging live-web benchmarks. With only 0.4K initialization trajectories and 2.2K open-ended RL training tasks, OpenWebRL-4B achieves 67.0% success on Online-Mind2Web and 64.0% on DeepShop, outperforming prior open agents of similar or larger scale and remaining competitive with proprietary systems including OpenAI CUA and Gemini CUA. Beyond strong benchmark performance, we systematically study the key design choices that make online RL effective for visual web agents, and analyze how RL improves agentic reasoning. Overall, our work offers a practical path toward building more capable, reproducible, and cost-efficient open web agents. We will release our training data, models, and code to support future research.

light_analysis.overview: 提出OpenWebRL框架，通过在线多轮强化学习在真实网站上训练视觉web代理，实现开源SOTA。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有开放视觉web代理高度依赖监督式后训练，需要大量人工收集的演示数据，成本高昂且静态数据集无法覆盖动态变化的开放网络。虽然在线RL已在文本代理中展现潜力，但其在视觉代理上的应用仍未被充分探索。本研究旨在克服数据瓶颈，探索直接利用真实网站进行在线RL训练的有效性，以构建可复现、成本效益高的开放web代理。
light_analysis.method: OpenWebRL框架包含完整训练流程：可扩展的实时浏览器基础设施用于与网站交互；监督微调初始化；多模态上下文管理（融合视觉与文本信息）；轨迹级成功判断自动评估任务完成情况；多轮策略优化算法。使用仅0.4K初始化轨迹和2.2K开放式RL训练任务，训练出4B参数的模型OpenWebRL-4B。
light_analysis.result: OpenWebRL-4B在Online-Mind2Web上达到67.0%成功率，在DeepShop上达到64.0%，显著优于此前相同或更大规模的开源代理，并与专有系统（如OpenAI CUA、Gemini CUA）竞争力相当。结果证明了在线RL在视觉web代理中的有效性，并显示了在少量训练数据下获得强性能的可能性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文展示了在线多轮强化学习训练视觉web代理的可行性与优势，提供了实用且可复现的框架。OpenWebRL在降低对大规模演示数据依赖的同时取得了竞争性性能，支持开源发布以推动研究。未来可进一步优化训练效率、扩大任务多样性，并探索在更复杂环境中的应用。

title: Ranking vs. Assignment: The Metric Mismatch in Multi-View Object Association
abstract: Multi-view object association is an important computer vision problem that underlies many multi-camera perception tasks. While this task is naturally formulated as a constrained one-to-one matching problem, recent works heavily rely on pairwise ranking metrics like AP and FPR-95 for model evaluation. We highlight a fundamental mismatch between these metrics and the actual assignment objective. Theoretically, we show that AP and FPR-95 can be imperfect even when the assignment is already correct, and that Sinkhorn-based normalization can make them perfect. Conversely, optimal pairwise ranking can still lead to incorrect assignments. We validate this mismatch in practice by using our Sinkhorn-based normalization as a controlled post-processing stress test. We show that optimizing just a few post-processing parameters significantly boosts AP and FPR-95 without corresponding improvements in assignment-level metrics such as ACC and IPAA.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示多视图对象关联中排名指标（AP、FPR-95）与分配目标的失配，提出Sinkhorn归一化可改善指标但不解决本质问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 多视图对象关联是多个摄像机感知任务的基础，自然形式化为约束的一对一匹配问题。然而，现有工作广泛使用成对排名指标（如AP、FPR-95）进行模型评估，这些指标与实际的分配目标之间存在根本性失配，导致评价结果无法反映真实分配性能，亟需理论分析和解决方案。
light_analysis.method: 从理论上证明AP和FPR-95即使在分配正确时也可能不完美，而Sinkhorn归一化可使这些指标达到完美。反之，最优成对排名仍可能导致错误分配。实验通过Sinkhorn归一化作为后处理应力测试，仅优化少数后处理参数显著提升AP和FPR-95，但分配级指标（如ACC和IPAA）无相应改进。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，通过优化Sinkhorn归一化的后处理参数，AP和FPR-95取得显著提升，但分配级指标ACC和IPAA未见明显改善，验证了排名指标与分配目标的失配。摘要未提供具体数值，仅说明趋势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作揭示了多视图对象关联中评估指标的缺陷，强调应使用分配级指标而非排名指标。Sinkhorn归一化能缓解指标失配，但需谨慎使用，以免产生误导性结果。未来可探索更一致的评估框架和优化目标。

title: PerBite: A Curated Diagnostic Workflow for Bite-Aware Food Volume Estimation
abstract: Can a visually plausible food mesh be trusted to estimate the volume of consumed food? \method investigates this question using selected paired before- and after-consumption states from the MetaFood CVPR 2026 Continuous 3D Reconstruction While Eating Challenge. The submitted workflow follows a curated reconstruction protocol: SAM~3 segments the food and plate regions; Hunyuan3D/SAM~3D generates a dimensionless food mesh; the plate diameter provides the metric scale; the plate geometry is removed in Blender; and the remaining mesh is hole-filled, made watertight, and integrated to estimate volume. MoGe-2 is used only as an auxiliary cue for initial dish-diameter estimation when direct plate measurement is uncertain; it is not the primary scale source for the reported challenge result. \method ranks first, with an average Chamfer distance of 8.31 across 34 meshes using rigid ICP without scale correction. On 17 before- and after-pairs, it achieves 33.87\% state-level volume MAPE and zero monotonicity violations, while consumed-volume MAPE remains 53.74\%. The results show that surface reconstruction, metric scale, controlled mesh cleanup, watertight volume integration, and physical depletion consistency should be evaluated separately for dietary assessment. Source code and evaluation scripts will be available at \href{https://github.com/GCVCG/PerBite-CVPR-MetaFood-2026}{github.com/GCVCG/PerBite-CVPR-MetaFood-2026}.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个诊断工作流，通过分阶段评估3D重建和体积估计的可信度，在MetaFood挑战中排名第一。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有食物体积估计方法依赖于视觉上合理的网格，但网格的视觉质量并不保证体积估计的准确性。该研究旨在系统性地评估表面重建、度量尺度、网格清理、水密体积积分和物理消耗一致性等各环节对最终体积估计的影响，从而提供更可靠的诊断依据。
light_analysis.method: 采用分步流程：利用SAM 3分割食物和盘子区域，用Hunyuan3D/SAM 3D生成无量纲食物网格，通过盘子直径确定真实尺度，在Blender中移除盘子几何，对剩余网格进行孔洞填充和水密化处理，最后积分估算体积。MoGe-2仅辅助初始盘子直径估计。
light_analysis.result: 在CVPR 2026 MetaFood挑战中排名第一，34个网格的平均Chamfer距离为8.31（使用刚体ICP，无尺度校正）。在17个餐前-餐后对上，状态级体积MAPE为33.87%，零单调性违规，但消耗体积MAPE为53.74%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作表明，食物体积估计的准确性依赖于多个独立因素，应分别评估。其诊断工作流有助于识别误差来源，指导改进。未来可探索更鲁棒的尺度估计和网格处理技术。

title: Unveiling the Entropy Dynamics of Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
abstract: This paper investigates the entropy dynamics of Chain-of-Thought (CoT) and uncovers a consistent two-phase structure: an Uncertainty Region of exploration transitioning sharply to a Confidence Region of convergence. We demonstrate that the Confidence Region possesses two critical properties: 1) High Reliability -- answers in the confidence region become highly accurate and stable, and 2) High Redundancy -- models generate unnecessary tokens long after reaching the correct answer. These properties unlock more efficient and reliable inference strategies: 1) Early Exit leverages reliability and redundancy to terminate computation safely when returns diminish, and 2)Test-Time Scaling uses the Confidence Region signal to prioritize converged trajectories. To operationalize these insights, we formulate Confidence Region detection as a sequential change-point detection problem, being the first to apply classical change-point methods to monitor CoT reasoning. Using the Cumulative Sum (CUSUM) algorithm, a statistically optimal change-point detector, we develop a training-free framework for real-time inference control. Experiments show our approach establishes a superior Pareto-frontier for early exit. CUSUM achieves 63.06% accuracy with 11.1% token reduction, outperforming DEER and Dynasor by 3.28% and 4.36% in accuracy respectively. For test-time scaling, CUSUM-weighted voting consistently outperforms self-consistency.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示了链式思维推理中熵动态的两阶段结构，并基于信心区域的高可靠性和冗余性提出早期退出和测试时缩放策略。
light_analysis.motivation: 链式思维推理虽能提升模型性能，但存在计算开销大、推理不确定等问题。现有方法缺乏对推理过程中熵动态的深入理解，难以在保证准确性的同时高效控制计算资源。本文旨在通过分析熵的变化规律，识别推理的确定性阶段，从而优化推理效率与可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 论文将推理过程分为不确定性区域和信心区域，并利用信心区域的高可靠性和冗余性设计两种策略：早期退出（基于CUSUM变点检测，在信心区域提前终止生成）和测试时缩放（优先选择收敛轨迹）。首次将变点检测应用于CoT推理监控，CUSUM算法无需训练即可实时控制推理进程。
light_analysis.result: 在早期退出任务中，CUSUM达到63.06%准确率，仅用11.1%的token缩减，准确率分别比DEER和Dynasor高3.28%和4.36%。在测试时缩放中，CUSUM加权投票一致优于自一致性基线，表明该方法能有效提升推理效率与可靠性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究首次揭示CoT推理的熵动态两阶段结构，证明了信心区域的高可靠性及冗余性，并基于变点检测提出实用高效的推理控制框架。该工作为优化大语言模型的推理效率提供了新视角，未来可探索更复杂的变点检测算法或多阶段动态策略。

title: Evaluating Real-World Generalizability of Algorithm Selection Models
abstract: Algorithm Selection (AS) aims to automatically identify the most suitable optimization algorithm for a given problem instance by leveraging measurable problem characteristics and historical performance data. In this study, we investigate the generalization ability of AS models across both synthetic and real-world optimization landscapes. We consider two widely used academic benchmark suites (BBOB and CEC) and two real-world problem sets (robotics trajectory optimization tasks and unmanned aerial vehicle path-planning problems). Through a systematic cross-benchmark evaluation, we analyze how AS models transfer between domains, identify where generalization succeeds or breaks down, and highlight the challenges that arise when applying AS in realistic, domain-specific contexts. Our findings provide insights into the robustness of current AS approaches and inform the development of more reliable, broadly applicable AS systems for real-world optimization.

light_analysis.overview: 系统评估算法选择模型在合成与真实优化场景间的泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 算法选择旨在自动为给定问题挑选最优优化算法，但现有研究多依赖合成基准，其在实际场景中的泛化能力未知。本文通过跨域实验，探究AS模型从合成到真实领域的迁移效果，识别泛化失效场景，为构建可靠、通用的AS系统提供依据。
light_analysis.method: 采用两类学术基准（BBOB、CEC）和两类真实问题（机器人轨迹优化、无人机路径规划），进行系统性的跨基准评估。通过对比模型在不同域间的性能，分析特征迁移效果与失败模式。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确提供具体数值结果，但指出通过跨基准评估揭示了AS模型在域间迁移的成功与失效场景，为实际应用中的可靠性提供见解。
light_analysis.conclusion: 总结了当前AS方法在真实世界泛化中的挑战，强调了开发更鲁棒、广泛适用的AS系统的必要性。研究为算法选择的实际部署提供了指导，并指出了未来改进方向。

title: Extreme Low-Bit Inference in Reasoning Models: Failure Modes and Targeted Recovery
abstract: Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) rely on long reasoning traces, making inference expensive. While low-bit quantization reduces per-token decoding cost, we show that aggressive 2-bit inference can fail to deliver end-to-end speedup because instability in the generation process inflates total token count. Instead of merely lowering answer accuracy, 2-bit quantization often produces much longer traces with repetitive loops, budget exhaustion, delayed commitment, and unclosed reasoning segments. We analyze full reasoning traces of Qwen3 reasoning models across mathematical and commonsense benchmarks and show that accuracy degradation is tightly linked to these process-level failures. To address them, we introduce two lightweight controls: FP16 planning, which gives the 2-bit model a short high-precision outline, and loop rescue, which detects repetitive traces and either commits to an earlier answer or falls back to FP16. On MATH-500, loop rescue improves Qwen3-8B accuracy from 17.2% to 74.2%, while planning plus loop rescue improves Qwen3-32B from 65.0% to 87.2%. Overall, our results show that extreme low-bit reasoning becomes practical when its failures are treated as controllable generation pathologies: with lightweight detection and selective FP16 support, 2-bit inference can recover accuracy while preserving real end-to-end speed. Our code is available at: https://github.com/brain-lab-research/quantized-reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示2-bit量化导致推理模型生成轨迹变长等过程级故障，提出轻量控制（FP16规划与循环救援）恢复精度，实现实用的极端低比特推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 大推理模型依赖长推理链，推理成本高。低比特量化可降低每token成本，但2-bit推理因生成过程不稳定导致总token数膨胀，无法实现端到端加速。现有方法仅关注准确率下降，未分析过程级故障（如重复循环、预算耗尽）。
light_analysis.method: 分析Qwen3模型完整推理轨迹，识别2-bit量化的四种过程故障。提出FP16规划（为2-bit模型提供短高精度大纲）和循环救援（检测重复轨迹并承诺早期答案或回退FP16）。两种轻量控制可插入现有推理流程。
light_analysis.result: 在MATH-500上，循环救援将Qwen3-8B准确率从17.2%提升至74.2%；规划+循环救援将Qwen3-32B从65.0%提升至87.2%。表明轻量检测与选择性FP16支持可恢复精度并保持端到端加速。
light_analysis.conclusion: 极端低比特推理需视为可控生成病理，将失败模式转化为可检测和纠正的问题。轻量控制（循环救援与FP16规划）可显著恢复精度，同时保留速度优势。代码开源，为高效推理提供实用方案。

title: Machine Learning for Coding Retail Product Names to Consumer-Price Categories: A Rule-plus-Bag-of-Words Pipeline with Reliability-Weighted Human-in-the-Loop Labeling
abstract: Consumer-price measurement increasingly draws on alternative data sources -- scanner, web-scraped, and transaction/receipt data. A recurring obstacle is that product descriptions in such sources are short, noisy, and abbreviated, with no standard product code, so each item must first be mapped to a consumption classification (e.g., the UN COICOP scheme) before prices can be compared. This paper studies that mapping as a general, reproducible method. The pipeline is: (i) text normalization and tokenization of noisy item names; (ii) a prefix-tree (trie) rule-based pre-classifier driven by per-category key-phrases and stop-phrases; and (iii) a per-category binary confirmation model deciding whether an item belongs to a tentatively assigned category. For labels at scale we use a human-in-the-loop protocol in which annotators give a binary valid/reject judgment, aggregated by a dynamically updated reliability weight; the model joins the same rule, enabling continual fine-tuning. Our empirical finding is deflationary: in a controlled, leakage-free study (one category, real positives vs. hard negatives, five seeds), bag-of-words models essentially saturate the task (F1 about 0.99) -- a linear classifier matches a multilayer perceptron, explicit word-order (n-gram) features add nothing, and about 67 labeled examples already suffice. A Monte-Carlo study of the labeling protocol shows the reliability-weighted vote barely beats plain majority (its additive weights saturate) while Dawid-Skene recovers labels markedly better. We also discuss price-level quality control and design lessons for statistical offices considering transaction data. All figures are illustrative; no confidential data, code, or documentation is reproduced.
comment: 11 pages, 3 tables. Methodology paper; illustrative experiments only, no proprietary data

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种结合规则和词袋模型的人机协作流水线，用于将零售产品名称映射到消费价格类别，实验表明简单的词袋模型即可达到近完美性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 消费者价格测量依赖替代数据（如扫描、网络抓取、交易数据），但产品描述简短、嘈杂且无标准编码，需要映射到统一分类方案（如COICOP）。现有方法可能过于复杂，且缺乏可控、可复现的评估。该研究旨在开发一种通用、可复现的方法，同时通过人机协作实现大规模标注，并揭示模型性能的上限。
light_analysis.method: 流水线包括三步：文本规范化与分词、基于前缀树（trie）的规则预分类（使用每类关键词和停用词）、以及每类二元确认模型（判断是否属于暂定类别）。标注采用人机协作协议，标注者给出二元判断，通过动态更新的可靠性权重聚合，模型持续微调。实验在单类别、无泄漏设置下进行，使用真实正例与困难负例。
light_analysis.result: 在控制实验中，词袋模型性能饱和（F1约0.99），线性分类器与多层感知机效果相同，显式词序特征（n-gram）无提升，约67个标注样本即可达到高性能。蒙特卡洛研究表明，可靠性加权投票仅略优于简单多数投票，而Dawid-Skene模型能明显更好地恢复真实标签。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法证明简单的词袋模型即可高效解决产品名称分类任务，无需复杂模型或大量标注数据。人机协作标注协议可扩展，但可靠性加权聚合的增益有限。研究为统计办公室采用交易数据提供了设计启示，强调简单模型和可控实验的重要性。未来可探索更复杂的标注聚合方法。

title: Distortion-Aware Fusion of Statistical and Vision-Language Features for Blind Image Quality Assessment
abstract: Blind image quality assessment (BIQA) aims to predict perceived image quality without access to a reference image. Classical natural scene statistics (NSS) descriptors and modern vision-language model (VLM) embeddings address this problem from fundamentally different perspectives, yet whether combining them yields complementary benefits and how to weight their contributions per input image remains unexplored. We propose a distortion-aware fusion framework that integrates a 138-dimensional NSS descriptor with two complementary VLM embeddings, SigLIP and CLIP-H, through a multiplicative gating mechanism that learns per-input stream weights conditioned on image content. Unlike static concatenation fusion, the proposed gating network suppresses or amplifies each stream's contribution based on the input, producing weights that correlate positively (Spearman rank correlation rho=0.33) with the per-distortion NSS contribution measured by independent ablation on KADID-10k. The framework requires no end-to-end fine-tuning of the VLM backbones and is trained with a hybrid loss combining mean squared error, Pearson linear correlation, and pairwise ranking objectives. We evaluate on three standard benchmarks: KonIQ-10k (SROCC=0.9142, PLCC=0.9279), KADID-10k (SROCC=0.9715, PLCC=0.9733, surpassing recent state-of-the-art methods), and LIVE Challenge in-the-Wild (SROCC=0.8527, PLCC=0.8802 with cross-dataset pretraining and fine-tuning). A per-distortion analysis on KADID-10k reveals that NSS features contribute most on noise and color-shift distortions where pixel statistics are directly affected, and least on perceptual distortions such as color saturation changes. The learned gate values validate these findings, confirming that the model autonomously discovers distortion-stream affinity patterns consistent with the manual per-distortion study.

light_analysis.overview: 提出失真感知融合框架，通过门控机制动态结合统计与VLM特征，实现盲图像质量评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 经典自然场景统计描述符与现代视觉语言模型嵌入从不同角度解决盲图像质量评估，但两者结合是否互补及如何根据输入自适应加权尚未探索。现有静态拼接融合无法动态调整各特征贡献，限制了性能提升。
light_analysis.method: 提出失真感知融合框架，集成138维NSS描述符与SigLIP和CLIP-H两种VLM嵌入，通过乘法门控机制学习每输入流权重。门控网络根据图像内容动态抑制或放大各流贡献，无需微调VLM主干。使用混合损失（MSE、Pearson线性相关、成对排序）训练。
light_analysis.result: 在KonIQ-10k上SROCC=0.9142、PLCC=0.9279；在KADID-10k上SROCC=0.9715、PLCC=0.9733，超越近期SOTA；在LIVE Challenge上SROCC=0.8527、PLCC=0.8802。门控权重与NSS独立消融贡献正相关（Spearman ρ=0.33），且模型自主发现失真-流亲和模式。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架有效融合统计与语义特征，门控机制实现自适应加权，提升BIQA性能。验证了不同失真类型下NSS与VLM特征的互补性，为多模态融合提供新思路。未来可探索更复杂的门控结构或扩展到其他图像评估任务。

title: Towards 3D-Aware Video Diffusion Models: Render-Free Human Motion Control with Mesh Tokenization
abstract: Diffusion models have shown remarkable success in video generation. However, whether such models are truly aware of the 3D structure underlying visual observations, rather than simply reproducing plausible 2D projections, remains an open question. In this work, we investigate this question through human motion control, a task that requires precise modelling of 3D human geometry, motion, camera viewpoint, and scene context. Unlike prior methods that rely on rendered 2D motion guidance videos, we propose a render-free framework that conditions video generation directly on compressed 3D human mesh tokens. This representation preserves full 3D geometric information while enabling a unified token-based generation pipeline that processes video tokens jointly with motion tokens in a DiT-based architecture. This design requires the model to reason jointly about appearance, 3D structure, and camera viewpoint during video generation. Experimental results demonstrate strong performance on human motion control benchmarks, while reducing artifacts induced by view-dependent 2D guidance and trajectory-pose mismatches during editing. These findings suggest that video diffusion models, when equipped with mesh tokenization, can better capture complex 3D human structures and their interactions with the surrounding environment.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种无渲染框架，通过3D人体网格标记直接条件化视频扩散模型，实现精确的3D感知人体运动控制。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频扩散模型是否真正理解3D结构尚不明确。人体运动控制任务需精确建模3D人体几何、运动、视角和场景。以往方法依赖渲染的2D运动引导视频，存在视角依赖伪影和轨迹-姿态不匹配问题。该研究旨在通过直接使用3D网格标记，使模型在生成时联合推理外观、3D结构和相机视角。
light_analysis.method: 提出无渲染框架，将视频生成条件直接建立在压缩的3D人体网格标记上。网格标记保留完整3D几何信息，并采用DiT架构统一处理视频和运动标记，实现联合生成。该方法避免了渲染2D引导步骤，确保模型在生成过程中必须同时考虑外观、3D结构和视角。
light_analysis.result: 在人体运动控制基准上取得强性能，减少了由视角相关2D引导和轨迹-姿态不匹配引起的伪影。实验表明，配备网格标记化的视频扩散模型能更好捕捉复杂3D人体结构及其与环境交互。具体指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作表明，通过网格标记化将3D结构直接注入扩散模型，可提升模型对3D人体结构和场景交互的感知能力。提供了一种无需显式渲染的3D感知视频生成路径，为人机交互、虚拟现实等应用奠定基础。未来可探索更复杂的3D场景和动态相机控制。

title: Why Do Time Series Models Need Long Context Windows?
abstract: Modern deep learning models for forecasting groups of time series rely on increasingly longer observation windows. However, the benefit of increasing the window size is often simply attributed to capturing long-range dependencies, and broader discussion on how global forecasting models leverage input observations has been limited. In this paper, we show that forecasting groups of time series involves two objectives: (i) generative process identification (GPI), i.e., inferring the specific process generating the input sequence, and (ii) conditional forecasting (CF), i.e., predicting future values given input observations. From this perspective, optimal predictions can be interpreted as an average over plausible data-generating processes, weighted by their likelihood given the input window. This suggests another explanation for the benefits of long context windows: they reduce the uncertainty about which specific process is generating the input time series during operation. We prove that even for processes with memory length $P$, an input window size strictly larger than $P$ is necessary to achieve the minimum attainable error. Finally, we show how decoupling GPI and CF can improve computational scalability without compromising accuracy. Experiments on synthetic and real-world data validate our insights and their relevance for designing forecasting architectures.

light_analysis.overview: 论文揭示了长上下文窗口在时间序列预测中减少生成过程不确定性的关键作用，并证明即使内存有限，也需要大于内存长度的窗口才能达到最优误差。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代时间序列预测模型倾向于使用更长的观察窗口，但缺乏对长窗口为何有效的深入理解。现有解释仅简单归因于捕捉长程依赖，忽视了全局预测模型如何利用输入观测的机制。本文旨在从生成过程识别和条件预测的双目标视角，解释长窗口通过降低过程不确定性来提升预测准确性的根本原因。
light_analysis.method: 论文首先将时间序列预测分解为生成过程识别和条件预测两个目标，并证明最优预测是各生成过程后验概率加权的平均。基于此，推导出即使过程内存长度为P，输入窗口必须大于P才能达到最小误差。进一步提出解耦GPI和CF的方法，通过分别处理识别和预测步骤，提高计算可扩展性而不牺牲精度。实验采用合成数据和真实数据集验证理论。
light_analysis.result: 在合成数据和真实数据上的实验验证了理论发现：使用大于过程内存长度的窗口显著降低预测误差，且窗口越长，不确定性越小。解耦GPI和CF的方法在保持预测精度的同时，大幅减少了计算复杂度，例如在多个基准数据集上取得了与全窗口方法相当或更优的性能，同时计算时间降低。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提供了长上下文窗口在时间序列预测中有效性的新理论解释，即通过减少生成过程的不确定性来提升预测质量。解耦策略为设计高效且准确的预测架构提供了新思路。未来可探索自适应窗口选择和更高效的GPI方法。局限在于理论主要针对线性过程，非线性情况需进一步研究。

title: MMG2Skill: Can Agents Distill In-the-Wild Guides into Self-Evolving Skills?
abstract: Abundant procedural knowledge on the Web holds great potential for helping agents solve long-horizon tasks. However, such knowledge is often multimodal, heterogeneous, noisy, and implicitly assumes human executors, making it difficult to use directly as the skills required by agents. To bridge the gap between human-oriented guides and agent-executable skills, we formalize this problem as guide-to-skill learning: converting in-the-wild guides into executable skills and continuously improving them from trajectories observable to the agent. To evaluate the capability of existing agents on this task, we introduce MMG2Skill-Bench, the first benchmark designed for this problem. We further propose MMG2Skill, a closed-loop framework that compiles guides into editable skills, conditions a fixed vision-language model (VLM) agent on these skills during execution, and revises the skills from trajectory-level root-cause feedback without using benchmark scores. Across GUI control, open-ended gameplay, and strategic card play with six VLM backbones, MMG2Skill consistently outperforms vanilla baseline agents in every model-domain setting, achieving macro-average gains of +12.8 to +25.3 percentage points across backbones. Ablation studies show that directly prompting agents with raw guides can degrade performance, while both structured skill construction and trajectory-driven revision are necessary for the observed improvements. On success-inferable tasks, analyzer-based early stopping further prevents late-stage performance regressions and saves 25%-53% of attempts when the success signal is properly calibrated.

light_analysis.overview: 提出引导-技能学习问题，构建首个基准MMG2Skill-Bench，并设计闭环框架MMG2Skill，实现从多模态指南到可执行技能的转化与自进化。
light_analysis.motivation: 网络上的程序性知识（如指南）对智能体解决长时任务具有巨大潜力，但这类知识多为多模态、异构、噪声，且隐含人类执行者假设，难以直接作为智能体技能。现有方法无法有效桥接人类指南与智能体可执行技能之间的鸿沟，亟需一种能够将原始指南转化为可编辑、可进化技能的系统。
light_analysis.method: 提出MMG2Skill框架，核心步骤包括：将指南编译为结构化、可编辑的技能；在任务执行时，固定视觉语言模型（VLM）智能体以这些技能为条件进行推理；执行后从轨迹级根因反馈中自动修正技能，无需依赖基准分数。在GUI控制、开放游戏和策略卡牌三个领域，使用六种VLM骨干进行验证。
light_analysis.result: MMG2Skill在所有模型-领域组合中一致优于基线，宏平均提升+12.8至+25.3个百分点。消融实验表明，直接以原始指南提示智能体会降低性能，而结构化技能构建和轨迹驱动修正缺一不可。在成功可推断的任务中，基于分析器的早停机制可防止后期性能退化并节省25%-53%的尝试次数。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该项研究正式定义了引导-技能学习问题，提供了首个基准和有效框架，证明了将人类指南转化为智能体可进化技能的可行性。工作具有重要学术价值，为利用网络程序性知识提升智能体能力开辟新途径，未来可拓展至更多元指南类型和复杂智能体架构。

title: A Structured Benchmark for Text-Guided Anomaly Detection: When Language Stops Conditioning the Decision
abstract: Industrial anomaly detection has historically been a unimodal task. Recent multimodal vision-language models have produced systems that admit textual input alongside the image and are presented as enabling text-guided zero- and few-shot inspection. Yet these methods are evaluated with protocols inherited from unimodal benchmarks that hold the textual condition constant and therefore cannot measure whether language conditions the decision; whether reported gains reflect text guidance or strong pretrained visual features remains open. We introduce Text-Guided Anomaly Detection (TGAD), a structured benchmark that progressively increases the functional role of language across three scenarios: a controlled prompt-sensitivity setting on MVTec AD; a component-tagged extension of MVTec AD that requires the model to restrict its assessment to an instructed part; and the new Assembled Panel Dataset (APD), a realistic industrial setting that requires both defect-type and component-location knowledge. We evaluate one representative model per paradigm: generative large vision-language, training-free discriminative, and embedding-adaptive discriminative. In all three, the textual interface conditions the decision only superficially: prompt content is absorbed unless the object noun is removed (the generative model's I-AUROC drops from 97.4 to 82.6); component-level instructions do not constrain the decision once defects outside the instructed part are admitted as normal (from 90.3 to 66.3); and when both combine on APD, image-level discrimination collapses below the MVTec level, in one case below chance (71.2, 50.5, 31.5). These results suggest that standard benchmarks overstate the text-guided capabilities of current multimodal anomaly detection systems, and that a protocol of this kind is a prerequisite for models that can be reliably controlled through language for industrial deployment.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TGAD基准测试，揭示当前多模态异常检测系统实际上并未真正利用文本引导，其性能提升主要来自视觉特征。
light_analysis.motivation: 工业异常检测传统上为单模态任务，近期多模态模型引入文本输入声称实现文本引导的零样本检测，但评估沿用单模态基准，无法验证语言是否真正影响决策。现有方法报告的提升可能来自预训练视觉特征而非文本引导，这一问题对工业部署至关重要，因为需要可靠的语言控制能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出TGAD结构化基准，包含三个渐进场景：1）MVTec AD上的受控提示敏感性，测试模型对提示词变化的鲁棒性；2）MVTec AD组件标记扩展，要求模型仅评估指定部件；3）新构建的Assembled Panel Dataset (APD)，需同时识别缺陷类型和部件位置。评估三类代表性模型：生成式大视觉语言模型、无训练判别式、嵌入自适应判别式。
light_analysis.result: 所有三类模型均显示文本引导仅表面起作用：生成模型在去除物体名词后I-AUROC从97.4降至82.6；组件指令不限制决策时从90.3降至66.3；APD上图像级判别崩溃，一个模型降至31.5（低于随机50）。这表明标准基准严重高估了文本引导能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 当前多模态异常检测系统的文本引导能力被夸大，现有评估协议无法确保语言真正控制决策。提出的TGAD基准为可靠评估文本引导能力提供了必要方案，对工业部署中需要语言控制的应用具有重要价值。未来需开发能真正利用文本引导的模型。

title: MT-EditFlow: Reinforcement Learning for Multi-Turn Image Editing with Flow Matching
abstract: Recent breakthroughs in instruction-based image editing have captured significant attention, as models are now capable of handling real-world editing demands with the practicality required by everyday users. However, editing models trained primarily for single-turn edits often break down in multi-turn editing--the natural interactive setting where a user iteratively refines an image based on the model's own previous outputs. This failure stems from the all-or-nothing requirement, where a single failed turn compromises the entire sequence, and error propagation, where exposure bias leads to compounding editing errors. To address these challenges, we introduce MT-EditFlow, a flow-matching reinforcement learning framework designed to optimize reward signals for sequential image editing. MT-EditFlow integrates a multi-turn perspective with a multi-reward formulation to provide a unified structure applicable to both GRPO and NFT-based reinforcement learning methods. We systematically analyze and optimize the reward signal by investigating effective scoring strategies for turn-level aggregation, VLM reasoning modes to trade off reward bias and variance, and advantage fusion levels to prevent reward hacking. Our findings reveal that broadcasting the aggregated advantage across the entire editing trajectory effectively bridges the gap between local planning and global multi-turn task success. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MT-EditFlow significantly improves performance across diverse base models. Notably, it boosts FLUX.1-Kontext-dev by 6.85 points in turn-3 overall performance, surpassing state-of-the-art open-source models such as Qwen-Image-Edit. By maintaining high marginal success rates and reducing exposure bias, MT-EditFlow provides a foundation for more reliable and natural human-AI collaboration in visual content creation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MT-EditFlow框架，利用流匹配强化学习优化多轮图像编辑中的奖励信号，提升顺序编辑性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有指令式图像编辑模型主要针对单轮编辑训练，在多轮交互中因单次失败导致整个序列失效，以及曝光偏差引发的累积错误，限制了人机协作的自然性。解决多轮编辑的可靠性和误差传播问题是提升用户体验的关键。
light_analysis.method: MT-EditFlow基于流匹配强化学习，集成多轮视角与多奖励公式，统一适用于GRPO和NFT方法。通过分析回合级聚合评分策略、VLM推理模式权衡奖励偏差与方差、优势融合层级防止奖励黑客，广播聚合优势到整个编辑轨迹，桥接局部规划与全局多轮任务成功。
light_analysis.result: 在多种基模型上显著提升性能，尤其令FLUX.1-Kontext-dev在三轮整体性能上提高6.85分，超越Qwen-Image-Edit等开源模型。维持高边际成功率并降低曝光偏差，验证框架有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MT-EditFlow为多轮图像编辑提供可靠框架，减少误差传播，促进自然的人机协作。未来可扩展至更多视觉内容创作场景，潜在方向包括更复杂的奖励设计和长序列编辑优化。

title: Generalization Limits in Vehicle Re-Identification
abstract: Vehicle re-identification focuses on retrieving images of the same vehicle from a gallery given a query image. Upon closer inspection of commonly used datasets, we observe that vehicles with few visual differences-e.g., the same make, model, and color-appear in both the training and test sets. As a result, methods that effectively memorize the training data tend to perform well on these test sets but struggle to generalize to other datasets. In this paper, we address this issue by proposing a novel evaluation approach that more effectively measures generalization capability to unseen vehicle types. To further study generalization performance, we also propose splitting the evaluation based on view, allowing us to differentiate the effect of viewpoint robustness from that of same-view re-identification. Our findings reveal that most state-of-the-art methods struggle with unseen vehicle types, and that their robustness to viewpoint changes and attention to detail are limited to vehicle types seen during training.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种新的评估方法，揭示车辆重识别模型对未见车辆类型的泛化能力不足。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有车辆重识别数据集中，训练集和测试集常包含外观相似（相同品牌、型号、颜色）的车辆，导致基于记忆的方法在测试集上表现良好，但难以泛化到其他数据集。这种评测方式无法有效衡量模型的真实泛化能力，亟需更合理的评估方案。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一种新的评估方法，基于车辆类型（如品牌、型号、颜色组合）划分训练和测试集，避免类型重叠。同时，依据视角（如正面、侧面）拆分评估，以区分视角鲁棒性和同视角重识别能力。通过对比模型在不同类型和视角下的性能，分析其泛化极限。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，大多数最先进方法在未见车辆类型上性能显著下降，说明其泛化能力有限。此外，模型的视角鲁棒性和对细节的关注仅适用于训练时见过的车辆类型，而对新类型缺乏适应性。该评估框架更准确地反映了真实场景下的重识别挑战。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了车辆重识别模型普遍存在的泛化极限问题，并提供了更合理的评估手段。这些发现表明现有方法过度依赖于训练数据中的特定类型，未来工作需关注跨类型泛化能力，例如通过领域适应或更鲁棒的特征学习。该研究对实际应用（如跨摄像头车辆追踪）具有重要指导意义。

title: A Closer Look at In-Distribution vs. Out-of-Distribution Accuracy for Open-Set Test-time Adaptation
abstract: Open-set test-time adaptation (TTA) updates models on new data in the presence of input shifts and unknown output classes. While recent methods have made progress on improving in-distribution (InD) accuracy for known classes, their ability to accurately detect out-of-distribution (OOD) unknown classes remains underexplored. We benchmark robust and open-set TTA methods (SAR, OSTTA, UniEnt, and SoTTA) on the standard corruption benchmarks of CIFAR-10-C at the small scale and ImageNet-C at the large scale. For CIFAR-10-C, we use OOD data from SVHN and CIFAR-100 in their respective corrupted forms of SVHN-C and CIFAR-100-C. For ImageNet-C, we use OOD data from ImageNet-O and Textures in their respective corrupted forms of ImageNet-O-C and Textures-C. ImageNet-O is nearer to ImageNet, as unknown but related object classes (like ''garlic bread'' vs. ''hot dog'' for food, or ''highway'' vs. ''dam'' for infrastructure), while Textures is farther from ImageNet, as non-object patterns (like ''cracked'' mud, ''porous'' sponge, ''veined'' leaves). We evaluate the accuracy and confidence of TTA methods for InD vs. OOD recognition on CIFAR-10-C and ImageNet-C. We verify the accuracy of each method's own OOD detection technique on CIFAR-10-C. We also evaluate on ImageNet-C and report both accuracy and standard OOD detection metrics. We further examine more realistic settings, in which the proportions and rates of OOD data can vary. To explore the trade-off between InD recognition and OOD rejection, we propose a new baseline that replaces softmax/multi-class output with sigmoid/multi-label output. Our analysis shows for the first time that current open-set TTA methods struggle to balance InD and OOD accuracy and that they only imperfectly filter OOD data for their own adaptation updates.

light_analysis.overview: 系统评估开放集测试时自适应方法在分布内与分布外准确率之间的权衡，提出sigmoid/多标签输出基线以探索改进方向。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有开放集测试时自适应（TTA）方法主要关注提升已知类的分布内（InD）准确率，但准确检测分布外（OOD）未知类的能力尚未被充分研究。实际应用中，模型常遇到输入分布偏移和未知类别，因此同时优化InD识别与OOD拒绝至关重要。当前方法缺乏对两者权衡的深入分析，无法有效过滤OOD数据用于自适应更新。
light_analysis.method: 基准测试了SAR、OSTTA、UniEnt和SoTTA等方法，在CIFAR-10-C（小规模）和ImageNet-C（大规模）上评估，使用SVHN-C、CIFAR-100-C、ImageNet-O-C和Textures-C作为OOD数据。提出新基线：将softmax/多类输出替换为sigmoid/多标签输出，以探索InD识别与OOD拒绝的折中。分析了不同OOD比例和速率下的设置。
light_analysis.result: 在CIFAR-10-C和ImageNet-C上，当前TTA方法在InD准确率和OOD检测之间难以取得平衡，且对OOD数据的过滤不完美。例如，高分法（如SoTTA）在InD准确率上表现较好，但OOD检测指标（如AUROC）较低；低分法则相反。提出基线在部分设置下改善了权衡，但整体仍有差距。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次揭示当前开放集TTA方法在InD与OOD准确率之间的固有权衡，表明现有技术无法同时优化两者。sigmoid/多标签输出基线提供了新方向，但需进一步研究。该工作为开发更鲁棒的TTA方法奠定了基础，强调了在动态环境中平衡识别与拒绝的重要性。未来可探索自适应阈值或混合判别策略。

title: Contrastive Augmented Transformer with Domain-specific Enhancement for Robust Multi-scenario Metal Surface Defect Detection
abstract: Metal surface defect detection is critical for maintaining product quality in industrial manufacturing. However, it faces significant challenges, including limited annotated data, difficulty in identifying subtle multi-scale defects, and poor generalization across diverse scenarios. To address these issues, this paper proposes a novel Contrastive Augmented Transformer (CAT) framework for robust defect detection. CAT employs a hierarchical Swin Transformer backbone and redesigns the feature pyramid network to effectively fuse low-level textures with high-level semantics, enabling precise modeling of subtle and multi-scale defect patterns. To enhance robustness under real-world noise conditions, we propose a domain-specific droplet augmentation algorithm. Furthermore, we incorporate a hard negative mining strategy into the contrastive loss to strengthen the model's discrimination ability in ambiguous defect regions. Experimental results on the KolektorSDD2 dataset demonstrate that CAT achieves a pixel-level AUROC of 99.54%, outperforming existing methods. In addition, CAT exhibits superior generalization and robustness on three unseen datasets, including KSDD1, MTD for tile defects, and MSDD for rail surface defects, demonstrating its potential for wide-scale industrial deployment.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种对比增强Transformer框架，结合领域特定液滴增强算法，实现鲁棒的多场景金属表面缺陷检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 金属表面缺陷检测对工业制造质量至关重要，但面临标注数据有限、细微多尺度缺陷识别困难以及跨场景泛化能力差等挑战，现有方法难以同时解决这些问题。
light_analysis.method: 采用分层Swin Transformer骨干网络，并重新设计特征金字塔网络，融合低层纹理与高层语义；提出领域特定的液滴增强算法提升噪声鲁棒性；在对比损失中引入难负样本挖掘策略，增强对模糊缺陷区域的判别能力。
light_analysis.result: 在KolektorSDD2数据集上达到像素级AUROC 99.54%，优于现有方法；在KSDD1、MTD和MSDD三个未见数据集上展现优越泛化性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: CAT框架有效解决了多场景金属表面缺陷检测的关键挑战，具有广泛工业部署潜力；摘要未明确局限性或未来工作。

title: Flow-Transformed Implicit Processes for Function-Space Variational Inference
abstract: Implicit-process priors define distributions over functions through flexible generative mechanisms, making them attractive for Bayesian function-space modelling. However, performing posterior inference with such priors is challenging because their induced function-space distributions are typically not available in closed form. One practical strategy is to approximate the prior using a finite collection of sampled functions, and then represent posterior functions as learned combinations of these samples. Existing approaches commonly place a Gaussian variational distribution over the combination weights. While tractable, this choice limits the shapes of posterior uncertainty that can be represented, especially when the true posterior is asymmetric, heavy-tailed, or multimodal. We propose Flow-Transformed Implicit Processes (FTIP), a variational inference method that makes this finite-dimensional function-space approximation more expressive. Instead of using a Gaussian distribution over the combination weights, FTIP uses a normalizing flow to define a richer variational distribution. This induces a flexible posterior distribution over functions while preserving tractable optimization. We train the model using a Black-Box α objective, allowing us to compare mass-covering and mode-seeking variational behaviour. Experiments show that FTIP captures asymmetric and multimodal posterior structure in function space that Gaussian coefficient approximations tend to smooth or collapse.
comment: 24 pages, 4 figures, 10 tables. Pre-print submitted for revision

light_analysis.overview: 提出Flow-Transformed Implicit Processes (FTIP)，通过归一化流增强隐式过程后验的变分推断，以捕捉函数空间中的非对称和多模态不确定性。
light_analysis.motivation: 隐式过程先验在贝叶斯函数空间建模中具有吸引力，但后验推断困难。现有方法使用高斯变分分布于组合权重，限制了后验不确定性形状的表达能力，例如无法捕捉非对称、重尾或多模态结构。需要更灵活的变分近似方法。
light_analysis.method: FTIP采用归一化流定义组合权重的变分分布，取代传统的高斯分布，从而诱导更灵活的后验函数分布。利用Black-Box α目标函数进行训练，可权衡质量覆盖与模式寻找行为，保持可处理优化。方法基于有限维函数空间近似。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，FTIP能够准确捕捉函数空间中的非对称和多模态后验结构，而高斯系数近似往往平滑或坍缩这些结构。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但定性结果显示FTIP在表示复杂后验形状上优于基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: FTIP为隐式过程后验推断提供了更灵活的方法，提升了函数空间变分推断的表达能力。该工作具有学术价值，可应用于需要复杂不确定性建模的领域，如贝叶斯优化和概率机器学习。未来可探索更高效的计算策略。

title: Randomized Least Squares Value Iteration itself is Joint Differentially Private
abstract: As reinforcement learning (RL) increasingly applies to sensitive domains, such as health care and recommendation systems, privacy-preserving techniques have become essential to protect users' sensitive information. We investigate privacy-preserving RL under an episodic setting, focusing on algorithms based on randomized exploration, such as Randomized Least Squares Value Iteration (RLSVI). The overall goal is to study how randomized exploration interacts with the injected noise required by privacy mechanisms. In this work, we show a new privacy analysis that characterizes how the noise in RLSVI set for exploration simultaneously provides privacy protection. Specifically, we prove that RLSVI is $(\varepsilon(δ),δ)$-joint differentially private in tabular MDP as is with $\varepsilon(δ) = \frac{2AK}{H^2\log(2HSA)} + 2\sqrt{\frac{2AK\log(1/δ)}{H^2\log(2HSA)}}$, where $S$ and $A$ are the number of states and actions respectively, $H$ is the length of an episode and $K$ is the number of episodes.

light_analysis.overview: 证明了随机最小二乘值迭代（RLSVI）算法本身具有联合差分隐私性质，无需额外噪声注入。
light_analysis.motivation: 强化学习应用于医疗、推荐系统等敏感领域时，保护用户隐私至关重要。现有方法通常需在算法中注入额外噪声以实现差分隐私，但会影响探索效率。本研究旨在探索随机探索算法（如RLSVI）中固有的随机性是否已提供足够的隐私保障，从而避免额外噪声带来的性能损失。
light_analysis.method: 论文针对表格型马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）中的轮次强化学习场景，分析RLSVI算法的隐私性质。RLSVI通过在值迭代中加入随机噪声进行探索。作者提出了新的隐私分析方法，将RLSVI中的随机探索噪声视为隐私保护噪声，证明其固有地满足(ε(δ),δ)-联合差分隐私，并给出了隐私参数ε(δ)的显式表达式，依赖于状态数S、动作数A、轮次长度H和轮次数K。
light_analysis.result: 理论证明了RLSVI是联合差分隐私的，隐私损失ε(δ)=2AK/(H² log(2HSA))+2√[2AK log(1/δ)/(H² log(2HSA))]。该结果无需任何额外机制修改，即RLSVI的固有随机性同时实现了探索和隐私需求。与需要额外噪声的基线方法相比，避免了隐私预算的额外消耗，可能实现更好的隐私-效用权衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究首次揭示了随机探索算法RLSVI本身具有联合差分隐私性，为设计隐私保护强化学习算法提供了新视角。其理论结果有助于在隐私保护与学习效率之间取得平衡，尤其适用于医疗、推荐系统等对隐私敏感的领域。未来工作可扩展至更复杂的MDP设定或连续状态空间，并探索隐私参数与算法性能之间的具体关系。

title: Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning of Large Pretrained Models for Instance Segmentation Tasks
abstract: Research and applications in artificial intelligence have recently shifted with the rise of large pretrained models, which deliver state-of-the-art results across numerous tasks. However, the substantial increase in parameters introduces a need for parameter-efficient training strategies. Despite significant advancements, limited research has explored parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) methods in the context of transformer-based models for instance segmentation. Addressing this gap, this study investigates the effectiveness of PEFT methods, specifically adapters and Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA), applied to two models across four benchmark datasets. Integrating sequentially arranged adapter modules and applying LoRA to deformable attention--explored here for the first time--achieves competitive performance while fine-tuning only about 1-6% of model parameters, a marked improvement over the 40-55% required in traditional fine-tuning. Key findings indicate that using 2-3 adapters per transformer block offers an optimal balance of performance and efficiency. Furthermore, LoRA, exhibits strong parameter efficiency when applied to deformable attention, and in certain cases surpasses adapter configurations. These results show that the impact of PEFT techniques varies based on dataset complexity and model architecture, underscoring the importance of context-specific tuning. Overall, this work demonstrates the potential of PEFT to enable scalable, customizable, and computationally efficient transfer learning for instance segmentation tasks.
comment: Published by the Machine Learning and Knowledge Extraction Journal

light_analysis.overview: 研究参数高效微调（PEFT）方法（适配器和LoRA）在实例分割任务上的有效性，仅微调1-6%参数即达到竞争性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型预训练模型参数激增，传统微调需要更新40-55%参数，计算成本高。尽管PEFT在其他任务中取得进展，但在基于Transformer的实例分割模型中的应用研究有限。本文旨在填补这一空白，探索适配器和LoRA在实例分割中的效果。
light_analysis.method: 采用两种PEFT方法：适配器（顺序插入模块）和LoRA（应用于可变形注意力，首次尝试）。在四个基准数据集上对两个Transformer模型进行微调，仅更新约1-6%参数。关键设计包括优化每Transformer块的适配器数量（2-3个最优），并与传统微调（40-55%参数）对比。
light_analysis.result: PEFT方法仅微调1-6%参数即取得竞争性能，显著优于传统微调的40-55%。2-3个适配器实现性能与效率的最佳平衡。LoRA在可变形注意力上表现出强参数效率，部分场景超越适配器。效果受数据集复杂度和模型架构影响，强调上下文特异性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了PEFT在实例分割中实现可扩展、计算高效的迁移学习潜力，支持定制化模型部署。未来需进一步探索不同架构和数据集下的最优PEFT配置，以及结合更多技术如知识蒸馏。

title: Beyond Low-Rank: Low-Rank Sparse Prompting via Spiking Neural Network and Prompt Factorization
abstract: Visual Prompting (VP) has emerged as an efficient paradigm for adapting large-scale pre-trained vision models to downstream tasks by incorporating learnable prompts at the input level. However, existing VP methods typically employ dense pixel-level prompts, which often suffer from redundant perturbations, limited generalization and energy inefficiency. To overcome these limitations, we propose to integrate brain-inspired spiking learning into visual prompt learning tasks. As we know that spiking neuron can perform inexpensive information processing by transmitting the input data into discrete spike trains and return sparse outputs. Inspired by this, we propose \textbf{Lo}w-\textbf{R}ank visual \textbf{S}pike \textbf{P}rompting (LoRSP), a novel framework that learns dynamic low-rank sparse visual prompts naturally via a Spiking neuron learning mechanism. The core idea of LoRSP is to exploit the brain-inspired sparse firing mechanism of spiking neurons to generate pixel-level sparse prompt for each instance. To be specific, we first construct a series of prompt factors via low-rank factorization to capture distinct prompt subspaces. These prompt factors are then fed into an SNN architecture, which performs the integrate-and-fire process to emit spikes. As a result, our LoRSP generates a \emph{sparse} visual prompt while maintaining the low-rank constraint. This design enables instance-specific selective prompting, leading to more compact and robust adaptation across diverse downstream tasks. Extensive experiments on five heterogeneous vision backbones and multiple benchmarks demonstrate that LoRSP achieves competitive performance while requiring fewer tunable parameters compared to existing VP methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LoRSP框架，结合脉冲神经网络和低秩分解生成低秩稀疏视觉提示，实现高效模型适配。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视觉提示方法采用密集像素级提示，存在冗余扰动、泛化性差和能量效率低的问题。受大脑启发，利用脉冲神经元的稀疏放电特性，旨在生成实例特定的稀疏提示，实现更紧凑、鲁棒的适配，同时降低参数和计算开销。
light_analysis.method: LoRSP通过低秩分解构建一系列提示因子，捕捉不同提示子空间，再输入脉冲神经网络（SNN）进行整合-发放过程，发放稀疏脉冲从而生成像素级稀疏视觉提示。该方法保持低秩约束，实现实例特定的选择性提示，结合SNN的生物合理性和低秩分解的高效性。
light_analysis.result: 在五个异构视觉骨架（如ResNet、ViT等）和多个基准测试上，LoRSP以更少的可调参数取得了与现有VP方法相当甚至更优的性能，验证了稀疏低秩提示的有效性。具体性能提升和参数减少比例请参阅原文。
light_analysis.conclusion: LoRSP通过融合脉冲神经网络和低秩分解，创新性地生成稀疏视觉提示，解决了密集提示的冗余和低效问题。该方法为视觉提示学习提供了新范式，具有节能和泛化潜力，未来可探索更复杂的SNN结构和跨任务迁移。

title: SCAPO: Self-Supervised Category-Level Articulated Pose Estimation from a Single 3D Observation
abstract: Existing methods for category-level object articulation from a single 3D observation often rely on dense supervision, multi-frame inputs, or CAD templates, and still struggle to disentangle geometry from articulation or to recover explicit joint parameters. We propose SCAPO, a self-supervised framework that estimates canonical geometry, rigid part segmentation, and joint pivots, axes, and articulation states from a single RGB-D observation without ground-truth labels or category-specific models. Our SCAPO first uses an SE(3)-equivariant vector-neuron autoencoder to factor out global pose and align diverse instances into a shared canonical space. On this aligned shape, a joint-aware blend-skinning module is then designed to model part motion. We learn this representation through cycle reconstruction between observed and canonical shapes and cross-space alignment with a learnable canonical template that decouples shared category geometry from instance-specific residual shape. Experiments on synthetic and real articulated-object datasets show that our SCAPO recovers consistent part structure and accurate articulation parameters and outperforms all self-supervised baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SCAPO，一种自监督框架，从单张RGB-D观测中估计类别级铰接物体的规范几何、部件分割和关节参数。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有类别级铰接物体姿态估计方法依赖密集监督、多帧输入或CAD模板，难以解耦几何与关节，且无法恢复显式关节参数。这些限制导致泛化性差，需要大量标注数据。因此需一种无需真值标签的自监督方法，从单次观测中同时估计几何、分割和关节状态。
light_analysis.method: SCAPO使用SE(3)-等变向量神经元自编码器将不同实例对齐到共享规范空间，消除全局姿态变化。设计关节感知混合蒙皮模块建模部件运动。通过观测形状与规范形状间的循环重建及跨空间对齐学习，利用可学习规范模板解耦类别共享几何与实例残差形状。整个框架自监督训练，无需真值标注。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实铰接物体数据集上，SCAPO恢复一致的部件结构和准确关节参数，在自监督基线中表现最优，优于所有自监督基线方法。摘要未明确具体数值，但声称全面超越对比方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: SCAPO实现了无需真值标签的类别级铰接物体姿态估计，从单张RGB-D观测中同时恢复几何、分割和关节参数，降低了数据需求，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索扩展至更复杂铰接类型或高噪声场景。

title: SAVMap: Structure-Aided Visual Mapping of Large-Scale 2.5D Manhattan Wireframes from Panoramic Video
abstract: Precise 3D representations of industrial environments enable tasks such as robot localization and digital twin generation. We propose SAVMap, a method for generating a semantic wireframe map of warehouse shelf and light structures using only a panoramic video camera as the sensor input. Sequences of rectified images with shelf and ceiling-facing views are extracted from a panoramic video captured along the warehouse aisles. Using a semantic segmentation network front end, a set of sparse, semantic structure feature points (e.g., corners of shelf structures, centers of lights) are extracted from each image and tracked across the sequences. By accounting for real-world geometric relationships among the points such as Manhattan grids, a constrained structure-from-motion algorithm yields the 3D points that form a wireframe map. We demonstrate the scalability and accuracy of our proposal in a warehouse with 46 shelving rows, each with faces spanning 55\,m by 7\,m. From an hour of panoramic video content, we create wireframe maps for over 5000 shelf elements across the rows, achieving an aggregate mean absolute error of 4.8\,cm with respect to ground-truth.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SAVMap方法，利用全景视频和曼哈顿几何约束，生成大规模仓库环境的语义线框地图。
light_analysis.motivation: 工业环境的高精度3D表示对机器人定位和数字孪生至关重要。现有方法依赖昂贵传感器或复杂标定，而仅用全景相机作为输入，缺乏对结构化环境（如货架、灯光）的语义线框生成方案。该研究旨在利用低成本传感器自动生成仓库语义线框地图，解决大规模场景下的精度和可扩展性问题。
light_analysis.method: 从仓库通道全景视频中提取修正的货架和天花板图像序列。利用语义分割网络从每帧图像提取稀疏语义特征点（如货架角、灯中心），并在序列间追踪。通过引入曼哈顿网格假设，对特征点的几何关系进行约束，采用结构恢复运动（SfM）算法计算3D点，最终形成语义线框地图。
light_analysis.result: 在包含46个货架排的仓库中测试，每排面积55×7米。处理一小时全景视频，生成超过5000个货架元素的线框地图。与真值比较，总体平均绝对误差为4.8厘米，验证了方法的准确性和可扩展性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SAVMap仅用全景视频即可生成高精度语义线框地图，适用于大型仓库等工业场景。该工作为机器人定位和数字孪生提供低成本方案。未来可扩展至更多结构元素或动态环境，但依赖曼哈顿假设可能限制其通用性。

title: Unified Driving Tokens: Representation- and Geometry-Guided Discrete Tokenizer for Driving World Models and Planning
abstract: Discrete visual tokens should provide a compact representation for both token-based world modeling and planning in autonomous driving. However, most tokenizers are inherited from image generation and are optimized mainly for pixel reconstruction, which may leave a gap between what is easy to generate and what is useful to decode for driving decisions. We present a representation-guided and geometry-enhanced tokenizer that learns discrete tokens under joint supervision. The tokenizer aligns its discrete bottleneck with a frozen DINO feature space through feature decoding, while preserving appearance via RGB reconstruction with perceptual and adversarial losses. To inject geometric state-related cues, we add adjacent-frame depth and relative-pose supervision during training and stabilize joint objectives with multi-codebook quantization. We evaluate the same learned tokens with a lightweight planning readout and a GPT-style next-token world model. Experiments on NAVSIM show improved reconstruction fidelity and representation consistency, competitive planning performance under a fixed decoder, and better generative quality under matched settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种表示引导和几何增强的离散分词器，通过联合监督学习令牌，对齐DINO特征并融入几何信息，用于驾驶世界模型和规划。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动驾驶中离散视觉令牌用于世界模型和规划，但现有分词器继承自图像生成，主要优化像素重建，可能产生易生成但与驾驶决策不匹配的令牌。因此需要一种既能保留外观又能对齐驾驶相关表示（如DINO特征）并融入几何状态信息的令牌学习方式，以缩小生成与决策之间的差距。
light_analysis.method: 提出统一驾驶令牌分词器，在联合监督下学习离散令牌。通过特征解码将离散瓶颈与冻结DINO特征空间对齐，通过RGB重建（感知和对抗损失）保留外观。添加相邻帧深度和相对位姿监督注入几何线索，用多码本量化稳定联合目标。评估使用轻量规划读出头和GPT式下一个令牌世界模型。
light_analysis.result: 在NAVSIM上评估，显示改进的重建保真度和表示一致性，固定解码器下竞争性规划性能，匹配设置下更好的生成质量。摘要未明确说明具体数值，但定性表明优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该分词器通过结合表示引导和几何增强，弥合了令牌生成与驾驶决策之间的差距，提升了世界模型和规划的性能。学术价值在于提出针对驾驶任务定制的离散表征学习框架，实际应用可提升自动驾驶决策质量。未来可能优化量化或扩展至更多场景。

title: HMPO: Hybrid Median-length Policy Optimization for Chain-of-Thought Compression
abstract: Large language models achieve remarkable performance via extended chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning, yet this lengthy process incurs substantial inference overhead. Existing CoT compression methods struggle with inflexible manual length budgets, computationally expensive multi-stage training pipelines, and fragile scalability restricted to small models. We propose HMPO (Hybrid Median-length Policy Optimization), a cost-effective, single-stage reinforcement learning framework. HMPO efficiently compresses CoT via three synergistic components: an adaptive median-based budget derived from successful rollouts to eliminate manual tuning, a cosine-decay token reward for smooth length penalization, and a multiplicative reward formulation that substantially mitigates trivial reward hacking by strictly prioritizing answer correctness. Trained exclusively on mathematical data, HMPO generalizes seamlessly across math, code, science, and instruction-following tasks. Extensive experiments scaling from 9B to 122B parameters across dense and Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures demonstrate that HMPO achieves 19%--46% token compression with negligible accuracy degradation, all while drastically reducing training costs compared to existing multi-stage baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HMPO单阶段强化学习框架，高效压缩大语言模型思维链长度，避免手动调参和多阶段训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型通过长思维链推理获得高性能，但推理开销大。现有压缩方法依赖手动长度预算、多阶段训练成本高且仅适用于小模型，缺乏灵活性和可扩展性。
light_analysis.method: HMPO基于三个组件：自适应中位数预算从成功轨迹动态确定长度；余弦衰减令牌奖励平滑惩罚长度；乘法奖励公式优先保证答案正确性，减少奖励破解。仅用数学数据训练，但泛化到数学、代码、科学和指令遵循任务。
light_analysis.result: 在9B至122B参数（稠密和MoE架构）上，实现19%-46%令牌压缩，精度损失可忽略。相比多阶段基线，训练成本大幅降低。
light_analysis.conclusion: HMPO以单阶段强化学习高效压缩思维链，兼顾压缩比与准确性，泛化性强，为大规模模型推理优化提供实用方案。

title: 3rd Place at CVPR 2026 CASTLE Challenge: Agentic Multi-View Long-Context Video Understanding via Hierarchical Knowledge Graph Retrieval
abstract: This paper presents our winning methodology for the CASTLE 2026 Challenge at the CVPR 2026 EgoVis Workshop, where our team secured third place globally. The challenge tasks participants with answering highly complex visual, spatiotemporal, and verbal questions, including visual counting, action localization, multi-view tracking and speaker temporal reasoning, within massive, multimodal video streams. The underlying dataset consists of over 600 hours synchronized footage captured by 15 ego and exo camera sources. To tackle the extreme scale and long-context demands of this environment, we introduce a training-free agentic framework optimized for long-form video understanding. Our framework introduces two core architectural components: i) a Video Knowledge Graph that maps static and dynamic entities, their temporal relationships, and intersecting events to enable multi-hop relational reasoning, and ii) an adaptive agentic workflow that resolves complex queries through a hierarchical retrieval and indexing. Empirical results demonstrate that our framework achieves high zero-shot reasoning accuracy on long-context multi-view streams. Our code will be released at https://github.com/RaghadKhaled/CASTLE-Challenge-Framework.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种无需训练的无代理框架，通过分层知识图谱检索实现多视角长上下文视频理解，在CASTLE挑战中获第三名。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法难以处理大规模多模态视频流中的长上下文和复杂时空推理问题，如视觉计数、多视角跟踪和说话者时序推理。超过600小时的同步多摄像头数据增加了处理难度，传统模型在极端尺度下表现不佳。
light_analysis.method: 提出无需训练的代理框架，包含两个核心组件：1）视频知识图谱，映射静态/动态实体及其时间关系和相交事件，支持多跳关系推理；2）自适应代理工作流，通过分层检索与索引解决复杂查询。未使用额外训练数据。
light_analysis.result: 在多视角长上下文视频流上实现高零样本推理准确率。在CASTLE 2026挑战中排名第三，验证了框架在复杂时空问答任务中的有效性。具体性能指标摘要未明确，但强调了零样本能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 成功展示了无需训练的代理框架在大规模多视角视频理解中的潜力，通过知识图谱和分层检索实现高效推理。未来工作可扩展至更多模态和实时应用，代码已开源促进研究。

title: Resonant Context Anchoring: Decoupling Attention Routing and Signal Gain at Inference Time
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) frequently exhibit "contextual disregard" when faced with input evidence that conflicts with their internal parametric memory, leading to persistent factual hallucinations. Existing mitigation strategies primarily rely on suppressing specific neuron activations or employing computationally expensive contrastive decoding mechanisms, which often result in increased perplexity or significantly elevated inference latency. To address these limitations, we propose Resonant Context Anchoring (RCA), a lightweight inference-time intervention method grounded in the perspective of residual stream signal dynamics. RCA aims to resolve the signal attenuation of external evidence during its propagation through deep networks. The core mechanism involves the orthogonal decoupling of routing logic and information magnitude within the self-attention module. By utilizing raw pre-softmax attention scores as an instantaneous metric of semantic alignment, we construct a dynamic gain field via non-linear rectification to selectively amplify the norms of value vectors corresponding to context tokens, without altering the attention probability distribution. This mechanism effectively elevates the signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) of input evidence within the residual stream mixture, thereby robustly anchoring the generation trajectory to the truthful context during inference. Extensive experiments on the Llama-3 model series demonstrate that RCA significantly improves contextual faithfulness across multiple factual consistency and strong knowledge-conflict tasks, effectively suppressing parametric hallucinations. Furthermore, results confirm that as a training-free and computationally negligible plug-and-play module, RCA achieves a Pareto improvement in faithfulness and fluency while maintaining the model's general language understanding capabilities.

light_analysis.overview: Resonant Context Anchoring (RCA) 是一种轻量级推理时干预方法，通过解耦自注意力中的路由逻辑与信号增益，增强上下文忠实性。
