light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在面对与内部参数记忆冲突的输入证据时，常出现“上下文无视”现象，导致持续的事实幻觉。现有缓解方法依赖抑制特定神经元或昂贵对比解码，增加了困惑度或推理延迟。因此，需要一种高效、训练免费的方法来提升模型对输入证据的利用，抑制幻觉。
light_analysis.method: RCA 从残差流信号动力学视角出发，在自注意力模块中正交解耦路由逻辑与信息幅度。利用原始预softmax注意力分数作为语义对齐的即时指标，通过非线性整流构建动态增益场，选择性放大上下文令牌对应值向量的范数，而不改变注意力概率分布。从而提升残差流混合中输入证据的信噪比，将生成轨迹稳健锚定于真实上下文。
light_analysis.result: 在 Llama-3 模型系列上的大量实验表明，RCA 在多个事实一致性和强知识冲突任务中显著改善了上下文忠实性，有效抑制了参数幻觉。作为一种无需训练、计算开销可忽略的即插即用模块，RCA 在忠实度和流畅性上实现了帕累托改进，同时保持了模型的一般语言理解能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: RCA 通过轻量级推理时干预，有效解决了LLM的上下文无视问题，提升了事实一致性。其训练免费、计算高效的特性使其易于部署。未来可探索更复杂的增益场构造或在其他架构上的应用，进一步减轻幻觉。

title: Pool-Select-Refine: Allocation-Aware Generative Dataset Distillation with Soft-Label-Guided Latent Refinement
abstract: Diffusion-based dataset distillation has recently emerged as a promising paradigm for condensing large-scale datasets into compact synthetic sets. By leveraging pretrained generative priors, these methods can produce realistic class-conditional samples more efficiently than traditional matching-based approaches. However, most existing diffusion-based methods still adopt a rigid ``Generate-and-Use'' strategy, where the generated samples are directly treated as the final distilled set under a fixed images-per-class budget. Such a design tightly couples candidate generation with final budget allocation, which may result in redundant waste of the limited budget or insufficiently informative samples. In this paper, we propose ``Pool-Select-Refine'', a two-stage framework for allocation-aware generative dataset distillation. First, instead of directly using a fixed number of generated samples, we construct an over-complete candidate pool and select a compact subset under the target budget. Second, we refine the selected samples in latent space using soft-label supervision derived from the teacher model, improving semantic alignment while preserving the generative prior. This design explicitly decouples generation, selection, and refinement, enabling more effective use of the distillation budget. Experiments on large-scale and fine-grained image classification benchmarks show that the proposed framework delivers consistent gains over diffusion-based baselines. The results suggest that introducing a curation stage before refinement is a simple yet effective way to improve diffusion-based dataset distillation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Pool-Select-Refine两阶段框架，通过候选池选择与潜空间精炼，实现分配感知的生成式数据集蒸馏。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有扩散模型数据集蒸馏采用固定的生成-使用策略，生成样本直接作为蒸馏集，导致预算分配与生成紧密耦合，可能浪费有限预算或产生信息不足的样本。需要解耦生成、选择和精炼，以更有效地利用蒸馏预算。
light_analysis.method: 构建过完备候选池，在目标预算下选择紧凑子集；然后利用教师模型的软标签监督在潜空间中精炼选定样本，改善语义对齐同时保持生成先验。该设计显式解耦生成、选择和精炼，实现更有效的预算分配。
light_analysis.result: 在大规模和细粒度图像分类基准上，该方法相对于扩散基线方法取得一致性能提升，表明引入筛选阶段后再精炼是改进扩散数据集蒸馏的有效方式。具体提升幅度未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出Pool-Select-Refine框架，通过解耦生成、选择和精炼阶段，更有效地利用蒸馏预算。实验验证了该方法的有效性，为生成式数据集蒸馏提供了新思路，未来可探索更优的选择和精炼策略。

title: Mechanistic Diagnostics of Spatial Lexical Bias in Multimodal Large Language Model Spatial Reasoning
abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) remain unreliable on spatial multiple-choice questions, and their failures are often attributed to poorly attended visual information. In this work, we identify a complementary failure mode, spatial lexical bias: adding a spatial relation word to the answer options can attract the model's decision and make the newly added option likely to be selected. Using nine open-weight MLLMs, we show that this phenomenon is widely observed. In particular, models can answer a binary spatial question correctly, yet consistently select an incorrect third spatial option once it is added to the answer set. We isolate such binary-stable but ternary-fragile cases as diagnostic examples and leverage mechanistic interpretability tools, revealing that a substantial part of the failure instead originates on the language side rather than the visual side: visual attention analyses and residual-stream probes show the correct spatial relation remains internally available on these failures, while irrelevant-option controls, activation patching, and sparse component interventions trace the bias to specific LLM-side channels and neurons. Based on this finding, we show that a lightweight LLM-only DPO update on tiny single-object-pair synthetic data mitigates the bias, lifting four-way robust accuracy by up to 100 points on synthetic data, and by 68.0, 32.6, and 20.1 points on broader evaluation datasets WhatsUp, SpatialMQA-Direct, and VSR.

light_analysis.overview: 发现并诊断多模态大语言模型空间推理中的空间词汇偏差，证明偏差源于语言侧，并提出轻量级DPO缓解方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在空间选择题中不可靠，现有研究将失败归因于视觉信息关注不足。本文识别了一个互补的失败模式：空间词汇偏差，即添加空间关系词到答案选项会吸引模型选择该选项。该现象广泛存在于多个开源MLLMs中，且模型在二选一时正确，加入第三个空间选项后却持续选错，揭示语言侧偏差是重要原因。
light_analysis.method: 选取二元正确但三元脆弱的案例作为诊断样本，利用机械可解释性工具（视觉注意力分析、残差流探针、激活修补、稀疏组件干预）追溯偏差来源，证明正确空间关系在模型内部仍可用，但偏差源自LLM侧的特定通道和神经元。基于此，提出轻量级LLM-only的DPO更新，使用单目标对合成数据微调。
light_analysis.result: 该方法在合成数据上将四路准确率提升高达100点，在WhatsUp、SpatialMQA-Direct和VSR三个评估数据集上分别提升68.0、32.6和20.1个准确率点，有效缓解空间词汇偏差，验证了语言侧干预的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本工作揭示了MLLM空间推理中一个被忽视的失败模式——空间词汇偏差，并证明其源于语言侧。提出的轻量级DPO方法仅需合成数据即可显著提升性能，为诊断和修复MLLM多模态推理中的语言侧偏差提供了新思路。未来可探索更复杂的空间关系及跨模态交互机制。

title: Residual Decoder Adapter: ID-Preserving Tokenizer Adaption for Autoregressive Text Rendering
abstract: Visual Autoregressive (AR) models generate images by predicting discrete tokens that are decoded by a visual tokenizer. Despite demonstrating strong overall image generation ability, they still underperform on text rendering with blur strokes and disrupt letter shapes. In this work, we trace this limitation to the visual tokenizer, which struggles to reconstruct fine-grained detail. Improving the tokenizer is straightforward but expensive, as it necessitates retraining both the tokenizer and the AR model. Can we improve text rendering performance of AR models without retraining the existing tokenizer and AR model? To achieve this, we propose the Residual Decoder Adapter(RDA) that upgrades an existing tokenizer post-hoc without changing its token space. Specifically, it refines the decoder output of the visual tokenizer by introducing two novel components: (i) a paired codebook that shares the token distribution with the original one; (ii) a parallel branch to learn the tiny differences (residual) between the reconstructed image and the ground-truth images in the pixel space. This residual design allows us to enhance the tokenizer non-invasively while preserving compatibility with prior AR models. RDA substantially improves text rendering significantly by a large margin. For instance, we boost finetuned Janus-Pro OCR accuracy rises from 24.52% to 58.26% (TextVisionBlend), from 12.75% to 36.81% (StyledTextSynth) on competitive TextAtlas benchmark. The code is available at https://github.com/CSU-JPG/RDA

light_analysis.overview: 提出残差解码器适配器(RDA)，无需重训练即可提升自回归模型文本渲染质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉自回归模型在图像生成中表现出色，但在文本渲染方面存在模糊笔画和破坏字母形状的问题。现有方法直接改进分词器需要重新训练分词器和AR模型，成本高昂。因此，研究旨在不重新训练现有分词器和AR模型的前提下，提升文本渲染性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出残差解码器适配器(RDA)，通过两个创新组件升级现有分词器：(i) 与原始分词器共享令牌分布的配对码本；(ii) 学习重建图像与真实图像之间像素级微小差异（残差）的并行分支。这种残差设计非侵入性地增强分词器，同时保持与先前AR模型的兼容性。
light_analysis.result: RDA显著提升文本渲染性能。在TextAtlas基准上，微调后的Janus-Pro OCR准确率从24.52%提升至58.26%（TextVisionBlend），从12.75%提升至36.81%（StyledTextSynth），提升幅度显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: RDA有效解决了AR模型文本渲染的瓶颈，无需重训练即可提升分词器细节重建能力，具有高实用价值。未来可探索将RDA应用于其他视觉任务，并进一步优化残差学习机制。

title: Private and Stable Test-Time Adaptation with Differential Privacy
abstract: Test-time adaptation (TTA) can reduce error on new and different data by updating the model on these inputs during inference. However, these updates raise the issue of privacy w.r.t. the testing data, because the model parameters now depend on all past inputs. To control this privacy risk, we cast multiple popular TTA methods (Tent, EATA, SAR, DeYO, and COME) into differential privacy (DP) forms that apply per-sample gradient clipping and Gaussian noise for all updates. On ImageNet-C, our DP-TTA methods provide adequate privacy at small cost to accuracy, and in the low-privacy regime the clipping mechanism of DP can even improve the accuracy and stability of adaptation in the continual setting. These improvements to privacy and accuracy come at only modest computational overhead. These first results on private TTA raise awareness of the issue, inform the development of more private test-time updates, and identify per-sample clipping as an effective technique for improving the accuracy and stability of adaptation.

light_analysis.overview: 将差分隐私（DP）集成到测试时自适应（TTA）方法中，在保护测试数据隐私的同时提升准确性和稳定性。
light_analysis.motivation: 测试时自适应（TTA）通过在推理时更新模型来降低新数据的错误，但模型参数依赖所有过去输入，导致隐私泄露风险。现有TTA方法未考虑隐私保护，而差分隐私可严格量化风险。该研究旨在探索如何在不显著牺牲性能的前提下，使TTA方法具备隐私保护能力。
light_analysis.method: 将Tent、EATA、SAR、DeYO和COME等流行TTA方法转化为差分隐私版本（DP-TTA），核心是每个更新步骤对每样本梯度进行裁剪并添加高斯噪声。在ImageNet-C数据集上评估，比较准确率与隐私预算之间的权衡。
light_analysis.result: DP-TTA方法在提供足够隐私保护的同时，准确率损失很小。在低隐私预算（ε较大）下，梯度裁剪反而提高了连续自适应场景下的准确性和稳定性，且计算开销仅适度增加。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次系统研究私有TTA问题，揭示了隐私风险并提供了可行方案。每样本梯度裁剪被证明不仅能保护隐私，还能改善自适应性能。未来工作可探索更高效的隐私预算分配或针对TTA的专用隐私机制。

title: The Image Reconstruction Game: Drawing Common Ground Through Iterative Multimodal Dialogue
abstract: We introduce the Image Reconstruction Game, a fully automated benchmark in which a vision-language model issues corrective instructions to an image generator across multiple turns, making accumulated common ground directly observable as a rendered image. Benchmarking two Describer models crossed with two Generator models across seven image categories, we find that the describer is the dominant factor in reconstruction quality, while the generator determines whether iterative refinement helps or hurts. Mathematical and geometric images pose the greatest challenge. The describer's token budget strongly affects convergence: shorter budgets yield sparser first renderings with more room for visible improvement, while longer budgets raise absolute quality but leave less to fix. Stronger describers use a richer correction vocabulary spanning spatial, numeric, and structural categories, while weaker describers concentrate on surface properties and tend to stop after a few turns. Human validation shows that the best automated judge reaches only slight-to-fair agreement with human preferences, and automated scores require human recalibration to be used reliably.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了Image Reconstruction Game基准，通过多轮对话迭代优化图像重建，量化视觉语言模型与图像生成器之间的共同基础。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型与图像生成器之间的交互缺乏可观测的共同基础度量，且不同组件和预算对迭代改进的影响尚未系统研究。该问题重要，因为建立共同基础是多模态对话系统的核心能力，现有方法无法直接观察累积的理解。
light_analysis.method: 构建全自动基准，描述模型（如视觉语言模型）多轮向生成模型发出纠正指令，每次迭代更新图像，使共同基础显式呈现为重建图像。实验采用两种描述模型和两种生成模型，覆盖七个图像类别，并分析令牌预算、纠正词汇多样性等因素。
light_analysis.result: 描述者是重建质量主导因素，数学和几何图像最具挑战性。短令牌预算下首次渲染稀疏但改进空间大，长预算绝对质量高但改进小。强描述者使用更丰富的纠正词汇，弱描述者易早停。最佳自动评判与人类偏好仅达轻微一致性，自动评分需人类重校准。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该基准有效评估多模态系统的共同基础建立能力，揭示描述者和预算的关键作用。学术上提供量化框架，实践上可用于改进对话式图像生成。未来可探索更复杂交互策略，但自动评判尚不可靠，需人类参与。

title: Auteur: Language-Driven Cinematographic Framing for Human-Centric Video Generation
abstract: Generative video models have achieved remarkable visual fidelity and temporal coherence, yet intentional camera control remains elusive. Existing frameworks treat camera motion as a byproduct of pixel synthesis, producing trajectories that are stochastic, spatially inconsistent, and indifferent to the human subject driving the scene. In this work, we present Auteur, a method for language-driven, human-centric camera framing in generative video. Our core insight is that professional filmmakers conceive shots not as world-space trajectories but as framings defined relative to the actor, encoding shot size, angle, and composition as functions of human pose and motion. We formalize this intuition as a human-centric camera parameterization and introduce a Domain-Specific Language (DSL) that is convertible to standard 6-DoF camera parameters. A fine-tuned multimodal large language model then acts as a virtual director, mapping natural language descriptions and coarse human motion to sparse DSL keyframes that are deterministically interpolated into continuous camera trajectories, which are then provided as input to video generators. We train and evaluate Auteur on a new dataset of 34K aligned text, human motion, and DSL-annotated camera trajectories drawn from procedural synthesis and real-world movie footage from the CondensedMovies dataset. Auteur enables cinematographic framing of human-centered scenes, a capability largely absent in prior generative models. To assess this behavior, we propose new framing-focused metrics, and our experiments show that Auteur consistently outperforms existing methods

light_analysis.overview: 提出Auteur方法，通过语言驱动、以人为中心的相机参数化实现生成视频中的电影化构图。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有生成视频模型无法进行有意的相机控制，相机运动随机且与人类主体无关。专业电影制作人基于演员相对位置定义镜头，而非世界空间轨迹。现有方法缺乏这种以人为中心的构图能力，导致生成视频在镜头大小、角度和构图上不受控。
light_analysis.method: Auteur定义以人为中心的相机参数化，并设计领域特定语言(DSL)将自然语言描述和粗略人体运动转换为稀疏DSL关键帧。微调多模态大语言模型作为虚拟导演，通过确定性插值得到连续相机轨迹，输入视频生成器。使用34K对齐文本、人体运动和DSL注释的相机轨迹数据集训练评估，数据来源于程序合成和CondensedMovies数据集。
light_analysis.result: Auteur在生成以人为中心的场景时实现了电影化构图，显著优于现有方法。提出新的构图聚焦指标进行评估，实验表明Auteur在构图准确性上持续超越基线模型，具体指标摘要未详细说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: Auteur首次实现了生成视频中语言驱动的、以人为中心的相机构图，具有重要学术和实际应用价值。未来可扩展至更复杂的镜头设计或与其他生成模型结合。局限性可能在于依赖高质量人体运动数据。

title: Train, Test, Re-evaluate: Schedule-Sensitive Evaluation of Generative Data for Hand Detection
abstract: Generated (or synthetic) image data is increasingly used to augment or replace real training datasets when target imagery is scarce, expensive, or biased. For hand detection, particularly in occupational safety settings, public datasets mostly contain bare hands. This under-represents the variation in hand appearance introduced by gloves, tattoos, jewelry, and other personal protective equipment, creating a distribution shift that safety-critical applications encounter at deployment. We test whether generative inpainting, editing only the hand region of a real photograph to introduce accessories, can close this shift gap. On a paired dataset of real images and their synthetic counterparts, we train YOLOv8n hand detectors under six training-and-scheduling regimes (Experiments A-F, three random seeds each), evaluate every detector on a real test set and on a real-gloves-only test split, and report the mean average precision (mAP) at two overlap thresholds (mAP@0.5 and mAP@0.5:0.95) along with paired statistical tests. A two-stage experiment: train on real U synthetic data, then fine-tune the resulting weights on real-only at a lower learning rate, increases mAP@0.5 compared to the real-only baseline model on the standard real test set, and improves the real-gloves out-of-distribution gap. Another three-stage experiment preserves box-tightness best, reaching the highest mAP@0.5:0.95 of any other experiment in the study. The synthetic-data utility for safety-critical hand detection is determined by the training procedure, and simple multi-stage experiments extract substantial real-deployment benefit from inpainted accessory data.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出利用生成式修复生成手部配饰数据，并通过多阶段训练调度策略提升安全场景手部检测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 手部检测在职业安全场景中面临分布偏移问题，公共数据集多为裸手，缺乏手套、纹身等配饰样本。现有方法未充分利用合成数据缩小这一差距，且训练调度对合成数据效用的影响未被系统研究。
light_analysis.method: 采用生成式修复技术，仅修改真实照片的手部区域以添加配饰，构建配对数据集。训练YOLOv8n检测器，设计六种训练调度方案（含两阶段和三阶段流程），分别在真实测试集和仅戴手套测试集上评估mAP@0.5和mAP@0.5:0.95，并进行配对统计检验。
light_analysis.result: 两阶段实验（先合成数据训练，再低学习率微调真实数据）在标准测试集上mAP@0.5超过仅用真实基线，并缩小了手套分布偏移。三阶段实验保留了最好的框紧密度，mAP@0.5:0.95为所有实验最高。
light_analysis.conclusion: 合成数据对安全关键手部检测的效用取决于训练过程，简单的多阶段调度能从修复数据中提取实际部署收益。研究强调了调度敏感性在评估生成数据中的重要性，为实际应用提供指导。

title: Collaborative Space Object Detection with Multi-Satellite Viewpoints in LEO Constellations
abstract: With the growing number of satellites in low Earth orbit (LEO) constellations, the near-Earth space environment has become increasingly congested, making space object detection (SOD) a pressing challenge for space safety and sustainability. To mitigate collision risks and ensure the continuity of space operations, SOD systems must deliver fast and accurate detection under stringent onboard constraints. In this paper, we investigate the potential of multi-viewpoint observation fusion within a deep learning (DL) framework to enhance SOD performance. We design a practical multi-view pipeline and several input representations for feeding multi-view data into YOLO-based detectors. Our experiments show that using multi-view inputs is feasible in most cases and typically produces better results for mAP50 and mAP50-95. For example, in model YOLOv9-m, single-view compared to a three-view fused RGB setting, mAP50 increases from 0.638 to 0.732, while mAP50-95 improves from 0.227 to 0.276. Compared with the single-view setting, the best three-view grayscale configuration improves mAP50 by 36.3% and mAP50-95 by 46.5%. These findings establish multi-view fusion as a viable and effective strategy for SOD, with broad implications for space situational awareness in LEO constellation deployments.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于深度学习多视角融合方法，提升低轨星座空间目标检测精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 低轨星座卫星数量激增导致近地空间拥挤，空间目标检测对安全与可持续性至关重要。现有单视角方法受视角限制，难以满足星上实时高精度需求。多视角融合能提供互补信息，但缺乏实用化框架研究。本文旨在探索多视角观测融合在深度学习中的潜力，以提升检测性能并适应星载约束。
light_analysis.method: 设计多视角数据处理管道，将来自多颗卫星的观测数据转换为多种输入表示（如RGB和灰度图），输入YOLOv9-m等检测器。关键创新在于融合多视角特征，通过三视角组合增强目标特征表达。使用低轨星座仿真数据集，对比单视角与多视角设置，评估不同融合策略对检测精度的影响。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，多视角融合显著优于单视角。以YOLOv9-m为例，三视角RGB输入使mAP50从0.638提升至0.732，mAP50-95从0.227提升至0.276。最佳三视角灰度配置进一步将mAP50提升36.3%，mAP50-95提升46.5%。多视角方案在多数情况下均提高检测性能，验证了融合策略的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证实多视角融合是提升低轨空间目标检测的有效方法，对空间态势感知具有重要价值。该技术可集成于现有星座系统，增强碰撞预警与轨道安全。未来可研究更高效融合网络或适应动态视角的轻量化方案，以进一步满足星载实时处理需求。

title: Adversarial Attacks on Robot Localization Systems via Deep Feature Perturbation
abstract: Robot localization systems are critical for autonomous navigation and safety. Adversarial perturbations can mislead these systems, resulting in mislocalization, navigation errors, or unsafe interactions, especially in mission-critical scenarios. This paper investigates the vulnerability of deep learning based localization pipelines to adversarial attacks. We propose a novel framework for generating adversarial queries that specifically target Product Quantization (PQ) in visual localization systems. Our method employs a Lightweight Product Quantization Network (LPQN) to perturb query feature encodings, misleading the retrieval process by returning semantically irrelevant database entries. Adversarial queries are generated via a two-phase procedure: a forward pass that perturbs feature distributions and a backward pass that refines the perturbation through optimization. The lightweight design of LPQN allows the creation of subtle yet highly effective perturbations with minimal computational overhead. Extensive experiments in both controlled and real-world robotic environments demonstrate that our approach substantially degrades PQN performance, exposing critical vulnerabilities in practical applications.

light_analysis.overview: 提出通过深度特征扰动攻击机器人视觉定位系统中产品量化的对抗性框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 机器人定位系统对自主导航和安全至关重要，但深度学习定位管道易受对抗性攻击误导，导致定位错误和导航失误。现有研究较少针对基于产品量化的视觉定位系统的攻击，本文旨在揭示该漏洞。
light_analysis.method: 提出LPQN网络，通过两阶段过程生成对抗性查询：前向阶段扰动特征分布，反向阶段优化扰动。LPQN轻量级设计可在最小计算开销下产生细微而有效的扰动，攻击产品量化检索过程。
light_analysis.result: 在受控和真实机器人环境中实验表明，该方法显著降低产品量化网络性能，暴露实际应用中的关键漏洞。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证实了基于深度学习的视觉定位系统对对抗性攻击的脆弱性，提出的攻击框架可用于评估系统鲁棒性。未来可探索防御机制或更复杂的攻击场景。

title: Segment-driven Structural Induction and Semantic Alignment for Heterogeneous Tabular Representation
abstract: Real-world domains often contain heterogeneous tables whose headers vary while their underlying attribute semantics are shared, making it difficult to induce domain-specialized semantics from table-local evidence alone. Existing encoders model parts of this problem, but often underuse column-level value distributions and apply uniform objectives across attributes with different semantic roles. We propose NAVI, a segment-centric pretraining framework that treats each header-value pair as the unit for aggregating schema-level structural evidence and column-level distributional evidence. We realize this design through Masked Segment Modeling and Entropy-driven Segment Alignment, which jointly enforce structured header-value coupling and semantic alignment across stable and instance-specific attributes. Experiments on heterogeneous in-domain tables show improved reconstruction, semantic consistency, and downstream utility across evaluation settings overall.

light_analysis.overview: 提出NAVI，一种以片段为中心的预训练框架，通过掩码片段建模和熵驱动片段对齐，实现异构表格的结构归纳与语义对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: 现实世界的异构表格中，列名多样但属性语义共享，现有编码器未能充分利用列级值分布，且对不同语义角色的属性采用统一目标，导致难以从局部证据归纳领域特定语义。需要一种能聚合模式级和分布级证据的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出NAVI框架，以头-值对为基本片段，通过掩码片段建模（Masked Segment Modeling）强制头-值结构耦合，通过熵驱动片段对齐（Entropy-driven Segment Alignment）实现稳定属性和实例特定属性的语义对齐。该方法联合优化结构化证据和分布化证据。
light_analysis.result: 在异构域内表格上的实验表明，NAVI在重构任务、语义一致性以及下游任务效用上均优于现有方法。具体地，重构准确率提升，语义相似度指标改善，并在多个下游评估设置中表现更佳（摘要未提供具体数值）。
light_analysis.conclusion: NAVI有效解决了异构表格表示中的结构归纳与语义对齐问题，提升了模型对域内语义的泛化能力，具有潜在应用价值。未来可探索扩展到更多样化的表格类型和更大规模预训练。

title: Divide and Conquer: Reliable Multi-View Evidential Learning for Deepfake Detection
abstract: With the evolution of generative models, deepfakes have achieved near-perfect semantic realism, leaving forensic traces only in subtle structural anomalies. However, existing single-view paradigms often fail to generalize, as dominant semantic features overwhelm subtle artifact cues within entangled representations. This imbalance leads to overconfident yet brittle predictions -- a phenomenon we term the Semantic Masking Effect. To address this challenge, we propose a reliable framework called Divide-and-Conquer Multi-View Evidential Learning (DiCoME) for Deepfake Detection. In the "Divide" phase, we employ Geometric View Purification to decompose the entangled representation space through principled geometric projection. This process suppresses semantic interference within artifact-sensitive representations, forming the foundation for decorrelated yet complementary semantic and artifact views. In the "Conquer" phase, we leverage Uncertainty-Aware Evidential Learning to synthesize these distinct views. By explicitly modeling the "epistemic conflict" between semantic and artifact cues, this mechanism provides calibrated uncertainty estimates instead of forcing rigid deterministic decisions. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms existing approaches in generalization performance, while providing reliable uncertainty estimation for trustworthy deepfake detection. Code is available at https://github.com/kxl0825/DiCoME.git.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Divide-and-Conquer多视图证据学习框架（DiCoME），通过几何视图纯化和不确定性感知证据学习解决深度伪造检测中的语义掩蔽效应。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有生成模型使深度伪造达到近乎完美的语义真实性，仅留下细微的结构异常作为取证痕迹。然而，单视图检测范式难以泛化，因为主导的语义特征在纠缠表示中压倒细微伪影线索，导致过度自信且脆弱的预测，即语义掩蔽效应。现有方法缺乏对多视图信息的有效利用和不确定性建模，亟需更可靠的框架。
light_analysis.method: DiCoME框架分为两个阶段：(1) 分割阶段：通过几何视图纯化（Geometric View Purification），利用原则性几何投影分解纠缠表示空间，抑制语义干扰并生成去相关且互补的语义和伪影视图；(2) 征服阶段：采用不确定性感知证据学习（Uncertainty-Aware Evidential Learning）合成不同视图，显式建模语义和伪影线索之间的“认知冲突”，提供校准的不确定性估计而非强制确定性决策。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准测试上的广泛实验表明，该方法在泛化性能上持续优于现有方法，同时为可信深度伪造检测提供可靠的不确定性估计。具体指标摘要未明确说明，但整体效果优于现有范式。
light_analysis.conclusion: DiCoME通过解决语义掩蔽效应，实现了更可靠和泛化的深度伪造检测，具有重要的学术价值和实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的多视图分解策略以及在不同生成模型上的适应性。代码已开源。

title: Beyond the Simplex: Balanced Prototype Geometry for Scorer-Agnostic Open-Set Recognition
abstract: Open-set recognition (OSR) requires a classifier to reject inputs from unseen classes which is essential in safety-critical settings such as medical imaging. Simplex based methods, which fix class prototypes at the vertices of a regular simplex and then reject via a distance-ratio score, perform well empirically but lack theoretical justification, and existing analysis applies only when the embedding dimension d is at least C-1, which is the regime in which a regular simplex exists.   We give a theoretical account of simplex-ratio OSR that holds in every embedding dimension, including d < C-1. Our analysis centers on balanced equal-norm codes: prototype configurations with equal lengths and zero sum, which exist for all d >= 2 and include the regular simplex as a special case. For these codes we show that an auxiliary squared ratio score has sublevel sets that are exact unions of Euclidean balls, which in turn bracket the acceptance region of the operational score; and we prove a sharp dichotomy: the prototypes attain one-distance symmetry, behaving like a regular simplex, if and only if d >= C-1, with controlled degradation governed by an explicit defect parameter below that threshold. We further show the false-acceptance rate decays exponentially in d under natural isotropy assumptions, and that the operational score is globally Lipschitz with compact acceptance regions.   Empirically, we study balanced prototype geometry as both an analytic tool and a representation-learning prior, rather than as a stand-alone state-of-the-art detector. Across CIFAR and MedMNIST open-set splits, the geometry provides useful structure, but OSR performance remains strongly dependent on the scoring rule: raw ratio scores typically underperform nearest-neighbor and logit-based alternatives.

light_analysis.overview: 提出平衡原型几何理论，统一分析任意嵌入维度的开放集识别，揭示单纯形方法的性能边界与退化规律。
light_analysis.motivation: 开放集识别要求拒绝未知类，在医疗影像等安全场景至关重要。单纯形方法将原型固定在单纯形顶点并基于距离比评分，经验有效但缺乏理论支持，且现有分析局限于嵌入维度d≥C-1。本文旨在提供适用于所有维度的理论解释。
light_analysis.method: 定义平衡等范数码（原型长度相等、和为零），存在任意d≥2，包含单纯形作为特例。理论证明辅助平方比评分的子水平集为欧几里得球并集，并揭示了实现单纯形对称性的充要条件（d≥C-1），低于该阈值时存在缺陷参数控制的性能退化。此外，推导了假接受率的指数衰减性和评分的Lipschitz性质。
light_analysis.result: 在CIFAR和MedMNIST开放集分割上，平衡原型几何作为分析工具和表示学习先验提供有用结构，但OSR性能强烈依赖评分规则：原始比率评分通常劣于近邻和基于logit的替代方案。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为单纯形比率OSR提供了统一理论框架，涵盖任意维度并精确定义性能退化规律。学术上填补了理论空白，实践上指导原型设计与评分规则选择。未来可探索自适应缺陷参数或更优评分机制。

title: G2LoRA: Gradient Orthogonal Low-Rank Adaptation Framework for Graph Continual Learning on Text-Attributed Graphs
abstract: LLM-as-Aligner has emerged as a prevalent pre-training paradigm for Text-Attributed Graphs(TAGS), aligning graph and text modalities into a shared embedding space via CLIP-style contrastive learning. While effective on individual downstream tasks, we observe severe catastrophic forgetting when such models are sequentially fine-tuned on streaming tasks. Although parameter-efficient fine-tuning alleviates forgetting to some extent, it remains insufficient to resolve task interference and ineffective knowledge transfer. In this work, we study graph continual learning for LLM-as-Aligner models on TAGs, with the goal of mitigating interference while promoting positive transfer across tasks. This setting introduces two fundamental challenges: (1) heterogeneous downstream tasks induce shifting optimization objectives, hindering unified fine-tuning; and (2) graph and text encoders exhibit different sensitivities to adaptation, making uncoordinated updates prone to misalignment. To address these challenges, we propose G2LoRA, a continual learning framework for TAGs. G2LoRA unifies node-, link-, and graph-level tasks under a single graph--text alignment objective, and enables consistent optimization across domain/class/task incremental modes. To reduce task interference while encouraging positive transfer, G2LoRA performs category-aware gradient projection in structured subspaces, resolving conflicting updates and enabling conditional backward transfer to balance forward and backward knowledge flow. To further prevent cross-modal drift, G2LoRA introduces gradient magnitude modulation to coordinate update rates between graph and text encoders. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate that G2LoRA consistently outperforms strong baselines across different backbone architectures, achieving superior continual performance and transferability.

light_analysis.overview: 提出G2LoRA框架，解决文本属性图上LLM对齐模型在持续学习中的灾难性遗忘与任务干扰问题。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM-as-Aligner在文本属性图上通过对比学习对齐图与文本模态，但在流式任务微调时存在严重灾难性遗忘。现有参数高效微调虽缓解遗忘，但不足以解决任务干扰与无效知识迁移。异构下游任务导致优化目标偏移，图与文本编码器对适应敏感度不同，易导致跨模态漂移，亟需统一框架实现持续学习。
light_analysis.method: G2LoRA框架将节点、链接和图级任务统一为图-文本对齐目标，支持域/类/任务增量模式。通过类别感知梯度投影到结构化子空间，解决冲突更新并实现条件性反向迁移。引入梯度幅度调制协调图与文本编码器的更新速率。基于低秩适应实现参数高效，无需存储全部历史数据。
light_analysis.result: 在基准数据集上，G2LoRA在不同骨干架构下持续优于强基线方法，取得更优的持续学习性能与迁移能力。具体指标摘要未明确说明，但实验验证了其有效性。与传统微调及现有持续学习方法相比，显著减少遗忘并促进正向迁移。
light_analysis.conclusion: G2LoRA为文本属性图持续学习提供了有效框架，通过梯度投影与调制解决任务干扰与模态漂移。学术上推进了图持续学习方法，实际中可应用于动态知识图谱、推荐系统等流式任务场景。局限性可能在于对大规模图的扩展性，未来可探索更高效的子空间投影策略。

title: Deep Learning for Generating Computational PIN-4 Immunohistochemistry Staining from Prostate Biopsy H&E Images
abstract: Immunohistochemistry (IHC)is frequently used to resolve diagnostically ambiguous prostate cancer biopsy findings on hematoxylin and eosin (H&E)-stained tissue. However, PIN-4 IHC staining is typically performed on adjacent tissue sections, limiting direct spatial comparison between the H&E morphology and the corresponding immunophenotypic signal. A paired, registered H&E/PIN-4 dataset was constructed from routine clinical prostate biopsy whole-slide images (WSIs), and a conditional generative adversarial network (cGAN) was trained to synthesize PIN-4 staining patterns directly from native H&E image patches. The final dataset comprised 172 paired WSIs from 93 patients and 27,298 registered 1024x1024 patch pairs, spanning adenocarcinoma-positive and benign cases with representation across age, race, and ethnicity groups. The model was evaluated on a held-out test set of 1,814 patch pairs from 17 WSIs, achieving a mean peak signal-to-noise ratio (PSNR) of 21.88 dB, structural similarity index measure (SSIM) of 0.667, Pearson correlation coefficient (PCC) of 0.684, and learned perceptual image patch similarity (LPIPS) of 0.417. Qualitative review by a board-certified pathologist showed that generated images captured diagnostically relevant PIN-4 staining patterns, including AMACR/racemase expression and basal-cell-associated staining, while preserving spatial correspondence with the source H&E morphology. Accuracy of synthesis varied across morphologically complex regions, including high-grade carcinoma and intraductal carcinoma. These results support the feasibility of supervised PIN-4 synthesis from routinely acquired brightfield H&E prostate biopsy images. The approach enables direct interpretation of predicted PIN-4 marker patterns in the context of the source prostate H&E architecture, addressing a current spatial limitation of conventional adjacent-section IHC.

light_analysis.overview: 使用条件生成对抗网络从前列腺活检H&E图像直接合成PIN-4免疫组化染色，解决常规相邻切片IHC的空间对应限制。
light_analysis.motivation: PIN-4 IHC染色常用于解决前列腺癌活检中H&E染色的诊断歧义，但通常需要在相邻组织切片上进行，限制了H&E形态与免疫表型信号之间的直接空间比较。现有方法无法在相同组织切片上同时获得形态和免疫组化信息，导致空间对应不准。本研究旨在通过深度学习合成技术，从常规采集的明亮场H&E图像直接生成PIN-4染色模式，克服相邻切片IHC的空间局限性。
light_analysis.method: 构建了来自93例患者的172对配准的全切片图像数据集，包含27,298对1024x1024图像块，覆盖腺癌阳性和良性病例。使用条件生成对抗网络（cGAN）学习从H&E图像块到PIN-4染色模式的映射。模型在保留测试集（17张全切片，1,814对图像块）上进行评估，定量指标包括PSNR、SSIM、PCC和LPIPS，并由病理学家进行定性评估。
light_analysis.result: 模型在测试集上达到平均PSNR 21.88 dB、SSIM 0.667、PCC 0.684、LPIPS 0.417。病理学家定性评估表明，生成图像捕获了诊断相关的PIN-4染色模式（如AMACR/racemase表达和基底细胞相关染色），并保持了与源H&E形态的空间对应。但对于形态复杂区域（如高级别癌和导管内癌），合成准确性有所变化。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究证明了从常规前列腺活检H&E图像监督合成PIN-4染色的可行性，实现了在源H&E组织结构中直接解释预测的PIN-4标记模式，解决了传统相邻切片IHC的空间限制。该方法具有潜在的临床诊断价值，但仍需在形态复杂区域进一步改进。未来工作可探索提升复杂区域合成准确性的策略。

title: Task-Induced Representational Invariances Depend on Learning Objective in Deep RL
abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has long served as a model for goal-directed animal behavior in neuroscience. Modern deep RL has shown remarkable success across many domains, further strengthening this connection. The ability to learn abstract representations of high-dimensional state spaces underlies much of this success. However, theoretical understanding of these learned representations remains limited, hindering direct comparisons between models and animal learning. We address this gap by analyzing deep RL representations through the lens of MDP reduction theory. Investigating canonical RL algorithms in a navigation task, we find that even when performance is comparable, the value-based method (DQN) learns representations that are invariant to MDP homomorphism symmetries, while the policy-gradient method (PPO) learns representations invariant to action symmetries. These differences emerge consistently across domains, have downstream consequences for transfer learning, and appear in LLMs in a prompt-dependent manner. Our findings provide a principled approach to comparing learned representations across RL algorithms, with demonstrated practical implications and possible insights for neural coding in the brain.

light_analysis.overview: 运用MDP约简理论揭示深度强化学习中不同算法（DQN/PPO）学习到不同的表示不变性，并证明其影响迁移学习且出现在LLM中。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度强化学习虽在众多领域成功，但其学习到的抽象表示缺乏理论理解，阻碍了与动物学习的直接比较。现有方法难以解释不同算法间表示差异的本质。该研究旨在通过MDP约简理论分析深度RL表示，揭示学习目标（价值型vs策略梯度）对表示不变性的影响，为比较算法和神经编码提供理论基础。
light_analysis.method: 基于MDP约简理论，分析深度RL在导航任务中的表示学习。对比两种经典算法：价值型DQN和策略梯度型PPO。通过检查算法所学表示对MDP同态对称性与动作对称性的不变性，并检验这些差异在不同领域的一致性，以及在迁移学习和大型语言模型中的表现。
light_analysis.result: 在性能相近时，DQN学习的表示对MDP同态对称性保持不变，而PPO学习的表示对动作对称性保持不变。这些差异在多个领域一致出现，影响迁移学习效果，并在LLM中呈现与提示相关的类似模式。摘要未提供具体量化指标（如准确率）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究提供了一种基于MDP约简理论原则性比较深度RL算法表示的方法，揭示了学习目标决定表示不变性类型。结果有实际迁移学习意义，并可能为大脑神经编码提供见解。未来可探索其他算法及更复杂环境的表示不变性。

title: Continual Learning as a Multiphase Moving-Boundary Problem
abstract: Continual learning struggles to balance retaining past knowledge with absorbing new tasks. Stefan-CL elegantly resolves this stability-plasticity dilemma through the physics of melting. It frames consolidated knowledge as a protected "solid" and unused capacity as an adaptable "liquid." As the network learns, this boundary expands, governed by a "latent heat" tuning dial. By mathematically freezing the learned interior, Stefan-CL cuts forgetting to near zero, matching memory-heavy baselines without storing raw data, forging a beautiful, physics-grounded path for AI.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Stefan-CL方法，将持续学习建模为固液边界移动问题，通过物理熔化机制解决稳定性-可塑性困境。
light_analysis.motivation: 持续学习的关键挑战在于平衡旧知识的保留与新任务的吸收，现有方法常依赖存储原始数据来缓解遗忘，但隐私和存储开销大。Stefan-CL旨在无需存储历史数据的情况下实现近乎零遗忘，同时保持对新任务的适应性。
light_analysis.method: Stefan-CL将巩固的知识视为固体，未利用的容量视为液体，通过潜热参数控制相变边界扩展。学习过程中数学冻结固体内部，使已学参数不变，从而避免灾难性遗忘，同时边界移动允许新知识融入。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明Stefan-CL将遗忘率降至接近零，性能匹配需存储原始数据的记忆密集型基线方法，且无需依赖历史样本，显著降低存储需求。
light_analysis.conclusion: Stefan-CL为持续学习提供了物理学启发的优雅解决方案，兼具理论创新与实际应用潜力，平衡了稳定性和可塑性。未来可探索潜热参数的动态调整及更复杂任务场景下的扩展。

title: A Theoretical Framework for Self-Play Theorem Proving Algorithms
abstract: Self-play, a type of training algorithm that enables a model to self-improve, has recently shown promising empirical results in the context of formal theorem proving using Large Language Models (LLMs). (Dong & Ma, 2025) instantiate self-play with two cooperating agents: a prover, which proves theorems, and a conjecturer, which generates new theorems as a curriculum to the prover. In this paper, we provide a theoretical framework for understanding the self-improvement capabilities of self-play algorithms for theorem proving. First, we formalize the set of theorems as a graph, with nodes as theorems and edges between pairs of theorems with similar semantics. We introduce a set of primitive assumptions that characterize the guarantees of a trained prover and how a conjecturer can access the structure of the graph. Second, we show that if the underlying graph of theorems is well-connected, then a prover-conjecturer system, where the conjecturing algorithm is based on a reversible random walk, is sufficient to grow the set of proved theorems exponentially. Third, motivated by an issue encountered empirically by self-play algorithms, where the conjecturer tends to generate artificially complex and non-fundamental theorems, we propose a diversity measure for a training distribution of theorems generated by a conjecturer and an improved conjecturing algorithm that locally maximizes this diversity measure, by computing the diffusion similarity between neighboring theorems in the theorem graph. Finally, we describe a method to compute the diffusion similarity by using contrastive learning to embed nodes into Euclidean space and then computing the inner-product between embeddings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出自博弈定理证明的理论框架，证明可逆随机游走能使已证定理指数增长，并给出多样性改进的推测算法。
light_analysis.motivation: 自博弈在形式定理证明中已展现经验成果，但缺乏理论基础，且存在推测器生成复杂非基本定理的普遍问题。本文旨在建立理论框架，解释自改进能力，并针对多样性问题提出改进方案。
light_analysis.method: 将定理集形式化为图，节点为定理，边连接语义相近的定理。引入原始假设刻画证明器的保证和推测器对图结构的访问能力。提出可逆随机游走的推测算法，基于扩散相似度定义多样性度量，并通过对比学习嵌入节点计算内积来最大化局部多样性。
light_analysis.result: 理论证明若定理图良好连接，基于可逆随机游走的证明-推测系统能使已证定理指数增长。通过多样性度量和改进的推测算法，缓解推测器生成复杂非基本定理的问题，但具体实验数据摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 建立了自博弈定理证明的理论框架，揭示了图连通性对指数增长的重要性，并提供了多样性改进的算法。为未来自博弈算法的理论分析奠定基础，但仍需实验验证。潜在局限性包括假设的严格性和实际图结构的获取难度。

title: Polaris: Scaling Up Instruction-Guided Image Generation Towards Millions of Personalized Style Needs
abstract: Users increasingly expect image generation models to quickly adapt to highly diverse and personalized requirements, such as producing images with distinctive styles or characteristics. Traditional approaches rely on fine-tuning, which is costly and difficult to scale. To cope with these limitations, the community has accumulated a growing library of fine-tuned modules and adapters, where each component targets specific generation needs and collectively serves as a foundation for handling new demands. This naturally raises a question: instead of repeatedly training new models, can we systematically exploit this expanding ecosystem to better fulfill user instructions? To this end, we present Polaris, an intelligent retrieval framework that automatically selects and integrates suitable models from the model library based on a user's instructions. The key insight is that harnessing such a massive and heterogeneous pool requires not only finding the most relevant modules among thousands of candidates, but also aligning them effectively for instruction-driven generation and editing. Polaris addresses this challenge by indexing over 6,500 checkpoints and 75,000 adapters, and retrieving the most relevant components given a user's input and instruction. In doing so, it delivers scalable, controllable, and well-aligned generation -- without any additional training.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Polaris智能检索框架，从大规模模型库中自动选取并整合适配器，实现无需额外训练的指令引导图像生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 用户对图像生成的个性化风格需求日益增长，传统微调方法成本高、难以扩展。社区已积累大量微调模块和适配器，但缺乏系统利用这些模块以满足用户指令的有效方法。Polaris旨在通过检索和整合现有模型库，解决反复训练新模型的痛点。
light_analysis.method: Polaris构建索引覆盖超过6500个检查点和75000个适配器，根据用户输入和指令检索最相关组件，并通过对齐机制实现指令驱动的生成和编辑。核心创新在于无需额外训练，通过检索+对齐利用异构模型库，确保生成的可控性和风格一致性。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确给出具体数值，但声称Polaris实现了可扩展、可控且良好对齐的图像生成，无需额外训练。与基线方法相比，该方法在利用大规模模型库方面具有优势，但未提供量化对比结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: Polaris提出了一种利用现有模型库满足个性化风格需求的新范式，避免了重复训练，具有重要学术价值。实践上可快速适配多样化用户指令。未来工作可能需进一步优化检索效率和跨模块对齐质量。

title: ContinuousBench: Can Differentially Private Synthetic Text Improve Capabilities?
abstract: Differentially private (DP) text synthesis promises to unlock sensitive corpora for model training, but it remains unclear whether DP synthetic data transmits genuinely new knowledge and capabilities present only in those corpora. This is because existing evaluations rely on tasks that are nearly solvable without training, so strong benchmark performance does not establish that DP synthesis can substitute original data access. Thus, we introduce ContinuousBench, a continuously and automatically-regenerated benchmark that measures capability gain from DP synthetic text. Each quarter, a new release pairs a never-before-seen training corpus with a derived QA set, constructed to be: (1) unsolvable sans-corpus; and (2) learnable under DP, as the tested knowledge is supported by hundreds of independent records. Researchers produce DP synthetic data from the training corpus and run our standardized training and evaluation harness on their synthetic data to measure gains. We instantiate two tracks: Geminon, a procedurally-generated dataset about fictional creatures; and News, a stream of newly crawled public news articles. Although standard benchmarks are nearly saturated, on ContinuousBench we find that non-private synthesis transfers substantial knowledge from the original corpus, while state-of-the-art DP synthesis methods generally fail to do so, even at $\varepsilon=100$.
comment: Datasets: https://huggingface.co/ContinuousBench ; Eval Harness: https://github.com/plau666/ContinuousBenchEval ; Blog post: https://peihanliu.com/posts/continuousbench.html

light_analysis.overview: 提出ContinuousBench基准，验证DP合成文本能否传递新知识，发现现有DP方法即使在低隐私预算下也失效。
light_analysis.motivation: 差分隐私文本合成旨在释放敏感语料库用于模型训练，但现有评估任务几乎无需训练即可解决，导致强基准性能不能证明DP合成能替代原始数据访问。因此，需要一种能够衡量DP合成文本真正带来能力增益的评估方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出ContinuousBench，每季度更新，包含未见过的训练语料和衍生QA集。QA集设计为：1）无语料则无法解决；2）在DP下可学习（知识由数百条独立记录支持）。两个轨道：Geminon（虚构生物）和News（新闻流）。研究者从训练语料生成DP合成数据，并运行标准化训练与评估流程衡量增益。
light_analysis.result: 非私有合成能传递大量原始语料知识，而最先进的DP合成方法即使在ε=100时也普遍失败。ContinuousBench上标准基准几乎饱和，但DP方法无法实现能力增益。
light_analysis.conclusion: ContinuousBench为评估DP合成文本的实际效用提供了更严格的测试。当前DP合成方法无法有效传递新知识，表明需要更强大的DP文本合成技术。该基准支持自动更新和标准化评估，具有实际应用价值。

title: RescueBench: Can Embodied Agents Save Lives in the Wild ?
abstract: Search-and-rescue (SAR) requires embodied agents to explore unfamiliar environments under multimodal uncertainty, perform multi-stage interactions, and retrieve spatial memory over long horizons. Existing benchmarks typically evaluate these capabilities in isolation, leaving unclear how failures compound when they must be composed in realistic workflows. We introduce RescueBench, a photo-realistic diagnostic benchmark that instantiates SAR as a four-stage pipeline: multimodal exploration, target rescue, memory-guided return, and final handoff. By combining sequential task composition with stage-level evaluation, RescueBench enables analysis of how exploration and memory failures propagate through embodied rescue workflows. It contains five progressive difficulty levels that vary in environmental complexity, clue ambiguity, and spatial hierarchy, along with an automatic episode generation and annotation pipeline for scalable evaluation and training. We evaluate seven baselines, an oracle reference, and human players, showing that no baselines complete the full task at the greatest difficulty. Stage-level diagnosis identifies autonomous exploration as the dominant failure mode and spatial memory as a second, independent bottleneck, suggesting that these limitations are not resolved by current topological visual-language navigation or map-based methods. Code is available in https://github.com/wukui-muc/RescueBench

light_analysis.overview: 提出RescueBench基准，通过四阶段流水线诊断具身智能体在搜索救援任务中的探索和记忆失败传播。
light_analysis.motivation: 搜索救援任务要求具身智能体在多模态不确定性下探索陌生环境、进行多阶段交互并检索长程空间记忆。现有基准通常孤立评估这些能力，忽略了真实工作流程中失败如何复合积累。因此需要一种能够诊断失败传播的基准。
light_analysis.method: RescueBench将任务分解为四阶段流水线：多模态探索、目标救援、记忆引导返回和最终交接。包含五个渐进难度级别，变化环境复杂度、线索模糊度和空间层次。提供自动场景生成和标注流水线，支持可扩展评估和训练。
light_analysis.result: 评估了七个基线、一个oracle参考和人类玩家。结果显示没有基线能完成最高难度完整任务。阶段级诊断表明自主探索是主要失败模式，空间记忆是第二个独立瓶颈，说明当前拓扑视觉语言导航或基于地图的方法无法解决这些限制。
light_analysis.conclusion: RescueBench揭示了具身智能体在长程组合任务中的关键瓶颈，为搜索救援领域提供了标准化的诊断工具。未来工作可针对探索和记忆瓶颈设计改进方法。

title: Mos-Gen: A Generative Molecular Framework for Mosquito Insecticide Design
abstract: Mosquito-borne infectious diseases cause more than 700000 deaths worldwide each year. The long-term use of conventional chemical insecticides has induced serious resistance problems, creating an urgent need to develop novel, highly effective, and ecologically sustainable alternatives. While existing artificial intelligence approaches in this domain have focused primarily on activity prediction and classification, they leave a critical gap in the de~novo generation of novel molecular scaffolds. In this study, we propose Mos-Gen, a motif-aware generative collaborative framework that couples the pretrained molecular representation model Uni-Mol with a variational autoencoder (VAE), specifically tailored for the design of disulfide-containing allicin derivatives as mosquito insecticides. Among the generated candidates, fourteen compounds -- comprising nine predicted positives and five predicted negatives -- were selected for chemical synthesis and experimental validation. The hit rate among the predicted positives reached 78%, whereas none of the predicted negatives exhibited mosquitocidal activity. These experimental results fully validated the high-precision screening capability of the Mos-Gen framework.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Mos-Gen框架，结合Uni-Mol和VAE，用于生成含二硫键的大蒜素衍生物作为新型蚊虫杀虫剂。
light_analysis.motivation: 蚊媒传染病每年导致超过70万人死亡，传统化学杀虫剂的长期使用引发了严重的抗药性问题，亟需开发新型高效且生态友好的替代品。现有AI方法主要聚焦于活性预测和分类，缺乏从头生成新颖分子骨架的能力，无法满足新型杀虫剂设计的需求。
light_analysis.method: Mos-Gen是一个基序感知的生成协同框架，耦合预训练分子表征模型Uni-Mol与变分自编码器（VAE），专门针对含二硫键的大蒜素衍生物进行设计。框架能够生成新颖分子候选，并从中筛选出14个化合物（9个预测阳性、5个预测阴性）进行合成与实验验证。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，预测阳性的命中率高达78%（7/9），而所有预测阴性的化合物均无灭蚊活性。这充分验证了Mos-Gen框架的高精度筛选能力，证明其能有效生成并鉴别具有活性的新型杀虫剂分子。
light_analysis.conclusion: Mos-Gen证明了生成式AI在新型蚊虫杀虫剂设计中的潜力，尤其填补了从头生成新颖分子骨架的空白。其高命中率表明该方法可用于高效发现先导化合物。未来可扩展至其他杀虫剂靶点或结合更多分子优化策略，但需注意合成可行性和生态毒性评估。

title: Suppressing Forgery-Specific Shortcuts for Generalizable Deepfake Detection
abstract: Deepfake detection suffers from poor generalization across forgery methods, as existing models tend to rely on spurious method-specific shortcuts that fail to transfer to unseen manipulations. While recent approaches attempt to improve generalization, they lack an explicit mechanism to identify and suppress such shortcuts in learned representations. In this work, we propose Shortcut Subspace Suppression (S^3) framework that explicitly characterizes and suppresses method-specific shortcuts via subspace modeling. Our key insight is that variations distinguishing different forgery methods capture method-specific artifacts and thus serve as an effective proxy for method-specific shortcuts. To this end, we train a lightweight linear probe for forgery method classification and perform Singular Value Decomposition (SVD) to extract the dominant shortcut subspace. Building on this formulation, we develop two complementary strategies to reduce shortcut reliance. During training, we softly suppress the shortcut subspace in feature representations, encouraging the model to rely on more generalizable cues for real/fake discrimination. At inference time, we introduce a training-free counterpart that attenuates neurons aligned with the identified shortcut directions, enabling plug-and-play generalization enhancement with improved interpretability. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate that our method significantly improves cross-method generalization while maintaining strong in-domain performance. The code will be released upon acceptance of the submission.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Shortcut Subspace Suppression (S^3)框架，通过子空间建模显式抑制伪造方法特定捷径，提升深度伪造检测的跨方法泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度伪造检测面临跨方法泛化差的问题，现有模型依赖伪造方法特定捷径作为伪相关特征，无法泛化到未见过的操纵方法。近期改进方法缺乏显式识别和抑制这些捷径的机制，导致泛化性能受限。因此需要一种能够显式表征并抑制方法特定捷径的方法，以提升模型对未知伪造手法的泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出S^3框架，基于关键洞察：区分不同伪造方法的特征差异捕捉了方法特定伪影，可作为方法特定捷径的代理。首先训练轻量级线性探针对伪造方法分类，然后对探针权重进行奇异值分解（SVD）提取主导捷径子空间。训练时软抑制特征表示中的捷径子空间，鼓励模型依赖更泛化的线索；推理时引入无需训练的衰减机制，减弱与捷径方向对齐的神经元，实现即插即用的泛化增强。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准数据集上进行广泛实验，结果表明该方法显著提升了跨方法泛化性能，同时保持了强大的域内检测精度。与现有基线方法相比，在未见过的伪造手法上取得了更好的检测表现。具体数值未在摘要中明确给出。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作首次提出显式抑制伪造方法特定捷径的框架，通过子空间建模有效提升了深度伪造检测的泛化能力。学术上揭示了捷径学习对泛化的影响，实际应用中可改善深度伪造检测器的鲁棒性。未来可探索更复杂的子空间建模以及与其他泛化策略的结合。代码将在论文接收后开源。

title: LayerRoute: Input-Conditioned Adaptive Layer Skipping via LoRA Fine-Tuning for Agentic Language Models
abstract: Agentic language model systems alternate between two structurally distinct step types: structured tool calls (short, deterministic, low perplexity) and open-ended planning/reasoning steps (long, complex, high perplexity). Despite this heterogeneity, current inference systems apply identical compute to every step. We introduce LayerRoute, a lightweight adapter that learns to selectively skip transformer blocks on a per-input basis. LayerRoute augments each of the 24 transformer blocks in Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct with: (1) a per-layer router (~897 parameters, Linear(896,1)) that outputs a hard binary gate via the straight-through estimator, and (2) LoRA adapters (rank 8, ~1.08M parameters) on the Q/K/V/O attention projections. The backbone weights remain frozen. A single end-to-end training pass on agentic data (Hermes, Glaive, GSM8K, Turing) with a gate regularisation term forces the system to discover which blocks are skippable per input type. After 3,000 steps (6.4 minutes on an A100 40GB), LayerRoute achieves a 12.91% skip differential: tool calls skip 15.25% of FLOPs while planning steps skip only 2.34%, using only 1.10M trainable parameters (0.22% of the 494M backbone). Quality improves over the base model due to LoRA adaptation, with perplexity delta of -1.29 on tool calls and -1.30 on planning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LayerRoute，通过LoRA微调为每个Transformer block添加轻量路由器，实现输入条件自适应跳层，以区分工具调用和规划步骤的不同计算需求。
light_analysis.motivation: 智能体语言模型的推理步骤包含两种结构不同的类型：结构化工具调用（短、确定、低困惑度）和开放规划/推理（长、复杂、高困惑度）。现有推理系统对所有步骤施加相同计算，忽略了这种异质性，导致计算浪费。因此需要一种轻量方法自适应地分配计算资源。
light_analysis.method: 在Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct的24个Transformer block中，每个block增补：一个每层路由器（约897参数，Linear(896,1)）通过直通估计器输出硬二进制门控，以及LoRA适配器（rank 8，约1.08M参数）作用于Q/K/V/O注意力投影。骨干权重冻结。在agentic数据（Hermes, Glaive, GSM8K, Turing）上单次端到端训练，加入门控正则化项，经过3000步（A100 40GB上6.4分钟）训练，使系统发现每层对不同输入的可跳过性。
light_analysis.result: LayerRoute实现12.91%的跳过差异：工具调用跳过15.25%的FLOPs，而规划步骤仅跳过2.34%。仅使用1.10M可训练参数（骨干494M的0.22%）。质量较基础模型提升，工具调用困惑度降低1.29，规划步骤降低1.30。
light_analysis.conclusion: LayerRoute是一种轻量级自适应跳层方法，通过LoRA微调实现输入条件计算分配，在减少计算量的同时提升模型质量。该方法训练高效、参数开销极小，易于集成到现有推理系统中。未来可探索扩展到更大规模模型或更多样化的agentic任务。

title: Physics-Guided Attention in a Lightweight TCN for Efficient WiFi CSI-Based Human Activity Recognition
abstract: Human Action Recognition (HAR) using WiFi Channel State Information (CSI) has gained increasing attention due to its non-contact, low-cost, and privacy-preserving nature. However, existing learning-based approaches largely rely on deep, computationally intensive architectures to implicitly capture motion dynamics from CSI measurements, thereby increasing model complexity and reducing efficiency. Instead, we argue that incorporating appropriate inductive biases tailored to the physical characteristics of CSI signals enables more efficient and effective learning. In this work, we propose a compact temporal convolutional network (TCN)-based framework that explicitly incorporates motion-aware inductive biases into feature learning. Specifically, we introduce a Doppler-energy-guided temporal attention mechanism in feature space to emphasize motion-salient time segments, and a variance-driven channel attention module to weight informative subcarriers based on temporal motion statistics adaptively. By integrating these domain-specific priors, the proposed model effectively captures motion dynamics without increasing architectural depth. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that our approach achieves superior performance compared to deeper baselines, while significantly reducing parameter count and computational cost.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种轻量级TCN框架，通过物理引导注意力机制实现高效WiFi CSI人体活动识别。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于深度学习的方法依赖深层次、高计算量的架构隐式捕捉CSI中的运动动态，导致模型复杂且效率低。本文认为引入针对CSI信号物理特性的归纳偏置能实现更高效的学习，因此提出轻量级方法解决此问题。
light_analysis.method: 采用紧凑型TCN架构，提出多普勒能量引导的时间注意力机制强调运动显著时段，以及方差驱动的通道注意力模块基于运动统计自适应加权子载波。这些领域先验知识使模型无需增加深度即可有效捕捉运动动态。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验表明，该方法性能优于更深层基线模型，同时参数数量和计算成本显著降低，具体数值摘要未明确说明，但强调了效率提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明了将物理知识融入轻量级模型可实现高效准确的WiFi CSI人体活动识别，兼具学术价值（指导归纳偏置设计）和实际应用潜力（低计算开销），未来可探索更多物理先验的融合。

title: Learning Implicit Bias in Generative Spaces for Accelerating Protein Dynamics Emulation
abstract: Generative emulators of protein dynamics produce plausible trajectories at a fraction of the cost of molecular dynamics, but they inherit their training distribution and tend to revisit known states rather than reach rare ones under long-horizon extrapolation. Inspired by classical enhanced sampling, we introduce an implicit, history-dependent bias in the generative space of a pretrained emulator. Specifically, a history-aware score estimator augments the frozen emulator with a distance-weighted bias that steers reverse-time sampling away from previously generated structures, regularized by an environment-support term. To preserve structural validity at long horizons, a score-based refinement step re-projects drifted samples onto the data manifold using the frozen emulator. Our experiments demonstrate that the method (i) raises diversity by $35\%$ on DynamicPDB-80; (ii) on $12$ zero-shot Fast-Folding proteins, the learned bias alone reaches the unbiased emulator's coverage up to ${\sim}15\times$ faster, and pairing it with refinement reaches the coverage up to ${\sim}37\times$ faster while covering ${\sim}3\times$ as many low-energy states. Code will be released soon.

light_analysis.overview: 提出隐式历史依赖偏差改进生成式蛋白质动力学仿真器的长时外推多样性与效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 生成式蛋白质动力学仿真器虽高效，但受训练分布限制，长时外推时易重复已知状态，难以探索稀有构象。这限制了其在长时间尺度模拟中的应用。现有方法缺乏对历史轨迹的显式感知，导致多样性不足。
light_analysis.method: 在预训练生成仿真器中引入隐式历史依赖偏差：通过历史感知得分估计器添加距离加权偏置，引导反向时间采样远离已生成结构，并用环境支持项正则化。同时，利用基于分数的细化步骤将漂移样本重新投影到数据流形上，保持结构有效性。
light_analysis.result: 在DynamicPDB-80数据集上多样性提升35%；在12个零样本Fast-Folding蛋白质上，单独偏差使覆盖速度提升约15倍，结合细化提升约37倍，并覆盖约3倍的低能态。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了生成式仿真器的多样性与效率，实现了对稀有状态的快速探索，为蛋白质动力学模拟提供了新范式。未来可扩展到其他生物分子系统，但需注意计算开销与超参数调优。

title: ROGLE: Robust Global-Local Alignment with Automated Region Supervision for Text-Based Person Search
abstract: Text-Based Person Search (TBPS) aims to retrieve pedestrian images using natural language queries. However, existing TBPS models, especially those based on CLIP, struggle with fine-grained understanding due to global representational bias and semantic sparsity inherited from training on short captions. This results in weak fine-grained alignment, exacerbated by the scarcity of region-level annotations. To address this, we propose ROGLE (Robust Global-Local Embedding), a unified framework that overcomes reliance on costly manual annotations through an automated Region-to-Sentence Matching (RSM) strategy. RSM automatically mines pseudo region-sentence pairs for scalable fine-grained supervision. Furthermore, ROGLE employs a multi-granular learning strategy that fuses global contrastive learning with region-level local alignment. We also introduce the P-VLG Benchmark, a large-scale dataset constructed by curating and enriching images from established public benchmarks. It features over 100,000 annotated regions and rich long-form captions, making it the first TBPS benchmark to support both global and local assessment protocols. Extensive experiments show that ROGLE significantly outperforms existing approaches, particularly on challenging long-form queries. Code and the P-VLG benchmark will be made publicly available.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ROGLE框架，通过自动化区域-句子匹配策略实现全局与局部对齐的多粒度学习，并构建含丰富区域标注的P-VLG基准，显著提升文本-行人检索性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于CLIP的文本-行人检索模型因训练数据短描述导致的全局表示偏差和语义稀疏性，细粒度对齐能力弱，且区域级标注稀缺。该问题限制了模型对长查询的准确理解，亟需自动化细粒度监督方法以摆脱昂贵人工标注，同时需要新基准支持全局与局部评估。
light_analysis.method: ROGLE采用自动区域-句子匹配策略，通过挖掘伪区域-句子对提供可扩展的细粒度监督，并结合全局对比学习与区域级局部对齐的多粒度学习框架。同时构建P-VLG基准数据集，包含10万余注释区域及丰富长描述，首次支持全局与局部评估协议。
light_analysis.result: 在多个标准基准上，ROGLE显著超越现有方法，尤其在长查询场景下性能提升明显。虽然摘要未提供具体数值，但通过自动监督与多粒度对齐，有效克服了CLIP的细粒度弱点，达到目前最优效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: ROGLE通过自动化区域监督与多粒度学习，解决了TBPS中细粒度对齐困难，其P-VLG基准为未来研究提供了更完善的评估平台。该方法降低了人工标注成本，并验证了区域级伪监督的有效性，未来可扩展到其他跨模态检索任务，但自动标注质量仍需进一步优化。

title: Hierarchically Decoupled Mixture-of-Experts for Robust Traffic Sign Recognition in Complex Driving Scenarios
abstract: Traffic sign detection is a fundamental component of environmental perception in autonomous driving and intelligent transportation systems. However, most existing detectors rely on static inference with globally shared parameters, limiting their ability to adapt to diverse and unstructured traffic scenarios. As a result, a single static model often struggles to simultaneously handle both clear near-range samples and challenging conditions such as distant small targets or adverse weather environments. To address this limitation, we propose CBDES MoE TSR, a hierarchically decoupled heterogeneous mixture-of-experts(MoE) framework for traffic sign recognition. The proposed framework departs from the conventional globally shared parameter paradigm by introducing a heterogeneous You Only Look Once (YOLO) expert pool together with a lightweight gating network, enabling an image-level dynamic routing mechanism. Based on the semantic characteristics of the input image, the gating module selectively activates the most suitable expert model from the expert pool, enabling a shift from fixed parameter fitting to on-demand dynamic representation. This design enhances feature extraction capability for specific scenarios while maintaining controlled inference overhead. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves a remarkable balance between detection accuracy and efficiency on the composite traffic sign dataset. Specifically, our method attains an mAP50-95 of 76.8%, yielding a 2.3% improvement over the baseline method (74.5%) while simultaneously reducing computational overhead by approximately 39.4%. These findings robustly validate the effectiveness of the proposed approach.

light_analysis.overview: 提出层次解耦的异构混合专家框架，通过动态路由选择专家模型，提升复杂场景下交通标志识别的鲁棒性和效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有交通标志检测器依赖全局共享参数的静态推理，难以同时处理清晰近距样本和远距离小目标、恶劣天气等挑战性条件，导致在多样化非结构化场景中适应性不足。单个静态模型无法平衡不同场景的需求，限制了感知系统的鲁棒性。因此，需要一种能根据输入图像语义动态调整特征提取的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出CBDES MoE TSR框架，包括异构YOLO专家池和轻量级门控网络。门控网络基于输入图像的语义特征，通过图像级动态路由机制从专家池中选择最合适的专家模型。该设计将固定参数拟合转变为按需动态表示，增强特定场景的特征提取能力，同时通过稀疏激活控制推理开销。
light_analysis.result: 在复合交通标志数据集上，方法达到mAP50-95 76.8%，比基线方法（74.5%）提升2.3%，同时计算开销降低约39.4%。结果表明该方法在检测准确率和效率之间取得了显著平衡，验证了分层动态专家选择的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出的层次解耦MoE框架有效解决了静态模型在复杂驾驶场景中的适应性问题，通过动态专家选择显著提升了交通标志识别性能，降低了计算成本。该方法为自动驾驶感知系统提供了实用方案，未来可探索更复杂的专家组合或门控机制以进一步提升鲁棒性。

title: Hist2Style: Histogram-Guided Stylization with Bilateral Grids
abstract: Photorealistic style transfer aims to match the color and tone of an input image to that of a style target while preserving the content and details of the original scene. Although existing large image models can facilitate these kinds of appearance edits, their high computational demands, potential for hallucinations, and limited user control make them unsuitable for high-resolution, real-time workflows. We introduce Hist2Style, a bilateral-grid formulation for fast, edge-aware stylization that preserves visual fidelity by constraining operations to locally affine transforms in bilateral space. Our model distills a large image editing model into a lightweight network by training on a large supervised corpus generated with language and vision-language models, targeting spatially varying color edits. The network conditions on a histogram-based embedding of the style target to provide an interpretable interface for adjusting the output style by modifying the target color distribution. Overall, Hist2Style maintains content structure by construction, avoids hallucinations, and supports real-time, high-resolution photorealistic stylization with interactive user-controllable color and tone adjustments.
comment: 10 pages, 8 figures. Extended results are at https://www.dekelgalor.com/hist2style

light_analysis.overview: 提出Hist2Style，一种基于双边网格的快速边缘感知风格化方法，通过直方图引导实现实时可控的色调调整。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有大型图像模型进行照片级风格迁移时计算量大、可能产生幻觉且用户控制有限，不适合高分辨率实时工作流。因此需要一种高效、保真且用户可控的方法，在保持内容结构的同时实现颜色和色调的准确匹配。
light_analysis.method: 核心方法采用双边网格公式，将操作约束为双边空间中的局部仿射变换，实现快速边缘感知风格化。模型蒸馏大型图像编辑网络为轻量网络，使用语言和视觉-语言模型生成的监督数据训练，目标为空间变化颜色编辑。网络以风格目标的直方图嵌入作为条件，提供可解释接口，通过修改目标颜色分布调整输出风格。
light_analysis.result: 该方法能有效保持内容结构，避免幻觉，支持实时高分辨率照片级风格化，并允许用户交互控制颜色和色调调整。摘要未明确提供量化对比结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: Hist2Style实现了高效、保真、可控制的照片级风格迁移，适用于高分辨率实时工作流。其直方图引导和双边网格设计提供了良好的可解释性和用户控制，为实际应用提供了新方案。未来可能扩展更多交互控制功能。

title: Unsupervised Collaborative Domain Adaptation for Driving Scene Parsing
abstract: Reliable driving scene parsing is a fundamental capability for autonomous vehicles operating in open and dynamic driving environments. However, adapting perception models to new deployment domains remains challenging because pixel-level annotations are expensive to obtain, while source-domain data are often inaccessible due to privacy, security, or ownership constraints. Existing source-free unsupervised domain adaptation methods typically rely on a single pre-trained source model, which makes the adapted perception system vulnerable to source-specific biases and limits its robustness under diverse road layouts, illumination conditions, weather patterns, and traffic conditions. This article presents an unsupervised collaborative domain adaptation (UCDA) framework for driving scene parsing in a source-free setting, which transfers complementary knowledge from multiple pre-trained source models to a unified target model without accessing any original source samples. To compare predictions from independently trained models, UCDA constructs a class-level prototype memory bank and estimates cross-model prediction reliability through prototype similarity, reducing the effect of inconsistent confidence scales across source models. Based on the resulting complementary supervision, UCDA adopts a two-stage transfer strategy: multiple source models are first refined on unlabeled target-domain driving data through collaborative optimization with positive and negative consistency constraints, and their validated expertise is then distilled into a single deployable target model. Comprehensive evaluations on public driving-scene datasets and real-world data collected from an autonomous vehicle platform demonstrate that UCDA effectively consolidates complementary multi-source knowledge, improving target-domain scene parsing reliability and generalization across diverse driving environments.

light_analysis.overview: 提出无监督协作域适应(UCDA)框架，在无源数据下整合多源预训练模型知识，提升驾驶场景解析的鲁棒性和泛化性。
light_analysis.motivation: 驾驶场景解析对自动驾驶至关重要，但适应新域面临像素标注昂贵和源数据因隐私等不可访问的挑战。现有无源域适应方法依赖单一预训练模型，易受源域偏差影响，在多变驾驶环境（如不同道路布局、光照、天气）下鲁棒性不足。本文旨在通过多源知识协作解决这一难题。
light_analysis.method: UCDA构建类级原型记忆库，通过原型相似性估计跨模型预测可靠性，减少源模型置信度不一致的影响。采用两阶段转移策略：首先在无标签目标域数据上通过正负一致性约束协作优化多个源模型，然后将验证后的专家知识蒸馏到单一目标模型。无需访问原始源样本。
light_analysis.result: 在公共驾驶场景数据集和真实自动驾驶平台数据上的综合评估表明，UCDA有效整合多源互补知识，显著提升目标域场景解析的可靠性和泛化能力。与现有单源无源域适应方法相比，在多种驾驶环境下均表现出更优的性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出首个多源无源域适应框架UCDA，解决了驾驶场景解析中源数据不可用时的适应问题。通过协作优化和知识蒸馏，提高了模型的鲁棒性和泛化性，具有重要的学术价值和实际应用潜力。未来可探索扩展到其他视觉理解任务。

title: "I've Seen How This Goes": Characterizing Diversity via Progressive Conditional Surprise
abstract: Measuring the diversity of creative outputs is central to evaluating post-training mode collapse, comparing decoding strategies, and quantifying creative behavior in both AI and human writing. We propose a new approach to measuring diversity using in-context learning, of which the ``Decan'' metric, $D_{Ca_n} = C \times a_n$, is the working instance we evaluate: a per-byte score read off the per-token log-probabilities of a base model $θ$ in a \emph{single forward pass} per permutation, with no embedding model, no reference corpus, and no human labels. This approach is grounded in information theory, makes use of language model in-context learning to detect a wide range of similarities between any number of inputs, and obviates the need to train a special-purpose model. The same pipeline scores AI samples and human-written response sets, with diversity treated as a property of (responses, prompt, scoring model). On Tevet and Berant's human-grounded McDiv benchmark, $D_{Ca_n}$ reaches OCA 0.846 on the McDiv prompt\_gen set where it performs best, behind the strongest neural baseline reported in Tevet and Berant (SentBERT, 0.897). On the OLMo-2-7B post-training pipeline, $D_{Ca_n}$ drops monotonically across the base $\to$ SFT $\to$ DPO $\to$ RLVR stages, detecting the type of diversity loss that creative-writing applications care about.
comment: 28 pages, 18 figures, 9 tables. Accepted to the Workshop on Generative AI, Creativity, and Human-AI Co-Creation @ ICML 2026 (non-archival). Code and data: https://github.com/AMindToThink/icl-diversity

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于上下文学习的多样性度量指标D_{Ca_n}，无需嵌入模型或标注，通过单次前向传播评估生成文本多样性。
light_analysis.motivation: 衡量创意输出的多样性对评估后训练模式崩塌、比较解码策略及量化AI与人类写作的创造性至关重要。现有方法通常需要专门的嵌入模型、参考语料库或人工标注，计算成本高且泛化性有限。该研究旨在提出一种轻量级、基于信息论和上下文学习的多样性度量方法，无需额外训练或资源，即可灵活应用于任意输入集和生成模型。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出Decan度量D_{Ca_n} = C × a_n，基于基础模型在单次前向传播中每个排列的每token对数概率计算字节级得分。该方法利用语言模型的上下文学习能力检测输入间的广泛相似性，无需嵌入模型、参考语料或人工标签。同一流程可直接应用于AI样本和人类写作响应集，将多样性视为（响应、提示、评分模型）的函数。
light_analysis.result: 在Tevet和Berant的McDiv基准测试中，D_{Ca_n}在prompt_gen集上达到OCA 0.846，落后于最强神经基线SentBERT（0.897）。在OLMo-2-7B后训练流水线上，D_{Ca_n}从基础→SFT→DPO→RLVR阶段单调下降，成功检测到创意写作应用关注的多样性损失类型。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出了一种基于上下文学习和信息论的多样性度量D_{Ca_n}，其无需额外模型或标注，通过单次前向传播即可有效捕获生成文本的多样性变化。该方法在基准测试中表现良好，并能在模型后训练阶段监测多样性衰减。未来可探索更高效的计算策略或拓展到其他模态。

title: Personalized 3D Myocardial Infarct Geometry Reconstruction from Cine MRI for Cardiac Digital Twins
abstract: Accurate 3D geometric characterization of myocardial infarction (MI) is essential for building cardiac digital twins (CDTs) to precisely simulate infarct-related electrophysiology. Late gadolinium enhancement magnetic resonance imaging (LGE MRI) is the clinical reference for locating MI, yet its reliance on contrast agents restricts use in renally impaired patients and limits longitudinal follow-ups. As an alternative, contrast-free cine MRI visualizes abnormal ventricular wall motion, which is highly indicative of the infarcted area. In this study, we propose a novel explicit geometry-motion embedded model to fully automatically reconstruct personalized, simulation-ready 3D MI geometries directly from multi-view cine MRIs. Specifically, we construct a 4D (3D + t) biventricular mesh to explicitly extract and decouple geometry-aware and motion-aware features. We further design a dual-branch module for adaptive geometry-motion fusion to capture spatiotemporal dependencies for mapping infarcted region. Furthermore, we introduce multi-scale supervision utilizing an AHA-17 segment-guided cross-attention mechanism to steer the prediction, ensuring biophysically consistent reconstruction. Experimental results on 225 cine MRIs demonstrated that the proposed 3D MI reconstruction achieved high performance with an average Dice score of 0.678 $\pm$ 0.011. In the downstream in-silico electrophysiological simulation evaluations, the results were highly consistent with the LGE-derived ground truth, highlighting the great potential of the proposed model for contrast-free scar characterization and seamless integration into CDT modeling. The code will be released publicly upon acceptance of the manuscript for publication.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于电影MRI的无对比剂3D心肌梗死几何重建方法，用于心脏数字孪生。
light_analysis.motivation: 准确的三维心肌梗死几何表征对构建心脏数字孪生以精确模拟梗死相关电生理至关重要。LGE MRI是临床金标准，但依赖对比剂，限制了在肾损伤患者中的使用和纵向随访。作为替代，无对比剂的电影MRI可可视化异常室壁运动，高度指示梗死区域。现有方法无法直接从电影MRI中实现全自动、仿真就绪的3D梗死几何重建。
light_analysis.method: 提出显式几何-运动嵌入模型，从多视角电影MRI全自动重建个性化3D梗死几何。构建4D（3D+t）双心室网格，显式提取并解耦几何和运动特征；设计双分支模块进行自适应几何-运动融合，捕获时空依赖以映射梗死区域；引入多尺度监督，利用AHA-17节段引导的交叉注意力机制，确保生物物理一致的重建。
light_analysis.result: 在225例电影MRI上，该方法3D梗死重建的平均Dice得分为0.678±0.011。下游体外电生理仿真评估中，结果与LGE导出的金标准高度一致，展示了无对比剂疤痕表征和整合入心脏数字孪生建模的巨大潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法实现了无对比剂的个性化3D心肌梗死几何重建，与LGE MRI结果高度一致，可无缝集成到心脏数字孪生建模中，避免了对比剂限制。未来工作可能涉及更大规模验证和临床转化，代码将开源。

title: ProbeScale: Probing Analysis to Optimize Neural Scaling Laws for Efficient Small Language Model Inference
abstract: Small Language Models (SLMs) offer a balance between capability and computational feasibility. Neural scaling laws inform their optimal training, suggesting that they possess rich internal representations that scale with their size. However, deploying even these SLMs can be challenging under strict resource constraints. Language model probing provides methods for analyzing the linguistic knowledge encoded in a model's internals. We propose ProbScale, a framework that unifies insights from scaling laws and probing to identify parameter-efficient subnetworks within pre-trained SLMs. ProbScale utilizes the high-quality representations of well-scaled SLMs and uses task-specific probes to mathematically quantify the relevance of each layer for target downstream capabilities. This allows selecting subnetworks that optimally trade off performance against parameter size. We formulate the subnetwork selection as finding a layer subset maximizing aggregated, task-weighted probe performance under a parameter budget. Experiments on representative SLMs such as RoBERTa-Large and T5-Base demonstrate that ProbScale identifies subnetworks achieving significant parameter reduction, from 5 to 10 times, while maintaining high performance (95% to 98% of the original SLMs) on targeted tasks, outperforming heuristic baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ProbScale框架，结合缩放定律和探针分析，从预训练小语言模型中提取参数高效的子网络，实现5-10倍压缩，性能保持95%以上。
light_analysis.motivation: 小语言模型虽在能力与计算可行性间取得平衡，但在严格资源约束下部署仍有挑战。现有方法如直接剪枝或蒸馏可能未充分利用模型内部表示。缩放定律表明模型具有丰富的内在表示，但如何从中选择最优子网络以权衡性能与参数大小尚未解决。ProbScale旨在通过探针量化每层相关性，指导子网络选择，实现高效推理。
light_analysis.method: ProbScale利用缩放定律训练良好的小语言模型的高质量表示，通过任务特定探针（如线性分类器）量化每个Transformer层对目标下游任务的相关性得分。将子网络选择形式化为在参数预算约束下，最大化聚合任务加权探针性能的层子集选择问题。采用贪心算法或整数规划求解，从预训练模型（如RoBERTa-Large、T5-Base）中提取最优层子集。
light_analysis.result: 在RoBERTa-Large和T5-Base上的实验表明，ProbScale识别的子网络实现5到10倍的参数缩减，同时在目标任务上保持原模型95%至98%的性能。与随机层选择、前k层等启发式基线相比，ProbScale在同等参数预算下取得更高准确率，验证了其层选择策略的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ProbScale成功统一了缩放定律与探针分析，为小语言模型高效部署提供了新思路。其子网络选择方法在显著降低参数和计算开销的同时，保持了接近原模型的性能，适用于资源受限场景。未来工作可探索跨任务迁移或动态预算分配，但摘要未明确提及局限性。

title: Multilinguality of Large Language Models From a Structural Perspective
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have excelled in processing multiple languages through pre- and post-training on multilingual data, even though English dominates the training data. Prior work focusing on token representations has revealed how those LLMs process non-English text. Although these analyses have provided insightful findings, they fail to capture a structural view, which is an inherent property of language. In this study, we explore the multilinguality of LLMs through representational structural analysis. Our findings reveal that low-resource languages are structurally more different from English than high- and mid-resource languages, and that language-specific post-training alters their structures while preserving inter-language relationships.

light_analysis.overview: 通过表示结构性分析探索LLM的多语言性，揭示低资源语言与英语结构差异更大，且语言后训练保持语言间关系。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在多语言处理上表现出色，但训练数据以英语为主。先前研究聚焦于token表示，未能捕捉语言的结构性特性，而结构是语言的固有属性。因此，需要从结构性视角理解LLM如何处理非英语文本，特别是低资源语言。
light_analysis.method: 采用表示结构性分析方法，比较不同语言在LLM中的表示结构。研究关注语言资源水平（高、中、低）对结构相似性的影响，并分析语言特定后训练如何改变结构。数据集和模型细节未明确说明。
light_analysis.result: 低资源语言与英语在结构上的差异大于高资源和中资源语言。语言特定的后训练会改变模型表示的结构，但保留了语言之间原有的关系。具体性能指标未提供。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究从结构性视角揭示了LLM多语言处理的特性，强调了资源水平对语言结构差异的影响，以及后训练对结构的作用。有助于理解LLM的多语言能力，为改进低资源语言处理提供方向。未来可探索更细粒度的结构分析。

title: Tree-Guided Identify-Then-Exploit: A Unified Framework of Best Arm Identification and Regret Minimization for Dueling Bandits
abstract: We study $N$-armed stochastic dueling bandits under the Condorcet-winner assumption, where three widely adopted objectives are considered: best-arm identification (BAI), weak regret, and strong regret. We propose Tree-Guided Identify-Then-Exploit (TG-ITE), the first unified framework to tackle all these objectives to our knowledge. Without requiring stronger assumptions, we propose a shared tree-guided identification approach to find a high-confidence incumbent within $O(N)$ comparisons. We further propose varied exploitation strategies to utilize this warm-start stage to optimize the specific objectives at hand. This methodology enables our approach to (1) achieve $O(N)$ sample complexity in BAI without commonly adopted stronger assumptions; (2) build the first winner-stays-style algorithm to achieve $O(N)$ weak regret; (3) enjoy the same $O(N \log T)$ guarantee as specialized strong-regret approaches; (4) realize the joint optimization of BAI and weak regret with $O(N)$ guarantees for both, eliminating the sub-optimal gap of $O(\log N)$ in the existing approach. Our results provide evidence that the trade-off between BAI and regret minimization is relatively benign in dueling bandits.

light_analysis.overview: 首次提出统一框架TG-ITE，在Condorcet赢家假设下同时优化最佳臂识别与遗憾最小化，无需更强假设。
light_analysis.motivation: 决斗赌博机问题中，现有方法通常针对最佳臂识别或遗憾最小化单独设计，缺乏统一框架。现有BAI方法需要更强假设，而弱遗憾算法存在次优间隙。本文旨在提出一个统一框架，无需额外假设，同时高效处理BAI、弱遗憾和强遗憾三种目标，并实现联合优化，减少性能权衡。
light_analysis.method: 提出树引导的识别-利用（TG-ITE）框架。首先通过树引导的识别阶段，在O(N)次比较内找到高置信度的当前最优臂（incumbent）。然后根据具体目标设计不同的利用策略：对BAI直接输出；对弱遗憾采用赢家留赛策略；对强遗憾结合标准算法。关键创新在于共享识别阶段，无需更强假设，且支持BAI与弱遗憾的联合优化。
light_analysis.result: TG-ITE在BAI上实现O(N)样本复杂度，无需常见更强假设；在弱遗憾上首次实现O(N)的赢家留赛算法；在强遗憾上达到O(N log T)的相同保证；在BAI与弱遗憾联合优化中，双方均达O(N)，消除现有方法O(log N)的次优间隙。实验证据表明，BAI与遗憾最小化之间的权衡相对较小。
light_analysis.conclusion: TG-ITE是首个统一处理决斗赌博机中三种主要目标的框架，展示了在Condorcet赢家假设下，无需更强假设即可实现各目标的最优或接近最优性能。该工作理论价值在于揭示了BAI与遗憾最小化之间的良性关系，实际应用可高效决策与学习。未来可扩展至非Condorcet情形或更复杂反馈模型。

title: STaR-KV: Spatio-Temporal Adaptive Re-weighting for KV Cache Compression in GUI Vision-Language Models
abstract: Vision-language-model-based graphical user interface (GUI) agents have shown broad automation capabilities, yet deployment is bottlenecked by a key-value (KV) cache that grows linearly with interaction steps. For instance, UI-TARS-1.5-7B consumes 76 GB of GPU memory on merely five screenshots, approaching the capacity of mainstream 80 GB accelerators. Existing KV compression methods share two structural assumptions: aggregating visual-token importance into a single shared saliency map, and applying a fixed top-B cutoff to the fused score distribution. Pilot measurements refute both: spatial specialization lives at the attention-subspace level and migrates across layers, while the score distribution drifts in shape along a trajectory. We propose STaR-KV (Spatio-Temporal Adaptive Re-weighting), a training-free KV cache compression framework that calibrates token importance along three axes: (i) subspace-aware scoring driven by online spatial mutual information; (ii) a temporal stability discount that suppresses redundant cache entries from persistently attended subspaces; and (iii) an entropy-derived temperature that adaptively reshapes the score distribution. Across four GUI benchmarks, STaR-KV achieves the strongest average accuracy among state-of-the-art KV compression methods (e.g., GUIKV, SnapKV) at matched budgets, with no compression-stage FLOPs overhead (-0.07%) and cutting peak GPU memory by nearly 40% at a 20% KV-cache budget. Code is available at https://github.com/kawhiiiileo/STaR-KV.

light_analysis.overview: 提出STaR-KV，一种无需训练的KV缓存压缩框架，通过自适应重加权实现GUI视觉语言模型的高效部署。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于VLM的GUI代理在部署时面临KV缓存随交互步骤线性增长的内存瓶颈，例如UI-TARS-1.5-7B模型仅处理五张截图就消耗76GB显存。现有压缩方法存在结构性缺陷：将视觉标记重要性聚合为单一共性显著图，并对融合后的分数分布应用固定top-B截断。实验表明，注意力在子空间层面具有空间特异性且跨层迁移，同时分数分布形状沿轨迹漂移，需要更精细的校准策略。
light_analysis.method: STaR-KV沿三个维度校准标记重要性：1）基于在线空间互信息的子空间感知评分；2）时间稳定性折扣，抑制持续关注子空间中的冗余缓存条目；3）熵导出的温度参数自适应重塑分数分布。该方法无需训练，在四个GUI基准上以匹配预算的压缩比实现最强平均准确率，且无压缩阶段FLOPs开销（-0.07%），在20%缓存预算下峰值显存降低近40%。
light_analysis.result: 在四个GUI基准测试中，STaR-KV在与最先进KV压缩方法（如GUIKV、SnapKV）匹配预算时取得最强平均准确率。具体地，在20%缓存预算下，峰值GPU显存降低近40%，且压缩阶段无额外FLOPs开销（-0.07%）。
light_analysis.conclusion: STaR-KV通过自适应重加权有效解决GUI-VLM中KV缓存膨胀问题，提升了部署效率。其无需训练的特性便于实际应用，且子空间感知与时间稳定性设计为KV压缩提供了新思路。未来可探索更高效的线上互信息计算策略及跨任务泛化能力。

title: PlatonicNav: Unveiling Semantic Correspondence in Navigation with Platonic Topological Maps
abstract: Embodied visual navigation, where an agent perceives a complex environment and acts to reach a goal from raw sensory input, underpins a wide range of applications such as household service robotics, assistive robotics, and large-scale autonomous exploration. However, recent attempts to unify vision-and-language navigation (VLN) and object goal navigation (ObjNav) remain at the level of architectural fusion, mixed-task training, and large vision-language pretraining, without examining whether independently trained vision and language encoders may already share a common semantic structure. Moreover, even object-centric topological maps still ground language goals through explicit cross-modal supervision such as CLIP or large vision-language models, leaving open whether such grounding is possible from a purely vision-built map. To address these challenges, we extend the Platonic Representation Hypothesis to embodied navigation and recast vision-only ObjNav, cross-modal ObjNav, and VLN as three different interfaces to the same object-centric semantic manifold. We further introduce PlatonicNav, a training-free framework whose Platonic Topological Map fuses geometric and semantic node distances from a self-supervised visual encoder, and grounds language goals via blind matching without any paired vision-language data. Extensive experiments on simulation benchmarks including HM3D-IIN, OVON, and R2R-CE on MP3D, together with deployment on Unitree Go2, demonstrate that PlatonicNav generalizes across tasks, modalities, and embodiments without explicit cross-modal training. Code: https://github.com/AIGeeksGroup/PlatonicNav. Website: https://aigeeksgroup.github.io/PlatonicNav.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PlatonicNav框架，将柏拉图表示假说扩展到具身导航，利用自监督视觉编码器构建拓扑地图，通过盲匹配实现零样本跨模态导航。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视觉-语言导航和物体目标导航的统一尝试停留在架构融合、多任务训练和视觉-语言预训练层面，未探究独立训练的视觉和语言编码器是否已共享公共语义结构。同时，现有物体中心拓扑地图仍需通过CLIP等显式跨模态监督来接地语言目标，尚未实现纯视觉地图的语言接地。这些问题限制了导航系统的通用性和可扩展性。
light_analysis.method: 将柏拉图表示假说扩展到具身导航，将纯视觉ObjNav、跨模态ObjNav和VLN视为同一物体中心语义流形的三种接口。提出无需训练的PlatonicNav框架，其Platonic拓扑地图融合来自自监督视觉编码器的几何和语义节点距离，并通过盲匹配（blind matching）实现语言目标接地，无需任何配对视觉-语言数据。
light_analysis.result: 在HM3D-IIN、OVON和R2R-CE（MP3D）等模拟基准以及Unitree Go2真实机器人上进行了实验。结果表明PlatonicNav能跨任务、跨模态和跨实体泛化，无需显式跨模态训练。摘要未提供具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: PlatonicNav证明了独立训练的视觉和语言编码器在导航任务中共享语义对应关系，为无需跨模态训练的通用导航框架提供了新思路。其零样本泛化能力具有实际应用价值，可降低对大规模配对数据的依赖。未来工作可能包括在更复杂场景和不同机器人平台上的验证。

title: FLARE: Diffusion for Hybrid Language Model
abstract: Autoregressive (AR) large language models (LLMs) have achieved broad practical success, but sequential decoding remains a key bottleneck for low-latency deployment. Recent efficient-inference work has progressed along two axes: reducing the cost of each model invocation through efficient architectures, and reducing serial decoding steps through parallel generation. Hybrid attention backbones address the former, while diffusion language models (dLLMs) pursue the latter via iterative parallel denoising. Combining these advantages remains challenging: AR-to-dLLM conversion often fails to preserve seed-checkpoint capability, and hybrid-attention recurrent states and masking constraints make diffusion training and serving nontrivial. We present FLARE, a systematic conversion framework for hybrid-attention LLMs. Our analysis identifies transfer data quality as the primary determinant of capability preservation, outweighing loss formulation and attention-mask design. The resulting framework combines a token-equal AR-and-diffusion objective, hardware-aware kernels, and unified inference, enabling one checkpoint to support both AR-style verified decoding and diffusion-style parallel denoising.
