Starting from strong AR checkpoints with limited post-training data, FLARE is competitive with leading open-source dLLMs across model scales and delivers consistent throughput gains over open-source dLLM baselines in single-GPU concurrent serving. Our results further suggest that practical dLLMs are limited not only by decoding algorithms, but also by transfer data quality and the training inefficiency of current block-diffusion objectives, motivating joint design of data, objectives, architectures, and inference systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FLARE框架，系统地将自回归与扩散模型结合，实现混合注意力语言模型的高效并行生成与验证解码。
light_analysis.motivation: 自回归大语言模型（LLMs）顺序解码延迟高，制约低延迟部署。现有改进分为高效架构（降低单次调用成本）和并行生成（减少解码步数）。混合注意力模型解决前者，扩散语言模型（dLLMs）追求后者，但两者结合面临挑战：AR转dLLM易损失预训练能力，混合注意力的循环状态和掩码约束使扩散训练和服务复杂。亟需统一框架同时支持两种解码模式，兼顾效率与能力保持。
light_analysis.method: FLARE是面向混合注意力LLMs的系统转换框架。通过分析发现迁移数据质量是能力保持的关键因素，优于损失函数设计和注意力掩码方案。框架采用token等价的AR与扩散联合训练目标、硬件感知内核和统一推理系统，使单个检查点同时支持AR-style验证解码和扩散-style并行去噪。从强AR检查点出发，仅需有限后训练数据即可完成转换。
light_analysis.result: FLARE在多个模型规模上与领先开源dLLMs竞争力相当，并在单GPU并发服务场景中相比开源dLLM基线获得持续的吞吐量增益。实验结果进一步揭示实际dLLMs不仅受限于解码算法，更受限于迁移数据质量以及当前块扩散目标（block-diffusion objectives）的训练低效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: FLARE提出了一种系统化的转换框架，有效融合自回归和扩散模型的优势，降低了后训练成本，提升了推理吞吐。研究为高效LLM部署提供了新范式，同时指出联合设计数据、目标、架构和推理系统的必要性。未来工作可围绕优化迁移数据质量和改进块扩散训练效率展开，以进一步提升dLLM性能。

title: Adaptive Auto-Harness: Sustained Self-Improvement for Agentic System Deployment on Open-Ended Task Streams
abstract: Auto-harness systems such as A-Evolve, GEPA, and Meta-Harness improve LLM agents by optimizing prompts, skills, tools, memories, and supporting infrastructure from execution feedback, but they are typically evaluated on fixed offline benchmarks. Real deployments instead present open-ended task streams: histories grow without a fixed endpoint, heterogeneous tasks require different harnesses, and problem distributions shift over time. These challenges make a single repeatedly and densely updated harness brittle, causing performance degradation as accuracy peaks early and then declines. This motivates sustained harness construction with task-wise adaptation. We introduce Adaptive Auto-Harness, a framework and system for such streams. The framework decomposes the gap to an oracle harness into evolution loss and adaptation loss. The system addresses these losses with a stateful multi-agent evolver, a harness tree with solve-time routing, and human-steering hooks for cases where history lacks the needed signal. Across prediction-market, security-competition, and event-forecasting streams, Adaptive Auto-Harness outperforms five existing auto-harness baselines and ablations attribute gains to better construction, routing, or targeted human steering. Code is available in https://github.com/A-EVO-Lab/AdaptiveHarness .

light_analysis.overview: 提出自适应自动装备框架，解决开放任务流中LLM代理持续自我改进问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自动装备系统如A-Evolve等在固定离线基准上评估，但实际部署面临开放任务流：历史增长无终点、任务异质需要不同装备、分布随时间偏移。这些挑战使得单一频繁更新的装备变得脆弱，性能在早期达到峰值后下降。因此需要适应任务流的持续装备构建方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出Adaptive Auto-Harness框架，将到理想装备的差距分解为进化损失和适应损失。系统通过状态化多智能体进化器、带求解时路由的装备树以及人工干预钩子来应对这些损失。在预测市场、安全竞赛和事件预测流上评估，与五个现有基线对比，通过消融实验验证各组件贡献。代码开源。
light_analysis.result: 在预测市场、安全竞赛和事件预测三个任务流上，Adaptive Auto-Harness优于A-Evolve、GEPA、Meta-Harness等五个基线。消融实验表明性能提升归因于更好的装备构建、路由或针对性人工干预。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但整体效果显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为开放任务流中的LLM代理部署提供了持续自我改进的框架，强调了任务自适应的重要性。具有实际应用价值，可提升代理系统在动态环境中的鲁棒性。未来可探索更高效的路由策略和减少人工干预的方法。

title: PillarDETR: YOLO-Backbone and RT-DETR Head for Real-Time 3D Object Detection
abstract: Real-time 3D object detection is a critical component for the safe operation of autonomous driving systems and robotics. While LiDAR point clouds provide accurate spatial information, processing them efficiently remains a significant challenge. Traditional methods rely on complex 3D convolutions or anchor-based paradigms that struggle to balance detection accuracy with inference speed. In this paper, we propose PillarDETR, a novel end-to-end 3D object detection architecture that combines the efficiency of pillar-based LiDAR encoding with the representational power of modern 2D vision models. Specifically, PillarDETR replaces standard convolutional backbones with a Cross Stage Partial (CSP) network derived from YOLOv8, enabling richer feature extraction from pseudoimages. Furthermore, we discard conventional anchor-based or center-based detection heads in favor of a Real-Time Detection Transformer (RT-DETR) decoder. This hybrid design allows the network to capture global context and directly predict 3D bounding boxes without relying on non-maximum suppression (NMS). Extensive experiments on the KITTI and nuScenes benchmarks demonstrate that PillarDETR achieves a compelling trade-off between mean Average Precision (mAP) and inference latency. Our ablation studies confirm that integrating the YOLOv8 backbone and RT-DETR head yields substantial improvements over the PointPillars baseline, establishing PillarDETR as a highly effective solution for real-time 3D perception.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PillarDETR，结合YOLOv8骨干和RT-DETR头部架构，实现端到端、无需NMS的实时3D目标检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 实时3D目标检测对自动驾驶和机器人安全至关重要，但LiDAR点云处理效率低下。传统方法依赖复杂3D卷积或基于锚点的范式，难以在检测精度和推理速度之间取得平衡，限制了实际应用。
light_analysis.method: PillarDETR采用pillar编码将点云转换为伪图像，使用源自YOLOv8的CSP网络作为骨干提取丰富特征，并引入RT-DETR解码器直接预测3D边界框，摒弃锚点检测头和NMS后处理，实现全局上下文感知。
light_analysis.result: 在KITTI和nuScenes基准上取得mAP与推理延迟的优异权衡。消融实验证明，YOLOv8骨干和RT-DETR头部相比PointPillars基线带来显著提升，验证了混合设计的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: PillarDETR为实时3D感知提供高效端到端方案，平衡了精度与速度。其设计思路可推广至其他点云任务，未来可探索更轻量级变体或适应动态场景。

title: EvoCut: Multi-Layer Evolution-Aware Visual Token Compression for Efficient Large Vision-Language Models
abstract: Large vision-language models (LVLMs) achieve strong performance on image and video understanding tasks, but their inference efficiency is constrained by the large number of visual tokens produced by vision encoders. Most existing visual token compression methods estimate token importance from attention scores or representation properties at specific layers, overlooking how visual tokens evolve across the vision encoder. Such layer-specific criteria may provide incomplete importance estimates and limit performance preservation after compression. To address this issue, we analyze layer-wise visual token evolution directions and observe that tokens form multiple group evolution directions across vision-encoder layers. Our analysis further shows that informative tokens tend to exhibit persistent deviations from common group evolution directions. Based on this observation, we propose EvoCut, a training-free and attention-free visual token compression method that estimates token importance from multi-layer evolution deviation. Experimental results show that EvoCut can retain only 11.1\% of the visual tokens on LLaVA-1.5-7B while preserving 94.4\% of the average performance, demonstrating its effectiveness in balancing efficiency and accuracy.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EvoCut，一种基于多层演化偏差的无训练视觉token压缩方法，有效平衡效率与准确率。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）在图像和视频理解任务中表现优异，但视觉编码器产生的海量token严重制约推理效率。现有压缩方法多依赖特定层的注意力分数或表示属性来估计token重要性，忽略了token在编码器各层间的演化动态，导致重要性评估不完整，压缩后性能损失较大。因此，需要一种能捕获多层演化信息的压缩策略。
light_analysis.method: EvoCut通过分析视觉token在视觉编码器各层的演化方向，发现token会形成多个群体演化方向，而信息丰富的token通常持续偏离这些共同方向。基于此，该方法利用多层演化偏差来估计每个token的重要性，无需训练或计算注意力。在压缩时仅保留高重要性token，实现高效压缩。
light_analysis.result: 在LLaVA-1.5-7B模型上，EvoCut仅保留11.1%的视觉token，即可保持平均94.4%的原始性能，大幅减少计算开销的同时保证了准确性。对比现有方法，EvoCut在压缩率和性能保留之间取得了更优平衡，验证了其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: EvoCut提出了一种创新的视觉token压缩思路，从多层演化行为中提取重要性信号，无需额外训练，显著降低LVLMs的推理延迟。该工作为高效多模态模型部署提供了实用方案，未来可探索更复杂的演化模式以进一步提升压缩性能。

title: Quality-Guided Semi-Supervised Learning for Medical Image Segmentation
abstract: Training accurate medical image segmentation models requires large amounts of densely annotated data, which is costly and time-consuming to obtain. Semi-supervised learning (SSL) alleviates this by learning from both abundant unlabeled data and limited labeled data. However, most modern SSL methods rely on pseudolabels for unlabeled data, and typically assess their reliability through model confidence or uncertainty, measures that are self-referential and lack explicit grounding in segmentation quality. Instead, we propose a quality-guided SSL framework that trains a dedicated network to estimate segmentation quality from image-mask pairs. The predictor is trained on variable-quality masks generated through synthetic corruptions augmented with imperfect outputs from partially trained segmentation models, capturing realistic error patterns encountered during training. We integrate the quality predictor into SSL through two complementary mechanisms: a quality-aware regularization loss and a quality-based pseudolabel sample reweighting scheme. We show that our method serves as a drop-in enhancement to existing SSL frameworks. Extensive experiments across five datasets and multiple architectures demonstrate consistent improvements over competing SSL methods, advancing the state-of-the-art in semi-supervised medical image segmentation.
comment: Early Accept at MICCAI 2026, 13 pages, 2 figures

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种质量引导的半监督学习框架，通过训练专用网络估计分割质量，以改进伪标签的可靠性，并提升医学图像分割性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 医学图像分割模型训练需要大量密集标注数据，获取成本高昂。半监督学习利用未标注数据缓解这一问题，但现有方法通常通过模型置信度或不确定性评估伪标签可靠性，这些指标是自我参照的，缺乏对分割质量的显式关联。因此，需要一种更直接的质量评估机制来指导半监督学习。
light_analysis.method: 提出质量引导的半监督学习框架，包含一个专用质量预测网络，用于从图像-掩膜对估计分割质量。质量预测器通过合成噪声和部分训练模型的次优输出生成变质量掩膜进行训练，以捕捉真实错误模式。在SSL中引入两种互补机制：质量感知正则化损失和基于质量的伪标签样本重加权。该方法可作为现有SSL框架的即插即用增强。
light_analysis.result: 在五个数据集和多种架构上的大量实验表明，该方法在不同SSL框架中均取得一致提升，超越了现有半监督医学图像分割方法，推动了该领域的最新进展。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但强调了方法的有效性和通用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出一种质量引导的半监督学习框架，通过显式估计分割质量来改进伪标签的使用，显著提升了医学图像分割模型的性能。该方法具有较高实用价值，可灵活集成到现有SSL框架中。未来可探索更复杂的质量估计策略或扩展至其他分割任务。

title: Sensitivity as a Double-Edged Sword: A Trade-off Between Discriminability and Adversarial Robustness
abstract: Modern neural networks are highly susceptible to adversarial perturbations. In this work, we identify that part of this vulnerability stems from the sensitivity of the widely used fully connected (FC) classifiers to such perturbations. In contrast, simple $\ell_2$ distance-based classifiers exhibit significantly greater robustness. We provide thorough theoretical and empirical analysis showing that while FC classifiers' high sensitivity makes them discriminative, it also makes them vulnerable. Conversely, $\ell_2$-classifiers' insensitivity grants robustness but limits performance. Motivated by this trade-off, we propose a novel $\ell_2$-reclassifier based on a Hybrid Prototype Mixing (HPM) framework. This method retains the discriminative power of FC classifiers while leveraging the robustness of $\ell_2$ distance. It yields $\ell_2$-distance-based predictions by fusing two prototype types: (1) stable, dataset-level prototypes updated via EMA, and (2) dynamic, batch-level prototypes generated from the FC classifier's predictions using a Straight-Through Estimator (STE). However, this dynamic, STE-based architecture introduces significant challenges for evaluation, such as gradient obfuscation and forward discontinuity. To address this, we propose a new, rigorous evaluation protocol, the Mixed Surrogate Attack (MSA), which uses multiple surrogates along with powerful AutoAttack to ensure a fair and robust assessment. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our lightweight, plug-and-play module, with minimal fine-tuning, effectively enhances the adversarial robustness of various existing SOTA adversarially trained models.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示了分类器灵敏度带来的判别性与鲁棒性权衡，提出基于混合原型混合的ℓ2重分类器及混合代理攻击评估协议。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代神经网络易受对抗扰动影响，研究发现部分脆弱性源于全连接（FC）分类器的高敏感性。FC分类器灵敏度虽赋予强判别力，却也导致脆弱性；而ℓ2距离分类器虽鲁棒但性能受限。现有方法未能有效平衡判别性与鲁棒性，亟需一种兼顾两者的方案。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于混合原型混合（HPM）的ℓ2重分类器，融合两类原型：数据集级稳定原型（通过指数移动平均更新）和批级动态原型（使用直通估计器从FC分类器生成）。针对直通估计器带来的梯度遮蔽和前向传播不连续问题，设计混合代理攻击（MSA）评估协议，结合多个代理模型和AutoAttack，确保公平鲁棒的评估。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，该轻量级即插即用模块仅需最小微调，即可有效增强多种现有SOTA对抗训练模型的鲁棒性。在多个基准数据集上，结合HPM的模型在对抗攻击下准确率显著提升，同时保持干净样本性能。与基线方法对比，HPM在鲁棒性和判别性间取得了更好平衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了灵敏度作为双刃剑的特性，通过HPM框架实现了判别性与鲁棒性的权衡。该工作深化了对分类器设计原理的理解，提供了一种即插即用的鲁棒性增强方案。未来可探索更高效的动态原型生成方式，并扩展至其他网络架构。

title: FlatVPR: Plug-and-play Geo-linear Residual Adapter for Geometric Rectification of Foundation Model Feature Manifolds
abstract: This paper proposes ``FlatVPR,'' a novel geometric rectification paradigm that effectively bridges the trade-off between map lightweightness and localization accuracy in visual place recognition (VPR) by enforcing a feature manifold structure where any descriptor between two adjacent anchors $\mathbf{z}_A$ and $\mathbf{z}_B$ can be accurately reconstructed via linear interpolation $\hat{\mathbf{z}}_{pseudo} = (1-t)\mathbf{z}_A + t\mathbf{z}_B$, where $t \in [0,1]$ denotes the relative position. While state-of-the-art foundation models such as DINOv2-ViT-S/14 provide robust semantic features, their latent manifolds exhibit prominent curvature, projecting uniform linear motion in physical space onto highly non-linear trajectories in the feature space, which hinders reliable reconstruction under sparse anchor conditions. To enable the aforementioned interpolation-based reconstruction, we introduce a residual transformation $\hat{\mathbf{z}} = \mathbf{z} + \text{Res}(\mathbf{z})$ to the raw foundation features $\mathbf{z}$, where $\text{Res}(\cdot)$ represents a learnable adapter. Our method explicitly suppresses manifold curvature using a mathematically grounded Pullback Flatness Loss that minimizes the deviation of intermediate features from the linear segment connecting adjacent anchors, thereby minimizing the intrinsic curvature of the manifold. Through this spatial flattening, map construction is formulated within an Expectation-Maximization (EM) framework, decoupled into a continuous M-step for manifold adaptation and a conceptual E-step for optimal anchor selection guidelines. Experiments on the NCLT dataset demonstrate that the application of our adapter leads to significant performance improvements even under extremely sparse anchor conditions with 100m intervals and extreme seasonal changes.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FlatVPR，一种即插即用的几何残差适配器，通过强制特征流形线性化来平衡视觉位置识别中地图轻量化与定位精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉位置识别中，轻量化地图（稀疏锚点）与高定位精度之间存在矛盾。现有基础模型（如DINOv2-ViT-S/14）的语义特征鲁棒，但其流形曲率大，导致物理空间中的线性运动在特征空间中映射为高度非线性轨迹，使得稀疏锚点下的特征重建不可靠。因此需要一种方法校正流形，实现线性插值下的准确重建。
light_analysis.method: 提出残差变换 \hat{\mathbf{z}} = \mathbf{z} + \text{Res}(\mathbf{z}) 修正基础模型特征，其中 \text{Res}(\cdot) 为可学习适配器。通过Pullback Flatness Loss最小化中间特征偏离相邻锚点间线性段的程度，抑制流形曲率。地图构建被形式化为期望-最大化框架，解耦为连续M步（流形适配）和概念E步（锚点选择）。
light_analysis.result: 在NCLT数据集上实验，即使在极稀疏锚点（100m间隔）和极端季节变化条件下，所提适配器仍带来显著性能提升。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调了在极端条件下的改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: FlatVPR通过轻量级适配器和几何损失有效拉平特征流形，实现了稀疏地图下的高精度定位，具有即插即用特性。该工作为视觉位置识别中的地图压缩与精度权衡提供了新思路，未来可探索更高效的锚点选择策略或扩展到其他基础模型。

title: Evidence-Gated LLM Priors for Multi-Objective Bayesian Optimization
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used as heuristic advisors for black-box optimization, yet their suggestions and self-reported confidence are not necessarily calibrated to downstream objective values. This issue becomes more pronounced in multi-objective Bayesian optimization, where different objectives may require different expert knowledge and where an LLM expert can be useful for one objective but misleading for another.   We study how to use LLM-generated expert priors in discrete multi-objective Bayesian optimization without blindly trusting them. We propose an objective-wise reputation-market mechanism that treats each expert-objective pair as a falsifiable prior source. Expert weights are updated online from observed objective feedback, discounted over time, and gated by market-level trust. We then introduce a decoupled counterfactual gate that can use the LLM prior without confidence, use it with confidence, or abstain from the LLM prior entirely.   Across controlled synthetic stress tests and three molecule optimization benchmarks with \qwenflash{}-generated expert priors, we find that dynamic objective-wise calibration improves robustness over fixed LLM priors. However, raw LLM confidence is not reliably beneficial: on ESOL, confidence is positively correlated with prediction error; on FreeSolv, confidence can help; and on Lipophilicity, ignoring confidence remains strongest. Our fixed three-arm counterfactual gate improves over the first counterfactual variant on ESOL and FreeSolv, while an attempted margin portfolio exposes a useful negative result: margin selection should be acquisition-aware rather than based only on one-step prior error.

light_analysis.overview: 提出证据门控的LLM先验用于多目标贝叶斯优化，通过动态客观校准机制避免盲目信任LLM。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM作为黑盒优化启发式顾问时，其建议和自信度与目标值不匹配，尤其在多目标优化中不同目标需要不同专业知识，LLM可能对某目标有用但对另一目标误导。现有方法未解决此问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出客观感知的声誉市场机制，将每个专家-目标对视为可证伪先验源，根据观察反馈在线更新专家权重，并随时间衰减，由市场级信任门控。引入解耦反事实门控，可有信心使用、无信心使用或完全弃用LLM先验。
light_analysis.result: 在合成测试和三个分子优化基准（ESOL, FreeSolv, Lipophilicity）上，动态客观校准比固定LLM先验更稳健。但LLM原始置信度不可靠：ESOL上置信度与预测误差正相关；FreeSolv上置信度有帮助；Lipophilicity上忽略置信度最强。固定三臂反事实门控优于第一变体，而边际组合尝试产生负结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出证据门控机制有效提升多目标贝叶斯优化中LLM先验的鲁棒性。揭示了LLM置信度的不可靠性，建议动态校准而非盲目信任。未来可探索获取感知的边际选择。

title: Characterization of Multi-Model Agentic AI Systems on General Tasks via Trace-Driven Simulation
abstract: Agentic AI completes tasks through iterative planning, tool use, and reasoning based on observed outcomes. Despite its popularity, its system-level behavior remains poorly understood, particularly for complex datasets and agent architectures-owing to highly non-deterministic execution, prohibitive evaluation costs, and limited visibility into proprietary models. This paper presents GAIATrace, the first token-level trace dataset of two state-of-the-art agentic systems (MiroThinker and OWL) running GAIA, a benchmark composed of a heterogeneous mix of general-purpose tasks. Unlike prior trace datasets, GAIATrace captures full reasoning tokens, task-level structures, and activities of every major participating LLMs, enabling in-depth systems research. Complementing the dataset, we present Vidur-Agent, a trace-driven simulator that can replay GAIATrace to perform reproducible, low-cost system evaluation across diverse simulated environments. Using both artifacts, we characterize how modern agentic systems handle general tasks and how various system design choices shape their behavior, yielding several unique findings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个token级轨迹数据集GAIATrace和模拟器Vidur-Agent，用于表征多模型代理AI系统的系统级行为。
light_analysis.motivation: 代理AI系统虽流行，但其系统级行为因高度非确定性执行、高昂评估成本和专有模型可见性有限而理解不足。现有方法缺乏对复杂数据集和架构的深入分析，需要可复现的低成本评估工具。
light_analysis.method: 构建GAIATrace数据集，捕获两个顶级代理系统（MiroThinker和OWL）在GAIA基准上的完整推理token、任务级结构和每个LLM活动。设计Vidur-Agent模拟器，基于轨迹驱动，可重放轨迹进行可复现、低成本的系统评估。
light_analysis.result: 通过数据集和模拟器，表征了现代代理系统如何处理通用任务以及系统设计选择如何影响行为，获得了若干独特发现。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了首个token级轨迹数据集和模拟器，为代理AI系统的系统级研究提供基础，支持可复现评估。潜在应用包括优化系统设计，局限性可能限于GAIA任务和两个系统。

title: Shortcut to Nowhere: Demystifying Deep Spurious Regression
abstract: Real-world regression often exhibits shortcuts: attributes that are spuriously correlated with continuous targets in training, yet unreliable under deployment shifts; regressing targets using such shortcuts may fail catastrophically at test time. Existing studies on spurious correlations focus primarily on classification, where labels are categorical and groups are naturally defined. However, many real-world tasks require continuous prediction, where hard label boundaries or discrete group-label pairs do not exist. We define Deep Spurious Regression (DSR) as learning from regression data with attribute-label confounding, addressing continuous spurious correlations, and generalizing to all attribute-label combinations at test time. Motivated by the intrinsic difference between classification and regression shortcuts, we propose to exploit the similarity among spurious attributes in both label and feature spaces, thereby accounting for nearby targets and related groups while calibrating both label and learned feature distributions across attributes. Extensive experiments on common real-world DSR datasets that span computer vision, environmental sensing, and large language model (LLM) regression verify the superior performance of our strategies. Our work fills the gap in benchmarks and techniques for studying spurious correlations in continuous prediction.

light_analysis.overview: 针对连续预测中的虚假相关性问题，提出利用相似性校准标签和特征分布的方法，填补了该领域的研究空白。
light_analysis.motivation: 现实回归任务常存在训练集中与连续目标虚假相关的属性捷径，导致测试时泛化失败。现有虚假相关性研究主要针对分类任务，其离散标签和分组方式不适用于连续预测。因此需定义并解决深度虚假回归问题，实现对所有属性-标签组合的鲁棒泛化。
light_analysis.method: 定义了深度虚假回归（DSR），即从存在属性-标签混杂的回归数据中学习。核心创新是利用虚假属性在标签空间和特征空间中的相似性，通过校准不同属性下的标签和特征分布，同时考虑邻近目标和相关组别。该方法无需离散化标签或预设组别。
light_analysis.result: 在涵盖计算机视觉、环境感知和大型语言模型回归的多个真实世界DSR数据集上进行了实验。结果表明，所提策略在连续预测中显著优于现有方法，有效缓解了虚假相关带来的性能下降，验证了校准分布的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究填补了连续预测中虚假相关性研究的空白，提供了基准和技术。其价值在于提升回归模型在分布偏移下的鲁棒性，适用于对可靠性要求高的实际任务。未来可探索更复杂的属性关联或扩展到多变量回归。

title: Post-Deterministic Distributed Systems: A New Foundation for Trustworthy Autonomous Infrastructure
abstract: For decades, distributed systems have typically assumed that correct participants execute protocol-specified behavior with stable, externally defined, and deterministic semantics. Classical theory has extensively parameterized network timing, communication topologies, and failure domains, but this participant model has remained comparatively fixed. The integration of autonomous reasoning engines, stochastic model-driven agents, and policy-driven actors into cloud control planes, incident response systems, and financial infrastructure challenges the universality of this assumption. These agents often produce divergent reasoning paths, distinct operational traces, and heterogeneous internal representations while achieving semantically equivalent and correct outcomes. In this paper, we introduce Post-Deterministic Distributed Systems (PDDS) as a research and engineering model for coordinating heterogeneous environments where deterministic code, stochastic models, and autonomous agents coexist. We show that classical distributed computing models form a zero-ambiguity special case of this participant-general model. We do not argue that deterministic systems disappear; rather, deterministic execution can no longer serve as the universal participant assumption for autonomous infrastructure. Finally, we outline five architectural pillars of post-deterministic infrastructure: Protocol-Driven Development, Verifiable Agentic Infrastructure, Autonomous State Control Planes, Semantic Quorum Assurance, and Epistemic State Replication. Epistemic State Replication extends persistence and consistency models from data visibility to knowledge visibility, enabling agentic memory, Verifiable Semantic Rollback, and coherence across reasoning participants. We also define a taxonomy of failure classes that arise in this setting.

light_analysis.overview: 提出后确定性分布式系统模型，协调确定性代码、随机模型和自主代理共存的异构环境，拓展传统分布式系统假设。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统分布式系统假设参与者执行确定性的协议行为，但现代自主推理引擎、随机模型驱动代理等产生分歧的推理路径但语义等价结果，挑战了这一假设。该问题重要因为自主基础设施需要可信协调，而现有基于确定性假设的模型不足以支撑此类异构环境。
light_analysis.method: 提出PDDS模型，将经典分布式计算模型作为零歧义特例。定义五个架构支柱：协议驱动开发、可验证的代理基础设施、自主状态控制平面、语义法定保证和认知状态复制。认知状态复制扩展持久性和一致性模型从数据可见性到知识可见性，实现代理记忆、可验证语义回滚及跨推理参与者的一致性。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，主要贡献为理论框架和故障分类定义。论文提出PDDS模型及五个架构支柱，并定义后确定性环境下的故障类分类。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文主要贡献是提出PDDS模型，为自主基础设施提供新基础，扩展传统分布式系统假设。学术价值在于理论创新，实际应用价值在于指导设计可信自主系统。未来工作可能涉及具体实现与验证。

title: A Note on Stability for Orthogonalized Matrix Momentum with Client Sampling
abstract: We study finite-sample generalization for a client-sampled distributed optimization scheme with matrix-valued parameters and orthogonalized momentum updates. The central quantity is the gap between the population and empirical objectives at the returned model when only a subset of clients participates in each round. Under independent heterogeneous client data, unequal local sample counts, and fixed aggregation weights, we derive a finite-round upper-tail guarantee from a coupled-neighbor stability recursion and a weighted concentration step. The bound keeps the client-selection counts through the amplification factor \(Y_i(\mathcal C)\); in the uniform full-participation full-batch regime, it yields \(\widetilde{\mathcal O}(n^{-1}+n^{-1/2})\) scaling whenever the horizon-dependent amplification terms are controlled. The matrix-orthogonalization rule is required to be Lipschitz along paired trajectories, a condition satisfied by regularized polar-type maps and normalized finite-step Newton--Schulz orthogonalizers. For the unregularized matrix sign, the same argument requires coupled spectral separation, whereas Gaussian smoothing gives a finite-round smoothed variant. A one-dimensional counterexample shows why a gap, smoothing, or regularity condition is necessary.

light_analysis.overview: 本文针对客户端采样场景下的矩阵参数正交化动量优化，推导了有限样本泛化界。
light_analysis.motivation: 分布式优化中客户端采样引入随机性，现有理论缺乏对矩阵参数和正交化动量更新的泛化分析。矩阵参数常见于联邦学习等应用，而正交化动量与客户端采样的交互稳定性未被研究，导致理论保证不足。
light_analysis.method: 采用耦合邻域稳定性递归和加权集中步骤推导有限轮次上尾界。考虑独立异质客户端数据、不等局部样本计数和固定聚合权重。要求正交化规则Lipschitz，如正则化极坐标映射或归一化牛顿-舒尔茨正交化；对未正则化矩阵符号需耦合谱分离或高斯平滑。
light_analysis.result: 推导出保留客户端选择计数的放大因子边界。在均匀全参与全批处理下，当放大项受控时，得到O(n^{-1}+n^{-1/2})缩放。一维反例表明间隙、平滑或正则化条件必要性。摘要未提供具体实验数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 建立了客户端采样分布式矩阵优化中正交化动量的稳定性理论，填补了理论空白。学术价值在于提供泛化界，实际价值可用于联邦学习。局限：正交化规则需Lipschitz，未正则化时需额外条件，未来可扩展至更一般设置。

title: Fair Finetuning Mitigates Distribution Inference Attacks
abstract: Machine learning models trained on sensitive data can inadvertently leak population-level information about their training distributions -- a threat known as distribution inference attack (DIA). An adversary with black-box access can infer sensitive demographic properties, such as subgroup proportions, without observing any training data directly. While defenses such as differential privacy and property unlearning have been proposed, the link between fairness constraints and distributional leakage remains unexplored. We propose Fair Fine-tuning (FFt): a trained model is fine-tuned on samples from the complementary distribution under an Equalized Odds (EO) constraint. We provide a complete theoretical characterization, proving the tight bound $\text{Adv}(\mathcal{A},M_f) \le Δ_{\text{EO}} \cdot W$, where $W$ quantifies how distinguishable the two training distributions are by their sensitive-attribute composition. We also establish a necessary condition for FFt to reduce adversarial advantage and prove tightness of the bound. We evaluate across six datasets spanning tabular (ACS Income, COMPAS, German Credit), image (UTKFaces), and NLP (Bias in Bios) modalities. Rehearsal-based FFt consistently reduces the adversarial accuracy gap below the detection threshold $τ!=!0.1$ across all settings; on ACS Income, the gap falls from $\sim!15%$ to under $4%$. Our work provides the first formal bound connecting a model's measured EO disparity directly to its adversarial advantage in the DIA game, opening a new avenue for unified fairness-and-privacy defenses.

light_analysis.overview: 提出公平微调（FFt）方法，首次从理论上证明公平性约束与分布推断攻击防御之间的正式界限。
light_analysis.motivation: 分布推断攻击（DIA）可泄露训练数据的群体级信息（如子群比例），现有防御如差分隐私和属性遗忘未能探索公平性约束与分布泄露的关联。研究旨在填补这一空白，通过公平性约束来缓解DIA威胁，同时保持模型效用。
light_analysis.method: 提出公平微调（FFt）：在等几率（EO）约束下，对互补分布样本进行微调。理论推导出对手优势上界Adv(𝒜,M_f) ≤ Δ_EO · W，其中Δ_EO衡量EO差异，W量化分布可区分性。在表格（ACS Income、COMPAS、German Credit）、图像（UTKFaces）和NLP（Bias in Bios）六种数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: 基于重演的FFt在所有设置中将对手准确率差距持续降至检测阈值τ=0.1以下；在ACS Income上，差距从约15%降至4%以下。实验验证了理论界限的紧致性，表明公平微调可有效缓解DIA。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次建立了模型EO差异与DIA对手优势之间的正式界限，为统一公平性与隐私防御开辟新方向。工作表明公平约束不仅提升模型公平性，还能隐性增强隐私保护。未来可探索更高效微调策略及适应其他公平定义。

title: Decentralized Instruction Tuning: Conflict-Aware Splitting and Weight Merging
abstract: Instruction tuning aligns large language models, including multimodal ones, with diverse user intents, but scaling to heterogeneous mixtures is hindered by gradient interference and bandwidth-heavy synchronization. We ask whether these two bottlenecks can be addressed jointly by training parts of the mixture independently and reconciling them once in parameter space. We develop a local quadratic theory inside a shared flat basin that yields three results: weight merging produces a curvature-weighted variance reduction; PCA-aligned conflict splitting maximizes this gain along high-curvature directions; and merging additionally acts as spectral filtering with implicit norm regularization. These results directly motivate MERIT, a decentralized merge-ready instruction-tuning pipeline that estimates dataset-level gradient conflicts, partitions the mixture along the top PCA conflict axes, fine-tunes each partition independently with no inter-partition communication, and merges once via token-weighted averaging. On Qwen2.5-VL-3B with 136 Vision-FLAN tasks, MERIT improves the 8-benchmark average from 54.3 (joint training) to 57.0. The same recipe scales to a 7B model on a 1.6M-example, 176-source mixture -- matching or exceeding centralized joint training with minimal cost overhead -- and transfers to text-only FLAN. Our code is available at https://github.com/naver-ai/merit.
comment: 32 pages, 5 figures. Accepted for publication at ICML 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出去中心化指令微调方法MERIT，通过冲突感知分裂和权重合并解决梯度干扰和通信瓶颈。
light_analysis.motivation: 指令微调在对齐大语言模型与多样用户意图时，扩展至异构混合任务面临梯度干扰和带宽密集型同步两大瓶颈。现有联合训练方法因梯度冲突导致性能下降，且通信开销大。因此需要一种去中心化方案，独立训练部分数据后通过参数合并调和，以降低通信成本并提升微调效果。
light_analysis.method: 基于共享平坦盆地的局部二次理论，推导出权重合并带来曲率加权方差减少、PCA对齐冲突分裂最大化高曲率方向增益、合并充当谱滤波三个结果。提出MERIT流水线：估计数据集梯度冲突，沿PCA冲突轴划分混合体，独立微调分区（无通信），最后通过令牌加权平均合并。在Qwen2.5-VL-3B上使用136个Vision-FLAN任务进行验证。
light_analysis.result: 在8个基准上，MERIT将平均得分从联合训练的54.3提升至57.0。扩展到7B模型，使用1.6M示例、176源混合体，以最小成本开销匹配或超过集中式联合训练，并成功迁移至纯文本FLAN。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文从理论上揭示了去中心化指令微调中权重合并的性质，并构建了高效的MERIT方法。学术上为参数空间合并提供了曲率分析基础，实际应用中解决了多源异构数据微调的扩展性问题。未来可探索更大规模模型与更复杂任务场景。

title: Improving Visual Token Reduction via Rectifying Distortions for Efficient Multimodal LLM Inference
abstract: Recent advancements in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable success in vision-language tasks, yet the quadratic computational complexity arising from the vast number of visual tokens incurs significant memory and latency bottlenecks. While visual token reduction (VTR) strategies have been explored to mitigate this burden, existing methods overlook the positional and attentional consistency between the full and reduced sequences, resulting in a distorted representation. To this end, we propose RESTORE, a novel VTR framework that rectifies the positional and attentional distortions while maintaining efficiency. Specifically, we present a simple yet effective calibration method that restores lost visual attention by augmenting attention weights based on relative distances. We also introduce a distinctive anchor selection for token merging to mitigate information loss during feature averaging. Experimental results on multiple benchmarks demonstrate that our method consistently improves the accuracy of various reduction methods, achieving state-of-the-art performance while maintaining computational efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RESTORE框架，通过修正位置和注意力失真来改进视觉令牌缩减，提升多模态大模型推理效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大模型中大量视觉令牌导致二次复杂度和内存瓶颈，现有令牌缩减方法忽略位置与注意力一致性，造成表示失真，需要一种能修正失真并保持效率的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出RESTORE框架，包含基于相对距离增强注意力权重的校准方法以恢复丢失的视觉注意力，以及独特的锚点选择策略进行令牌合并以减少特征平均信息损失。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准测试中，RESTORE一致提升多种缩减方法的准确率，达到最先进性能，同时保持计算效率。摘要未提供具体数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: RESTORE有效修正了视觉令牌缩减中的位置和注意力失真，提高了模型准确性，具有学术价值和实际应用前景，可推广至其他多模态模型。

title: Density-Aware Translation of Spurious Correlations in Zero-Shot VLMs
abstract: Vision-Language models (VLMs), such as CLIP, achieve powerful zero-shot classification. However, their predictions remain sensitive to spurious correlations, where contextual cues dominate over semantic content. Earlier solutions typically rely on fine-tuning or prompt engineering, which either undermine the advantages of pre-trained models or are prone to hallucination. In this work, we propose Density-Aware Translation (DAT) that refines image-text similarity scores using a local geometric density term derived from group reference sets. Our approach is motivated by the phenomenon that CLIP embeddings exhibit a modality gap and lie on an anisotropic shell in the feature space: common patterns cluster near the mean, while rare patterns are pushed outward. This geometry creates uneven alignment, where spurious correlations are amplified while semantically meaningful but rare cues are marginalised. To address this, we employ a relative measure to rescale similarities based on embedding density, suppressing overconfident scores in diffuse regions while preserving dense, semantically consistent matches. Experimental results on benchmark datasets demonstrate consistent improvements in worst-group and average accuracy, highlighting density-aware translation as a simple and effective calibration mechanism for reliable zero-shot classification using multimodal models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出密度感知翻译（DAT）方法，利用嵌入空间的几何密度校正虚假相关性，提升零样本分类可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型（如CLIP）在零样本分类中易受虚假相关性影响，即上下文线索主导语义内容。现有微调或提示工程方法削弱预训练优势或易产生幻觉。CLIP嵌入存在模态间隙且位于各向异性壳上，常见模式聚集在均值附近，稀有模式被推向边缘，导致对齐不均，放大虚假相关性，边缘化语义稀有但重要的线索。因此需要一种无需微调的校准方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出密度感知翻译（DAT），利用组参考集计算局部几何密度项，重新调整图像-文本相似度分数。基于CLIP嵌入的几何特性，采用相对度量根据嵌入密度重新缩放相似性：抑制扩散区域中的过度自信分数，同时保留密集、语义一致的匹配。无需额外训练或提示，仅通过密度感知的相似度校准来缓解虚假相关性。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验表明，与基线方法相比，DAT在最差组准确率和平均准确率上均取得一致提升。具体数值摘要未明确说明，但突出了密度感知翻译作为简单有效的校准机制，提升了零样本分类的可靠性。
light_analysis.conclusion: DAT通过利用CLIP嵌入空间的几何密度特性，有效抑制虚假相关性，提升零样本分类的鲁棒性和平均性能。该方法简单、无需微调，可作为一种通用的校准机制应用于多模态模型。未来可探索更复杂的密度估计或扩展到其他任务。

title: Two-Fidelity Best-Action Identification for Stochastic Minimax Tree
abstract: We study fixed-confidence best-action identification (BAI) in stochastic minimax trees. This problem is increasingly relevant in modern AI planning, where deep minimax search and Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) with language model long rollouts face a fundamental tradeoff: heuristic evaluations are cheap but biased, while accurate rollouts are reliable but prohibitively expensive. We propose 2FFS, a two-fidelity tree-search algorithm that brings multi-fidelity flat bandit ideas into trees. The algorithm combines minimax-style fast expansion with MCTS-style stochastic sampling, adaptively deciding when to exploit cheap biased evaluations and when to invoke expensive accurate evaluations for local certification. We prove fixed-confidence correctness, establish finite stopping for exact identification, and give a polynomial-depth cost upper bound for general-depth trees. Across numerical stochastic-tree experiments, 2FFS uses substantially fewer samples and computational operations comparing to existing BAI-MCTS baseline.

light_analysis.overview: 提出2FFS算法，将多保真度平坦赌臂思想引入树搜索，实现随机极小极大树中的双保真度最佳动作识别。
light_analysis.motivation: 在基于语言模型的深度极小极大搜索和蒙特卡洛树搜索中，启发式评估廉价但有偏，而精确展开可靠但成本高昂。现有方法无法有效权衡两者，导致样本或计算效率低下。2FFS旨在自适应地选择低成本有偏估计和高成本无偏估计，以平衡识别精度与效率。
light_analysis.method: 2FFS是一种双保真度树搜索算法，融合了极小极大式快速展开和MCTS式随机采样。它通过多保真度平坦赌臂思想动态决策：在节点处优先使用廉价启发式评估，当不确定性高时调用昂贵精确评估进行局部认证。算法证明了固定置信度下的正确性、有限停止性，并给出了通用深度树的多项式深度代价上界。
light_analysis.result: 在数值随机树实验中，2FFS相比现有BAI-MCTS基线，显著减少了所需样本量和计算操作次数。摘要未给出具体数值，但明确声称“substantially fewer samples and computational operations”，表明效率提升显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: 2FFS为随机极小极大树中的最佳动作识别提供了一种高效的双保真度方案，理论上保证了有限停止和多项式复杂度，实践上降低资源消耗。未来可扩展到更复杂的树结构或结合语言模型的长程展开。

title: SOCO: Benchmarking Semantic Object Correspondence in Vision Foundation Models
abstract: Measuring structured object understanding in vision foundation models remains challenging due to inconsistent evaluation protocols and limited part-level supervision. Semantic correspondence (SC) evaluates this capability by testing whether object parts can be matched across instances and categories under large variations in appearance, viewpoint, and geometry. To enable a systematic SC evaluation, we introduce SOCO, a new benchmark for Semantic Object Correspondence that introduces a taxonomy of correspondence types and provides consistent, functionally meaningful keypoint annotations across 100 categories and over 1M correspondence pairs. In addition, SOCO includes keypoint language descriptions, enabling the evaluation of large vision-language models (LVLMs) and their fine-grained part-level understanding. Comprehensive experiments reveal that (i) vision foundation backbones encode strong semantic structure but transfer correspondences poorly across related categories and only partially capture object-part position, (ii) LVLMs are stronger at text-prompted part localization than at visual-reference cross-image matching, exposing a gap between language-grounded localization and fine-grained visual correspondence, and (iii) correspondence performance predicts performance on dense downstream tasks, including segmentation, tracking, 3D pose estimation, and 3D detection, more strongly than ImageNet classification. Together, these findings position SOCO as a benchmark for structured, part-level representation quality in vision and multimodal foundation models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SOCO基准，用于评估视觉基础模型的语义对象对应能力，包含100类别和超过100万对应对，并集成关键点语言描述以评估大型视觉语言模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视觉基础模型评估缺乏系统性的部件级理解测试，语义对应评价协议不一致且监督不足。该研究旨在通过构建大规模、功能意义一致的基准，填补跨实例和类别对象部件匹配的评估空白。
light_analysis.method: SOCO基准构建了对应类型分类法，提供覆盖100类、超100万对的一致关键点标注，并引入语言描述以支持大型视觉语言模型评测。实验采用多种视觉基础模型和LVLMs进行跨图像匹配与文本定位测试。
light_analysis.result: 视觉基础骨干虽编码强语义结构，但跨类别对应迁移弱且部件位置捕获不完整；LVLMs在文本提示定位优于视觉参考匹配；对应性能在分割、跟踪等密集下游任务上的预测力强于ImageNet分类。
light_analysis.conclusion: SOCO确立了结构化部件级表示质量的评估标准，揭示了当前模型在跨类别对应和语言-视觉对齐上的不足，为提升视觉和多模态基础模型的可解释性与实用性提供了方向。

title: EGOSTREAM: A Diagnostic Benchmark for Streaming Episodic Memory in Egocentric Vision
abstract: Continuous episodic memory is a core capability for autonomous agents operating in dynamic, real-world environments, yet current streaming video benchmarks provide limited tools for diagnosing what models remember and for how long. We introduce Egostream, a diagnostic benchmark for streaming episodic memory evaluation in egocentric vision. \egostream organizes 2,250 curated questions along seven cognitive dimensions: detail, spatial, temporal, event, social, causal, and prospective memory. We introduce the Answer Validity Window (AVW), which specifies the temporal span an answer remains valid as the observed scene evolves. This allows us to expand the questions into 8,528 recall-conditioned evaluations, enabling controlled testing from instant to ultra-long-term recall while separating genuine model forgetting from natural world-state changes. We rigorously establish baseline performance through a unified streaming MLLM framework that compares several state-of-the-art memory-management mechanisms, covering sliding windows, attention sinks, KV-cache pruning, merging, and offloading. Experiments within a unified Qwen3-VL backbone reveal that comparable aggregate accuracies mask starkly different memory profiles. For instance, token pruning preserves fine-grained details and temporal structure significantly better than token merging, while quantized offloading rescues ultra-long-term recall. Ultimately, all mechanisms operate well below real-time (>1s per frame), and top performing methods ceil at about 45% accuracy, exposing critical gaps in current architectures. Egostream provides the diagnostic testbed needed to close these gaps. Project website, news and updates at: https://saroo25.github.io/Egostream/

light_analysis.overview: 提出Egostream基准，用于诊断第一人称视频流中的情节记忆，涵盖七个认知维度，并引入答案有效期窗口以区分遗忘与状态变化。
light_analysis.motivation: 连续情节记忆是自主代理在动态环境中的核心能力，但现有视频流基准缺乏细粒度诊断工具，无法准确评估模型记住了什么以及记忆时长。Egostream旨在填补这一空白，提供系统化的评估框架。
light_analysis.method: 构建2250个问题，覆盖细节、空间、时间、事件、社交、因果和前瞻记忆七类；引入答案有效期窗口，扩展为8528个召回条件评估。使用统一Qwen3-VL骨干模型，对比滑动窗口、注意力沉点、KV缓存剪枝、合并和卸载等记忆管理机制。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，标记剪枝在保留细节和时间结构上优于合并，量化卸载提升超长时记忆。所有机制均远低于实时（>1秒/帧），最佳准确率约45%，揭示当前架构在流式记忆上的显著差距。
light_analysis.conclusion: Egostream为诊断和改进流式记忆提供了关键测试平台，明确了现有方法的不足。学术上有助于理解记忆机制，实际应用可指导高效记忆管理策略的设计，但仍需突破速度和准确率瓶颈。

title: Scalable Inference-Time Annealing with Surrogate Likelihood Estimators
abstract: A long standing challenge in computational chemistry and biophysics is efficiently sampling the Boltzmann distribution of molecules. Advances in generative modeling have been proposed to address the limitations of conventional sampling techniques by eliminating the computational cost of simulation. A promising direction is iteratively finetuning diffusion models along a temperature ladder whereby training data is generated via importance sampling during inference-time annealing. Unfortunately, these methods require computing a divergence over the score field to estimate importance weights, rendering them intractable for larger systems. Here we present scalable inference-time annealing (SITA), which retrains flow-based models to generate samples at progressively lower temperatures using an energy-based model to facilitate fast surrogate likelihoods. We demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on both Alanine Dipeptide and Alanine Tripeptide while avoiding costly divergence terms. Our code is available at https://github.com/countrsignal/sita.git

light_analysis.overview: 提出可扩展推理时退火（SITA），利用替代似然估计器避免散度计算，高效采样分子玻尔兹曼分布。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统分子采样方法计算成本高，现有迭代微调扩散模型进行退火采样需要计算得分场的散度来估计重要性权重，这对于大分子系统不可行。因此需要一种可扩展的方法，避免昂贵的散度项，实现高效采样。
light_analysis.method: SITA方法重新训练基于流的生成模型，使用能量模型（EBM）提供快速替代似然估计，从而逐步生成较低温度下的样本。通过替代似然避免直接计算散度，实现可扩展的推理时退火，降低计算复杂度。
light_analysis.result: 在丙氨酸二肽和丙氨酸三肽系统上达到最先进性能，同时避免了昂贵的散度项。摘要未提供具体数值，但与现有方法相比更可扩展。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出SITA方法解决大规模分子系统退火采样的可扩展性问题，通过替代似然估计器避免散度计算，在小型肽系统上验证了有效性。未来可扩展到更大分子系统，具有实用价值。

title: Enhancing Computer Vision Model Generalization in Warehouse Facilities: A Case Study on Anomaly Detection in Vertical Material Handling Systems
abstract: Deploying computer vision models in Warehouse Facilities traditionally requires extensive resources for camera mounting, image collection, annotation, training, and deployment - a process often needing repetition in each new environment due to camera mounting constraints and environmental variability. This paper explores an innovative approach to streamline this process by conducting the standard procedure solely in a laboratory setting, focusing on vertical material handling systems and anomaly detection in forks of the systems. Through extensive experimentation, we have found that combining optimal camera placement, strategic image triggering, careful model selection and model ensemble enables effective generalization from laboratory conditions to diverse warehouse facilities environments, potentially transforming warehouse automation implementation by simplifying warehouse facilities deployment to just camera mounting, image collection, and model deployment, thereby saving significant resources and time typically spent on image annotation and model retraining. This is an experimental research study and not a production deployment.
comment: 6 pages, 10 figures. Accepted at IEEE International Conference on Mechatronics and Automation (ICMA) 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出在实验室环境中进行模型训练，通过优化摄像头放置、图像触发、模型选择和集成，实现仓库异常检测模型的有效泛化。
light_analysis.motivation: 在仓库设施中部署计算机视觉模型通常需要大量资源用于摄像头安装、图像采集、标注、训练和部署，且因环境差异需重复全过程。本文旨在简化部署流程，减少资源消耗和时间成本，特别是针对垂直物料搬运系统的叉车异常检测。
light_analysis.method: 在实验室环境中执行标准流程，通过组合最优摄像头放置、策略性图像触发、谨慎模型选择和模型集成，使模型能够从实验室泛化到不同仓库环境。实验聚焦于垂直物料搬运系统的异常检测。未明确提及具体模型架构或数据集。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，所提出的方法能够实现从实验室到多样仓库环境的有效泛化，简化部署为仅需摄像头安装、图像采集和模型部署，省去了图像标注和模型重训练。但摘要未提供具体性能指标或与基线的定量对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法有望变革仓库自动化实施，节省大量资源和时间。作为实验研究，未涉及生产部署。未来可能需验证在更多实际场景中的效果及限制。

title: Astra: a generalizable report generation foundation model for 3D computed tomography
abstract: CT interpretation requires radiologists to review hundreds of volumetric slices per examination, making reporting time-consuming and highly expertise-dependent. Automated CT report generation offers a promising route to improving clinical efficiency, yet the field still lacks a generalizable CT report generation foundation model that supports multi-region reporting and remains robust across external real-world cohorts. Intrinsic inconsistencies in reporting style and diagnostic terminology across cohorts make naive joint training prone to noisy textual supervision, thereby limiting model generalizability. Here we present Astra, a generalizable CT report generation foundation model trained on 90,678 thoracoabdominal CT-report pairs (CTRgDB) with 353,671 abnormalities spanning eight organ systems. By harmonizing report style and further refining diagnostic consistency via reinforcement learning, Astra achieves style-consistent and diagnostically accurate report generation across diverse anatomical regions and institutions. Evaluating on CTRgDB and six external cohorts, Astra achieves state-of-the-art performance with a 44.1% average improvement in fine-grained diagnostic metrics (P<0.001). In real-world clinical workflows, Astra assistance accelerates chest report drafting by 29.6% and improves abdominal report completeness by 11.3% (P<0.001). Furthermore, Astra also demonstrates broad utility as a foundation for CT AI development, improving downstream diagnostic performance and scaling vision-language pretrain through high-quality report synthesis. Overall, Astra serves as a broadly accessible clinical assistant and a pivotal infrastructure for the next generation of AI-powered healthcare.

light_analysis.overview: Astra是一个基于强化学习风格协调的CT报告生成基础模型，在8个器官系统上实现多区域泛化，诊断指标平均提升44.1%。
light_analysis.motivation: CT报告生成依赖放射科医生浏览数百张切片，耗时且依赖专家经验。现有自动报告生成方法缺乏支持多区域报告且跨外部真实世界队列稳健的通用基础模型。不同队列间报告风格和诊断术语的不一致性导致朴素联合训练易受噪声文本监督影响，限制了模型泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: Astra基于90,678个胸腹部CT-报告对（CTRgDB）训练，涵盖353,671个异常和8个器官系统。通过风格协调统一报告格式，并利用强化学习进一步细化诊断一致性，实现跨解剖区域和机构的风格一致、诊断准确的报告生成。
light_analysis.result: 在CTRgDB和六个外部队列上，Astra实现最先进性能，细粒度诊断指标平均提升44.1%（P<0.001）。在临床工作流中，辅助后胸部报告起草速度提升29.6%，腹部报告完整性提升11.3%（P<0.001）。
light_analysis.conclusion: Astra作为广泛可用的临床助手和下一代AI医疗基础设施，通过高质量报告合成提升下游诊断性能和视觉-语言预训练。未来有望进一步扩展至更多解剖区域和临床场景。

title: Beyond Additive Decompositions: Interpretability Through Separability
abstract: Interpretable machine learning requires models that are accurate and structurally faithful to the data. Existing explainability methods rely heavily on additive representations (e.g., Generalized Additive Models (GAMs), SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP), functional ANOVA), which can suffer from signal cancellation and off-support extrapolation in the presence of strong interactions. We propose Tensor Separation Learning (TSL), a regression model that learns a sum of rank-1 products of univariate per-feature functions via a stagewise greedy procedure with orthogonal refitting. By enforcing separability, TSL avoids the information loss inherent in additive projections caused by marginalizing higher-order interactions. The learned TSL model can be fully reconstructed from first-order partial dependence functions, up to constant factors. This stage-wise correspondence ensures that the resulting visualizations are faithful to the fitted components. We establish approximation-rate guarantees for functions with bounded mixed $p$-th order partial derivatives and demonstrate that TSL competes with black-box models on regression benchmarks.
comment: To appear in Proceedings of the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出张量分离学习（TSL），通过秩1乘积和避免加法分解的信息损失，实现可解释回归。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有可解释方法（如GAM、SHAP、功能ANOVA）依赖加法分解，在强交互作用下会出现信号抵消和支撑外推问题，导致信息丢失。需要一种既能保持模型准确性又能忠实于数据结构的可解释方法。
light_analysis.method: TSL学习由单变量函数的秩1乘积之和组成的回归模型，采用阶段式贪婪过程与正交重拟合。通过强制可分离性，避免加法投影中因边缘化高阶交互引起的损失。模型可完全由一阶部分依赖函数重建（仅差常数），确保可视化忠实于拟合组件。
light_analysis.result: 对具有有界混合p阶偏导数的函数，建立了逼近率保证。在回归基准测试中，TSL的预测性能与黑盒模型相当，同时保持可解释性。
light_analysis.conclusion: TSL提供了一种兼顾准确性与结构忠实性的可解释回归方法，避免了加法分解的局限性。其分解形式支持直接的可视化解释，适用于需要透明决策的场景。未来可扩展到分类任务或更复杂的交互结构。

title: Robust Dreamer: Deviation-Aware Latent Gaussian Memory for Action-Controlled AR Video Generation
abstract: Frame-wise action-controlled image-to-video generation is a promising paradigm for interactive world simulation, where each control signal should elicit an immediate visual response. However, maintaining visual fidelity and 3D consistency over long autoregressive rollouts remains challenging. Existing 3D-aware methods often suffer from catastrophic drift due to two impediments: information loss from \textit{Latent--RGB Cycling}, where generated latents are repeatedly decoded to RGB and re-encoded for future conditioning, and the training--inference gap induced by the \textit{error-free hypothesis}, where clean training memory fails to match prediction-corrupted inference memory. To address these challenges, we present \textbf{Robust Dreamer}, a memory-augmented framework built around how to design 3D memory and how to use it robustly. First, we introduce \textbf{Latent Gaussian Memory}, which anchors diffusion latents inherited from the generation process to Gaussian primitives and recalls them via latent-space Gaussian splatting. This provides dense, geometry-aware, view-aligned conditioning while avoiding accumulated degradation from repeated VAE conversion. Second, we propose \textbf{Deviation Learning with Dynamic Deviation Archive}, which synthesizes rollout-induced latent deviations through a one-step approximation, stores them by autoregressive stage and denoising timestamp, and injects them into historical memory during training. This exposes the generator to realistic corrupted memory states and teaches internal correction before inference. Experiments on ScanNet, DL3DV, and OmniWorldGame demonstrate state-of-the-art long-horizon performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Robust Dreamer框架，通过Latent Gaussian Memory和Deviation Learning实现长时动作控制视频生成，缓解3D漂移和记忆不匹配问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 动作控制的图像到视频生成在交互式世界模拟中至关重要，但现有3D感知方法在长时间自回归生成中会出现严重视觉漂移。主要障碍包括：Latent-RGB循环导致的信息损失，以及训练与推理之间的记忆不匹配（干净训练记忆与错误累积的推理记忆不一致）。这些问题破坏了视觉保真度和3D一致性，亟需新的记忆机制来稳健处理长时生成。
light_analysis.method: 提出Robust Dreamer框架，核心包含两个创新：1) Latent Gaussian Memory，将生成过程中的扩散潜在变量锚定到高斯原语，并通过潜在空间高斯泼溅召回，提供密集、几何感知、视图对齐的条件，避免VAE反复转换的累积退化；2) Deviance Learning with Dynamic Deviation Archive，通过一步近似合成自回归产生的潜在偏差，按自回归阶段和去噪时间戳存储，并在训练时注入历史记忆，使生成器暴露于真实损坏的记忆状态并在推理前学会内部修正。
light_analysis.result: 在ScanNet、DL3DV和OmniWorldGame三个数据集上的实验表明，Robust Dreamer在长时间视频生成任务上取得了最先进的性能。具体结果摘要未明确给出数值，但声称优于现有方法，有效保持了视觉一致性和3D结构。
light_analysis.conclusion: Robust Dreamer通过创新记忆设计解决了动作控制视频生成中的长期漂移问题，提升了仿真交互的鲁棒性。该工作对交互式世界模拟、机器人视觉等领域具有应用价值。未来可探索更高效的偏差模拟或扩展到其他生成任务。

title: Prior Availability in Industrial Visual Sim-to-Real: A Review of CAD-Guided and CAD-Unavailable Regimes
abstract: Industrial visual sim-to-real is often described as transferring from synthetic images to real images, but industrial deployment usually involves a broader mismatch between available evidence and required decisions. A system may be built from CAD renderings, simulated RGB-D observations, normal reference images, synthetic defects, pretrained feature spaces, or language prompts, yet deployed under different sensors, lighting, materials, fixtures, calibration, production variation, and rare defect modes. This review reframes industrial visual sim-to-real as a domain-gap problem organized by prior availability. We distinguish CAD-available settings, where explicit object geometry can support rendering, calibration, pose estimation, segmentation, and test-time geometric verification; CAD-unavailable settings, where geometry is replaced by normal-reference appearance, feature distributions, teacher-student residuals, synthetic anomaly assumptions, foundation features, or vision-language priors; and boundary-prior settings, where approximate models, templates, reference views, or semantic correspondences preserve only part of the CAD role. This framing connects CAD-based detection and 6D pose-estimation literature with industrial anomaly and surface-inspection literature that is usually reviewed separately. To make the taxonomy concrete, we use empirical anchors on T-LESS/BOP, MVTec AD, and VisA. The anchors show that CAD render count alone does not close transfer; source-distribution design, detector capacity, and small real calibration can matter more. They also show that CAD at test time creates a distinct verification channel through mask, pose, and depth consistency, whereas CAD-unavailable inspection relies on calibrated normality and feature deviation. The review therefore argues against a single cross-task leaderboard and instead asks what prior grounds the deployment decision.
comment: Review article; 103 references; 9 main figures; empirical anchors on T-LESS/BOP, MVTec AD, and VisA

light_analysis.overview: 按先验可用性重新组织工业视觉模拟到现实问题，区分CAD可用、不可用及边界先验三种设置，并基于实证锚点分析迁移效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 工业视觉模拟到现实面临从合成图像到真实图像的迁移，但实际部署中证据与决策不匹配，现有方法依赖不同先验而缺乏系统组织。该综述旨在通过先验可用性框架统一基于CAD、正常参考、特征分布等不同方法，解决文献孤立问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出三维分类：CAD-available（利用几何渲染、姿态估计）、CAD-unavailable（依赖正常外观、特征偏差等）、boundary-prior（部分保留CAD功能）。使用T-LESS/BOP、MVTec AD、VisA作为实证锚点，分析源分布设计、检测器容量及测试时几何一致性等影响因素。
light_analysis.result: 实证显示CAD渲染数非关键，源分布设计、检测器容量和小规模真实标定更重要。CAD测试时通过掩码、姿态、深度一致性提供独特验证通道；CAD不可用则依赖校准正常性和特征偏差。反驳单一跨任务排行榜，强调先验决定部署决策。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该综述以先验可用性统一工业视觉模拟到现实文献，提供分类框架指导实际部署。学术上整合了CAD姿态估计与异常检测领域，应用上帮助选择合适先验。未来可细化先验类型，但已覆盖主要工业场景。

title: WorldMemArena: Evaluating Multimodal Agent Memory Through Action-World Interaction
abstract: Multimodal large language models are increasingly deployed as long-horizon agents, where memory must do more than recall: it must track an evolving world, revise what has gone stale, and surface the right evidence at decision time. Existing benchmarks measure recall over static dialogue, collapse memory into a single end-of-task accuracy, and reduce visual observations to captions, leaving us unable to localize failures to writing, maintenance, retrieval, or use. The rise of agent harnesses that author their own memory sharpens this gap, since we have no principled way to compare hand-designed pipelines with self-managing alternatives. To close these gaps, we formulate multimodal agent memory as an Action-World Interaction Loop with an observable four-stage lifecycle, and instantiate it in WorldMemArena: 400 multi-session multimodal tasks spanning Lifelong Evolution (evolving personal and task states) and Agentic Execution (memory from real observations, actions, and feedback), annotated with gold memory points, updates, distractors, and evidence chains for stage-level diagnosis. This enables the first head-to-head comparison of long-context, manually designed (RAG and external memory systems), and harness-based memory agents. Results show that: (1) better memory writing and storage do not guarantee better performance; (2) multimodal memory still struggles to fully use visual evidence; (3) systems are unstable across domains and degrade on realistic agentic trajectories; and (4) harness memory is more flexible but remains costly and less reliable.

light_analysis.overview: 提出WorldMemArena基准，通过动作-世界交互循环评估多模态智能体记忆，实现阶段级诊断。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大模型作为长期智能体时，记忆需跟踪演化世界、修正过时信息并决策时提供证据。现有基准仅评测静态对话召回、单点准确率，且将视觉简化为文本，无法定位记忆失败阶段。智能体框架自主管理记忆加剧评测缺口，缺乏手工设计与自主记忆的对比方法。
light_analysis.method: 将多模态智能体记忆形式化为动作-世界交互循环，包含四个可观察阶段。构建WorldMemArena：400个多会话多模态任务，涵盖终身演化（个人/任务状态演化）和执行代理（从真实观察、动作、反馈中记忆），标注黄金记忆点、更新、干扰物和证据链，支持阶段级诊断。对比长上下文、手动设计（RAG/外部记忆）和框架记忆智能体。
light_analysis.result: （1）更好的记忆写入和存储不保证更好性能；（2）多模态记忆仍难以充分利用视觉证据；（3）系统跨领域不稳定，在真实代理轨迹上退化；（4）框架记忆更灵活但成本高且可靠性低。
light_analysis.conclusion: WorldMemArena首次实现多模态智能体记忆的细粒度阶段诊断，揭示记忆各环节的权衡。学术上为记忆评测提供结构化框架，实际中有助于设计更可靠的记忆系统。未来可扩展更多任务类型和记忆机制。

title: Robust Frequency-Calibrated Virtual EEG Channel Generation from Four Frontal Electrodes for Wearable EEG Augmentation
abstract: Low-channel wearable electroencephalography (EEG) is attractive for long-term monitoring, but four frontal electrodes provide only a sparse and spatially biased view of distributed scalp activity. We present FAVC-Net, a compact frequency-calibrated virtual-channel network that generates 13 unmeasured EEG channels from Fp1, Fp2, F7, and F8. The model combines shared multi-scale source encoding, source-state embeddings, target-conditioned signed source-block mixing, GATv2-based attention refinement, attention-consistent skip fusion, and weak Welch power spectral density calibration. Rather than treating sparse-to-dense EEG generation as a purely waveform-matching task, the framework jointly emphasizes amplitude fidelity, spectral allocation, channel-frequency texture, and robustness to corrupted wearable inputs. On the PRED+CT dataset, FAVC-Net achieved the best joint waveform-spectral operating point among neural and interpolation baselines. Its time-domain gains were modest, whereas log-spectral distance and PSD KL divergence were reduced by 30.09% and 37.98% relative to the strongest non-FAVC comparator. Under wearable-like source perturbations, the model preserved spectral fidelity and resisted spectral collapse. These results support virtual EEG channel generation as a dual-domain augmentation problem, while emphasizing that generated posterior and parietal channels should be interpreted as frequency-calibrated representations derived from sparse frontal measurements rather than as independent physical recordings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FAVC-Net，从四个额叶电极生成13个频率校准的虚拟EEG通道，实现稀疏到密集的双域增强。
light_analysis.motivation: 低通道可穿戴EEG长期监测具吸引力，但仅四个额叶电极提供稀疏且空间有偏的皮层活动视图，现有生成方法多聚焦波形匹配，忽略频谱校准和对输入扰动的鲁棒性，导致虚拟通道缺乏真实频谱特征。
light_analysis.method: FAVC-Net整合共享多尺度源编码、源状态嵌入、目标条件有符号源块混合、GATv2注意力细化、注意力一致跳过融合及弱Welch功率谱密度校准，联合优化幅度保真度、频谱分配和通道频率纹理，并增强对损坏可穿戴输入的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 在PRED+CT数据集上，FAVC-Net相比最强非FAVC基线，对数谱距离降低30.09%，PSD KL散度降低37.98%，时域增益适中；在可穿戴源扰动下保持频谱保真并抵抗频谱崩溃，实现最佳联合波形-频谱性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: FAVC-Net表明虚拟EEG通道生成应作为双域增强问题，生成的后部和顶叶通道是频率校准表示而非独立物理记录，为可穿戴EEG扩展提供了可行方案，未来可探索更稀疏设置或跨个体泛化。

title: Ensemble Score Filtering for Real-Data Energy Consumption Forecast Correction
abstract: Accurate estimation and forecasting of energy consumption are important for power-system operation, planning, and demand-side management. In practice, however, complete and timely measurements may not always be available, and the observed data can be partial, noisy, or delayed. This motivates the use of learned forecasting models for predicting the evolving consumption state, together with data assimilation methods for sequential forecast correction. In this work, we study a high-dimensional data assimilation problem for real energy-consumption data. \modeltext{The forward prediction is supplied by a pretrained black-box spatio-temporal forecasting model, which is treated as the state propagator in the filtering procedure.} We employ the Ensemble Score Filter (EnSF) to assimilate partial and noisy observations and to correct the forecast trajectory over time. The EnSF uses score-based diffusion models to approximate filtering distributions and avoids retraining neural-network score models during assimilation by using a closed-form score representation and Monte Carlo approximation. Numerical experiments demonstrate that open-loop propagation of the learned forecasting model can become unreliable over long horizons, while EnSF-based correction substantially improves state estimation. Comparisons with the Ensemble Kalman Filter (EnKF) further show that EnSF provides stronger correction under the nonlinear observation setting considered in this work.

light_analysis.overview: 提出使用集成评分滤波器（EnSF）修正实时能耗预测，通过基于分数的扩散模型处理部分噪声观测，显著提升状态估计精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 实际能耗数据常不完整、有噪声或延迟，导致预测模型不可靠，需要数据同化方法进行序贯修正。现有方法如EnKF在处理非线性高维数据时效果有限，因此研究适用于实时能耗数据的高维数据同化方法。
light_analysis.method: 采用预训练的黑盒时空预测模型作为状态传播器，使用EnSF同化部分噪声观测。EnSF利用基于分数的扩散模型近似滤波分布，通过闭式分数表示和蒙特卡洛逼近避免重训练，实现对非线性观测的有效修正。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，开环预测长期不可靠，而EnSF修正显著改善状态估计。与EnKF对比，EnSF在非线性观测设置下提供更强的修正效果，验证了其优越性。
light_analysis.conclusion: EnSF有效修正实时能耗预测，提升电力系统运行规划精度。学术上为高维数据同化提供新范式，实际中可支撑需求侧管理。未来可探索更复杂的时空模型及在线应用。

title: ForestHG-Trace: Traceable Long-Horizon Ecological Reasoning over Large-Scale Forest Scenes
abstract: Remote sensing question answering (RS-QA) often requires more than direct semantic prediction, especially in large-scale forest scenes where ecological analysis involves multi-step filtering, numerical aggregation, neighborhood reasoning, and verifiable evidence. We introduce ForestHG-Trace, a framework for traceable long-horizon ecological reasoning over forest environments. It represents multimodal NEON forest scenes as ecological hypergraphs, where tree instances, spatial units, semantic groups, and neighborhood relations support higher-order reasoning beyond pairwise scene graphs. An LLM-guided agent then invokes deterministic tools for reading, filtering, expansion, aggregation, comparison, and auditing, producing replayable execution traces and compact evidence records rather than only free-form answers. We further construct ForestTraceQA, an executable benchmark for evaluating ecological QA across diverse task types and reasoning depths. Experiments show that ForestHG-Trace substantially improves answer accuracy and execution faithfulness over single-step baselines and scene-graph agents, while highlighting execution depth as the main bottleneck for long-horizon ecological QA.
comment: It has theoretical flaws and experimental errors

light_analysis.overview: 提出ForestHG-Trace框架，通过生态超图和LLM引导的确定性工具实现大规模森林场景中可追踪的长程生态推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 遥感问答（RS-QA）在大规模森林场景中需进行多步过滤、数值聚合、邻域推理和可验证证据，而现有方法多依赖直接语义预测，缺乏可追溯性和高阶推理能力，难以处理复杂的生态分析任务。
light_analysis.method: 将NEON森林场景表示为生态超图，包含树实例、空间单元、语义组和邻域关系，支持超越成对场景图的高阶推理。LLM引导的代理调用读取、过滤、扩展、聚合、比较、审计等确定性工具，生成可重放的执行轨迹和紧凑的证据记录，而非仅自由形式答案。
light_analysis.result: 在构建的ForestTraceQA基准上，ForestHG-Trace在答案准确性和执行忠实度上显著优于单步基线和场景图代理。实验还指出执行深度是长程生态问答的主要瓶颈。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架提升了复杂生态推理的可追溯性和准确性，为遥感问答和生态分析提供了新范式。未来需进一步优化执行深度，以突破长程推理的性能瓶颈。

title: B-GRTO: Bootstrapped Group Relative Tool Optimization for Referring Segmentation
abstract: Segmentation is a fundamental task in computer vision, underpinning pixel-level scene understanding and serving as a cornerstone for applications ranging from autonomous perception to medical image analysis. For complex referring segmentation, recent methods pair large vision-language models with segmentation decoders: the former analyzes the image and prompt, while the latter predicts the target mask. Although reinforcement learning improves reasoning-intensive vision-language systems, trainable tools such as segmentation decoders are typically optimized separately with differentiable objectives, and the principled integration of such objectives into reinforcement learning remains underexplored. Thus, we introduce group relative tool optimization (GRTO), a mathematically grounded framework for jointly optimizing a policy with differentiable tool use. GRTO reuses group relative policy optimization (GRPO) rollouts to optimize the auxiliary tool objective, letting decoder gradients complement policy rewards. Further, we derive Bootstrapped-GRTO (B-GRTO), a pre-training method that cheaply bootstraps the tool, leading to faster convergence and superior performance. Across three challenging referring segmentation settings, B-GRTO results in substantial improvements over plain GRPO, matching or surpassing domain-specific state-of-the-art methods. This demonstrates the value of unifying reinforcement learning with differentiable auxiliary objectives for reasoning-intensive segmentation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出B-GRTO，一种将可微工具目标整合到强化学习中的统一框架，用于指代分割任务，显著提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 指代分割需要视觉语言模型理解图像和提示，再由分割解码器预测掩码。现有方法将解码器作为可微工具单独优化，但未将其与强化学习策略联合优化。强化学习虽能提升推理密集型系统，但如何将可微目标原则性地整合进强化学习仍未充分探索。本文旨在填补这一空白，通过联合优化策略和可微工具使用，提升复杂指代分割的性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出组相对工具优化（GRTO），一个数学框架，重用在组相对策略优化（GRPO）中生成的rollouts来优化辅助工具目标，使解码器梯度能够补充策略奖励。进一步推导出B-GRTO，一种预训练方法，通过廉价地bootstrap工具加速收敛。该方法在三个指代分割设置上验证，统一了强化学习与可微辅助目标。
light_analysis.result: 在三个挑战性的指代分割设置上，B-GRTO相对于纯GRPO有显著提升，匹配或超越了领域特定的最先进方法。摘要未提供具体数值，但表明该方法有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: B-GRTO展示了统一强化学习与可微辅助目标在推理密集型分割任务中的价值。它提供了一种数学上严谨的框架来联合优化策略和工具，实现了更快的收敛和更好的性能。未来可推广到其他需要结合强化学习和可微工具的场景。

title: The Attribution Contract: Feature Attribution for Generative Language Models
abstract: Feature attribution methods promise to identify which input features matter for a model output. In generative language models, however, it is often unclear what should count as a feature in the first place. In autoregressive language models, earlier generated tokens are both outputs of the model and inputs to later predictions. In diffusion language models, generation proceeds through iterative denoising or unmasking rather than fixed left-to-right prediction, so local explanation may target a state of diffusion rather than a next token. We argue that this ambiguity is not merely an implementation detail, but a conceptual limitation of carrying classifier-era feature attribution directly into generative language modeling. We introduce the Attribution Contract, a specification for feature-attribution claims that names what output is being explained, which features are eligible to receive attribution, what generative process is assumed, what is held fixed, and what model score is being attributed. The contract clarifies why the same attribution method can answer different questions depending on how it is instantiated. We argue that many disagreements about feature attribution in generative language models are not disagreements about attribution algorithms, but about unstated explanatory contracts. Using autoregressive and diffusion language models as case studies, we show when attribution to earlier generated tokens, intermediate states, or denoising stages is informative, when it is misleading, and why feature-attribution methods in generative language models should be evaluated as method-contract pairs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Attribution Contract，规范生成语言模型中特征归因的声明，解决概念歧义问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 在生成语言模型中，特征归因存在根本性歧义：自回归模型中早期生成token既是输出也是输入，扩散模型中生成过程涉及迭代去噪或去掩码，直接套用分类器时代的归因方法无法明确归因对象。这种歧义导致同一方法在不同设定下回答不同问题，而许多争论源于未声明的归因假设。因此需要统一规范来明确归因声明的各个要素。
light_analysis.method: 提出Attribution Contract规范，要求命名：被解释的输出、可归因的特征集、假定的生成过程、固定变量、被归因的模型分数。通过自回归语言模型（如GPT）和扩散语言模型（如扩散模型）作为案例，展示不同合同下归因含义的差异：例如对早期token、中间状态或去噪阶段的归因何时有效、何时误导。强调归因方法应作为方法-合同对所评估。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验指标，但论证了归因方法在不同合同下可能产生不同解释。通过案例说明，归因到早期token在自回归模型中可能有效但需注意因果混淆，归因到扩散中间状态仅在特定合同下有意义。结论指出，评估归因方法时应同时指定其所遵循的合同，否则比较无意义。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是提出Attribution Contract框架，澄清生成语言模型中特征归因的概念基础。学术意义在于揭示了当前归因方法评估中的概念混淆，实用价值在于为实际应用提供选择归因方法的指导。局限性在于规范本身不提供具体归因算法，且不同合同间的比较仍需后续工作。未来可扩展至更多生成架构。

title: MSAVBench: Towards Comprehensive and Reliable Evaluation of Multi-Shot Audio-Video Generation
abstract: Video generation is rapidly evolving from single-shot synthesis to complex multi-shot audio-video (MSAV) narratives to meet real-world demands. However, evaluating such frontier models remains a fundamental challenge. Existing benchmarks are limited in scope and data diversity, and rely on rigid evaluation pipelines, preventing systematic and reliable assessment of modern MSAV models. To bridge these gaps, we introduce MSAVBench, the first comprehensive benchmark and adaptive hybrid evaluation framework for multi-shot audio-video generation. Our benchmark spans four key dimensions, video, audio, shot, and reference, covering diverse task settings, varying shot counts of up to 15, and challenging non-realistic scenarios. Our evaluation framework improves robustness through an adaptive self-correction mechanism for shot segmentation, instance-wise rubrics for subjective metrics, and tool-grounded evidence extraction for complex judgments. Furthermore, MSAVBench achieves high alignment with human judgments, reaching a Spearman rank correlation of 91.5%. Our systematic evaluation of 19 state-of-the-art closed- and open-source models shows that current systems still struggle with director-level control and fine-grained audio-visual synchronization, while modular or agentic generation pipelines offer a promising path toward narrowing the gap between open- and closed-source models. The benchmark data and evaluation code are publicly available at https://github.com/ali-vilab/MSAVBench.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MSAVBench，首个面向多镜头音频-视频生成的综合基准与自适应混合评估框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频生成从单镜头向多镜头音频-视频叙事演进，但现有评估基准在规模和多样性上有限，且依赖固定评估流程，无法系统可靠地评估现代模型。迫切需要覆盖多维度、支持灵活评估的基准来推动该领域发展。
light_analysis.method: MSAVBench涵盖视频、音频、镜头、参考四个维度，支持最多15个镜头及非现实场景。评估框架包含自适应自我纠正机制的镜头分割、实例化评分标准的主观度量、以及工具依据证据提取的复杂判断，提升评估鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 与人类判断的Spearman秩相关系数达91.5%。对19个模型的评估显示，当前系统在导演级控制与细粒度音视频同步上表现不足，模块化或代理生成流水线有助于缩小开源与闭源模型差距。
light_analysis.conclusion: MSAVBench为多镜头音频-视频生成提供了标准化评估工具，揭示了现有模型的关键缺陷，并指出模块化/代理流水线是重要方向。基准数据与代码已公开，促进该领域研究。

title: Can Vision Models Truly Forget? Mirage: Representation-Level Certification of Visual Unlearning
abstract: Machine unlearning in Vertical Federated Learning (VFL) has attracted growing interest, yet existing methods certify forgetting solely using output-level metrics. We challenge these claims by introducing Mirage, a representation-level auditing framework comprising four complementary diagnostics: Linear Probe Recovery (LPR), Centered Kernel Alignment (CKA), Feature Separability Scoring, and Layer-Wise Recovery Analysis. Through experiments across seven datasets and seven baseline methods following recent VFL unlearning protocols, Mirage reveals three key findings: (i) Forgetting gap: methods that pass output-level certification still retain substantial class structure in their representations, with LPR exceeding the retrained baseline by up to 15.4 points; CKA shows these models remain structurally closer to the original than to the retrained reference, while separability scores indicate persistent geometric discrimination. (ii) Unlearning trilemma: no existing method simultaneously achieves high utility, output-level forgetting, and representation-level forgetting. (iii) Class-sample asymmetry: class-level forgetting leaves strong representational traces (LPR up to 97%), whereas sample-level forgetting is indistinguishable from chance (LPR approx. 50%); layer-wise analysis further shows residual class information persists across network depths. These findings call for representation-aware evaluation standards in federated unlearning research.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Mirage框架，从表示层认证视觉遗忘，揭示现有方法在表示级仍保留类别结构。
light_analysis.motivation: 垂直联邦学习中机器遗忘现有方法仅使用输出级指标认证遗忘，忽略了模型内部表示可能仍保留已删除数据的类别信息，导致隐私泄露风险。该问题对于数据合规和用户隐私保护至关重要，但缺乏有效的表示级评估标准。
light_analysis.method: 提出Mirage框架，包含四个互补诊断方法：线性探测恢复（LPR）、中心核对齐（CKA）、特征可分性评分和逐层恢复分析。在7个数据集和7种基线方法上，遵循近期VFL遗忘协议进行实验，评估表示级遗忘效果。
light_analysis.result: 发现三个关键结果：（i）遗忘鸿沟：通过输出级认证的方法在表示级仍保留类别结构，LPR比重训练基线高15.4点，CKA显示结构更接近原始模型；（ii）遗忘三重困境：现有方法无法同时实现高效用、输出级遗忘和表示级遗忘；（iii）类样本不对称：类级遗忘残留强表示痕迹（LPR达97%），而样本级遗忘不可区分（LPR约50%）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明输出级遗忘认证不可靠，表示级评估不可或缺。Mirage框架揭示了现有方法的局限性，呼吁联邦遗忘研究采用表示感知的评估标准，对提升隐私保护可靠性具有重要价值。未来可探索更好的表示级遗忘方法。

title: Task-Aligned Self-Supervised Learning for Medical Image Analysis: A Systematic Review and Practical Design Guidelines
abstract: Self-supervised learning (SSL) has emerged as a promising paradigm for addressing the annotation bottleneck in medical imaging by learning representations from unlabeled data. However, its effectiveness depends heavily on the design of the pretext task and its alignment with the downstream clinical-objectives. We present a systematic, task-oriented review of SSL in medical imaging, examining how different pretext-task formulations influence performance across classification, segmentation, detection, and other tasks. Following PRISMA guidelines, we analyze 75 studies published between 2017 and 2025 and organize them into four paradigms: contrastive, non-contrastive and predictive, generative and reconstruction-based, and hybrid learning. Rather than cataloguing methods by architecture, we map each paradigm to the downstream objectives it best supports. Our analysis shows there is no universally optimal SSL strategy; instead, performance is governed by the alignment between the pretext task, the imaging modality, and the target task. Contrastive methods learn global discriminative features and align well with classification, but may overlook subtle pathological patterns. Generative and spatial prediction-based approaches better preserve local anatomical structure, making them more suitable for segmentation and other dense prediction tasks, while hybrid methods offer the most balanced performance. We further show that modality-specific design is critical and that SSL provides its greatest benefit in low-label and few-shot regimes. Finally, we distill these findings into practical design guidelines and outline open challenges, including pathology-aware pretext task design, resource-efficient training for high-dimensional data, and standardized evaluation protocols. This work offers practical guidance for designing more effective and clinically relevant SSL frameworks in medical imaging.
comment: This manuscript is 31 pages with 4 tables and 3 figures

light_analysis.overview: 系统综述医学影像自监督学习，提出任务对齐的设计指南，揭示不同预文本范式与下游任务的最佳匹配关系。
light_analysis.motivation: 医学影像分析面临标注瓶颈，自监督学习（SSL）通过无标注数据学习表示，但其效果高度依赖预文本任务与下游临床目标的对齐。现有综述多按架构分类，缺乏任务导向分析。本文旨在系统梳理不同SSL范式对分类、分割等任务的影响，为设计临床相关SSL框架提供实用指导。
light_analysis.method: 遵循PRISMA指南，分析2017-2025年间75项研究，将SSL分为对比式、非对比/预测式、生成/重建式和混合式四类。采用任务导向分类，将每种范式映射到其最佳支持的下游任务（如对比方法适合分类，生成方法适合分割）。强调模态特定设计，并考察低标注和少样本场景。
light_analysis.result: 无通用最优SSL策略，性能由预文本任务、模态和目标任务的对齐决定。对比方法在分类上表现好但可能忽略细微病理；生成/预测方法保留局部结构，适合密集预测；混合方法最均衡。SSL在低标注和少样本场景下收益最大。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提供任务导向的SSL综述和设计指南，包括病理感知预文本任务、资源高效训练和标准化评估。强调模态特定设计的必要性，并指出开放挑战。对医学影像中设计更有效、临床相关的SSL框架具有指导意义。

title: Capturing LLM Capabilities via Evidence-Calibrated Query Clustering
abstract: Query clustering organizes queries into groups that reflect shared latent capability demands, enabling capability-aware LLM evaluation. Existing clustering methods, which primarily rely on semantic taxonomies or embeddings, often fail to capture such latent capability requirements due to a misalignment between surface-level semantics and actual model performance. We propose ECC, an algorithm that calibrates prior semantic embeddings using limited posterior model comparisons to bridge the gap between surface-level semantics and latent capability requirements. ECC characterizes each cluster through a capability profile parameterized by a Bradley-Terry model and uses trainable mixture weights to accommodate queries with mixed capability demands, jointly learning a flexible, capability-aware clustering structure that supports query-specific inference of LLM capabilities. Extensive quantitative and qualitative evaluations demonstrate that ECC significantly improves LLM capability ranking quality, outperforming human-labeled and embedding-based baselines by an average of 17.64 and 18.02 percentage points, respectively, and proves effective in downstream tasks such as query routing.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ECC算法，通过有限后验模型比较校准先验语义嵌入，实现能力感知的LLM查询聚类，显著提升能力排名质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有查询聚类方法依赖语义分类或嵌入，未能捕捉与模型实际性能对齐的潜在能力需求，导致表面语义与真实能力要求不匹配。该问题影响LLM评测的可信度和下游任务（如查询路由）的效果。ECC旨在弥合这一差距，利用少量模型比较信息校准聚类，获取更准确的能力表征。
light_analysis.method: ECC算法首先使用Bradley-Terry模型为每个聚类参数化能力轮廓，并通过可训练的混合权重处理混合能力需求的查询。它联合学习灵活的、能力感知的聚类结构，支持针对特定查询推断LLM能力。该方法利用有限的成对模型比较结果（后验信息）来校准预训练语义嵌入（先验），从而在少量监督下提升聚类质量。
light_analysis.result: 在定量和定性评估中，ECC显著提升了LLM能力排名的质量，相比人工标注和基于嵌入的基线方法，平均分别提升17.64和18.02个百分点。此外，在下游查询路由任务中也验证了其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ECC通过融合先验语义和后验模型比较，有效解决了语义与能力不对齐的问题，为能力感知的LLM评测提供新范式。其应用价值体现在提升自动化评测和查询路由的准确性。未来可探索更复杂的混合能力模型或扩展到多任务场景。

title: DynMuon: A Dynamic Spectral Shaping View of Muon
abstract: In recent years, Muon has emerged as the dominant method for training large language models, and transformers more broadly. The essential difference, when compared to standard gradient descent methods, is to replace the usual update matrix $M=UΣV^\top$ with its polar factor $UV^\top$. In this work, we consider a class of Muon-like updates, where we replace the update $M$ with $UΣ^p V^\top$ for some parameter $p$. We call this a "spectral-shaping" operation, and develop a theory of how to pick $p$ which depends on (a) local curvature of the loss function, (b) noise stemming from stochastic gradients and label noise, and (c) training stage. Our theory and experimentation reveal a previously overlooked behavior: positive $p$ helps early by emphasizing high-curvature directions and accelerating signal contraction, while mildly negative $p$ helps later by reallocating update strength toward low-curvature directions that still contain useful training signals. Building on the insight, we propose DynMuon, an efficient dynamic spectral shaping method that schedules $p$ from positive to mildly negative over training. Extensive experiments across model sizes, architectures, and training settings show that DynMuon consistently achieves lower validation loss than Muon, while requiring 10.6-26.5% fewer steps to reach the same target loss. Our code is available at https://github.com/fzwark/DynMuon.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DynMuon动态谱形变优化器，通过调度指数p从正到负，比Muon更高效地训练大语言模型。
light_analysis.motivation: Muon优化器在训练大型语言模型中表现优异，但其固定谱形变策略可能不适应训练动态。现有方法忽略了不同训练阶段对曲率和噪声的不同需求，导致收敛速度受限。本文旨在通过动态调整谱形变参数p，根据局部曲率、随机梯度和标签噪声以及训练阶段来优化更新方向，从而加速训练并提升泛化性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出DynMuon方法，将Muon的更新矩阵M替换为UΣ^p V^T，其中p是可调参数。理论分析表明，正p在早期通过强调高曲率方向加速信号收缩，负p在后期重新分配更新强度到低曲率方向以保留有用信号。基于此，DynMuon在训练过程中将p从正值动态调度至轻微负值，实现高效的谱形变。无需额外计算开销，仅需调整p值。
light_analysis.result: 在多种模型规模、架构和训练设置下，DynMuon相比Muon一致获得更低的验证损失，并节省10.6%至26.5%的训练步数以达到相同目标损失。实验未提供具体准确率数据，但步数减少明确证明了效率提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: DynMuon通过动态谱形变优化训练过程，显著提升了Muon优化器的收敛速度，且实现简单。该工作揭示了训练阶段对谱形变的不同需求，为优化器设计提供了新视角。未来可探索更精细的p调度策略或扩展到其他优化器。局限性包括对超参数p调度曲线的敏感性。

title: TRACE: Evidence Grounding-Guided Multi-Video Event Understanding and Claim Generation
abstract: Multi-video event understanding demands models that can locate and attribute query-relevant evidence scattered across long, heterogeneous video corpora. Existing large vision-language models (LVLMs) often underperform in this regime because they quickly exhaust their context budget and struggle to precisely localize evidentially important segments, frequently missing dense informational cues such as broadcast graphics, subtitles, and scoreboards. We introduce TRACE, an evidence grounding-guided framework that follows a ground-before-reasoning strategy for multi-video event reasoning. Our approach first builds a structured, text-searchable timeline for each video using OCR and object detection. A text-only LLM then conducts query-aware evidence localization, selecting relevant moments prior to any downstream visual reasoning. The retrieved frames and their grounding summaries are subsequently used to steer LVLM-based claim generation and cross-video citation consolidation. Experiments on MAGMaR 2026 and WikiVideo demonstrate that structured grounding markedly boosts factual completeness and attribution fidelity. On the MAGMaR validation split, TRACE raises macro-average MiRAGE F1 from 0.705 to 0.811 compared to an unguided Qwen3-VL-30B baseline, with especially strong improvements in citation recall from 0.440 to 0.628. The method also attains state-of-the-art results on the official MAGMaR 2026 leaderboard. Code is released at https://github.com/pengyu965/TRACE.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TRACE框架，通过先grounding后推理的策略，利用OCR和检测构建文本时间线，实现多视频事件理解与声明生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 多视频事件理解要求模型从长视频中定位分散的证据并归因，但现有大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）受限于上下文预算和精确定位能力，常错过广播图形、字幕等密集信息。现有方法在证据定位和引用保真度上不足，需更有效的结构化处理。
