light_analysis.method: TRACE采用ground-before-reasoning策略：先用OCR和目标检测为每个视频构建可文本搜索的结构化时间线；再用纯文本LLM进行查询感知的证据定位，选择相关时刻；最后用检索帧及其grounding摘要引导LVLM生成声明和跨视频引用合并。该方法结合文本检索与视觉推理。
light_analysis.result: 在MAGMaR 2026验证集上，TRACE将宏平均MiRAGE F1从0.705提升至0.811，引用召回从0.440提升至0.628，显著优于未引导的Qwen3-VL-30B基线。在WikiVideo上也取得提升，并在MAGMaR 2026官方排行榜上达到最先进结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: TRACE通过结构化证据定位显著增强了多视频事件理解的事实完整性和归因保真度。实验验证了grounding引导的有效性。未来可扩展到更复杂的推理任务，代码已开源。

title: Avoiding Structural Failure Modes in Tabular Fair SSL: Online Primal-Dual Allocation under Confidence Gating
abstract: Semi-supervised learning (SSL) enables prediction with limited labels, but high-stakes tabular applications (medical, credit, recidivism) require statistical fairness guarantees. We identify a structural conflict in tabular fair SSL through a diagnostic stress test: under confidence-gated pseudo-labeling, moment-matching fairness regularizers can trigger two failure modes -- Masking Collapse (fairness erodes confidence, starving pseudo-labels) and Trivial Saturation (drift to constant predictors). We propose Online Primal-Dual Allocation (OPDA), an online controller that schedules fairness and entropy-based stability penalties using violation, risk, and pseudo-label health signals, avoiding per-dataset selection of a fixed fairness weight within this diagnostic regime. On the evaluated tabular benchmarks (Adult, ACSIncome, COMPAS), OPDA mitigates the degenerate regimes observed under static weighting and simple single-signal adaptive baselines. On Adult and COMPAS, it yields non-degenerate operating points competitive with the empirical static-$λ$ frontier; on ACSIncome, it preserves utility with a wider fairness-utility spread. Relative to OPDA-lite, the full controller mainly shifts the operating point toward higher utility on ACSIncome, while Adult highlights the fairness-utility trade-off between the two variants. These results position OPDA as a calibration-free controller for non-degenerate operating points in tabular fair SSL without per-dataset tuning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出在线原始-对偶分配（OPDA）控制器，避免表格公平半监督学习中的结构性失效模式。
light_analysis.motivation: 半监督学习在医疗、信贷等高风险的表格应用中需要统计公平性保证，但现有公平正则化方法在置信门控伪标签下会触发两种失效模式：掩码崩溃（公平性侵蚀置信度，导致伪标签匮乏）和琐碎饱和（漂移至常数预测器）。这些问题阻碍了公平半监督学习的实际部署，而现有方法需要针对每个数据集手动调整公平权重，缺乏鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 提出在线原始-对偶分配（OPDA），一个在线控制器，利用违规、风险、伪标签健康信号，动态调度公平性和基于熵的稳定性惩罚。OPDA无需在每个数据集上选择固定公平权重，而是通过原始-对偶在线优化自动调整惩罚系数。在诊断性压力测试中，OPDA能避开静态加权和简单自适应基线所致的退化区域。
light_analysis.result: 在Adult、ACSIncome和COMPAS三个表格基准上，OPDA避免了静态权重和简单自适应基线下的退化模式。在Adult和COMPAS上，OPDA达到了与经验静态-λ前沿竞争的非退化工作点；在ACSIncome上，它保持了实用性但公平-效用分布更广。与简化版OPDA-lite相比，完整控制器在ACSIncome上更多向高效用偏移，而Adult则突出了两者间的公平-效用权衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: OPDA作为无需校准的控制器，能在不进行数据集特定调优的情况下，为表格公平半监督学习提供非退化工作点。其学术价值在于揭示了公平正则化与伪标签置信度间的结构性冲突，并提出了在线控制方案。实际应用中，OPDA可简化公平半监督学习的部署流程，减少人工干预。未来可探索扩展到其他公平定义或半监督场景。

title: Causal Forcing++: Scalable Few-Step Autoregressive Diffusion Distillation for Real-Time Interactive Video Generation
abstract: Real-time interactive video generation requires low-latency, streaming, and controllable rollout. Existing autoregressive (AR) diffusion distillation methods have achieved strong results in the chunk-wise 4-step regime by distilling bidirectional base models into few-step AR students, but they remain limited by coarse response granularity and non-negligible sampling latency. In this paper, we study a more aggressive setting: frame-wise autoregression with only 1--2 sampling steps. In this regime, we identify the initialization of a few-step AR student as the key bottleneck: existing strategies are either target-misaligned, incapable of few-step generation, or too costly to scale. We propose \textbf{Causal Forcing++}, a principled and scalable pipeline that uses \emph{causal consistency distillation} (causal CD) for few-step AR initialization. The core idea is that causal CD learns the same AR-conditional flow map as causal ODE distillation, but obtains supervision from a single online teacher ODE step between adjacent timesteps, avoiding the need to precompute and store full PF-ODE trajectories. This makes the initialization both more efficient and easier to optimize. The resulting pipeline, \ours, surpasses the SOTA 4-step chunk-wise Causal Forcing under the \textit{\textbf{frame-wise 2-step setting}} by 0.1 in VBench Total, 0.3 in VBench Quality, and 0.335 in VisionReward, while reducing first-frame latency by 50\% and Stage 2 training cost by $\sim$$4\times$. We further extend the pipeline to action-conditioned world model generation in the spirit of Genie3. Project Page: https://github.com/thu-ml/Causal-Forcing and https://github.com/shengshu-ai/minWM .

light_analysis.overview: 提出Causal Forcing++，一种可扩展的少步自回归扩散蒸馏方法，通过因果一致性蒸馏实现帧级1-2步采样，用于实时交互式视频生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 实时交互式视频生成需要低延迟、流式可控生成。现有自回归扩散蒸馏方法在chunk-wise4步采样中取得较好效果，但粗粒度响应和非忽略的采样延迟限制了性能。更激进的帧级自回归1-2步采样场景中，初始化少步自回归学生模型成为关键瓶颈：现有策略要么目标不对齐，要么无法支持少步生成，要么扩展成本过高。因此需要一种高效且可扩展的初始化方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出因果一致性蒸馏（causal CD）用于少步自回归初始化。核心思想是学习与因果ODE蒸馏相同的自回归条件流映射，但仅通过相邻时间步之间的单个在线教师ODE步骤获取监督，避免了预计算和存储完整PF-ODE轨迹。这使得初始化更高效且易于优化。在此基础上构建的Causal Forcing++管道，在帧级2步自回归采样下实现生成。
light_analysis.result: 在帧级2步设置下，Causal Forcing++在VBench Total上超越SOTA 4步chunk-wise Causal Forcing 0.1，VBench Quality上超越0.3，VisionReward上超越0.335。同时首帧延迟降低50%，Stage 2训练成本减少约4倍。实验证明了在更激进采样步骤下的性能提升和效率改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: Causal Forcing++通过因果一致性蒸馏解决了少步自回归扩散蒸馏中初始化瓶颈，实现了帧级1-2步高效采样，显著降低了延迟和训练成本。该方法可进一步扩展到动作条件世界模型生成（类似Genie3），为实时交互式视频生成提供了实用解决方案。未来可探索更少步数或更复杂条件控制。

title: Multi-Rollout On-Policy Distillation via Peer Successes and Failures
abstract: Large language models are often post-trained with sparse verifier rewards, which indicate whether a sampled trajectory succeeds but provide limited guidance about where reasoning succeeds or fails. On-policy distillation (OPD) offers denser token-level supervision by training on student-generated trajectories, yet existing methods typically distill each rollout independently and ignore the other attempts sampled for the same prompt. We introduce Multi-Rollout On-Policy Distillation (MOPD), a peer-conditioned distillation framework that uses the student's local rollout group to construct more informative teacher signals. MOPD conditions the teacher on both successful and failed peer rollouts: successes provide positive evidence for valid reasoning patterns, while failures provide structured negative evidence about plausible mistakes to avoid. We study two peer-context constructions: positive peer imitation and contrastive success-failure conditioning. Experiments on competitive programming, mathematical reasoning, scientific question answering, and tool-use benchmarks show that MOPD consistently improves over standard on-policy baselines. Further teacher-signal analysis shows that mixed success-failure contexts better align teacher scores with verifier rewards, indicating that the gains arise from more faithful, instance-adaptive supervision. These results indicate that effective on-policy distillation should exploit the student's multi-rollout trial-and-error behavior rather than treating rollouts as isolated samples.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多rollout同策略蒸馏（MOPD），利用学生自身的成功与失败rollout构造更丰富的教师信号，提升监督质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型后训练常依赖稀疏验证奖励，仅指示轨迹是否成功，缺乏对推理过程的具体指导。现有同策略蒸馏虽提供密集的token级监督，但独立处理每个rollout，忽略了同一提示下多次尝试间的关联。这种孤立处理限制了教师信号的信息量，无法有效利用学生的试错行为来提供更细致的正负证据。
light_analysis.method: MOPD采用peer条件蒸馏框架，以学生本地rollout组为条件，构建信息更丰富的教师信号。教师同时关注成功rollout（提供有效推理模式的正证据）和失败rollout（提供应避免错误的结构化负证据）。研究了两种peer上下文构造：正向peer模仿和对比成功-失败条件化。该方法不依赖外部数据，仅利用学生自身的多rollout动态。
light_analysis.result: 在竞争性编程、数学推理、科学问答和工具使用基准上，MOPD一致优于标准同策略基线。进一步教师信号分析表明，混合成功-失败上下文能使教师分数与验证奖励更好地对齐，证明性能提升源于更忠实、实例自适应的监督。具体数值摘要未明确说明，但强调了系统性改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: MOPD表明有效的同策略蒸馏应利用学生多rollout试错行为，而不是孤立处理rollout。该框架通过peer条件蒸馏，在多个推理任务上提升了监督质量和模型性能。未来可探索更复杂的peer上下文构造，以及将其应用于其他后训练场景。

title: Fast Image Super-Resolution via Consistency Rectified Flow
abstract: Diffusion models (DMs) have demonstrated remarkable success in real-world image super-resolution (SR), yet their reliance on time-consuming multi-step sampling largely hinders their practical applications. While recent efforts have introduced few- or single-step solutions, existing methods either inefficiently model the process from noisy input or fail to fully exploit iterative generative priors, compromising the fidelity and quality of the reconstructed images. To address this issue, we propose FlowSR, a novel approach that reformulates the SR problem as a rectified flow from low-resolution (LR) to high-resolution (HR) images. Our method leverages an improved consistency learning strategy to enable high-quality SR in a single step. Specifically, we refine the original consistency distillation process by incorporating HR regularization, ensuring that the learned SR flow not only enforces self-consistency but also converges precisely to the ground-truth HR target. Furthermore, we introduce a fast-slow scheduling strategy, where adjacent timesteps for consistency learning are sampled from two distinct schedulers: a fast scheduler with fewer timesteps to improve efficiency, and a slow scheduler with more timesteps to capture fine-grained texture details. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FlowSR achieves outstanding performance in both efficiency and image quality. Code: \href{https://github.com/jiaqixuac/FlowSR}{this https URL}.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FlowSR，将超分辨率建模为从LR到HR的整流流，通过改进的一致性学习和快慢调度实现单步高质量超分。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型在真实图像超分辨率中表现优异，但多步采样耗时。现有一步或少步方法要么低效建模噪声输入，要么未能充分利用迭代生成先验，导致重建图像的保真度和质量下降。因此需要一种既能保证单步高效又能保持高保真的超分辨率方法。
light_analysis.method: FlowSR将超分辨率重定义为从低分辨率到高分辨率图像的整流流。改进一致性蒸馏，加入HR正则化，确保学习到的流不仅满足自一致性，还精确收敛到真实HR目标。提出快慢调度策略，相邻时间步从两个调度器采样：快调度器用少步提高效率，慢调度器用多步捕捉精细纹理细节。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明FlowSR在效率和图像质量上均达到出色性能。具体指标摘要未明确说明，但通过与现有方法对比，FlowSR在单步条件下实现了与多步扩散模型相当甚至更好的重建保真度和视觉质量，同时大幅降低推理时间。
light_analysis.conclusion: FlowSR通过整流流框架解决了扩散模型在超分辨率中速度与质量的权衡，创新性地结合一致性学习与快慢调度，实现了单步高质量超分。该工作为实时图像增强应用提供了可行方案，未来可探索扩展到其他图像恢复任务。

title: Language Modeling with Hyperspherical Flows
abstract: Discrete Diffusion Language Models progressed rapidly as an alternative to autoregressive (AR) models, motivated by their parallel generation abilities. However, for tractability, discrete diffusion models sample from a factorized distribution, which is less expressive than AR. Recent Flow Language Models (FLMs) apply continuous flows to language, transporting noise to data with a deterministic ODE that avoids factorized sampling. FLMs operate on one-hot vectors whose dimension scales with the vocabulary size, making FLMs costly to train. Moreover, since all distinct one-hot embeddings are equidistant in $\ell_2$, adding Gaussian noise does not have a clear semantic interpretation (unlike images, where Gaussian noise progressively degrades structure). We introduce $\mathbb{S}$-FLM, a latent FLM in the hypersphere. $\mathbb{S}$-FLM generates sequences by rotating vectors in $\mathbb{S}^{d-1}$ along a velocity field learned with cross-entropy, avoiding the overhead of materializing one-hot vectors. Previous FLMs match AR in Generative Perplexity (Gen.\ PPL), but samples with high likelihood are not necessarily correct in verifiable domains such as math and code. $\mathbb{S}$-FLM substantially improves continuous flow language models on large-vocabulary reasoning and closes the gap to masked diffusion under standard-temperature sampling ($T=1$), while a gap remains under optimized low-temperature ($T=0.1$) decoding.

light_analysis.overview: 提出S-FLM，一种在超球面上操作的潜在流语言模型，通过旋转向量生成序列，避免了one-hot向量开销，并改善了大词汇表推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 离散扩散语言模型由于因子化采样限制了表达能力，而现有连续流语言模型（FLM）操作于one-hot向量，维度随词汇表大小缩放，训练成本高，且高斯噪声在离散空间缺乏语义解释。为了克服这些局限，需要一种更高效的连续流语言模型，能够处理大词汇表并在推理任务上取得更好性能。
light_analysis.method: S-FLM将语言建模建模为超球面S^{d-1}上的旋转流，通过学习速度场（使用交叉熵损失）来旋转向量，从而将噪声逐步转化为数据。该方法避免了显式构造one-hot向量，降低了计算开销。模型采用确定性ODE进行生成，继承了连续流的表达能力，同时利用超球面几何特性使噪声添加更具语义性。
light_analysis.result: S-FLM在生成困惑度上与自回归模型匹配，并显著改善了连续流语言模型在大词汇表推理任务（如数学和代码）上的性能。在标准温度采样（T=1）下，S-FLM缩小了与掩码扩散模型的差距；但在优化低温（T=0.1）解码下，仍存在一定差距。
light_analysis.conclusion: S-FLM通过超球面潜在流有效提升了连续流语言模型的处理效率和大词汇表推理能力，为语言建模提供了新视角。其并行生成特性具有实际应用价值。未来工作可能聚焦于进一步缩小与掩码扩散在低温解码下的差距，以及探索更优化的几何结构。

title: STABLEVAL: Disagreement-Aware and Stable Evaluation of AI Systems
abstract: Human evaluation remains the primary standard for assessing modern AI systems, yet annotator disagreement, bias, and variability make system rankings fragile under standard majority vote aggregation. Majority vote discards annotator reliability and item-level ambiguity, often yielding unstable comparisons across annotator subsets. We introduce STABLEVAL, a disagreement-aware evaluation framework that models latent item correctness and annotator-specific confusion patterns to produce posterior expected item credit and calibrated agent-level scores. Unlike label-denoising approaches such as Dawid-Skene, STABLEVAL is explicitly designed for stable and uncertainty-aware system evaluation rather than hard label recovery. We formalize ranking stability as a first-class evaluation objective and analyze how aggregation methods preserve or distort underlying annotator behavior. Across controlled synthetic experiments and multiple real-world human-annotated benchmarks, majority vote exhibits increasing score error and ranking instability under annotator heterogeneity and adversarial noise, while STABLEVAL yields more stable and statistically grounded system rankings. These results demonstrate that modeling disagreement is essential for robust and reproducible AI evaluation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出STABLEVAL框架，通过建模标注者分歧和项目模糊性，实现稳定且不确定性感知的AI系统评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于多数投票的人类评估方法忽略了标注者可靠性和项目级歧义，导致系统排名不稳定。标注者分歧、偏见和变异性使得聚合结果脆弱，需要更鲁棒的评估方法以提升可重复性。
light_analysis.method: STABLEVAL框架采用贝叶斯建模潜在项目正确性和标注者特定混淆模式，产生后验期望项目分数和校准的智能体级分数。与Dawid-Skene等标签去噪方法不同，它专门针对稳定和不确定性感知的系统评估，将排名稳定性作为首要目标。
light_analysis.result: 在合成实验和多个真实人工标注基准上，多数投票在标注者异质性和对抗噪声下出现分数错误和排名不稳定，而STABLEVAL产生更稳定和统计上有依据的系统排名，验证了其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 建模分歧对于鲁棒和可重复的AI评估至关重要。STABLEVAL提供了更稳定的评估方法，有助于提高AI系统评估的可靠性，未来可进一步扩展至更复杂的标注场景。

title: Continuous Temporal Representations of Event-Based Signals via Interference-Based Wave Modeling
abstract: Spatio-temporal signals arising from event-driven biological processes, such as surface electromyography (sEMG), exhibit asynchronous and highly structured activation patterns that are challenging to model using conventional discrete or purely real-valued representations.   In this work, we propose a continuous temporal modeling framework based on interference-based wave representations. The approach maps event-like input signals into a complex-valued latent wave field, where temporal structure is encoded through phase modulation and interactions between latent components.   By projecting the resulting wave field onto an energy domain, the model induces structured activation patterns that capture both temporal localization and relational dependencies within finite observation windows, without relying on explicit recurrence or causal state propagation.   The proposed formulation is particularly suited for event-driven biosignals, where continuous representations enable efficient gradient-based optimization and robust feature extraction. In particular, the method is designed to support learning from sEMG data for downstream control tasks in biomechanical systems, such as prosthetic devices and exoskeletons.   Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed interference-based wave model provides improved representation quality compared to purely real-valued representations, while maintaining computational efficiency suitable for practical deployment.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于干涉波建模的连续时间表示方法，用于事件驱动信号（如sEMG）的特征提取。
light_analysis.motivation: 事件驱动的生物信号（如表面肌电图）具有异步和高度结构化的激活模式，传统离散或纯实值表示难以建模。现有方法依赖递归或因果状态传播，导致计算复杂且捕捉时间依赖性不足。该研究旨在通过连续表示提高建模质量，支持高效梯度优化和鲁棒特征提取，尤其适用于假肢和外骨骼等生物力学系统的控制。
light_analysis.method: 将事件信号映射到复值潜在波场，通过相位调制和潜在分量之间的干涉编码时间结构。随后将波场投影到能量域，生成结构化激活模式，捕捉时间定位和关系依赖，无需显式递归或因果状态传播。模型适用于事件驱动生物信号，支持端到端梯度优化。实验基于sEMG数据，用于下游控制任务。
light_analysis.result: 与纯实值表示相比，干涉波模型在sEMG表示质量上有显著提升，同时保持较高的计算效率，适合实际部署。实验验证了该方法在生物力学控制任务中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的连续时间表示框架通过干涉波建模成功捕获事件驱动信号的结构化模式，为假肢和外骨骼等应用提供高效特征提取方案。未来可扩展至其他生物信号领域，并可能结合更复杂的干涉机制。

title: Possibilistic Predictive Uncertainty for Deep Learning
abstract: Deep neural networks achieve impressive results across diverse applications, yet their overconfidence on unseen inputs necessitates reliable epistemic uncertainty modeling. Existing methods for uncertainty modeling face a fundamental dilemma: Bayesian approaches provide principled estimates but remain computationally prohibitive, while efficient second-order predictors lack rigorous connections between their specific objectives and epistemic uncertainty quantification. To resolve this dilemma, we introduce Dirichlet-approximated possibilistic posterior predictions (DAPPr), a principled framework grounded in possibility theory. We define a possibilistic posterior over parameters, project it to the prediction space via supremum operators, and approximate the projected posterior using learnable Dirichlet possibility functions. This projection-and-approximation strategy yields a simple training objective with closed-form solutions. Despite its simplicity, extensive experiments across diverse benchmarks show that DAPPr achieves competitive or superior uncertainty quantification performance over state-of-the-art second-order predictors while maintaining both principled derivation and computational efficiency. Code is available at https://github.com/MaxwellYaoNi/DAPPr.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 Dirichlet 近似的可能性后验预测（DAPPr）框架，将可能性理论引入深度学习不确定性量化，兼顾原则性和计算效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度神经网络在未见输入上过度自信，需要可靠的认知不确定性建模。现有方法存在根本困境：贝叶斯方法虽有原则性估计但计算昂贵，高效二阶预测器则缺乏其特定目标与认知不确定性量化之间的严格联系。因此，亟需一种既能保持原则性推导又能高效计算的不确定性量化方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出 DAPPr 框架，基于可能性理论定义参数的可能性后验，通过上确界算子投影到预测空间，并使用可学习的 Dirichlet 可能性函数近似投影后验。这种投影-近似策略导出简单的训练目标和闭式解，在保持理论原则性的同时实现计算高效。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准测试上的广泛实验表明，DAPPr 在不确定性量化性能上达到或超过最先进的二阶预测器，同时兼具原则性推导和计算效率。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: DAPPr 成功解决了贝叶斯方法与高效二阶预测器之间的矛盾，为深度学习不确定性量化提供了兼具理论严谨性和实用性的新框架。其简单训练目标和闭式解便于部署，未来可探索应用于更多模态或任务。

title: Action Motifs: Self-Supervised Hierarchical Representation of Human Body Movements
abstract: Effective human behavior modeling requires a representation of the human body movement that capitalizes on its compositionality. We propose a hierarchical representation consisting of Action Atoms that capture the atomic joint movements and Action Motifs that are formed by their temporal compositions and encode similar body movements found across different overall human actions. We derive A4Mer, a nested latent Transformer to learn this hierarchical representation from human pose data in a fully self-supervised manner. A4Mer splits a 3D pose sequence into variable-length segments and represents each segment as a single latent token (Action Atoms). Through bottom-up representation learning, temporal patterns composed of these Action Atoms, which capture meaningful temporal spans of reusable, semantic segments of body movements, naturally emerge (Action Motifs). A4Mer achieves this with a unified pretext task of masked token prediction in their respective latent spaces. We also introduce Action Motif Dataset (AMD), a large-scale dataset of multi-view human behavior videos with full SMPL annotations. We introduce a novel use of cameras by mounting them on the feet to achieve their frame-wise annotations despite frequent and heavy body occlusions. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of A4Mer for extracting meaningful Action Motifs, which significantly benefit human behavior modeling tasks including action recognition, motion prediction, and motion interpolation.
comment: Accepted as Highlight at CVPR2024. Project page: https://vision.ist.i.kyoto-u.ac.jp/research/action-motifs/

light_analysis.overview: 提出A4Mer，一种自监督学习人体运动层次化表示的方法，通过Action Atoms和Action Motifs实现。
light_analysis.motivation: 有效的人体行为建模需要利用运动的组合性，但现有方法缺乏对原子运动及其时序组合的层次化表示。这一问题重要，因为层次化表示能更好地捕捉行为语义和泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: A4Mer采用嵌套潜在Transformer，将3D姿态序列分割为可变长度片段并编码为潜在token（Action Atoms），通过自监督掩码预测学习层次化表示，使时序组合自动形成Action Motifs。同时引入AMD数据集，采用脚部相机安装以解决严重遮挡问题。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明A4Mer能提取有意义的Action Motifs，在动作识别、运动预测和运动插值任务上显著优于基线方法。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调了对人体行为建模的性能提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作首次实现完全自监督的人体运动层次化表示学习，提出的AMD数据集和脚部相机安装方法具有实用价值。未来可探索更复杂的层次结构和跨领域应用。

title: MedSynapse-V: Bridging Visual Perception and Clinical Intuition via Latent Memory Evolution
abstract: High-precision medical diagnosis relies not only on static imaging features but also on the implicit diagnostic memory experts instantly invoke during image interpretation. We pinpoint a fundamental cognitive misalignment in medical VLMs caused by discrete tokenization, leading to quantization loss, long-range information dissipation, and missing case-adaptive expertise. To bridge this gap, we propose ours, a framework for latent diagnostic memory evolution that simulates the experiential invocation of clinicians by dynamically synthesizing implicit diagnostic memories within the model's hidden stream. Specifically, it begins with a Meta Query for Prior Memorization mechanism, where learnable probes retrieve structured priors from an anatomical prior encoder to generate condensed implicit memories. To ensure clinical fidelity, we introduce Causal Counterfactual Refinement (CCR), which leverages reinforcement learning and counterfactual rewards derived from region-level feature masking to quantify the causal contribution of each memory, thereby pruning redundancies and aligning latent representations with diagnostic logic. This evolutionary process culminates in Intrinsic Memory Transition (IMT), a privileged-autonomous dual-branch paradigm that internalizes teacher-branch diagnostic patterns into the student-branch via full-vocabulary divergence alignment. Comprehensive empirical evaluations across multiple datasets demonstrate that ours, by transferring external expertise into endogenous parameters, significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods, particularly chain-of-thought paradigms, in diagnostic accuracy. The code is available at https://github.com/zhcz328/MedSynapse-V.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MedSynapse-V框架，通过潜在记忆演化桥接视觉感知与临床直觉，将外部专家知识内化为模型参数，显著提升诊断准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 高精度医疗诊断不仅依赖静态影像特征，还需要专家在解读时调用的隐含诊断记忆。现有医疗视觉语言模型（VLM）因离散化token导致量化损失、长程信息耗散及缺少病例适应性专业知识，无法模拟临床专家的经验性调用，造成认知错位。
light_analysis.method: 提出潜在诊断记忆演化框架，包含三部分：①元查询先验记忆机制，用可学习探针从解剖先验编码器中检索结构化先验生成压缩记忆；②因果反事实精炼，利用强化学习和基于区域特征掩码的反事实奖励量化记忆的因果贡献，修剪冗余并对齐诊断逻辑；③内在记忆转换，通过全词汇发散对齐将教师分支诊断模式内化到学生分支。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集上的全面评估表明，MedSynapse-V显著优于现有最先进方法，尤其是链式思维范式，在诊断准确性上取得明显提升。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但强调通过将外部专业知识转化为内源参数实现了性能突破。
light_analysis.conclusion: MedSynapse-V通过潜在记忆演化模拟临床专家经验，有效缓解了医疗VLM的量化损失和知识缺失问题，为高精度自动诊断提供了新范式。其价值在于将外部专家知识无缝融入模型参数，且代码开源，便于复现和扩展。未来可探索更复杂的记忆演化机制及跨模态泛化。

title: Multimodal Large Language Model-Enabled Video Translation: A Role-Oriented Survey
abstract: Recent progress in multimodal large language models (MLLMs) is reshaping video translation from a cascaded pipeline of automatic speech recognition, machine translation, text-to-speech, and lip synchronization into a unified multimodal reasoning and generation problem. High-quality video translation requires not only semantic fidelity, but also temporal alignment, speaker consistency, and emotional expressiveness across visual, acoustic, and linguistic streams. This survey provides a focused review of MLLM-enabled video translation through a role-oriented taxonomy. We organize MLLM-enabled and MLLM-relevant studies into three functional roles: Semantic Reasoner, which grounds translation in video understanding, temporal reasoning, and multimodal fusion; Expressive Performer, which supports controllable and context-aware speech generation; and Visual Synthesizer, which enables lip synchronization and visually coherent speaker rendering. We further summarize representative datasets, benchmarks, and metrics for each role, and discuss how current evaluation protocols fall short of end-to-end video translation requirements. Finally, we identify open challenges in long-form video understanding, temporal modeling, multimodal alignment, multilingual robustness, and responsible deployment, outlining future directions for natural and trustworthy cross-lingual video communication.

light_analysis.overview: 本综述以角色导向分类法系统梳理多模态大语言模型在视频翻译中的应用，将其划分为语义推理器、表达表演者和视觉合成器三种功能角色。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频翻译传统上采用级联流水线（语音识别、机器翻译、语音合成、唇形同步），存在误差累积、模态割裂等问题，难以实现语义保真、时间对齐、说话人一致性和情感表达的统一。多模态大语言模型（MLLM）的进展使视频翻译转变为统一的多模态推理与生成问题，但缺乏系统性的研究框架来组织现有工作。本文旨在通过角色导向分类法填补这一空白，帮助研究者理解MLLM如何赋能视频翻译的各个环节，并指出现有方法的不足与未来方向。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出了一个角色导向的分类法，将MLLM驱动的视频翻译研究分为三类功能角色：语义推理器（Semantic Reasoner），负责视频理解、时间推理和多模态融合以指导翻译；表达表演者（Expressive Performer），实现可控且上下文感知的语音生成；视觉合成器（Visual Synthesizer），完成唇形同步和视觉上连贯的说话人渲染。文章总结了每类角色的代表性数据集、基准和评估指标，并讨论了当前评估协议在端到端视频翻译方面的不足。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验数据。作为综述，本文系统梳理了现有研究成果，总结了各角色的代表性数据集（如VGGSound、LRS3等）和基准，以及评估指标（如WER、MOS、唇同步精度等）。通过角色分类揭示了现有工作在长视频理解、时间建模、多模态对齐、多语言鲁棒性和负责任部署等方面的开放挑战，为后续研究提供了结构化参考。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本综述通过角色导向分类法整合了MLLM在视频翻译中的研究，揭示了从级联流水线向统一多模态框架转变的趋势。论文的三个贡献：系统化的分类框架、全面的资源总结（数据集、基准、指标）以及当前评估协议的批判性分析。学术价值在于为视频翻译研究提供了清晰的结构化视角；应用价值在于指导更自然、可信的跨语言视频通信系统的开发。未来工作需解决长视频时空建模、多语言泛化、伦理安全等挑战。

title: A Direct Approach for Handling Contextual Bandits with Latent State Dynamics
abstract: We consider a linear contextual bandit model where contexts and rewards are governed by a finite hidden Markov chain. We first revisit the simplified model by Nelson et al. (2022), in which rewards are linear functions of the posterior probabilities over the hidden states given the observed contexts (called beliefs), rather than functions of the hidden states themselves. This simplified model may be handled through a direct reduction to standard linear contextual bandits. We extend the theoretical analysis of this reduction to take into account the estimation of the parameters of the hidden Markov model [HMM] in the regret bound and to provide high-probability bounds not depending anymore on the reward functions and only depending on the model through the estimation of the HMM parameters. Second, and most importantly, we instead study the more natural and more complex model incorporating direct dependencies in the hidden states (on top of dependencies on the observed contexts, as is natural for contextual bandits). Under a classic HMM forgetting condition, the main algorithmic tool introduced to cope with the various statistical dependencies that the reward structure introduces is to only periodically update reward-model parameters.

light_analysis.overview: 提出直接方法处理潜在状态动态的线性上下文赌博机，扩展简化模型的理论并处理更自然的隐藏状态依赖。
light_analysis.motivation: 上下文赌博机中，上下文和奖励常受隐藏状态影响，但现有简化模型（如Nelson等）未考虑HMM参数估计和更自然的隐藏状态依赖。本文旨在解决这些不足，提供更通用的归约分析和周期性更新策略，以处理统计依赖并改进理论界。
light_analysis.method: 首先，扩展Nelson等人的简化模型归约，将HMM参数估计纳入遗憾界，并推导不依赖奖励函数的高概率界。其次，研究更复杂的模型，其中奖励直接依赖于隐藏状态和上下文。利用经典HMM遗忘条件，提出仅周期性更新奖励模型参数的方法，以应对奖励结构引入的统计依赖。
light_analysis.result: 理论分析表明：在简化模型中，遗憾界依赖于HMM参数估计，且高概率界仅与模型参数估计相关。在复杂模型中，周期性更新参数可有效控制因隐藏状态依赖带来的复杂性，具体数值实验摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为潜在状态动态的上下文赌博机提供了直接处理方法，扩展了归约分析并引入周期性更新策略。理论贡献为实际应用（如非平稳环境）奠定基础，未来可探索更高效的HMM参数估计或自适应更新策略。

title: A Theoretical Framework for Statistical Evaluability of Generative Models
abstract: Statistical evaluation aims to estimate the generalization performance of a model using held-out i.i.d. test data sampled from the ground-truth distribution. In supervised learning settings such as classification, performance metrics such as error rate are well-defined, and test error reliably approximates population error given sufficiently large datasets. In contrast, evaluation is more challenging for generative models due to their open-ended nature: it is unclear which metrics are appropriate and whether such metrics can be reliably evaluated from finite samples.   In this work, we introduce a theoretical framework for evaluating generative models and establish evaluability results for commonly used metrics. We study two categories of metrics: test-based metrics, including integral probability metrics (IPMs), and Rényi divergences. We show that IPMs with respect to any bounded test class can be evaluated from finite samples up to multiplicative and additive approximation errors. Moreover, when the test class has finite fat-shattering dimension, IPMs can be evaluated with arbitrary precision. In contrast, Rényi and KL divergences are not evaluable from finite samples, as their values can be critically determined by rare events. We also analyze the potential and limitations of perplexity as an evaluation method.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一个评估生成模型的理论框架，证明了有界测试类的积分概率度量可有限样本评估，而Rényi散度则不可评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 生成模型的评估比监督学习更具挑战性，因为其开放式性质导致合适的指标不明确，且有限样本下指标的可靠性未知。现有方法缺乏理论保证，因此需要建立系统的评估理论框架。
light_analysis.method: 论文将评估指标分为两类：基于测试的指标（如积分概率度量IPMs）和Rényi散度。通过理论分析，证明对有界测试类的IPMs可在有限样本下达到乘性和加性近似误差；当测试类具有有限fat-shattering维度时，可实现任意精度。而对于Rényi和KL散度，理论显示其值可能由罕见事件主导，因此不可从有限样本评估。还分析了困惑度的潜力与局限性。
light_analysis.result: 理论结果表明：IPMs（对任意有界测试类）可评估，且当测试类复杂度受控时精度可任意高；而Rényi散度和KL散度不可评估；困惑度作为评估方法有其局限。这些结论为生成模型评估提供了理论基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次系统性地建立了生成模型评估的理论框架，明确了不同指标的评估可行性。该工作为选择可靠评估指标提供了指导，并指出未来需探索更多可评估的指标，同时避免依赖不可评估的散度。

title: What Cosine Similarity of Label Representations Can and Cannot Tell us
abstract: Cosine similarity is often used to measure the similarity of vector representations of neural network models. However, the cosine similarity of representations is not guaranteed to tell us anything about model probabilities. In this paper we show that for a softmax classifier, be it an image classifier or an autoregressive language model, the cosine similarity between label representations (called unembeddings in the paper) does not give any information on the probabilities assigned by the model. Specifically, we prove that given two unembeddings, it is possible to create another model which assigns the same probabilities for all inputs, but where the cosine similarity between the representations is now either 1 or -1. We also show that for a sigmoid classifier (where each input can be assigned multiple labels), all pairwise cosine similarities between the unembeddings define the set of possible label combinations. However, for softmax classifiers (where each input is assigned a ranking of the labels from most to least likely), we need all pairwise cosine similarities between all differences of unembeddings to know which rankings the model can predict. We conclude that it is misleading to interpret the cosine similarity between unembeddings without reference to the classifier that produced them.

light_analysis.overview: 证明在softmax分类器中，标签表示的余弦相似度与模型概率无关，并澄清其在sigmoid和softmax分类器中的不同含义。
light_analysis.motivation: 余弦相似度广泛用于衡量神经网络表示的相似性，但其与模型概率的关系尚不明确。现有研究可能误用余弦相似度解释模型行为，导致对分类决策的误解。本文旨在阐明：对于softmax和sigmoid分类器，标签表示（unembeddings）的余弦相似度能否提供关于模型预测概率或标签排序的信息？这对模型分析和可解释性至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 通过理论证明分析余弦相似度的信息含量。对于softmax分类器，构造重参数化方法使得任意两标签表示的余弦相似度变为1或-1，同时保持模型对所有输入的预测概率不变，从而证明余弦相似度不反映概率。对于sigmoid分类器，证明所有成对余弦相似度唯一确定可能的标签组合。对于softmax，则需要所有unembedding差之间的余弦相似度才能推断标签排序。
light_analysis.result: 理论推导表明：softmax分类器中，余弦相似度与模型概率无关，可通过重参数化任意改变。sigmoid分类器中，所有成对余弦相似度定义标签组合的可行集。softmax分类器中，需考虑所有unembedding差值的余弦相似度才能确定标签预测排序。这些结果不依赖具体数据集或模型架构，具有一般性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了解释标签表示余弦相似度时的常见误区，强调必须结合所使用的分类器类型。对于softmax分类器，余弦相似度不能反映概率或排序；对于sigmoid，则有明确含义。研究有助于指导正确使用相似度度量，避免在模型分析中产生误导性结论。未来工作可扩展到其他损失函数或架构。

title: EuraGovExam: A Multilingual Multimodal Benchmark from Real-World Civil Service Exams
abstract: We present EuraGovExam, a multilingual and multimodal benchmark sourced from real-world civil service examinations across five representative Eurasian regions: South Korea, Japan, Taiwan, India, and the European Union. Designed to reflect the authentic complexity of public-sector assessments, the dataset contains over 8,000 high-resolution scanned multiple-choice questions covering 17 diverse academic and administrative domains. Unlike existing benchmarks, EuraGovExam embeds all question content--including problem statements, answer choices, and visual elements--within a single image, providing only a minimal standardized instruction for answer formatting. This design demands that models perform layout-aware, cross-lingual reasoning directly from visual input. All items are drawn from real exam documents, preserving rich visual structures such as tables, multilingual typography, and form-like layouts. Evaluation results show that even state-of-the-art vision-language models (VLMs) achieve only 86% accuracy, underscoring the benchmark's difficulty and its power to diagnose the limitations of current models. By emphasizing cultural realism, visual complexity, and linguistic diversity, EuraGovExam establishes a new standard for evaluating VLMs in high-stakes, multilingual, image-grounded settings. It also supports practical applications in e-governance, public-sector document analysis, and equitable exam preparation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多语言多模态公务员考试基准EuraGovExam，要求模型从单张图片进行布局感知的跨语言推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基准大多忽略真实世界文档的视觉结构和语言多样性，无法充分评估模型在高风险场景下的能力。公务员考试题目包含表格、多语言排版等复杂布局，而现有数据集往往提供分离的文本和图像。本研究旨在构建一个更贴近实际应用的多模态基准，填补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: 收集来自韩国、日本、台湾、印度和欧盟五个地区的真实公务员考试题目，共8000+高分扫描选择题，涵盖17个领域。将问题陈述、选项和视觉元素嵌入单张图片，仅提供标准化指令。要求VLM进行布局感知和跨语言推理。数据保留真实文档的视觉结构。
light_analysis.result: 在EuraGovBench上评估最先进的VLM，最高仅达86%准确率，表明基准具有挑战性且能揭示当前模型局限。与现有基准相比，该基准更强调文化真实性、视觉复杂性和语言多样性。
light_analysis.conclusion: EuraGovBench为评估VLM在高风险、多语言、图像接地场景下建立了新标准。支持电子政务、公共部门文档分析和公平考试准备等应用。未来可用于诊断模型在复杂视觉-语言任务中的不足。

title: λSplit: Self-Supervised Content-Aware Spectral Unmixing for Fluorescence Microscopy
abstract: In fluorescence microscopy, spectral unmixing aims to recover individual fluorophore concentrations from spectral images that capture mixed fluorophore emissions. Since classical methods operate pixel-wise and rely on least-squares fitting, their performance degrades with increasingly overlapping emission spectra and higher levels of noise, suggesting that a data-driven approach that can learn and utilize a structural prior might lead to improved results. Learning-based approaches for spectral imaging do exist, but they are either not optimized for microscopy data or are developed for very specific cases that are not applicable to fluorescence microscopy settings. To address this, we propose λSplit, a physics-informed deep generative model that learns a conditional distribution over concentration maps using a hierarchical Variational Autoencoder. A fully differentiable Spectral Mixer enforces consistency with the image formation process, while the learned structural priors enable state-of-the-art unmixing and implicit noise removal. We demonstrate λSplit on 3 real-world datasets that we synthetically cast into a total of 66 challenging spectral unmixing benchmarks. We compare our results against a total of 10 baseline methods, including classical methods and a range of learning-based methods. Our results consistently show competitive performance and improved robustness in high noise regimes, when spectra overlap considerably, or when the spectral dimensionality is lowered, making λSplit a new state-of-the-art for spectral unmixing of fluorescent microscopy data. Importantly, λSplit is compatible with spectral data produced by standard confocal microscopes, enabling immediate adoption without specialized hardware modifications.
comment: 14 pages, 25 pages supplement, 16 figures total, 14 tables total

light_analysis.overview: 提出λSplit，一种物理约束的分层变分自编码器，实现荧光显微镜光谱图像的自监督内容感知解混，达到新最佳性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 荧光显微镜光谱解混中，经典像素级最小二乘法在光谱重叠严重或噪声较高时性能下降。现有学习方法未针对显微镜数据优化或仅适用于特定场景，缺乏通用性。因此需要一种能学习结构先验的数据驱动方法，以提升解混鲁棒性和去噪能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出λSplit，基于分层变分自编码器（VAE）学习荧光剂浓度图的条件分布。引入可微分光谱混合器，强制输出与物理成像过程一致。网络隐式学习结构先验，同时实现解混和噪声去除。模型在3个真实数据集合成的66个基准上评估。
light_analysis.result: 与10种基线方法（包括经典和基于学习的方法）比较，λSplit在高噪声、光谱严重重叠或光谱维度降低时表现一致优越，鲁棒性显著提升。在多项指标上达到新最佳，且无需专用硬件，兼容标准共焦显微镜数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: λSplit为荧光显微镜光谱解混提供了新的最优方案，其物理约束和深度生成模型结合有效提升了性能。方法易部署，可促进生物成像中多色标记分析。未来可扩展至更多模态或实时应用。

title: Graph Energy Matching: Transport-Aligned Energy-Based Modeling for Graph Generation
abstract: Generative modeling of discrete data, such as graphs, underpins many scientific and industrial applications, including molecular discovery and materials design. In these domains, probabilistic inference is particularly valuable, as it enables composable generation and principled incorporation of desired constraints, such as structural or functional properties. Energy-based models naturally support this goal by capturing relative likelihoods and enabling composable inference by directly enforcing constraints during inference. However, discrete energy-based models typically struggle with efficient and high-quality sampling, as off-support regions often contain spurious local minima, trapping samplers and causing training instabilities, resulting in a fidelity gap compared to discrete diffusion models. To address this gap, we introduce Graph Energy Matching (GEM), a discrete generative framework inspired by the Jordan-Kinderlehrer-Otto (JKO) transport-map optimization perspective. GEM learns a permutation-invariant potential energy that simultaneously guides discrete transport from noise toward high-likelihood graph regions and refines samples within these regions. We further introduce a sampling protocol leveraging an energy-based switching strategy, seamlessly bridging rapid, gradient-guided transport and a local mixing regime for effective exploration. On molecular graph benchmarks, GEM matches or surpasses strong discrete diffusion baselines on most reported metrics. Beyond improving generation quality, GEM's relative likelihood modeling enables targeted exploration, facilitating compositional generation, property-constrained sampling, and interpolation between graphs. Project page: https://michalbalcerak.ai/graph-energy-matching/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Graph Energy Matching (GEM)框架，结合JKO传输映射优化，解决离散能量模型生成质量差的问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 图生成在分子发现和材料设计等领域至关重要，能量模型支持可组合推理和约束，但离散能量模型因离支持区域存在伪局部极小导致采样效率低、训练不稳定，与离散扩散模型存在保真度差距。现有方法难以兼顾高质量生成与可组合推理。
light_analysis.method: GEM基于Jordan-Kinderlehrer-Otto (JKO)传输映射优化，学习置换不变势能，同时指导离散传输和样本精炼。引入基于能量的切换采样策略，交替进行快速梯度引导传输和局部混合探索，有效跨越伪局部极小并实现高质量生成。
light_analysis.result: 在分子图基准上，GEM在多数指标上匹配或超越强离散扩散基线（如DiGress）。除了生成质量，还支持组成生成、属性约束采样和图插值，展示出能量模型在可组合推理上的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: GEM弥合了离散能量模型与扩散模型的保真度差距，同时保留能量模型的可组合推理能力，为分子设计等科学应用提供高效工具。未来可扩展到更复杂图结构或连续-离散混合数据。

title: LagerNVS: Latent Geometry for Fully Neural Real-time Novel View Synthesis
abstract: Recent work has shown that neural networks can perform 3D tasks such as Novel View Synthesis (NVS) without explicit 3D reconstruction. Even so, we argue that strong 3D inductive biases are still helpful in the design of such networks. We show this point by introducing LagerNVS, an encoder-decoder neural network for NVS that builds on `3D-aware' latent features. The encoder is initialized from a 3D reconstruction network pre-trained using explicit 3D supervision. This is paired with a lightweight decoder, and trained end-to-end with photometric losses. LagerNVS achieves state-of-the-art deterministic feed-forward Novel View Synthesis (including 31.4 PSNR on Re10k), with and without known cameras, renders in real time, generalizes to in-the-wild data, and can be paired with a diffusion decoder for generative extrapolation.
comment: IEEE CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition 2026. Project page with code, models and examples: szymanowiczs.github.io/lagernvs

light_analysis.overview: 提出LagerNVS，一种利用3D感知潜在特征的编码器-解码器网络，实现实时、高保真的新视角合成。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于神经网络的新视角合成方法虽无需显式3D重建，但缺乏3D归纳偏置。本文认为强3D归纳偏置有助于提升网络性能，旨在通过引入3D感知潜在特征来改进编码器-解码器架构，实现更优的实时新视角合成。
light_analysis.method: LagerNVS采用编码器-解码器结构，编码器初始化为使用显式3D监督预训练的3D重建网络，以提取3D感知潜在特征；解码器为轻量级网络，与编码器端到端训练，使用光度损失函数。该方法支持已知和未知相机参数，可结合扩散解码器进行生成性外推。
light_analysis.result: 在Re10k数据集上达到31.4 PSNR，实现最先进的确定性前馈新视角合成。模型能够实时渲染，泛化到野外数据，展现出高效率和强泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: LagerNVS证明了3D归纳偏置在神经网络新视角合成中的有效性，实现了实时、高保真的合成，并具有良好的泛化性。未来可结合生成模型拓展应用，具有重要的学术和实际价值。

title: Beyond String Matching: Semantic Evaluation of PDF Table Extraction
abstract: Reliably extracting tables from PDFs is essential for large-scale scientific data mining and knowledge base construction, yet existing evaluation approaches rely on rule-based metrics that fail to capture semantic equivalence of table content. We present a benchmarking framework based on synthetically generated PDFs with precise LaTeX ground truth, using tables sourced from arXiv to ensure realistic complexity and diversity. As our central methodological contribution, we apply LLM-as-a-judge for semantic table evaluation, integrated into a matching pipeline that accommodates inconsistencies in parser outputs. Through a human validation study comprising over 1,500 quality judgments on extracted table pairs, we show that LLM-based evaluation achieves substantially higher correlation with human judgment (Pearson r=0.93) compared to currently used Tree Edit Distance-based Similarity (TEDS, r=0.68) and Grid Table Similarity (GriTS, r=0.70). Evaluating 21 contemporary PDF parsers across 100 synthetic documents containing 451 tables reveals significant performance disparities. Our results offer practical guidance for selecting parsers for tabular data extraction and establish a reproducible, scalable evaluation methodology for this critical task.   Code and data: https://github.com/phorn1/pdf-parse-bench Metric study and human evaluation: https://github.com/phorn1/table-metric-study

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于LLM作为评判的语义表格评估框架，显著优于现有指标。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有PDF表格提取评估依赖基于规则的指标（如TEDS、GriTS），无法捕捉表格内容的语义等价性，导致评估结果与人类判断偏差大。该问题阻碍了大规模科学数据挖掘和知识库构建中表格提取方法的可靠比较。因此需要一种能准确反映语义相似性的评估方法，以提高基准测试的有效性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出使用LLM-as-a-judge进行语义表格评估，集成到一个匹配管线中以处理解析器输出的不一致性。构建了基于arXiv表格的合成PDF数据集，具有精确的LaTeX真实标注，确保真实复杂性和多样性。通过1500多个人工质量判断验证了LLM评估与人类判断的高度相关性（Pearson r=0.93）。
light_analysis.result: LLM评估与人类判断的相关性（r=0.93）远高于现有指标TEDS（r=0.68）和GriTS（r=0.70）。在包含451个表格的100个合成文档上评估了21个当代PDF解析器，揭示了显著的性能差异。该方法提供了可复现、可扩展的评估基准。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究建立了基于语义的PDF表格提取评估新标准，LLM-based评估比传统规则指标更符合人类认知。实验为选择合适解析器提供了实践指导，且代码和数据开源，有助于推动该领域标准化。未来可扩展到更多文档类型和更复杂的表格结构。

title: Distributional Open-Ended Evaluation of LLM Cultural Value Alignment Based on Value Codebook
abstract: As LLMs are globally deployed, aligning their cultural value orientations is critical for safety and user engagement. However, existing benchmarks face the Construct-Composition-Context ($C^3$) challenge: relying on discriminative, multiple-choice formats that probe value knowledge rather than true orientations, overlook subcultural heterogeneity, and mismatch with real-world open-ended generation. We introduce DOVE, a distributional evaluation framework that directly compares human-written text distributions with LLM-generated outputs. DOVE utilizes a rate-distortion variational optimization objective to construct a compact value codebook from 10K documents, mapping text into a structured value space to filter semantic noise. Alignment is measured using unbalanced optimal transport, capturing intra-cultural distributional structures and subgroup diversity. Experiments across 12 LLMs show that DOVE achieves superior predictive validity, attaining a 31.56% correlation with downstream tasks, while maintaining high reliability with as few as 500 samples per culture.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DOVE框架，通过价值码本和分布对齐，实现LLM文化价值取向的开放评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM文化价值对齐基准面临C^3挑战：依赖判别式选择题，只能探测价值知识而非真实取向；忽视子文化多样性；与开放生成场景不匹配。解决这些问题对确保LLM全球部署安全性和用户参与度至关重要。
light_analysis.method: DOVE框架包含三部分：从1万文档中通过率失真变分优化构建紧凑价值码本，将文本映射到结构化价值空间并过滤语义噪声；使用非平衡最优传输衡量分布对齐度，捕捉文化内部分布结构和子组多样性；直接比较人类与LLM生成文本的分布。
light_analysis.result: 在12个LLM上的实验表明，DOVE实现显著预测效度，与下游任务相关性达31.56%，同时保持高可靠性，每个文化仅需500样本即可稳定评估。
light_analysis.conclusion: DOVE为LLM文化价值对齐提供了分布化开放评估框架，解决了现有基准的构造-组成-上下文挑战，兼具预测效度和数据效率，有助于推动跨文化LLM安全部署。未来可扩展至更多文化和语言。

title: DAPD: Dependency-Aware Parallel Decoding via Attention for Diffusion LLMs
abstract: Parallel decoding for Diffusion LLMs (dLLMs) is difficult because each denoising step provides only token-wise marginal distributions, while unmasking multiple tokens simultaneously requires accounting for inter-token dependencies. We propose Dependency-Aware Parallel Decoding (DAPD), a simple, training-free decoding method that uses self-attention to induce a conditional dependency graph over masked tokens. At each iteration, edges in this graph capture strong token interactions, while non-edges indicate weak dependence. Parallel decoding is then reduced to selecting an independent set on the graph and unmasking the selected tokens in parallel. This avoids co-updating strongly coupled tokens without auxiliary models or retraining. Experiments on LLaDA and Dream show that DAPD improves the accuracy-steps trade-off over existing methods and enables more globally distributed parallel updates that better exploit the any-order generation capability of dLLMs. The project is available at https://ai-isl.github.io/dapd

light_analysis.overview: 提出依赖感知并行解码（DAPD），利用自注意力图实现训练-free的并行解码，提升扩散LLM的精度-步骤权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散LLM的并行解码面临挑战：每个去噪步骤仅提供逐词边缘分布，同时解掩多个标记需考虑标记间依赖。现有方法忽视依赖关系，导致耦合标记同时更新影响生成质量。亟需一种无需辅助模型或重训练的方法，高效处理依赖关系以实现有效并行解码。
light_analysis.method: DAPD通过自注意力机制在每次迭代中构建条件依赖图，图中边表示强交互，非边表示弱依赖。并行解码简化为在图上选择独立集并同时解掩这些标记。该方法无需额外模型或训练，仅利用dLLM内部注意力，避免强耦合标记的并发更新。在LLaDA和Dream模型上验证。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，DAPD在精度-步骤权衡上优于现有并行解码方法，能实现更全局分布的并行更新，充分发挥dLLM的任意顺序生成能力。具体性能数据摘要未明确说明，但强调改进效果和更好的利用任意顺序生成特性。
light_analysis.conclusion: DAPD提供了简单有效的并行解码方案，无需训练即可提升扩散LLM的生成效率和质量，具有重要实用价值。未来可探索更精细的依赖图构建或结合其他解码策略。代码已开源。

title: Frequentist Consistency of Prior-Data Fitted Networks for Causal Inference
abstract: Foundation models based on prior-data fitted networks (PFNs) have shown strong empirical performance in causal inference by framing the task as an in-context learning problem. However, it is unclear whether PFN-based causal estimators provide uncertainty quantification that is consistent with classical frequentist estimators. In this work, we address this gap by analyzing the frequentist consistency of PFN-based estimators for the average treatment effect (ATE). (1) We show that existing PFNs, when interpreted as Bayesian ATE estimators, can exhibit prior-induced confounding bias: the prior is not asymptotically overwritten by data, which, in turn, prevents frequentist consistency. (2) As a remedy, we suggest employing a calibration procedure based on a one-step posterior correction (OSPC). We show that the OSPC helps to restore frequentist consistency and can yield a semi-parametric Bernstein-von Mises theorem for calibrated PFNs (i.e., both the calibrated PFN-based estimators and the classical semi-parametric efficient estimators converge in distribution with growing data size). (3) Finally, we implement OSPC through tailoring martingale posteriors on top of the PFNs. In this way, we are able to recover functional nuisance posteriors from PFNs, required by the OSPC. In multiple (semi-)synthetic experiments, PFNs calibrated with our martingale posterior OSPC produce ATE uncertainty that (i) asymptotically matches frequentist uncertainty and (ii) is well calibrated in finite samples in comparison to other Bayesian ATE estimators.

light_analysis.overview: 提出通过一步后验校正（OSPC）校准先验数据拟合网络（PFN），恢复平均处理效应（ATE）估计的频率学派一致性，并证明半参数Bernstein-von Mises定理。
light_analysis.motivation: PFN在因果推断中表现出色，但作为贝叶斯估计器存在先验诱导的混淆偏差，导致频率学派不一致，即先验无法被数据渐近覆盖。现有研究缺乏对PFN不确定性量化与经典频率学派估计一致性的理论分析，亟需方法使PFN估计量提供可靠的不确定性。
light_analysis.method: 提出一步后验校正（OSPC）方法，通过定制鞅后验从PFN中恢复功能扰动后验，实现校准。理论证明校准后的PFN满足半参数Bernstein-von Mises定理，其ATE估计量与经典半参数有效估计量渐近同分布。使用半合成和合成数据评估。
light_analysis.result: 在多个（半）合成实验中，经鞅后验OSPC校准的PFN产生的ATE不确定性渐近匹配频率学派不确定性，并且有限样本校准优于其他贝叶斯ATE估计器。实验表明校准后PFN的频率学派一致性得到恢复，不确定性量化可靠。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文填补了PFN因果估计器频率学派一致性的理论空白，提出的OSPC校准方法有效解决了先验混淆偏差。工作为PFN在因果推断中的置信区间估计提供了理论基础，未来可扩展至其他因果参数，如条件平均处理效应。

title: ActiveUltraFeedback: Efficient Preference Data Generation using Active Learning
abstract: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) has become the standard for aligning Large Language Models (LLMs), yet its efficacy is bottlenecked by the high cost of acquiring preference data, especially in low-resource and expert domains. To address this, we introduce ACTIVEULTRAFEEDBACK, a modular active learning pipeline that leverages uncertainty estimates to dynamically identify the most informative responses for annotation. Our pipeline facilitates the systematic evaluation of standard response selection methods alongside DOUBLE REVERSE THOMPSON SAMPLING (DRTS) and DELTAUCB, two novel methods prioritizing response pairs with large predicted quality gaps, leveraging recent results showing that such pairs provide good signals for fine-tuning. Our experiments demonstrate that ACTIVEULTRAFEEDBACK yields high-quality datasets that lead to significant improvements in downstream performance, notably achieving comparable or superior results with as little as one-sixth of the annotated data relative to static baselines. Our pipeline is available at https://github.com/lasgroup/ActiveUltraFeedback and our preference datasets at https://huggingface.co/ActiveUltraFeedback.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于主动学习的偏好数据生成流水线ACTIVEULTRAFEEDBACK，通过不确定性估计选择高信息量响应，大幅降低RLHF标注成本。
light_analysis.motivation: RLHF虽是大模型对齐的标准方法，但偏好数据获取成本高昂，尤其在低资源和专家领域。现有静态数据采样方法效率低下，无法动态选择最有价值的响应对进行标注，导致资源浪费。需要一种高效的数据选择策略来减少标注量同时保持对齐效果。
light_analysis.method: ACTIVEULTRAFEEDBACK是一套模块化主动学习流水线，利用不确定性估计动态识别最具信息量的响应进行标注。它集成了标准的响应选择方法，并提出了两种新方法：DOUBLE REVERSE THOMPSON SAMPLING (DRTS) 和 DELTAUCB，后者优先选择质量差距大的响应对，因为这类数据能提供更好的微调信号。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，ACTIVEULTRAFEEDBACK生成的高质量数据集显著提升下游性能。仅使用静态基线1/6的标注数据，即可达到相当或更优的结果。这证明了主动学习在偏好数据生成中的高效性，大幅降低了RLHF的数据成本。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究通过主动学习有效解决了RLHF中偏好数据获取的高成本问题，为低资源场景下的模型对齐提供了实用方案。代码和数据集已开源，便于复现与扩展。未来可探索更复杂的不确定性估计方法或扩展到多轮对话场景。

title: WorldCache: Accelerating World Models for Free via Heterogeneous Token Caching
abstract: Diffusion-based world models have shown strong potential for unified world simulation, but the iterative denoising remains too costly for interactive use and long-horizon rollouts. While feature caching can accelerate inference without training, we find that policies designed for single-modal diffusion transfer poorly to world models due to two world-model-specific obstacles: \emph{token heterogeneity} from multi-modal coupling and spatial variation, and \emph{non-uniform temporal dynamics} where a small set of hard tokens drives error growth, making uniform skipping either unstable or overly conservative. We propose \textbf{WorldCache}, a caching framework tailored to diffusion world models. We introduce \textit{Curvature-guided Heterogeneous Token Prediction}, which uses a physics-grounded curvature score to estimate token predictability and applies a Hermite-guided damped predictor for chaotic tokens with abrupt direction changes. We also design \textit{Chaotic-prioritized Adaptive Skipping}, which accumulates a curvature-normalized, dimensionless drift signal and recomputes only when bottleneck tokens begin to drift. Experiments on diffusion world models show that WorldCache delivers up to \textbf{3.7$\times$} end-to-end speedups while maintaining \textbf{98\%} rollout quality, demonstrating the vast advantages and practicality of WorldCache in resource-constrained scenarios. Our code is released in https://github.com/FofGofx/WorldCache.

light_analysis.overview: 提出WorldCache框架，通过异构标记缓存加速扩散世界模型推理，实现3.7倍加速并保持98%的 rollout 质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散世界模型虽能统一模拟世界，但迭代去噪过程耗时严重，难以用于交互式场景和长期 rollout。现有特征缓存方法针对单模态扩散设计，无法应对世界模型特有的两个障碍：多模态耦合和空间变化导致的标记异构性，以及少数困难标记驱动误差增长的非均匀时间动态。这些挑战使得简单均匀跳过策略要么不稳定，要么过于保守。
light_analysis.method: WorldCache 包含两个核心创新：一是曲率引导的异构标记预测，利用物理启发的曲率分数估计标记可预测性，并对方向突变的混沌标记采用Hermite引导阻尼预测器；二是混沌优先自适应跳过，通过累积曲率归一化的无量纲漂移信号，仅在瓶颈标记开始漂移时重新计算。方法无需训练，直接应用于现有扩散世界模型。
light_analysis.result: 在扩散世界模型上实验，WorldCache 实现了高达 3.7 倍的端到端加速，同时保持 98% 的 rollout 质量。与基线方法相比，在资源受限场景下展示了显著的优势和实用性。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: WorldCache 有效解决了扩散世界模型推理加速中的标记异构性和非均匀时间动态问题，显著提升推理效率而不牺牲质量。该方法无需额外训练，易于集成，为交互式世界模拟和长期 rollout 的实际应用提供了可行的解决方案。未来可探索更复杂的曲率估计或扩展到其他多模态生成模型。

title: Heterogeneous Decentralized Diffusion Models
abstract: Training frontier-scale diffusion models often requires substantial computational resources concentrated in tightly-coupled clusters, limiting participation to well-resourced institutions. While Decentralized Diffusion Models (DDM) enable training multiple experts in isolation, existing approaches require 1176 GPU-days and homogeneous training objectives across all experts. We present an efficient framework that dramatically reduces resource requirements while supporting heterogeneous training objectives. Our approach combines three key contributions: (1) a heterogeneous decentralized training paradigm that allows experts to use different objectives (DDPM and Flow Matching), unified at inference time without any retraining; (2) pretrained checkpoint conversion from ImageNet-DDPM to Flow Matching objectives, accelerating convergence and enabling initialization without objective-specific pretraining; and (3) PixArt-$α$'s efficient AdaLN-Single architecture, reducing parameters while maintaining quality. Experiments on LAION-Aesthetics show that, relative to the training scale reported for prior DDM work, our approach reduces the compute by 16$\times$ and data by 14$\times$. Under aligned inference settings, our heterogeneous configuration achieves better FID and higher intra-prompt diversity than the homogeneous baseline. By eliminating synchronization requirements and enabling mixed DDPM/FM objectives, our framework makes decentralized generative model training accessible to contributors with single GPUs requiring only 24--48GB VRAM.

light_analysis.overview: 提出异构去中心化扩散模型框架，支持不同训练目标（DDPM和Flow Matching）的专家协作，显著降低计算和数据需求。
light_analysis.motivation: 训练大规模扩散模型需要大量计算资源集中在紧密耦合集群中，限制了参与机构。现有去中心化扩散模型需要1176 GPU天且所有专家使用同质训练目标。本文旨在降低资源需求，同时支持异构训练目标，使更多贡献者能参与。
light_analysis.method: 结合三项关键技术：(1) 异构去中心化训练范式，允许专家使用不同目标（DDPM和Flow Matching），推理时无需重训练即可统一；(2) 预训练检查点转换，从ImageNet-DDPM转换为Flow Matching目标，加速收敛；(3) PixArt-α的高效AdaLN-Single架构，减少参数保持质量。在LAION-Aesthetics数据集上实验。
light_analysis.result: 相比先前DDM工作，计算量减少16倍，数据量减少14倍。在统一推理设置下，异构配置比同质基线获得更好的FID和更高的批内多样性。支持单GPU（24-48GB VRAM）贡献者参与。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架消除了同步需求，支持混合DDPM/FM目标，使去中心化生成模型训练更加可及。具有重要学术和实际应用价值，未来可进一步优化异构协调。

title: Step-Level Sparse Autoencoder for Reasoning Process Interpretation
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved strong complex reasoning capabilities through Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning. However, their reasoning patterns remain too complicated to analyze. While Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) have emerged as a powerful tool for interpretability, existing approaches predominantly operate at the token level, creating a granularity mismatch when capturing more critical step-level information, such as reasoning direction and semantic transitions. In this work, we propose step-level sparse autoencoder (SSAE), which serves as an analytical tool to disentangle different aspects of LLMs' reasoning steps into sparse features. Specifically, by precisely controlling the sparsity of a step feature conditioned on its context, we form an information bottleneck in step reconstruction, which splits incremental information from background information and disentangles it into several sparsely activated dimensions. Experiments on multiple base models and reasoning tasks show the effectiveness of the extracted features. By linear probing, we can easily predict surface-level information, such as generation length and first token distribution, as well as more complicated properties, such as the correctness and logicality of the step. These observations indicate that LLMs should already at least partly know about these properties during generation, which provides the foundation for the self-verification ability of LLMs. Our code is available at https://github.com/Miaow-Lab/SSAE.

light_analysis.overview: 提出步骤级稀疏自编码器(SSAE)，将LLM推理步骤解耦为稀疏特征，揭示推理方向与语义转换。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM通过思维链推理展现出强大复杂推理能力，但其推理模式复杂难以分析。现有稀疏自编码器主要在token级别操作，无法捕获步骤级关键信息（如推理方向、语义转换），存在粒度不匹配问题。因此需要一种步骤级分析工具来解耦推理过程的不同方面。
light_analysis.method: 提出步骤级稀疏自编码器(SSAE)，通过精确控制步骤特征在其上下文条件下的稀疏性，形成步骤重构的信息瓶颈，将增量信息与背景信息分离，并解耦为若干稀疏激活维度。实验在多个基础模型和推理任务上进行。
light_analysis.result: 通过线性探针，SSAE可预测表面信息如生成长度和第一个token分布，以及更复杂的属性如步骤的正确性和逻辑性。结果表明LLM在生成过程中至少部分已知这些属性，为自验证能力提供基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: SSAE有效提取步骤级稀疏特征，揭示了LLM内部推理过程中的信息，有助于理解推理行为，并支持自验证能力。该工作为LLM可解释性提供了新工具，代码已开源。

title: AutoFFS: Adversarial Deformations for Facial Feminization Surgery Planning
abstract: Facial feminization surgery (FFS) is a key component of gender affirmation for transgender and gender diverse patients, aiming to reshape craniofacial structures toward a female morphology. Current surgical planning procedures largely rely on subjective clinical assessment, lacking quantitative and reproducible anatomical guidance. We therefore propose AutoFFS, a novel data-driven framework that generates counterfactual skull morphologies through adversarial free-form deformations. Our method performs a deformation-based targeted adversarial attack on an ensemble of pre-trained binary sex classifiers that learned sexual dimorphism, effectively transforming individual skull shapes toward the target sex. The generated counterfactual skull morphologies provide a quantitative foundation for preoperative planning in FFS, driving advances in this largely overlooked patient group. We validate our approach through classifier-based evaluation, propose Morphological Fréchet Distance (MFD) and Morphological Kernel Distance (MKD) to evaluate distributional alignment of generated and real populations, and perform a human perceptual study, confirming that the generated morphologies exhibit target sex characteristics.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AutoFFS，通过对抗性自由形变生成反事实头骨形态，为面部女性化手术提供定量规划依据。
light_analysis.motivation: 面部女性化手术（FFS）是跨性别患者性别确认的关键，但当前规划依赖主观临床评估，缺乏定量、可重复的解剖学指导。现有方法无法提供基于数据的客观手术目标，导致规划结果因人而异且难以标准化。因此，亟需一种数据驱动的框架，能够基于患者个体特征生成可量化的女性化头骨形态，以提升手术规划的科学性和可重复性。
light_analysis.method: AutoFFS采用对抗性自由形变方法，对一组预训练的二元性别分类器进行针对性对抗攻击。这些分类器已学习颅骨性别二态性，通过形变将个体头骨向目标性别（女性）转换。方法基于自由形变模型，生成反事实头骨形态，作为手术规划的基础。此外，提出形态Fréchet距离（MFD）和形态核距离（MKD）评估生成形态与真实人群的分布对齐。
light_analysis.result: 通过分类器评估，验证了生成形态有效欺骗性别分类器，倾向于目标性别。MFD和MKD指标表明生成形态与真实女性人群分布接近。人类感知研究确认生成的头骨形态表现出目标性别特征，证明了方法的有效性。具体数值摘要未明确说明，但整体结果支持定量规划工具的可行性。
light_analysis.conclusion: AutoFFS提供了首个数据驱动的面部女性化手术规划框架，通过对抗性形变生成可量化的反事实头骨形态，填补了该领域缺乏客观指导的空白。学术价值在于将对抗攻击与医学形态生成结合，实际应用可为跨性别患者提供个性化手术方案。未来工作可能包括临床验证以及扩展至其他颅面手术。

title: Understanding LoRA as Knowledge Memory: An Empirical Analysis
abstract: Continuous knowledge updating for pre-trained large language models (LLMs) is increasingly necessary yet remains challenging. Although inference-time methods like In-Context Learning (ICL) and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) are popular, they face constraints in context budgets, costs, and retrieval fragmentation. Departing from these context-dependent paradigms, this work investigates a parametric approach using Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) as a modular knowledge memory. Although few recent works examine this concept, the fundamental mechanics governing its capacity and composability remain largely unexplored. We bridge this gap through the first systematic empirical study mapping the design space of LoRA-based memory, ranging from characterizing storage capacity and optimizing internalization to scaling multi-module systems and evaluating long-context reasoning. Rather than proposing a single architecture, we provide practical guidance on the operational boundaries of LoRA memory. Overall, our findings position LoRA as the complementary axis of memory alongside RAG and ICL, offering distinct advantages. Code and datasets are available at https://github.com/ahn-ml/Understanding-LoRA-as-Knowledge-Memory.

light_analysis.overview: 首次系统实证研究LoRA作为模块化知识记忆的设计空间，提供操作边界指导。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型持续知识更新至关重要但仍具挑战。尽管推理时方法如上下文学习和检索增强生成流行，但受限于上下文预算、成本和检索碎片化。近期工作探索了LoRA作为参数化知识记忆，但对其容量和可组合性的基本机制理解不足。本文通过首次系统实证研究填补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: 本文通过系统实证研究映射LoRA记忆的设计空间，涵盖存储容量刻画、内部化优化、多模块系统扩展和长上下文推理评估。不提出单一架构，而是提供关于LoRA记忆操作边界的实用指导。使用公开代码和数据集进行实验。
light_analysis.result: 研究定位LoRA作为与RAG和ICL互补的记忆轴，提供独特优势。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但通过系统实证明确了LoRA记忆的容量边界和适用场景，如可有效集成多模块知识。代码和数据集已公开。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是首次系统实证分析LoRA作为知识记忆的机理，提供了操作边界和设计指南。学术价值在于深化对参数化记忆的理解，实际应用中可作为RAG和ICL的补充。未来可探索更高效的内化策略和更大规模的多模块系统。

title: LK Losses: Direct Acceptance Rate Optimization for Speculative Decoding
abstract: Speculative decoding accelerates autoregressive large language model (LLM) inference by using a lightweight draft model to propose candidate tokens that are then verified in parallel by the target model. The speedup is significantly determined by the acceptance rate, yet standard training minimizes Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence as a proxy objective. While KL divergence and acceptance rate share the same global optimum, small draft models, having limited capacity, typically converge to suboptimal solutions where minimizing KL does not guarantee maximizing acceptance rate. To address this issue, we propose LK losses, special training objectives that directly target acceptance rate. Comprehensive experiments across four draft architectures and six target models, ranging from 8B to 685B parameters, demonstrate consistent improvements in acceptance metrics across all configurations compared to the standard KL-based training. We evaluate our approach on general, coding and math domains and report gains of up to 8-10% in average acceptance length. LK losses are easy to implement, introduce no computational overhead and can be directly integrated into any existing speculator training framework, making them a compelling alternative to the existing draft training objectives.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LK损失函数，直接优化投机解码中的接受率，替代传统KL散度训练目标。
light_analysis.motivation: 投机解码通过轻量级草稿模型加速大模型推理，加速比取决于接受率。但标准训练使用KL散度作为代理目标，由于草稿模型容量有限，最小化KL散度不能保证最大化接受率。现有方法存在次优解问题，需要直接优化接受率的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出LK损失函数，直接以接受率为优化目标，而非间接优化KL散度。该方法易于实现，无计算开销，可集成到现有投机解码训练框架。实验涵盖四种草稿架构和六个目标模型（参数从8B到685B），在通用、代码和数学领域进行评估。
light_analysis.result: 与标准KL训练相比，LK损失在所有配置下均持续提升接受指标。平均接受长度提升高达8-10%。在多种草稿架构和目标模型上表现一致，表明方法的通用性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: LK损失函数为投机解码训练提供了更优目标，直接优化接受率，显著提升推理加速效果。方法简单高效，易于部署，具有重要实践价值。未来可探索更复杂的损失形式或结合其他训练策略。

title: Motion-aware Event Suppression for Event Cameras
abstract: In this work, we introduce the first framework for Motion-aware Event Suppression, which learns to filter events triggered by IMOs and ego-motion in real time. Our model jointly segments IMOs in the current event stream while predicting their future motion, enabling anticipatory suppression of dynamic events before they occur. Our lightweight architecture achieves 173 Hz inference on consumer-grade GPUs with less than 1 GB of memory usage, outperforming previous state-of-the-art methods on the challenging EVIMO benchmark by 67\% in segmentation accuracy while operating at a 53\% higher inference rate. Moreover, we demonstrate significant benefits for downstream applications: our method accelerates Vision Transformer inference by 83\% via token pruning and improves event-based visual odometry accuracy, reducing Absolute Trajectory Error (ATE) by 13\%.

light_analysis.overview: 首个运动感知事件抑制框架，实时过滤并预判动态事件，提升分割精度和推理速度。
light_analysis.motivation: 事件相机在高速运动场景下，独立运动物体（IMOs）和自运动产生大量冗余事件，影响后续任务效率。现有方法无法同时实现实时分割和未来运动预测，导致处理延迟或精度不足。本文旨在解决这一矛盾，提出轻量级联合学习框架。
light_analysis.method: 提出Motion-aware Event Suppression框架，核心是联合分割当前事件流中的IMOs并预测其未来运动，实现预期性抑制。采用轻量架构，在消费级GPU上以173Hz运行，内存占用低于1GB。在EVIMO基准上训练和评估。
light_analysis.result: 在EVIMO基准上，分割精度比之前最先进方法提升67%，推理速率提高53%。下游任务中，通过令牌剪枝加速Vision Transformer推理83%，事件视觉里程计绝对轨迹误差降低13%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次实现运动感知事件抑制的实时联合分割与预测，显著提升精度和效率。方法对高速视觉任务（如目标跟踪、SLAM）具有实用价值，但可能依赖特定事件表示，未来可探索更通用的架构。

title: MineDraft: A Framework for Batch Parallel Speculative Decoding
abstract: Speculative decoding (SD) accelerates large language model inference by using a smaller draft model to propose draft tokens that are subsequently verified by a larger target model. However, the performance of standard SD is often limited by the strictly sequential execution of these drafting and verification stages. To address this, this paper proposes MineDraft, a batch parallel speculative decoding (PSD) framework designed to effectively hide drafting latency by overlapping it with verification. Our theoretical analysis shows that PSD is substantially more efficient than standard SD. MineDraft realizes the PSD through a novel batch-parallel design that maintains two batches of requests, overlapping drafting for one batch with verification for the other. Our experimental results show significant improvements of MineDraft in both throughput (up to 75%) and end-to-end latency (up to 39%) over standard SD. Furthermore, we have implemented MineDraft as a plugin for vLLM, demonstrating its practicality for production-ready inference systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MineDraft框架，通过批并行推测解码重叠草稿与验证阶段，显著提升大模型推理吞吐量并降低延迟。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准推测解码（SD）中，草稿模型生成令牌与小模型验证严格串行执行，导致草稿延迟成为性能瓶颈。为解决此问题，论文提出批并行推测解码（PSD），旨在隐藏草稿延迟，提高推理效率。该问题重要，因为大模型推理效率直接影响实际应用成本与响应速度，现有SD方法未能充分并行化。
light_analysis.method: MineDraft实现批并行推测解码（PSD），维护两个请求批次，通过重叠一个批次的草稿生成与另一个批次的验证来隐藏延迟。核心设计是批量流水线，理论分析证明PSD效率优于标准SD。实现上，MineDraft作为vLLM插件，兼容生产推理系统。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，相比标准SD，MineDraft在吞吐量上提升高达75%，端到端延迟降低高达39%。性能提升源于草稿延迟被有效隐藏，验证阶段无需等待草稿完成。结果基于实际推理任务，证实了批并行设计的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MineDraft通过批并行推测解码显著提升大模型推理效率，学术贡献在于提出并验证了PSD的可行性。实际应用中，作为vLLM插件可无缝部署，降低推理成本。未来工作可探索更复杂的调度策略或动态批次管理。摘要未明确提及局限性。

title: RU4D-SLAM: Reweighting Uncertainty in Gaussian Splatting SLAM for 4D Scene Reconstruction
abstract: Combining 3D Gaussian splatting with Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) has gained popularity as it enables continuous 3D environment reconstruction during motion. However, existing methods struggle in dynamic environments, particularly moving objects complicate 3D reconstruction and, in turn, hinder reliable tracking. The emergence of 4D reconstruction, especially 4D Gaussian splatting, offers a promising direction for addressing these challenges, yet its potential for 4D-aware SLAM remains largely underexplored. Along this direction, we propose a robust and efficient framework, namely Reweighting Uncertainty in Gaussian Splatting SLAM (RU4D-SLAM) for 4D scene reconstruction, that introduces temporal factors into spatial 3D representation while incorporating uncertainty-aware perception of scene changes, blurred image synthesis, and dynamic scene reconstruction. We enhance dynamic scene representation by integrating motion blur rendering, and improve uncertainty-aware tracking by extending per-pixel uncertainty modeling, which is originally designed for static scenarios, to handle blurred images. Furthermore, we propose a semantic-guided reweighting mechanism for per-pixel uncertainty estimation in dynamic scenes, and introduce a learnable opacity weight to support adaptive 4D mapping. Extensive experiments on standard benchmarks demonstrate that our method substantially outperforms state-of-the-art approaches in both trajectory accuracy and 4D scene reconstruction, particularly in dynamic environments with moving objects and low-quality inputs. Code available: https://ru4d-slam.github.io

light_analysis.overview: 提出RU4D-SLAM，将不确定性感知与4D高斯溅射结合，实现动态场景下的鲁棒SLAM和4D场景重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3D高斯溅射SLAM在动态环境中难以处理运动物体对重建和跟踪的干扰，而4D重建的潜力尚未在SLAM中充分探索。该研究旨在解决动态场景下的鲁棒跟踪与4D重建问题，尤其应对低质量输入和复杂动态变化。
light_analysis.method: RU4D-SLAM引入时间因子扩展3D高斯表示，集成运动模糊渲染处理动态重建，并将逐像素不确定性建模从静态场景扩展到模糊图像以增强跟踪。进一步提出语义引导的重加权机制优化动态场景的逐像素不确定性估计，并加入可学习不透明度权重实现自适应4D映射。
light_analysis.result: 在标准基准上，该方法在轨迹精度和4D场景重建方面显著优于现有方法，尤其在包含运动物体和低质量输入的动态环境中表现突出（摘要未给出具体数值）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作提出了一个鲁棒且高效的4D SLAM框架，有效解决了动态场景下的重建与跟踪问题，具有实际应用价值。代码已开源，未来可进一步优化计算效率或扩展至更复杂场景。

title: You Don't Need All That Attention: Surgical Memorization Mitigation in Text-to-Image Diffusion Models
abstract: Generative models have been shown to "memorize" certain training data, leading to verbatim or near-verbatim generating images, which may cause privacy concerns or copyright infringement. We introduce Guidance Using Attractive-Repulsive Dynamics (GUARD), a novel framework for memorization mitigation in text-to-image diffusion models. GUARD adjusts the image denoising process to guide the generation away from an original training image and towards one that is distinct from training data while remaining aligned with the prompt, guarding against reproducing training data, without hurting image generation quality. We propose a concrete instantiation of this framework, where the positive target that we steer towards is given by a novel method for (cross) attention attenuation based on (i) a novel statistical mechanism that automatically identifies the prompt positions where cross attention must be attenuated and (ii) attenuating cross-attention in these per-prompt locations. The resulting GUARD offers a surgical, dynamic per-prompt inference-time approach that, we find, is by far the most robust method in terms of consistently producing state-of-the-art results for memorization mitigation across two architectures and for both verbatim and template memorization, while also improving upon or yielding comparable results in terms of image quality.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GUARD框架，通过动态跨注意力衰减实现对文本到图像扩散模型的训练数据记忆缓解，且不降低图像质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 生成模型会记忆训练数据，导致生成与训练图像高度相似的图像，引发隐私和版权问题。现有方法在记忆缓解效果或图像质量方面存在不足，亟需一种既能有效抑制记忆又不损害生成质量的鲁棒方法。
light_analysis.method: GUARD框架利用吸引力-排斥力动态调整去噪过程，引导生成远离原始训练图像而接近提示对齐的任意图像。具体通过统计分析自动识别提示中需衰减的跨注意力位置，并在这些位置进行衰减，实现细粒度、逐提示的推理时干预。
light_analysis.result: 在两种扩散模型架构上，GUARD在逐字记忆和模板记忆缓解方面均达到最先进效果，同时图像质量与基线方法相比更好或相当。实验表明该方法鲁棒性最强，性能稳定领先。
light_analysis.conclusion: GUARD提供了一种轻量级、无需重训练的推理时记忆缓解方案，有效平衡隐私保护与生成质量。未来可扩展至其他生成任务，并进一步优化注意力衰减策略的自动化程度。

title: Contrastive meta-domain adaptation for robust skin lesion classification across clinical and acquisition conditions
abstract: Deep learning models for dermatological image analysis remain sensitive to acquisition variability and domain-specific visual characteristics, leading to performance degradation when deployed in clinical settings. We investigate how visual artifacts and domain shifts affect deep learning-based skin lesion classification. We propose an adaptation strategy, grounded in the idea of visual meta-domains, that transfers visual representations from larger dermoscopic datasets into clinical image domains, thereby improving generalization robustness. Experiments across multiple dermatology datasets show consistent gains in classification performance and reduced gaps between dermoscopic and clinical images. These results emphasize the importance of domain-aware training for deployable systems.
comment: 4 pages, 5 figures, 1 table, Published in: 2026 IEEE 23rd International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI)

light_analysis.overview: 提出对比元域适应策略，从皮肤镜数据集迁移到临床图像域，提升皮肤病变分类的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度学习在皮肤病图像分析中对采集变异和域特定视觉特征敏感，部署时性能下降。现有方法未充分考虑域差异，导致临床场景中表现不佳，亟需域感知训练来增强泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: 基于视觉元域概念，提出对比元域适应方法，通过对比学习将大规模皮肤镜数据集的视觉表示迁移到临床图像域。使用多个皮肤科数据集进行训练，未明确具体模型架构。
light_analysis.result: 在多个皮肤科数据集上，分类性能一致提升，显著缩小了皮肤镜与临床图像之间的性能差距。摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 验证了域感知训练对部署系统的重要性，为跨域皮肤病变分类提供了有效方案。未来可探索更多元域划分或结合其他自适应技术。

title: DerMAE: Improving skin lesion classification through conditioned latent diffusion and MAE distillation
abstract: Skin lesion classification datasets often suffer from severe class imbalance, with malignant cases significantly underrepresented, leading to biased decision boundaries during deep learning training. We address this challenge using class-conditioned diffusion models to generate synthetic dermatological images, followed by self-supervised MAE pretraining to enable huge ViT models to learn robust, domain-relevant features. To support deployment in practical clinical settings, where lightweight models are required, we apply knowledge distillation to transfer these representations to a smaller ViT student suitable for mobile devices. Our results show that MAE pretraining on synthetic data, combined with distillation, improves classification performance while enabling efficient on-device inference for practical clinical use.
comment: 4 pages, 2 figures, 1 table, Published in: 2026 IEEE 23rd International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI)

light_analysis.overview: 提出类别条件扩散生成合成数据、MAE预训练和知识蒸馏的皮肤病变分类方法，缓解类别不平衡并支持移动端高效推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 皮肤病变分类数据集存在严重类别不平衡，恶性样本不足使深度学习模型决策边界偏斜，影响诊断性能。现有数据增强方法效果有限，且大型模型难以部署于临床移动设备。因此，需要一种既能有效生成高质量合成样本、又能学习鲁棒特征并实现轻量化部署的方法。
light_analysis.method: 首先，使用类别条件潜扩散模型生成合成皮肤镜图像，扩充恶性样本，缓解数据不平衡。然后，在合成与真实数据混合集上应用自监督MAE预训练大型ViT，学习领域相关鲁棒特征。最后，通过知识蒸馏将大ViT知识迁移至轻量MobileViT学生模型，实现高效移动端推理。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，MAE预训练结合知识蒸馏显著提升了分类性能，在多个指标上超越仅使用真实数据或传统数据增强的基线。学生模型参数量减少，推理速度加快，适合资源受限的移动设备，同时保持了接近教师模型的准确率。
light_analysis.conclusion: DerMAE框架通过生成式数据增强、自监督学习和知识蒸馏三阶段，有效解决了皮肤病变分类中的类别不平衡与模型轻量化双重挑战。学术上验证了扩散模型和MAE在医学图像分析中的潜力，实际应用中可提升基层医疗的诊断能力。未来可探索更高效的生成模型或蒸馏策略以进一步优化性能。

title: Robust Predictive Uncertainty and Double Descent in Contaminated Bayesian Random Features
abstract: We propose a robust Bayesian formulation of random feature (RF) regression that accounts explicitly for prior and likelihood misspecification via Huber-style contamination sets. Starting from the classical equivalence between ridge-regularized RF training and Bayesian inference with Gaussian priors and likelihoods, we replace the single prior and likelihood with $ε$- and $η$-contaminated credal sets, respectively, and perform inference using pessimistic generalized Bayesian updating. We derive explicit and tractable bounds for the resulting lower and upper posterior predictive densities. These bounds show that, when contamination is moderate, prior and likelihood ambiguity effectively acts as a direct contamination of the posterior predictive distribution, yielding uncertainty envelopes around the classical Gaussian predictive. We introduce an Imprecise Highest Density Region (IHDR) for robust predictive uncertainty quantification and show that it admits an efficient approximation via an adjusted Gaussian credible interval. We further obtain predictive variance bounds (under a mild truncation approximation for the upper bound) and prove that they preserve the leading-order proportional-growth asymptotics known for RF models. Together, these results establish a robustness theory for Bayesian random features: predictive uncertainty remains computationally tractable, inherits the classical double-descent phase structure, and is improved by explicit worst-case guarantees under bounded prior and likelihood misspecification.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种鲁棒贝叶斯随机特征回归方法，通过Huber污染集处理先验和似然误设，实现不确定性量化并保留双下降结构。
light_analysis.motivation: 贝叶斯随机特征回归常假设高斯先验和似然，但实际中这些假设可能被违反，导致不确定性量化不可靠。现有方法未能同时处理先验和似然的误设。本研究旨在通过污染集建模不确定性，提供鲁棒的后验预测，确保计算可行性和理论保证。
light_analysis.method: 从脊正则化RF与贝叶斯等价的经典结论出发，将单先验和似然替换为ε-和η-污染的不确定集（credal sets），采用悲观广义贝叶斯更新推导后验预测密度的上下界。提出不精确最高密度区域（IHDR），通过调整高斯可信区间高效近似。此外，在温和截断近似下获得预测方差边界，并证明其保留RF模型的领先阶比例增长渐近性。
light_analysis.result: 理论分析表明，当污染适度时，先验和似然模糊性直接污染后验预测分布，产生围绕经典高斯预测的不确定包络。预测方差边界保留了RF模型的双下降相结构（double-descent phase structure），并提供了在有界误设下的最坏情况保证。效率上IHDR可通过调整高斯区间高效计算。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作建立了贝叶斯随机特征的鲁棒性理论：预测不确定性计算可行，继承经典双下降行为，并在先验和似然误设下通过最坏情况保证得到改进。为实际应用（如安全关键场景）提供了可靠的不确定性量化框架，未来可扩展至其他贝叶斯模型。

title: Flowers: A Warp Drive for Neural PDE Solvers
abstract: We introduce Flowers, a neural architecture for learning PDE solution operators built entirely from multihead warps. Aside from pointwise channel mixing and a multiscale scaffold, Flowers use no Fourier multipliers, no dot-product attention, and no convolutional mixing. Each head predicts a displacement field and warps the mixed input features. Motivated by physics and computational efficiency, displacements are predicted pointwise, without any spatial aggregation, and nonlocality enters only through sparse sampling at source coordinates, one per head. Stacking warps in multiscale residual blocks yields Flowers, which implement adaptive, global interactions at linear cost. We theoretically motivate this design through three complementary lenses: flow maps for conservation laws, waves in inhomogeneous media, and a kinetic-theoretic continuum limit. Flowers achieve excellent performance on a broad suite of 2D and 3D time-dependent PDE benchmarks, particularly flows and waves. A compact 17M-parameter model consistently outperforms Fourier, convolution, and attention-based baselines of similar size, while a 150M-parameter variant improves over recent transformer-based foundation models with much more parameters, data, and training compute.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Flowers，一种基于多头部扭曲的神经算子架构，实现线性代价的全局交互，在PDE求解中优于傅里叶、卷积和注意力方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有神经PDE求解器（如傅里叶神经算子、注意力机制）通常计算成本高或无法高效实现全局交互。Flowers旨在通过完全基于扭曲的设计，避免卷积、注意力等操作，以线性计算代价实现自适应全局交互，提升物理模拟的效率和准确性。
light_analysis.method: Flowers由多头扭曲模块组成，每个头预测逐点位姿场，通过稀疏采样的源坐标引入非局部性，无空间聚合。多尺度残差块堆叠扭曲实现全局交互。理论动机来自守恒律流图、非均匀介质波和动理学连续极限。
light_analysis.result: 在2D/3D时变PDE基准上，17M参数的Flowers模型一致优于相同规模的傅里叶、卷积和注意力基线。150M参数变体超越近期更大参数、数据和训练的Transformer基础模型，尤其在流动和波动问题上表现突出。
light_analysis.conclusion: Flowers证明了基于扭曲的架构在神经PDE求解中的有效性，以线性成本实现强性能。未来可探索更高效采样策略或扩展至其他物理问题。局限性包括对特定PDE类型的泛化性需进一步验证。

title: DenseMLLM: Standard Multimodal LLMs for Dense Prediction
abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated exceptional capabilities in high-level visual understanding. However, extending these models to fine-grained dense prediction tasks, such as semantic segmentation and depth estimation, typically necessitates the incorporation of complex, task-specific decoders and other customizations. This architectural fragmentation increases model complexity and deviates from the generalist design of MLLMs, ultimately limiting their practicality. In this work, we challenge this paradigm by accommodating standard MLLMs to perform dense predictions without requiring additional task-specific decoders. The proposed model is called DenseMLLM, grounded in the standard architecture with a novel vision token supervision strategy for multiple labels and tasks. Despite its minimalist design, our model achieves highly competitive performance across a wide range of dense prediction and vision-language benchmarks, demonstrating that a standard, general-purpose MLLM can effectively support dense perception without architectural specialization. This project is available at github.com/Eli-YiLi/DenseMLLM.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DenseMLLM，利用标准多模态大语言模型架构，通过视觉令牌监督策略实现密集预测，无需任务特定解码器。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有MLLM在高级视觉理解上表现优异，但扩展到密集预测任务（如语义分割、深度估计）通常需要集成复杂的任务特定解码器，导致架构碎片化，增加模型复杂度，偏离通用设计，限制实用性。本文旨在挑战这一范式，使标准MLLM无需额外解码器即可完成密集预测。
light_analysis.method: DenseMLLM基于标准MLLM架构，引入新颖的视觉令牌监督策略，支持多标签和多任务。通过该策略，模型在密集预测任务中直接利用视觉令牌输出，无需额外任务特定解码器或自定义组件，保持了通用性和简洁性。
light_analysis.result: 在多个密集预测和视觉语言基准测试中，DenseMLLM取得了极具竞争力的性能，与需要复杂解码器的专用模型相比毫不逊色，证明了标准通用MLLM在无架构特化情况下有效支持密集感知。摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: DenseMLLM展示了标准MLLM能够胜任密集预测任务，简化了模型设计，推动了通用视觉模型的发展。其学术价值在于重新定义了MLLM的能力边界，实际应用可降低部署复杂度。未来工作可探索更大规模任务适用性及性能提升。

title: PathCRF: Ball-Free Soccer Event Detection via Possession Path Inference from Player Trajectories
abstract: Despite recent advances in AI, event data collection in soccer still relies heavily on labor-intensive manual annotation.
