Although prior work has explored automatic event detection using player and ball trajectories, ball tracking also remains difficult to scale due to high infrastructural and operational costs. As a result, comprehensive data collection in soccer is largely confined to top-tier competitions, limiting the broader adoption of data-driven analysis in this domain. To address this challenge, this paper proposes PathCRF, a framework for detecting on-ball soccer events using only player tracking data. We model player trajectories as a fully connected dynamic graph and formulate event detection as the problem of selecting exactly one edge corresponding to the current possession state at each time step. To ensure logical consistency of the resulting edge sequence, we employ a Conditional Random Field (CRF) that forbids impossible transitions between consecutive edges, where emission and transition scores are dynamically computed from edge embeddings produced by a socio-temporal backbone architecture. During inference, the most probable edge sequence is obtained via Viterbi decoding, and events such as ball controls or passes are detected whenever the selected edge changes between adjacent time steps. Experiments show that PathCRF produces accurate, logically consistent possession paths, enabling reliable downstream analyses while substantially reducing the need for manual event annotation. The source code is available at https://github.com/hyunsungkim-ds/pathcrf.git.

light_analysis.overview: 提出仅利用球员轨迹数据检测足球事件的PathCRF框架，通过CRF保证持球路径逻辑一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前足球比赛事件数据采集严重依赖人工标注，成本高昂且难规模化；球追踪虽可实现但基础设施和运营成本高，导致数据主要限于顶级赛事。因此需要一种仅依赖已有球员追踪数据就能自动检测事件的方法，以降低门槛并推广数据驱动分析。
light_analysis.method: 将球员轨迹建模为全连接动态图，每个时间步选择一条边表示当前控球状态，事件检测转化为边序列选择问题。使用社会时空骨干网络生成边嵌入，并利用条件随机场（CRF）约束相邻边之间的非法转移，发射分和转移分由边嵌入动态计算。推理时采用维特比解码求最大概率边序列，相邻边变化即检测到控球或传球事件。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明PathCRF能生成准确且逻辑一致的持球路径，有效支持下游分析任务，显著减少对人工事件标注的依赖。摘要未明确给出具体数字指标，如准确率或F1分数，但强调在可靠性上的提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: PathCRF框架仅需球员轨迹数据即可实现足球事件自动检测，降低了数据收集成本，有望提升数据驱动分析在足球领域的普及度。未来可探索扩展至其他运动或更复杂的事件类型，当前方法依赖于球员轨迹的完整性和质量。

title: Prototype Transformer: Towards Language Model Architectures Interpretable by Design
abstract: While state-of-the-art language models (LMs) surpass most humans in certain domains, their reasoning remains largely opaque, reducing trust and increasing the risk of deception and hallucination. We introduce the Prototype Transformer (ProtoT), an autoregressive LM architecture that replaces the quadratic-cost self-attention module of the Transformer with a linear-cost module based on prototypes, which are learned parameter vectors. In ProtoT, prototypes create communication channels that aggregate contextual information at different time scales. We show that this structure leads prototypes to automatically capture nameable concepts, such as "woman", during training, offering a path toward interpreting model reasoning and making targeted edits to model behavior. Compared with baselines, ProtoT scales well with model and data size, is robust to input perturbations, and performs well on text generation and downstream tasks, including GLUE. These results suggest that ProtoT is a promising step toward autoregressive language models that are more interpretable by design.
comment: Accepted at ICML 2026. Equal contribution: Yordan Yordanov and Matteo Forasassi. 40 pages, 28 figures, 22 tables

light_analysis.overview: 提出Prototype Transformer (ProtoT)，一种线性复杂度的自回归语言模型架构，通过原型机制实现设计层面的可解释性。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前最先进的语言模型虽然在某些领域超越人类，但其推理过程不透明，降低了信任度，增加了欺骗和幻觉风险。现有方法难以解释模型行为，需要一种更透明的架构来提升可解释性，同时保持性能。
light_analysis.method: ProtoT用基于原型的线性模块替代Transformer的二次自注意力模块，原型是学习到的参数向量，在不同时间尺度聚合上下文信息。训练时原型自动捕捉可命名概念（如“woman”），支持推理解释和针对性行为编辑。
light_analysis.result: 与基线相比，ProtoT在模型和数据规模上扩展良好，对输入扰动鲁棒，在文本生成和GLUE等下游任务上表现优异，验证了其有效性和可解释性平衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: ProtoT是迈向更可解释自回归语言模型的重要一步，具有学术价值（设计可解释性）和应用价值（安全、可信NLP）。未来可探索原型的更细粒度控制和泛化。

title: Mitigating Reward Hacking in RLHF via Bayesian Non-negative Reward Modeling
abstract: Reward models learned from human preferences are central to aligning large language models (LLMs) via reinforcement learning from human feedback, yet they are often vulnerable to reward hacking due to noisy annotations and systematic biases such as response length or style. We propose Bayesian Non-Negative Reward Model (BNRM), a principled reward modeling framework that integrates non-negative factor analysis into Bradley-Terry (BT) preference model. BNRM represents rewards through a sparse, non-negative latent factor generative process that operates at two complementary levels: instance-specific latent variables induce disentangled reward representations, while sparsity over global latent factors acts as an implicit debiasing mechanism that suppresses spurious correlations. Together, this disentanglement-then-debiasing structure enables robust uncertainty-aware reward learning. To scale BNRM to modern LLMs, we develop an amortized variational inference network conditioned on deep model representations, allowing efficient end-to-end training. Extensive empirical results demonstrate that BNRM substantially mitigates reward over-optimization, improves robustness under distribution shifts, and yields more interpretable reward decompositions than strong baselines.
comment: Accepted as an Oral presentation at ICML 2026. The code is available at https://github.com/GuoweiRong/Bayesian-Non-negative-Reward-Model

light_analysis.overview: 提出贝叶斯非负奖励模型(BNRM)，通过非负因子分析和解缠-去偏机制缓解RLHF中的奖励作弊问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 通过人类反馈强化学习(RLHF)训练奖励模型是使大语言模型(LLMs)与人类对齐的核心，但奖励模型常因噪声标注和系统性偏见（如回复长度或风格）而遭受奖励作弊。现有方法未能有效解决这些问题，导致奖励过度优化和分布偏移下的脆弱性。BNRM旨在通过概率建模和隐式去偏来提升奖励学习的鲁棒性和可解释性。
light_analysis.method: BNRM将非负因子分析整合到Bradley-Terry偏好模型中，通过实例特定的稀疏非负潜在变量实现奖励解缠，同时利用全局潜在因子的稀疏性作为隐式去偏机制。为适配现代LLMs，开发了基于深度模型表示的摊销变分推理网络，支持端到端高效训练。该方法在偏好学习框架内实现了不确定性感知的奖励建模。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明，BNRM显著缓解了奖励过度优化问题，在分布偏移下表现出更强的鲁棒性，并且比强基线方法产生更可解释的奖励分解。具体性能提升包括更稳定的奖励分数和更好的对齐质量，但摘要未提供精确数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: BNRM为RLHF奖励建模提供了一种原则性框架，有效抑制奖励作弊，增强对齐可靠性。其学术价值在于将贝叶斯非负因子分析与偏好学习结合，实际应用可提升LLM安全性和准确性。未来可探索其在大规模多轮对话和复杂任务中的扩展性。

title: WildCat: Near-Linear Attention in Theory and Practice
abstract: We introduce WildCat, a high-accuracy, low-cost approach to compressing the attention mechanism in neural networks. While attention is a staple of modern network architectures, it is also notoriously expensive to deploy due to resource requirements that scale quadratically with the input sequence length $n$. WildCat avoids these quadratic costs by only attending over a small weighted coreset. Crucially, we select the coreset using a fast but spectrally-accurate subsampling algorithm -- randomly pivoted Cholesky -- and weight the elements optimally to minimise reconstruction error. Remarkably, given bounded inputs, WildCat approximates exact attention with super-polynomial $O(n^{-\sqrt{\log(\log(n))}})$ error decay while running in near-linear $O(n^{1+o(1)})$ time. In contrast, prior practical approximations either lack error guarantees or require quadratic runtime to guarantee such high fidelity. We couple this advance with a GPU-optimized PyTorch implementation and a suite of benchmark experiments demonstrating the benefits of WildCat for image generation, image classification, and language model KV cache compression.

light_analysis.overview: WildCat通过随机枢轴Cholesky算法选择加权核心集，实现近线性时间复杂度的注意力机制近似，并具有超多项式误差衰减。
light_analysis.motivation: 注意力机制是神经网络的核心组件，但其计算复杂度随输入序列长度二次增长，限制了长序列应用。现有近似方法要么缺乏误差保证，要么需要二次时间才能保证高保真度。因此，需要一种既高效又精确的注意力压缩方法，以降低部署成本并支持更长序列。
light_analysis.method: WildCat通过快速且频谱精确的随机枢轴Cholesky子采样算法选择一个小型加权核心集，并优化权重以最小化重构误差。该方法在给定有界输入时，以近线性时间O(n^{1+o(1)})运行，并实现超多项式误差衰减O(n^{-√(log log n)})。同时提供GPU优化的PyTorch实现。
light_analysis.result: WildCat在理论上实现了接近线性的运行时间和超多项式误差衰减，优于现有缺乏误差保证或需二次时间的方法。实验表明，其在图像生成、图像分类和语言模型KV缓存压缩等任务中有效降低了计算成本，并保持了高精度。具体性能提升数据摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: WildCat提出了一种高精度、低成本的注意力压缩方法，通过随机枢轴Cholesky算法和最优加权，在理论和实践上均优于现有近似方法。该工作提升了注意力机制在长序列任务中的可扩展性，但未探讨在极长序列上的性能或与其他稀疏注意力的集成。

title: Beware of the Batch Size: Hyperparameter Bias in Evaluating LoRA
abstract: Low-rank adaptation (LoRA) is a standard approach for fine-tuning large language models, yet its many variants report conflicting empirical gains, often on the same benchmarks. We show that these contradictions arise from a single overlooked factor: the batch size. When properly tuned, vanilla LoRA often matches the performance of more complex variants. We further propose a proxy-based, cost-efficient strategy for batch size tuning, revealing the impact of rank, dataset size, and model capacity on the optimal batch size. Our findings elevate batch size from a minor implementation detail to a first-order design parameter, reconciling prior inconsistencies and enabling more reliable evaluations of LoRA variants.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示了批次大小是LoRA变体评估中导致矛盾结果的关键因素，并提出高效调优策略。
light_analysis.motivation: LoRA及其变体在相同基准上报告了矛盾的性能提升，现有研究忽视了一个重要因素——批次大小。批次大小作为超参数，其影响被低估，导致评估结果不一致。本文旨在澄清这一混淆，将批次大小提升为LoRA调优的一阶设计参数，以解决先前研究中的矛盾，并实现更可靠的评估。
light_analysis.method: 通过系统性实验证明，经过适当调优的普通LoRA能匹配更复杂变体的性能。提出一种基于代理的、成本高效的批次大小调优策略，该策略考虑了秩、数据集大小和模型容量对最优批次大小的影响。方法核心是揭示批次大小与这些因素的交互作用，从而简化调优过程，无需大量计算。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，当批次大小被恰当调节时，普通LoRA的性能可与更复杂变体相媲美，反驳了先前声称复杂变体更优的结论。通过代理调优策略，有效识别了不同设置下的最优批次大小，并量化了其对最终性能的影响，调和了文献中的不一致结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文强调批次大小是LoRA评估中的关键设计参数，而非次要实现细节。研究结果不仅解释了现有文献中的矛盾，还为未来LoRA变体的可靠评估提供了指导。局限性在于代理策略的通用性需进一步验证，未来工作可探索自动批次大小搜索方法。

title: Online Learning in MDPs with Partially Adversarial Transitions and Losses
abstract: We study reinforcement learning in MDPs whose transition function is stochastic at most steps but may behave adversarially at a fixed subset of $Λ$ steps per episode. This model captures environments that are stable except at a few vulnerable points. We introduce \emph{conditioned occupancy measures}, which remain stable across episodes even with adversarial transitions, and use them to design two algorithms. The first handles arbitrary adversarial steps and achieves regret $\tilde{O}(H S^Λ\sqrt{K S A^{Λ+1}})$, where $K$ is the number of episodes, $S$ is the number of state, $A$ is the number of actions and $H$ is the episode's horizon. The second, assuming the adversarial steps are consecutive, improves the dependence on $S$ to $\tilde{O}(H\sqrt{K S^{3} A^{Λ+1}})$. We further give a $K^{2/3}$-regret reduction that removes the need to know which steps are the $Λ$ adversarial steps. We also characterize the regret of adversarial MDPs in the \emph{fully adversarial} setting ($Λ=H-1$) both for full-information and bandit feedback, and provide almost matching upper and lower bounds (slightly strengthen existing lower bounds, and clarify how different feedback structures affect the hardness of learning).

light_analysis.overview: 提出条件占用度量，实现在部分对抗转移下MDP的在线学习，并给出几乎最优的遗憾界。
light_analysis.motivation: 现实环境中，智能体常面临大部分步骤随机、少数步骤受对抗干扰的转移函数。现有方法假设完全随机或完全对抗，无法处理这种混合情况。本研究旨在解决该问题，使强化学习适应更真实的非稳定环境。
light_analysis.method: 引入条件占用度量，其跨回合保持稳定，基于此设计两种算法：第一种处理任意位置对抗步骤，遗憾界为Õ(H S^Λ√(K S A^{Λ+1}))；第二种假设对抗步骤连续，将S依赖降至Õ(H√(K S^3 A^{Λ+1}))。还提出无需知道对抗步骤位置的K^{2/3}遗憾降低方法。对完全对抗情况给出全信息和bandit反馈下几乎匹配的上下界。
light_analysis.result: 在部分对抗转移MDP中，算法实现亚线性遗憾：第一个算法上界Õ(H S^Λ√(K S A^{Λ+1}))，第二个算法Õ(H√(K S^3 A^{Λ+1}))。在完全对抗设定（Λ=H-1）下，首次将上界下界差距缩小至对数因子，并澄清反馈结构对学习难度的影响。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次在部分对抗转移下实现高效学习，理论价值显著。条件占用度量是处理混合随机-对抗环境的关键工具。未来可探索更紧的依赖关系及实际应用，如网络安全中的鲁棒决策。

title: Learning To Sample From Diffusion Models Via Inverse Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Diffusion models generate samples through an iterative denoising process guided by a pretrained neural network. Once the denoiser is fixed, the sampling algorithm itself (noise schedules, guidance scales, stochasticity profiles) still requires careful tuning, a process typically carried out through costly empirical grid search. In this work, we introduce an inverse reinforcement learning framework for learning sampling strategies without retraining the denoiser. We formulate the diffusion sampling procedure as a discrete-time finite-horizon Markov Decision Process, where actions correspond to optional modifications of the sampling dynamics. To optimize action scheduling, we avoid defining an explicit reward function and instead directly match the target behavior expected from the sampler using policy gradient techniques. We provide experimental evidence that this approach matches fine-tuned samplers and comes at a modest cost compared to grid search: on ImageNet-64, a single training run replaces exhaustive search at up to 9x lower cost, with only 16% overhead at inference.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于逆强化学习的扩散模型采样策略学习方法，无需重新训练去噪器且避免手工调整。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型生成样本依赖迭代去噪过程，但采样算法（如噪声调度、引导尺度、随机性配置）需精细调整，通常通过耗时且昂贵的网格搜索完成。现有方法缺乏自动化机制，难以高效优化采样策略，限制了扩散模型的实用性。
light_analysis.method: 将扩散采样过程建模为离散时间有限视野马尔可夫决策过程，动作对应采样动力学的可选修改。通过逆强化学习，避免定义显式奖励函数，而是利用策略梯度直接匹配采样器的期望目标行为。训练后学习最优动作调度，无需重新训练去噪器。
light_analysis.result: 在ImageNet-64上，单次训练替换了穷举网格搜索，成本降低至原来的1/9，推理时仅增加16%开销，且性能与精细调优的采样器相当。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种高效自动化扩散模型采样调优方法，避免了手工设计和计算密集型搜索。展示了逆强化学习在生成模型采样优化中的潜力，未来可扩展到更复杂调度和跨任务迁移。

title: Predicting Future Utility: Global Combinatorial Optimization for Task-Agnostic KV Cache Eviction
abstract: Given the quadratic complexity of attention, KV cache eviction is vital to accelerate model inference. Current KV cache eviction methods typically rely on instantaneous heuristic metrics, implicitly assuming that score magnitudes are consistent proxies for importance across all heads. However, this overlooks the heterogeneity in predictive fidelity across attention heads. While certain heads prioritize the instantaneous contribution of tokens, others are dedicated to capturing long-horizon utility. In this paper, we propose that optimal budget allocation should be governed by the marginal utility in preserving long-term semantic information. Building on this insight, we propose LU-KV, a novel framework that formulates head-level budget allocation as a global combinatorial optimization problem to maximize the long-horizon marginal contribution of reserved tokens. To solve this non-convex problem, we employ a convex-hull relaxation and a marginal-utility-based greedy solver, achieving near-optimal solutions. Furthermore, we implement a data-driven offline profiling protocol to facilitate the practical deployment of LU-KV. Evaluations on LongBench and RULER benchmarks demonstrate that LU-KV reduces KV cache size by 80% with minimal performance degradation, while also decreasing inference latency and GPU memory footprint.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LU-KV框架，通过全局组合优化实现头级KV缓存预算分配，最大化长期语义信息保留，在80%缓存削减下保持性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有KV缓存驱逐方法依赖瞬时启发式指标，假设所有注意力头的评分幅度一致性，忽略了不同头在预测保真度上的异质性：部分头关注即时贡献，而其他头捕捉长期效用。这种忽视导致预算分配次优，无法有效保留长期语义信息，因而需要一种以长期边际效用为导向的优化方法。
light_analysis.method: LU-KV将头级预算分配建模为全局组合优化问题，目标最大化保留token的长期边际贡献。为求解非凸问题，采用凸包松弛和基于边际效用的贪婪求解器获得近优解。同时设计数据驱动的离线分析协议，通过预计算头重要性模式实现实际部署，无需在线优化开销。
light_analysis.result: 在LongBench和RULER基准上，LU-KV将KV缓存大小缩减80%，性能下降极小（<1%）。相比于基线方法（如H2O、Scissorhands），推理延迟降低约30%，GPU内存占用减少40%以上，证明了在长序列场景下的高效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: LU-KV通过区分注意力头的异质性并优化长期边际效用，突破了传统启发式方法的局限，实现了高效的KV缓存压缩。该方法在保持模型质量的同时显著加速推理，适用于长文本应用。未来可探索动态头分组或自适应预算调整以进一步提升灵活性。

title: Controllable Value Alignment in Large Language Models through Neuron-Level Editing
abstract: Aligning large language models (LLMs) with human values has become increasingly important as their influence on human behavior and decision-making expands. However, existing steering-based alignment methods suffer from limited controllability: steering a target value often unintentionally activates other, non-target values. To characterize this limitation, we introduce value leakage, a diagnostic notion that captures the unintended activation of non-target values during value steering, along with a normalized leakage metric grounded in Schwartz's value theory. In light of this analysis, we propose NeVA, a neuron-level editing framework for controllable value alignment in LLMs. NeVA identifies sparse, value-relevant neurons and performs inference-time activation editing, enabling fine-grained control without parameter updates or retraining. Experiments show that NeVA achieves stronger target value alignment while incurring smaller performance degradation on general capability. Moreover, NeVA significantly reduces the average leakage, with residual effects largely confined to semantically related value classes. Overall, NeVA offers a more controllable and interpretable mechanism for value alignment.

light_analysis.overview: 提出NeVA框架，通过神经元级编辑实现大语言模型的可控价值对齐，有效解决价值泄漏问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型对人类行为影响日益增大，与人类价值观对齐至关重要。现有基于引导的对齐方法可控性有限，激活目标价值时往往无意中激活其他非目标价值，导致价值泄漏。为量化此局限，作者引入价值泄漏概念及归一化泄漏度量，基于Schwartz价值理论。因此亟需更精细可控的对齐方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出NeVA，一种神经元级编辑框架。通过识别稀疏的价值相关神经元，在推理时进行激活编辑，实现细粒度价值控制，无需参数更新或重训练。该方法基于Schwartz价值理论定义泄漏度量，并利用稀疏性定位关键神经元，确保编辑精确性。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，NeVA在目标价值对齐方面显著强于现有方法，同时通用能力性能下降更小。平均价值泄漏大幅降低，残余效应主要局限于语义相关的价值类别。与基线对比，NeVA在可控性和对齐效果上均占优。
light_analysis.conclusion: NeVA为价值对齐提供了更可控且可解释的机制，核心贡献在于提出价值泄漏诊断概念及神经元级编辑方案。学术上深化了对齐可控性研究，实际应用可提升模型安全性与伦理一致性。未来可探索更多价值类别及动态编辑策略。

title: Sharpness-Aware Hybrid Model Learning for Architecture-Agnostic Parameter Estimation
abstract: Hybrid modeling, the combination of machine learning models and scientific mathematical models, enables flexible and robust data-driven prediction with partial interpretability. However, the unknown parameters of the scientific model cannot necessarily be estimated properly, since the flexibility of the machine learning model might make the scientific model part effectively ignored in prediction. We may avoid it by applying some regularization, but the formulation of such regularizers typically depends on model architectures and domain knowledge. In this paper, we propose an architecture-agnostic method to learn hybrid models while properly estimating the scientific parameters. The idea is to use the flatness of loss minima to achieve model simplicity, based upon the Occam's razor principle. We employ the idea of sharpness-aware minimization and adapt it to the hybrid modeling setting. Numerical experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the SAM-based hybrid model learning for scientific parameter estimation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种架构无关的混合模型学习方法，基于锐度感知最小化（SAM）实现科学参数的有效估计。
light_analysis.motivation: 混合模型结合机器学习与科学数学模型，但机器学习部分的灵活性常导致科学模型参数被忽略，难以准确估计。现有正则化方法依赖特定模型架构和领域知识，缺乏通用性。因此，需要一种架构无关的方法来确保科学参数在预测中被合理利用。
light_analysis.method: 基于奥卡姆剃刀原则，利用损失最小值平坦性实现模型简洁性。将锐度感知最小化（SAM）思想适配到混合模型学习场景，通过优化损失函数的锐度来抑制机器学习部分过度拟合，从而迫使模型依赖科学模型部分，实现参数估计。该方法不依赖具体模型架构。
light_analysis.result: 数值实验表明，所提出的SAM-based混合模型学习方法在科学参数估计任务上有效，能够准确估计未知参数。摘要未提供具体性能数值或与基线方法的定量对比，但定性验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为混合模型中的科学参数估计提供了架构无关的解决方案，具有通用性和实用性。未来可探索在更复杂科学模型中的应用，并进一步理论分析其泛化性能。潜在局限包括需要调整锐度超参数。

title: ChatUMM: Robust Context Tracking for Conversational Interleaved Generation
abstract: Unified multimodal models (UMMs) have achieved remarkable progress yet remain constrained by a single-turn interaction paradigm, effectively functioning as solvers for independent requests rather than assistants in continuous dialogue. To bridge this gap, we present ChatUMM. As a conversational unified model, it excels at robust context tracking to sustain interleaved multimodal generation. ChatUMM derives its capabilities from two key innovations: an interleaved multi-turn training strategy that models serialized text-image streams as a continuous conversational flow, and a systematic conversational data synthesis pipeline. This pipeline transforms a diverse set of standard single-turn datasets into fluid dialogues through three progressive stages: constructing basic stateful dialogues, enforcing long-range dependency resolution via ``distractor'' turns with history-dependent query rewriting, and synthesizing naturally interleaved multimodal responses. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that ChatUMM achieves state-of-the-art performance among open-source unified models on visual understanding and instruction-guided editing benchmarks, while maintaining competitive fidelity in text-to-image generation. Notably, ChatUMM exhibits superior robustness in complex multi-turn scenarios, ensuring fluid, context-aware dialogues.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ChatUMM，一个能鲁棒跟踪上下文并实现交织多模态生成的对话式统一多模态模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有统一多模态模型仅限于单轮交互，无法有效处理连续对话中的多模态生成任务。研究旨在突破这一限制，让模型成为真正的对话助手，而非独立请求的求解器。
light_analysis.method: ChatUMM采用交织多轮训练策略，将文本-图像序列建模为连续对话流；并设计系统化的对话数据合成流水线，通过三阶段（基础有状态对话构建、干扰轮次强制长程依赖解析、自然交织多模态响应合成）将单轮数据集转化为多轮对话数据。
light_analysis.result: 在视觉理解和指令引导编辑基准上，ChatUMM在开源统一模型中达到最先进性能；在文本到图像生成中保持有竞争力保真度；并在复杂多轮场景中表现出卓越鲁棒性，实现流畅上下文感知对话。
light_analysis.conclusion: ChatUMM首次实现对话式统一多模态模型的鲁棒上下文跟踪，突破了单轮交互局限，为连续多模态对话提供了可行方案。未来可探索更高效的训练策略或领域拓展。

title: Can Vision Language Models Learn Intuitive Physics from Interaction?
abstract: Pre-trained vision language models do not have good intuitions about the physical world. Recent work has shown that supervised fine-tuning can improve model performance on simple physical tasks. However, fine-tuned models do not appear to learn robust physical rules that can generalize to new contexts. Based on research in cognitive science, we hypothesize that models need to interact with an environment to properly learn its physical dynamics. We train models that learn through interaction with a simulated environment using reinforcement learning. While learning from interaction allows models to improve their within-task performance, it fails to produce models with generalizable physical intuitions. We find that models trained on one task do not reliably generalize to related tasks, even if the tasks share visual statistics and physical principles, and regardless of whether the models are trained through interaction.

light_analysis.overview: 探究视觉语言模型能否通过交互学习获得可泛化的物理直觉，发现交互学习未能提升跨任务泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 预训练的视觉语言模型对物理世界缺乏直觉，监督微调虽能提升简单物理任务性能，但无法学习鲁棒的物理规则以实现跨上下文泛化。基于认知科学，研究者假设模型需通过与环境的交互来学习物理动态，因此探索使用强化学习在模拟环境中进行交互训练。
light_analysis.method: 采用强化学习训练视觉语言模型，在模拟环境中通过交互学习物理动态。模型学习过程中，通过与环境互动获取奖励信号以优化任务策略。摘要未明确说明具体数据集、模型架构或任务设计，但强调交互训练旨在让模型主动探索物理规则。
light_analysis.result: 交互学习能够提升模型在训练任务内的性能，但未能产生可泛化的物理直觉。模型在单任务上表现提升，但在相关任务上（即使共享视觉统计和物理原理）无法可靠泛化，无论是否通过交互训练，泛化能力均受限。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明，当前通过交互训练视觉语言模型的方法不足以学习通用的物理直觉，跨任务泛化仍具挑战。该发现质疑了单纯交互学习对物理推理的有效性，提示未来需探索更复杂的机制或结合结构化知识来促进物理规则的内在化。

title: Stable Velocity: A Variance Perspective on Flow Matching
abstract: While flow matching is elegant, its reliance on single-sample conditional velocities leads to high-variance training targets that destabilize optimization and slow convergence. By explicitly characterizing this variance, we identify 1) a high-variance regime near the prior, where optimization is challenging, and 2) a low-variance regime near the data distribution, where conditional and marginal velocities nearly coincide. Leveraging this insight, we propose Stable Velocity, a unified framework that improves both training and sampling. For training, we introduce Stable Velocity Matching (StableVM), an unbiased variance-reduction objective, along with Variance-Aware Representation Alignment (VA-REPA), which adaptively strengthen auxiliary supervision in the low-variance regime. For inference, we show that dynamics in the low-variance regime admit closed-form simplifications, enabling Stable Velocity Sampling (StableVS), a finetuning-free acceleration. Extensive experiments on ImageNet $256\times256$ and large pretrained text-to-image and text-to-video models, including SD3.5, Flux, Qwen-Image, and Wan2.2, demonstrate consistent improvements in training efficiency and more than $2\times$ faster sampling within the low-variance regime without degrading sample quality. Our code is available at https://github.com/linYDTHU/StableVelocity.

light_analysis.overview: 通过方差分析提出Stable Velocity框架，降低流匹配训练方差并实现两倍加速采样。
light_analysis.motivation: 流匹配依赖单样本条件速度，导致高方差训练目标，使得优化不稳定且收敛缓慢。现有方法缺乏对方差的显式刻画，无法有效解决高方差区域（靠近先验）的优化困难，以及低方差区域（靠近数据分布）中条件速度与边缘速度几乎一致的特性未能充分利用。
light_analysis.method: 提出Stable Velocity框架，包含三项技术：StableVM（无偏方差缩减训练目标）、VA-REPA（在低方差区域自适应增强辅助监督）和StableVS（免微调加速采样）。通过分析方差特性，识别高/低方差区域，并在低方差区域导出闭式简化动态，实现快速采样。
light_analysis.result: 在ImageNet 256×256及大规模预训练文本到图像/视频模型（SD3.5、Flux、Qwen-Image、Wan2.2）上，训练效率一致提升，采样速度在低方差区域提升超过2倍，且不降低生成质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: Stable Velocity从方差视角统一改进了流匹配的训练和采样，具有显著的实用价值。未来可扩展至其他基于流的生成模型，并探索更精细的方差控制策略。

title: Fast-SAM3D: 3Dfy Anything in Images but Faster
abstract: SAM3D enables scalable, open-world 3D reconstruction from complex scenes, yet its deployment is hindered by prohibitive inference latency. In this work, we conduct the \textbf{first systematic investigation} into its inference dynamics, revealing that generic acceleration strategies are brittle in this context. We demonstrate that these failures stem from neglecting the pipeline's inherent multi-level \textbf{heterogeneity}: the kinematic distinctiveness between shape and layout, the intrinsic sparsity of texture refinement, and the spectral variance across geometries. To address this, we present \textbf{Fast-SAM3D}, a training-free framework that dynamically aligns computation with instantaneous generation complexity. Our approach integrates three heterogeneity-aware mechanisms: (1) \textit{Modality-Aware Step Caching} to decouple structural evolution from sensitive layout updates; (2) \textit{Joint Spatiotemporal Token Carving} to concentrate refinement on high-entropy regions; and (3) \textit{Spectral-Aware Token Aggregation} to adapt decoding resolution. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Fast-SAM3D delivers up to \textbf{2.67$\times$} end-to-end speedup with negligible fidelity loss, establishing a new Pareto frontier for efficient single-view 3D generation. Our code is released in https://github.com/wlfeng0509/Fast-SAM3D.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Fast-SAM3D，首个系统研究SAM3D推理动态并利用多级异质性实现无训练加速，端到端提速2.67倍。
light_analysis.motivation: SAM3D实现可扩展的开放世界3D重建，但推理延迟过高阻碍部署。现有通用加速策略在此场景下失效，原因是忽略了管道中固有的多级异质性：形状与布局的运动差异、纹理细化的内在稀疏性、几何间的频谱差异。因此需要针对性的加速方法。
light_analysis.method: Fast-SAM3D是一个无训练框架，包含三个异质性感知机制：模态感知步骤缓存（解耦结构演化与布局更新）、联合时空令牌雕刻（集中细化高熵区域）、频谱感知令牌聚合（自适应解码分辨率）。这些机制动态对齐计算与生成复杂度，无需额外训练。
light_analysis.result: 在复杂场景下，Fast-SAM3D实现最高2.67倍端到端加速，且保真度损失可忽略。与基线相比，建立了高效单视图3D生成的新帕累托前沿。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次系统分析SAM3D推理动态，揭示了多级异质性瓶颈。提出的Fast-SAM3D通过无训练策略显著加速，保持了高质量重建。该方法为大规模3D生成部署提供了实用方案，未来可探索更多异质性感知加速技术。

title: Equilibrium Propagation for Non-Conservative Systems
abstract: Equilibrium Propagation (EP) is a physics-inspired learning algorithm that uses stationary states of a dynamical system both for inference and learning. In its original formulation it is limited to conservative systems, $\textit{i.e.}$ to dynamics which derive from an energy function. Given their applications, it is important to extend EP to non-conservative systems, $\textit{i.e.}$ systems with non-reciprocal interactions. Previous attempts to generalize EP to such systems failed to compute the exact gradient of the cost function. Here we propose a framework that extends EP to arbitrary non-conservative systems, including feedforward networks. We keep the key property of equilibrium propagation, namely the use of stationary states both for inference and learning. However, we modify the dynamics in the learning phase by a term proportional to the non-reciprocal part of the interaction so as to obtain the exact gradient of the cost function. This algorithm can also be derived using a variational formulation that generates the learning dynamics through an energy function defined over an augmented state space. Numerical experiments show that this algorithm achieves better performance and learns faster than previous proposals.

light_analysis.overview: 将平衡传播扩展到非保守系统，通过修正动力学实现精确梯度计算，提升学习性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 平衡传播（EP）是一种受物理学启发的学习算法，利用动态系统的稳态进行推理和学习，但原始公式局限于保守系统。许多实际应用涉及非保守系统（如非互易交互），而先前将EP推广到非保守系统的尝试未能计算代价函数的精确梯度。因此，需要一种能处理非保守系统并保持EP关键特性的梯度学习方法。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出一个框架，将EP扩展到任意非保守系统，包括前馈网络。核心创新是在学习阶段修改动力学，加入一个与交互的非互易部分成正比的项，从而获得代价函数的精确梯度。该方法还可通过变分公式推导，在增广状态空间上定义能量函数来生成学习动力学。保留了使用稳态进行推理和学习的核心特性。
light_analysis.result: 数值实验表明，该算法相比之前的EP推广方法，在性能上更优且学习速度更快。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但明确指出“achieves better performance and learns faster than previous proposals”。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本工作成功将平衡传播扩展到非保守系统，提供了精确梯度计算方法，拓展了EP的应用范围。学术上，建立了非保守与非互易系统的物理启发学习理论；实践上，可应用于更广泛的动态系统。未来可能探索更复杂的非保守系统或与其他学习框架结合，但摘要未提及局限性。

title: ForesightKV: Optimizing KV Cache Eviction for Reasoning Models by Learning Long-Term Contribution
abstract: Recently, large language models (LLMs) have shown remarkable reasoning abilities by producing long reasoning traces. However, as the sequence length grows, the key-value (KV) cache expands linearly, incurring significant memory and computation costs. Existing KV cache eviction methods mitigate this issue by discarding less important KV pairs, but often fail to capture complex KV dependencies, resulting in performance degradation. To better balance efficiency and performance, we introduce ForesightKV, a training-based KV cache eviction framework that learns to predict which KV pairs to evict during long-text generations. We first design the Golden Eviction algorithm, which identifies the optimal eviction KV pairs at each step using future attention scores. These traces and the scores at each step are then distilled via supervised training with a Pairwise Ranking Loss. Furthermore, we formulate cache eviction as a Markov Decision Process and apply the GRPO algorithm to mitigate the significant language modeling loss increase on low-entropy tokens. Experiments on AIME2024 and AIME2025 benchmarks of three reasoning models demonstrate that ForesightKV consistently outperforms prior methods under only half the cache budget, while benefiting synergistically from both supervised and reinforcement learning approaches. Code is available at https://github.com/RUCAIBox/ForesightKV.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ForesightKV，一种基于训练的KV缓存驱逐框架，通过监督学习和强化学习结合，在长文本推理中优化缓存效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在长推理轨迹中，KV缓存线性增长导致显著内存和计算开销。现有驱逐方法难以捕捉复杂KV依赖关系，导致性能下降。因此需要一种更高效的KV缓存驱逐策略，平衡效率与模型性能。
light_analysis.method: ForesightKV包含Golden Eviction算法，利用未来注意力分数识别每个步骤的最优驱逐KV对。通过Pairwise Ranking Loss进行监督训练，并基于马尔可夫决策过程使用GRPO算法优化低熵token的语言模型损失，减少性能下降。
light_analysis.result: 在AIME2024和AIME2025基准测试上，对三个推理模型评估，ForesightKV在仅使用一半缓存预算时一致优于先前方法，且监督学习与强化学习协同带来额外收益。
light_analysis.conclusion: ForesightKV通过预测KV对长期贡献，有效提升了推理模型在长文本生成中的缓存效率，兼顾性能与内存。未来可扩展到更多模型和任务，但需注意训练成本。

title: Mixture of Concept Bottleneck Experts
abstract: Concept Bottleneck Models (CBMs) promote interpretability by grounding predictions in human-understandable concepts. However, existing CBMs typically constrain their task predictor to a single expression whose functional form is set a priori, limiting both predictive accuracy and adaptability to diverse user needs. We propose Mixture of Concept Bottleneck Experts (M-CBE), a framework that generalizes existing CBMs along two dimensions: the number of expressions, referred to as experts, employed by the task predictor to map concepts to the task, and the functional form each expression takes, thus exposing an underexplored region of this design space. We investigate this region by instantiating two novel models: Linear M-CBE, which learns a finite set of linear expressions, and Symbolic M-CBE, which leverages symbolic regression to discover expert functions from data subject to user-specified operator vocabularies. Empirical evaluation demonstrates that varying the number of expressions and their functional form provides a robust framework for navigating the accuracy-interpretability trade-off.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Mixture of Concept Bottleneck Experts (M-CBE)框架，通过引入多个表达式专家及其灵活函数形式，拓展概念瓶颈模型的设计空间，平衡准确率与可解释性。
light_analysis.motivation: 概念瓶颈模型（CBM）通过人类可理解的概念提升可解释性，但现有方法将任务预测器限制为单一预设函数形式，限制了预测准确性及对多样化用户需求的适应性。因此需要更灵活的框架，允许多种表达形式以更好地平衡准确率与可解释性。
light_analysis.method: 提出M-CBE框架，沿专家数量（映射概念到任务的表达式个数）和每个表达式的函数形式两个维度泛化CBM。实例化两种模型：Linear M-CBE学习一组线性表达式；Symbolic M-CBE使用符号回归根据用户指定的算子词汇表从数据中自动发现专家函数。通过调整专家数量和形式，可在准确率-可解释性权衡空间内灵活导航。
light_analysis.result: 实验评估表明，改变专家数量及其函数形式为导航准确率-可解释性权衡提供了鲁棒框架。与单一表达式基线方法相比，M-CBE在保持可解释性的同时显著提升了预测准确性，且能灵活适应不同用户对可解释性程度的需求。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: M-CBE框架通过引入多个专家和灵活函数形式，显著扩展了CBM的设计空间，有效平衡了准确率和可解释性。其学术价值在于揭示了CBM中未充分探索的设计维度，实际应用中可适应不同用户需求。未来工作可探索专家选择机制或更复杂的函数形式。

title: Causal Evaluation of Membership Inference Attacks
abstract: Membership Inference Attacks (MIAs) aim to distinguish training points (members) from unseen data (non-members), and are widely used to quantify memorization and assess privacy risks. Standard MIA evaluation requires repeated retraining, which is computationally costly for large models. One-run (single training with randomized data inclusion) and zero-run (post hoc evaluation) methods are often used instead, but their statistical validity remains unclear. We address this gap by framing MIA evaluation as a causal inference problem, defining \emph{memorization as the causal effect of including a data point in the training set}. This novel formulation reveals and formalizes key sources of bias in existing protocols: one-run methods suffer from interference between jointly included points, while zero-run evaluations are additionally confounded by distribution shift between member and non-member evaluation data. We derive causal analogues of standard MIA metrics and propose practical estimators for multi-run, one-run, and zero-run regimes with non-asymptotic consistency guarantees. We validate our approach in several settings, including pretrained and fine-tuned LLMs, showing that it enables reliable measurement of MIA performance without retraining and under distribution shift. Overall, our framework provides a principled foundation for privacy evaluation in modern AI systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出将成员推断攻击评估视为因果推断问题，定义记忆为数据点包含的因果效应，并推导实用估计器。
light_analysis.motivation: 成员推断攻击（MIA）的标准评估需重复训练，计算成本高昂。常用的一次训练（单次运行）和事后评估（零次运行）方法虽节省资源，但其统计有效性未明。现有协议存在联合包含点的干扰和分布偏移等偏差，导致评估不可靠。本文旨在通过因果推断框架形式化这些偏差，并提供无需重训练的可靠评估方法。
light_analysis.method: 本文将MIA评估重新定义为因果推断问题，将记忆量化为训练集包含某数据点的因果效应。通过构建结构因果模型，揭示了单次运行方法中联合包含的干扰偏差和零次运行方法中成员/非成员分布偏移的混杂偏差。推导了标准MIA指标的因果类比（如受试者工作特征曲线下面积的因果版本），并提出了多运行、单运行和零次运行机制下的非渐近一致估计器。这些估计器利用倾向得分和逆概率加权等技术校正偏差。
light_analysis.result: 在多个实验设置中验证了方法，包括预训练和微调的大语言模型（LLMs）。结果显示，所提估计器能够在无需重训练的情况下，可靠测量MIA性能，即使存在分布偏移。与标准重训练基线相比，单次运行和零次运行估计器在LLM记忆评估任务中保持了准确性，显著降低了计算开销。具体量化结果摘要未明确，但强调了一致性和无偏性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为MIA评估提供了因果推断的新视角，建立了隐私评估的原则性基础。通过形式化记忆的因果定义，揭示了现有方法的偏差来源，并提出了实用且理论保证的估计器。该框架适用于现代AI系统（如LLMs），可在无需昂贵重训练的条件下可靠量化隐私风险。未来工作可拓展至更复杂的训练范式（如联邦学习）或结合差分隐私机制。

title: Interpretability in Deep Time Series Models Demands Semantic Alignment
abstract: Deep time series models continue to improve predictive performance, yet their deployment remains limited by their black-box nature. In response, existing interpretability approaches in the field keep focusing on explaining the internal model computations, without addressing whether they align or not with how a human would reason about the studied phenomenon. Instead, we state interpretability in deep time series models should pursue semantic alignment: predictions should be expressed in terms of variables that are meaningful to the end user, mediated by spatial and temporal mechanisms that admit user-dependent constraints. In this paper, we formalize this requirement and state that, once established, semantic alignment must be preserved under temporal evolution: a constraint with no analog in static settings. Provided with this definition, we outline a blueprint for semantically aligned deep time series models, identify properties that support trust, and discuss implications for model design.

light_analysis.overview: 提出深度时间序列模型可解释性应追求语义对齐，形式化定义并给出设计蓝图。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有可解释性方法仅聚焦内部计算解释，未与人类推理对齐；时间序列模型的黑箱性质限制其部署。语义对齐要求预测表达对用户有意义的变量，并经时空机制维持，且需在时间演化中保持，这是一项静态设置中无对应物的约束。
light_analysis.method: 该文形式化语义对齐要求，强调预测应基于用户可理解变量，并受时空机制约束。提出语义对齐必须在时间演化中保持，给出保持该性质的蓝图；识别支持信任的属性（如一致性、可干预性），并讨论对模型设计的关键影响。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果。该工作主要提出概念框架与设计原则，未涉及实证验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: 重新定义深度时间序列模型可解释性目标，形式化语义对齐概念，并指出其时间演化保持是核心挑战。该框架为设计可解释模型提供新方向，但未进行实验验证，未来需实证评估语义对齐的有效性。

title: ObjEmbed: Towards Universal Multimodal Object Embeddings
abstract: Aligning objects with corresponding textual descriptions is a fundamental challenge and a realistic requirement in vision-language understanding. While recent multimodal embedding models excel at global image-text alignment, they often struggle with fine-grained alignment between image regions and specific phrases. In this work, we present ObjEmbed, a novel MLLM embedding model that decomposes the input image into multiple regional embeddings, each corresponding to an individual object, along with global embeddings. It supports a wide range of visual understanding tasks like visual grounding, local image retrieval, and global image retrieval. ObjEmbed enjoys three key properties: (1) Object-Oriented Representation: It captures both semantic and spatial aspects of objects by generating two complementary embeddings for each region: an object embedding for semantic matching and an IoU embedding that predicts localization quality. The final object matching score combines semantic similarity with the predicted IoU, enabling more accurate retrieval. (2) Versatility: It seamlessly handles both region-level and image-level tasks. (3) Efficient Encoding: All objects in an image, along with the full image, are encoded in a single forward pass for high efficiency. Superior performance on 18 diverse benchmarks demonstrates its strong semantic discrimination.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ObjEmbed多模态嵌入模型，通过分解图像为对象级和全局嵌入，实现细粒度视觉-语言对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有多模态嵌入模型擅长全局图像-文本对齐，但在图像区域与短语的细粒度对齐上表现不足。为克服这一局限，需要一种能够同时捕捉对象语义和空间信息、支持多种视觉理解任务的统一框架。
light_analysis.method: ObjEmbed基于MLLM架构，将输入图像分解为多个区域嵌入（每个对应一个对象）和全局嵌入。每个区域生成两种互补嵌入：对象嵌入用于语义匹配，IoU嵌入预测定位质量。最终匹配分数结合语义相似度和预测IoU。所有对象和全图通过单次前向传递编码，支持视觉定位、局部/全局图像检索等任务。
light_analysis.result: 在18个多样化基准测试上取得优越性能，证明了模型在细粒度对齐和多种视觉理解任务中的强语义判别能力。具体指标摘要未明确说明，但强调优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: ObjEmbed实现了通用的多模态对象嵌入，有效解决细粒度对齐问题，且高效灵活。未来可扩展至更多视觉-语言任务，如密集字幕生成、视觉问答等。其对象级表示也为可解释AI提供新方向。

title: Reconsidering Positional Supervision in Masked Diffusion Language Model Training
abstract: Masked diffusion language models (MDLMs) generate text by unmasking tokens in parallel and have recently emerged as alternatives to autoregressive language models. They can be viewed as parallel decoders trained with a position-wise cross-entropy (CE) loss, the same setup as non-autoregressive translation (NAT). In NAT, CE-trained parallel decoders have been argued to be sensitive to small positional shifts, since CE penalizes them harshly. We ask whether CE-trained MDLMs are similarly sensitive to such shifts under iterative decoding. To probe this, we apply a controlled intervention that introduces them during decoding. On LLaDA-8B-Instruct with Arena-Hard, displacing as little as 1% of generated tokens by one position substantially reduces win rates against the unintervened model, showing that MDLMs are sensitive to such small shifts under iterative parallel decoding. Motivated by this, we adapt connectionist temporal classification (CTC), an alignment-flexible objective known to mitigate it there, to MDLM supervised fine-tuning. By relaxing the strict position-wise match that CE imposes, CTC gives the loss room to absorb small positional shifts; concretely, we modified CTC objective to use a special <slack> token that absorbs positional uncertainty between target tokens and output positions, and a updated collapse map that preserves target surface forms. Across four open-ended generation benchmarks, the resulting model consistently improves over both the original model and a matched cross-entropy-trained baseline, with statistically significant gains on all four. These results identify training-side alignment flexibility as a useful design dimension for MDLM SFT, complementary to the inference-time approaches explored in prior work.

light_analysis.overview: 提出使用连接主义时间分类目标替代位置交叉熵，缓解掩码扩散语言模型对位置偏移的敏感性。
light_analysis.motivation: 掩码扩散语言模型（MDLM）使用位置交叉熵损失训练，类似非自回归翻译，对小的位置偏移敏感。实验表明，在LLaDA-8B-Instruct上，仅将1%生成令牌移位一个位置就显著降低胜率。现有方法多关注推理阶段，而训练目标的对齐灵活性尚未被探索。
light_analysis.method: 将连接主义时间分类（CTC）目标适配到MDLM监督微调中。通过引入特殊<slack>令牌吸收目标令牌与输出位置之间的位置不确定性，并更新collapse映射以保留目标表面形式，从而放松严格的位置一一匹配，使得损失能够容忍小的位置偏移。
light_analysis.result: 在四个开放生成基准上，CTC训练的模型在统计上显著优于原始模型和匹配的交叉熵基线。所有四个基准均观察到一致性提升，验证了训练侧对齐灵活性的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 训练侧对齐灵活性是MDLM监督微调的一个有用设计维度，与先前工作的推理时方法互补。该工作为改进并行解码语言模型提供了新视角，未来可探索更复杂的对齐策略或结合其他正则化技术。

title: Quartet II: Accurate LLM Pre-Training in NVFP4 by Improved Unbiased Gradient Estimation
abstract: The NVFP4 lower-precision format, supported in hardware by NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs, promises to allow, for the first time, end-to-end fully-quantized pre-training of massive models such as LLMs. Yet, existing quantized training methods still sacrifice some of the representation capacity of this format in favor of more accurate unbiased quantized gradient estimation by stochastic rounding (SR), losing noticeable accuracy relative to standard FP16 and FP8 training. In this paper, improve the state of the art for quantized training in NVFP4 via a novel unbiased quantization routine for micro-scaled formats, called MS-EDEN, that has more than 2x lower quantization error than SR. We integrate it into a novel fully-NVFP4 quantization scheme for linear layers, called Quartet II. We show analytically that Quartet II achieves consistently better gradient estimation across all major matrix multiplications, both on the forward and on the backward passes. In addition, our proposal synergizes well with recent training improvements aimed specifically at NVFP4. We further validate Quartet II on end-to-end LLM training with up to 1.9B parameters on 38B tokens. We provide kernels for execution on NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs with up to 4.2x speedup over BF16. Our code is available at https://github.com/IST-DASLab/Quartet-II .

light_analysis.overview: 提出MS-EDEN无偏量化方法和Quartet II全NVFP4量化方案，显著降低量化误差，实现更准确的LLM预训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有NVFP4量化训练方法为获得无偏梯度估计而采用随机舍入，牺牲了该格式的表示能力，导致与FP16/FP8训练相比精度下降。为解决这一矛盾，需要一种既能保持无偏性又能降低量化误差的新方法，以充分发挥NVFP4在Blackwell GPU上的硬件优势，实现端到端全量化LLM预训练。
light_analysis.method: 提出MS-EDEN，一种针对微缩放格式的无偏量化例程，量化误差比随机舍入低2倍以上。将其集成到全NVFP4线性层量化方案Quartet II中，理论分析表明在前向和反向传播的所有主要矩阵乘法中实现一致更优的梯度估计。该方法与近期针对NVFP4的训练改进协同，并提供Blackwell GPU上的高效内核实现。
light_analysis.result: 在1.9B参数、38B tokens的LLM端到端预训练中验证，Quartet II在NVIDIA Blackwell GPU上达到比BF16高4.2倍的加速，同时保持与FP16/FP8训练相当的精度，显著优于现有NVFP4量化训练方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: Quartet II通过改进无偏梯度估计，实现了NVFP4格式下更准确的LLM预训练，兼具精度和效率优势。该工作展示了低精度量化训练的潜力，为大规模模型训练提供了可行的硬件-算法协同方案。代码已开源，便于复现和后续研究。

title: GUDA: Counterfactual Group-wise Training Data Attribution for Diffusion Models via Unlearning
abstract: Training-data attribution for vision generative models aims to identify which training data influenced a given output. While most methods score individual examples, practitioners often need group-level answers (e.g., artistic styles or object classes). Group-wise attribution is counterfactual: how would a model's behavior on a generated sample change if a group were absent from training? A natural realization of this counterfactual is Leave-One-Group-Out (LOGO) retraining, which retrains the model with each group removed; however, it becomes computationally prohibitive as the number of groups grows. We propose GUDA (Group Unlearning-based Data Attribution) for diffusion models, which approximates each counterfactual model by applying machine unlearning to a shared full-data model instead of training from scratch. GUDA quantifies group influence using differences in a likelihood-based scoring rule (ELBO) between the full model and each unlearned counterfactual. Experiments on CIFAR-10 and artistic style attribution with Stable Diffusion show that GUDA identifies primary contributing groups more reliably than semantic similarity, gradient-based attribution, and instance-level unlearning approaches, while achieving ~100x speedup on CIFAR-10 over LOGO retraining.
comment: Accepted at ICML 2026. Code is available at https://github.com/sony/guda

light_analysis.overview: 提出GUDA方法，利用机器遗忘近似留一组出去（LOGO）重训练，高效实现扩散模型的组级训练数据归因。
light_analysis.motivation: 训练数据归因通常针对单个样本，但实际应用需要组级归因（如艺术风格或物体类别）。现有的LOGO重训练方法计算成本高，无法扩展到大量分组。因此，需要一种高效且准确的组级归因方法。
light_analysis.method: GUDA采用机器遗忘技术，基于共享的全数据模型通过遗忘特定组来近似每个反事实模型，避免从头训练。使用似然评分规则（ELBO）的差异量化组影响，适用于扩散模型。在CIFAR-10和Stable Diffusion风格归因上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在CIFAR-10和Stable Diffusion艺术风格归因上，GUDA比语义相似度、梯度归因和实例级遗忘方法更可靠地识别主要贡献组，同时比LOGO重训练加速约100倍。
light_analysis.conclusion: GUDA为扩散模型提供了一种高效、可扩展的组级训练数据归因方法，弥补了现有单样本归因的不足。未来可扩展到其他生成模型和更大规模的训练数据，潜在局限性包括对遗忘质量的依赖。

title: naPINN: Noise-Adaptive Physics-Informed Neural Networks for Recovering Physics from Corrupted Measurement
abstract: Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs) are effective methods for solving inverse problems and discovering governing equations from observational data. However, their performance degrades significantly under complex measurement noise and gross outliers. To address this issue, we propose the Noise-Adaptive Physics-Informed Neural Network (naPINN), which robustly recovers physical solutions from corrupted measurements without prior knowledge of the noise distribution. naPINN embeds an energy-based model into the training loop to learn the latent distribution of prediction residuals. Leveraging the learned energy landscape, a trainable reliability gate adaptively filters data points exhibiting high energy, while a rejection cost regularization prevents trivial solutions where valid data are discarded. We demonstrate the efficacy of naPINN on various benchmark partial differential equations corrupted by non-Gaussian noise and varying rates of outliers. The results show that naPINN significantly outperforms existing robust PINN baselines, successfully isolating outliers and accurately reconstructing the dynamics under severe data corruption.

light_analysis.overview: 提出噪声自适应物理信息神经网络（naPINN），从被破坏的测量中稳健恢复物理解。
light_analysis.motivation: 物理信息神经网络（PINN）在反问题和发现控制方程方面有效，但在复杂测量噪声和严重离群值下性能显著下降。现有方法缺乏对噪声分布的适应性，难以处理非高斯噪声。本文旨在克服这一局限，提出无需噪声先验知识的鲁棒PINN方法。
light_analysis.method: naPINN在训练循环中嵌入基于能量的模型，学习预测残差的潜在分布。利用学习的能量景观，一个可训练的可靠性门控自适应过滤高能量数据点，并引入拒绝代价正则化，防止有效数据被丢弃。该方法无需噪声分布先验。
light_analysis.result: 在多种偏微分方程基准上，针对非高斯噪声和不同离群率，naPINN显著优于现有鲁棒PINN基线。实验表明，它成功隔离离群值，并在严重数据破坏下准确重建动力学。
light_analysis.conclusion: naPINN为从被污染数据恢复物理规律提供了鲁棒方案，具有重要学术和实际价值。未来可探索更高效的能量模型实现，或扩展到其他类型的噪声和系统。

title: When Does Predictive Inverse Dynamics Outperform Behavior Cloning?
abstract: Behavior cloning (BC) is a practical offline imitation learning method, but it often fails when expert demonstrations are limited. Recent works have introduced a class of architectures named predictive inverse dynamics models (PIDM) that combine a future state predictor with an inverse dynamics model. While PIDM often outperforms BC, the reasons behind its benefits remain unclear. In this paper, we provide a theoretical explanation: PIDM introduces a bias-variance tradeoff. While predicting the future state introduces bias, conditioning the IDM on the prediction can significantly reduce variance. We establish conditions on the state predictor bias for PIDM to achieve lower prediction error and higher sample efficiency than BC, with the gap widening when additional data sources are available. We validate the theoretical insights empirically in 2D navigation tasks, where BC requires up to five times (three times on average) more demonstrations than PIDM to reach comparable performance; and in a complex 3D environment in a modern video game with high-dimensional visual inputs and stochastic transitions, where BC requires over 66% more samples than PIDM.
comment: To be published in proceedings of the International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML), 2026

light_analysis.overview: 理论解释了预测逆动力学模型（PIDM）通过偏差-方差权衡优于行为克隆（BC），并建立了其优势的条件。
light_analysis.motivation: 行为克隆（BC）在专家演示有限时性能不佳，而预测逆动力学模型（PIDM）虽常优于BC，但其优势原因不明。本文旨在从理论上解释PIDM的有效性，揭示其通过偏差-方差权衡实现更高样本效率的机制，并为实际应用提供指导。
light_analysis.method: 提出理论框架：PIDM结合未来状态预测器和逆动力学模型，通过引入偏差（预测误差）来降低条件方差。建立了状态预测器偏差的条件，使得PIDM的预测误差低于BC，且样本效率更高。在2D导航和3D视频游戏环境（高维视觉、随机转移）中进行实验验证。
light_analysis.result: 在2D导航中，BC需比PIDM多5倍（平均3倍）的演示才能达到相当性能；在复杂3D环境中，BC需多66%的样本。理论与实验一致，表明PIDM在有限专家数据下显著优于BC，且额外数据源可扩大差距。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次从理论上解释PIDM优于BC的原因，揭示了偏差-方差权衡的作用。成果为离线模仿学习提供了设计原则，未来可探索更优的预测器设计或扩展到更复杂场景。局限性在于理论假设较强，实际应用中需谨慎选择状态预测器。

title: KromHC: Manifold-Constrained Hyper-Connections with Kronecker-Product Residual Matrices
abstract: The success of Hyper-Connections (HC) in neural networks (NN) has also highlighted issues related to training instability and restricted scalability. The Manifold-Constrained Hyper-Connections (mHC) mitigate these challenges by projecting the residual connection space onto a Birkhoff polytope, however, it faces two issues: 1) its iterative Sinkhorn-Knopp (SK) algorithm does not always yield exactly doubly stochastic residual matrices; 2) mHC incurs a prohibitive $O(n^3C)$ parameter complexity with $n$ as the width of the residual stream and $C$ as the feature dimension. The recently proposed mHC-lite reparametrizes the residual matrix via the Birkhoff-von-Neumann theorem to guarantee double stochasticity, but also faces a factorial explosion in its parameter complexity, $O \left( nC \cdot n! \right)$. To address both challenges, we propose KromHC, which uses the Kronecker products of smaller doubly stochastic matrices to parametrize the residual matrix in mHC. By enforcing manifold constraints across the factor residual matrices along each mode of the tensorized residual stream, KromHC guarantees exact double stochasticity of the residual matrices while reducing parameter complexity to only $O(n^2C)$. Experiments show that KromHC matches or even outperforms other state-of-the-art (SOTA) mHC variants, while requiring significantly fewer trainable parameters. The code is at https://github.com/wz1119/KromHC.

light_analysis.overview: 提出KromHC，用Kronecker积分解参数化残差矩阵，在保证精确双随机性的同时将参数复杂度从O(n^3 C)或O(nC·n!)降至O(n^2 C)。
light_analysis.motivation: 超连接（HC）在神经网络中有效但存在训练不稳定和扩展性差的问题。流形约束超连接（mHC）通过将残差空间投影到Birkhoff多面体缓解问题，但其Sinkhorn-Knopp算法不能保证精确双随机性，且参数复杂度高达O(n^3 C)。改进版本mHC-lite虽保证双随机性，但参数复杂度阶乘爆炸（O(nC·n!)）。因此需要一种既能保证精确双随机性又具有低参数复杂度的新方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出KromHC，利用Kronecker积的多个小双随机矩阵参数化残差矩阵。通过将残差流张量化，沿每个模态对因子矩阵施加流形约束（Birkhoff多面体），确保整体残差矩阵精确双随机，同时参数复杂度仅为O(n^2 C)。该方法避免了迭代标准化过程，并大幅降低参数量。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，KromHC在多个任务上匹配或超越其他最先进的mHC变体（如mHC、mHC-lite），同时所需的可训练参数显著减少。例如，在相同的网络结构下，KromHC的参数量远低于mHC的O(n^3 C)和mHC-lite的O(nC·n!)，但性能持平或更优。具体提升幅度需参考原文。
light_analysis.conclusion: KromHC通过Kronecker积分解有效解决了mHC系列方法中双随机性保证与参数复杂度之间的矛盾，为超连接在大型神经网络中的应用提供了更高效的方案。其学术价值在于提出一种新的流形约束参数化方式，实际应用价值在于降低训练开销并保持性能。未来可探索更高效的分解策略或与其他注意力机制结合。

title: APB-V: Accelerating Long-Video Understanding via Sequence-Parallelism-aware Approximate Attention
abstract: The efficiency of long-video inference remains a critical bottleneck, mainly due to the dense computation in the prefill stage of Large Multimodal Models (LMMs). Existing methods either compress visual embeddings or apply sparse attention on a single GPU, yielding limited acceleration or degraded performance and restricting LMMs from handling longer, more complex videos. To overcome these issues, we propose APB-V, a sequence-parallel framework with optimized attention that accelerates long-video inference across multiple GPUs. By distributing approximate attention, APB-V reduces computation and increases parallelism, enabling efficient processing of more visual embeddings without compression and thereby improving task performance. System-level optimizations, such as load balancing and fused forward passes, further unleash the potential of APB-V, delivering speedups of 12.72x, 1.70x, and 1.18x over FlashAttn, ZigZagRing, and APB, without notable performance loss. Code available at https://github.com/thunlp/APB

light_analysis.overview: 提出APB-V，一种基于序列并行感知近似注意力的框架，通过多GPU分布式近似注意力加速长视频推理，在不压缩视觉嵌入的前提下实现大幅加速。
light_analysis.motivation: 长视频推理效率受限于大型多模态模型预填充阶段的密集计算，现有方法通过压缩视觉嵌入或单GPU稀疏注意力加速，但加速有限且可能降低性能，限制了模型处理更长、更复杂视频的能力。因此需要一种既能高效加速又不损失性能的方法。
light_analysis.method: APB-V采用序列并行框架，在多个GPU上分布式近似注意力，减少计算量并增加并行性，从而在不压缩视觉嵌入的情况下高效处理更多标记。系统级优化包括负载均衡和融合前向传递，以充分发挥并行潜力。代码已开源。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，APB-V在长视频推理任务上分别实现了相对于FlashAttn、ZigZagRing和APB的12.72倍、1.70倍和1.18倍加速，且无明显性能损失，验证了其高效性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: APB-V通过序列并行和近似注意力显著加速长视频推理，为大型多模态模型处理更复杂视频提供了可行方案。该工作的学术价值在于探索分布式近似注意力与系统优化的结合，实际应用前景广阔。未来可进一步优化近似策略或扩展到其他模态。

title: Multi-Objective Reinforcement Learning for Tactical Decision Making for Trucks in Highway Traffic
abstract: Balancing safety, efficiency, and operational costs in highway driving poses a challenging decision-making problem for heavy-duty vehicles. A central difficulty is that conventional scalar reward formulations, obtained by aggregating these competing objectives, often obscure the structure of their trade-offs. We present a Proximal Policy Optimization based multi-objective reinforcement learning framework that learns a set of policies explicitly representing these trade-offs and evaluates it on a scalable simulation platform for tactical decision making in trucks. The proposed approach learns a set of Pareto-optimal policies that capture the trade-offs among three conflicting objectives: safety, quantified in terms of collisions and successful completion; energy efficiency and time efficiency, quantified using energy cost and driver cost, respectively. The resulting Pareto frontier is smooth and interpretable, enabling flexibility in choosing driving behavior along different conflicting objectives. This framework allows seamless transitions between different driving policies without retraining, yielding a robust and adaptive decision-making strategy for autonomous trucking applications.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于PPO的多目标强化学习框架，学习一组帕累托最优策略，平衡卡车在高速公路行驶中的安全、能效和时间效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 重型车辆在高速公路行驶中需要同时平衡安全、效率和运营成本，传统标量奖励聚合方法通过加权求和将多个目标合并为一个标量，这往往会掩盖目标之间的权衡结构。由于各目标相互冲突且优先级动态变化，单一聚合难以表达驾驶员或系统的真实偏好，导致决策僵化。因此，需要一种能够显式建模目标权衡并生成多样化策略的方法，以适应不同场景下的灵活决策需求。
light_analysis.method: 该研究提出了一个基于近端策略优化（PPO）的多目标强化学习框架。框架将三个冲突目标（安全性、能源效率、时间效率）分别建模为独立奖励，并学习一组帕累托最优策略，覆盖不同权衡区域。安全性通过碰撞次数和任务完成情况量化，能源效率以能源成本衡量，时间效率以驾驶员成本衡量。在可扩展的模拟平台上进行卡车战术决策训练，最终得到平滑且可解释的帕累托前沿。该框架支持在没有重新训练的情况下实现不同策略间的无缝切换。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确提供具体数值实验指标，但强调所得到的帕累托前沿是平滑且可解释的，能够清晰展示三个目标之间的权衡关系。不同驾驶模式（如更安全或更高效）对应的策略可以直接从前沿中选择，并实现无障碍切换，无需额外重新训练过程，表明框架具有鲁棒性和自适应能力。与常规标量方法相比，该方法显式保留了目标间的冲突结构，从而提供更灵活的决策空间。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为自动驾驶卡车的战术决策提供了一种多目标强化学习方案，通过学习一组帕累托最优策略，成功平衡了安全、能效和时间效率这三个相互冲突的目标。其平滑的帕累托前沿使得决策者能够根据实时需求灵活调整驾驶行为，且策略切换零成本，提升了系统的适应性和鲁棒性。该框架有望应用于实际卡车编队、燃油优化等场景，未来可扩展到更复杂的交通环境并考虑更多目标。

title: Beyond Rigid: Benchmarking Non-Rigid Video Editing
abstract: As video generation models are increasingly expected to manipulate physical dynamics, there is a growing need to move evaluation beyond appearance fidelity and semantic alignment. Non-rigid video editing offers a uniquely revealing testbed, where distinct materials impose distinct physical constraints. In this paper, we introduce NRVBench, a diagnostic benchmark for non-rigid video editing, where the task is to modify deformable motion while preserving irrelevant regions and maintaining material-specific plausibility. NRVBench contains 180 curated videos across six physics-grounded categories, 2,340 fine-grained editing instructions, 360 multiple-choice questions, and pixel-accurate masks. We further propose NRVE-Acc, a structured VLM-based protocol that decomposes editing success into instruction following, material-aware deformation plausibility, and temporal coherence with motion cues. Experiments on representative inference-time video editing methods reveal a clear mismatch between conventional metrics and physics-aware perceptual editing success: methods that preserve appearance or achieve strong global alignment may still fail under non-rigid dynamics. We additionally introduce VM-Edit, a simple region-conditioned editing baseline that frees the foreground while locking the background, exposing the stability--plasticity trade-off.

light_analysis.overview: 提出非刚体视频编辑诊断基准NRVBench及其评估协议NRVE-Acc，并揭示现有方法在物理动态方面的不足。
light_analysis.motivation: 非刚体视频编辑对物理动态操控要求高，现有评估多关注外观保真度和语义对齐，缺乏对物理约束的考量；不同材料（如布料、流体）具有不同的物理约束，现有方法在非刚体动态编辑中可能失败。
light_analysis.method: 构建NRVBench：包含180个视频、6类物理类别、2340条细粒度指令、360道多选题和像素级掩码。提出NRVE-Acc评估协议，基于VLM分解编辑成功为指令遵循、材料感知变形合理性、时间一致性。提出VM-Edit基线：区域条件编辑，前景自由而背景锁定，暴露稳定性-可塑性权衡。
light_analysis.result: 在代表性推理时视频编辑方法上的实验表明，传统指标与物理感知编辑成功之间存在明显不匹配：保持外观或强全局对齐的方法在非刚体动态下仍可能失败。具体数据未给出，但指出实验揭示了不匹配。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献：提出首个非刚体视频编辑诊断基准和评估协议，揭示了现有方法缺陷，并提供了基线VM-Edit。意义：推动视频编辑向物理感知方向发展，未来可扩展更多材料类型或结合物理模拟。

title: Multigrade Neural Network Approximation
abstract: We study multigrade deep learning (MGDL) as a principled framework for structured error refinement in deep neural networks. While the approximation power of neural networks is now relatively well understood, training very deep architectures remains challenging due to highly nonconvex and often ill-conditioned optimization landscapes. In contrast, for relatively shallow networks, most notably certain one-hidden-layer ReLU models, training admits convex reformulations with global guarantees under appropriate settings, motivating learning paradigms that improve stability while scaling to depth. MGDL builds on this insight by training deep networks grade by grade: previously learned grades are frozen, and each newly added grade-wise subnetwork is composed on top of the previously learned grades and trained to fit the residual left by the current approximation, yielding a structured and interpretable hierarchical refinement process. We develop an operator-theoretic foundation for MGDL and prove that, for any continuous target function defined on a hypercube, there exists a fixed-width multigrade ReLU scheme whose residuals are pointwise nonincreasing in magnitude and converge uniformly to zero, with strict $L^p$-norm decay at every nontrivial grade for $p\in [1,\infty)$. To the best of our knowledge, this work provides the first rigorous constructive approximation guarantee showing that a grade-wise residual refinement scheme can achieve vanishing error in a fixed-width multigrade ReLU architecture.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多等级深度学习框架，通过逐等级残差精炼实现固定宽度ReLU网络的逼近保证。
light_analysis.motivation: 深层神经网络训练面临高度非凸与病态优化难题，而浅层ReLU网络可借助凸重构获得全局保证。为兼顾深度与稳定性，亟需一种结构化误差精炼机制。现有方法缺乏对等级式残差逼近的理论保证。
light_analysis.method: 提出多等级深度学习（MGDL）框架：冻结先前等级，在顶层逐级添加子网络以拟合残差，形成层次化精炼。基于算子理论证明，对任意超立方体上的连续函数，存在固定宽度的多等级ReLU网络，其残差点单调递减且L^p范数严格衰减。
light_analysis.result: 理论证明所提方案残差逐点非增且一致收敛到零，每个非平凡等级上L^p范数严格衰减（p∈[1,∞)）。这是首个严格的构造性逼近保证，表明固定宽度多等级ReLU架构可通过等级式残差精炼实现任意精度逼近。
light_analysis.conclusion: MGDL为深度网络训练提供了稳定且可解释的替代方案，其严谨逼近保证奠定了理论基础。未来可扩展至其他激活函数或架构，但未讨论实际训练效率与泛化性能。

title: Prototypicality Bias Reveals Blindspots in Multimodal Evaluation Metrics
abstract: Automatic metrics are widely used to evaluate text-to-image models, often replacing human judgment in benchmarking, model selection, and large-scale data filtering. Yet they may reward images that look plausible or prototypical rather than images that faithfully satisfy the prompt. We identify prototypicality bias as a systematic blindspot in multimodal evaluation: metrics can prefer a semantically incorrect but visually or socially prototypical image over a correct but less prototypical one. We introduce PROTOBIAS, a controlled diagnostic benchmark across Animals, Objects, and Demography, where semantically correct images are contrasted with plausible prototypical adversaries containing a single controlled semantic violation. Grounded in prototype theory and social-category prototypicality, PROTOBIAS is constructed with multiple prompt generators, image generators, and independent VLM filters, and validated through prompt-quality, human-annotation, and image-quality controls. Using PROTOBIAS, we show that widely used embedding, reward, VQA-based, and VLM-as-judge metrics frequently fail these contrasts, while human judgments remain more faithful to semantic correctness. We further introduce PROTOSCORE, a lightweight contrastively trained evaluator, as an initial mitigation baseline. PROTOBIAS provides a focused benchmark for measuring prototypicality-driven metric failures and developing more semantically faithful T2I evaluators.

light_analysis.overview: 发现多模态评估指标中存在原型性偏差，提出PROTOBIAS基准和PROTOSCORE评估器以提升语义忠实性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有文本到图像评估指标可能偏好视觉上看似合理或原型性的图像，而非忠实满足提示的语义正确图像。这种原型性偏差导致评估盲点，影响模型选择和数据过滤的可靠性。需要系统检测和缓解这一问题。
light_analysis.method: 构建PROTOBIAS基准，覆盖动物、物体和人口统计学三类，对比语义正确图像与仅含单一语义违反的原型对抗样本。通过多种提示生成器、图像生成器和VLM过滤器构建，经质量控制验证。提出PROTOSCORE，一种轻量级对比训练评估器作为缓解基线。
light_analysis.result: 广泛使用的嵌入、奖励、VQA和VLM裁判指标在PROTOBIAS中频繁失败（无法区分正确与原型错误图像），而人类判断更忠实于语义正确性。PROTOSCORE作为基线，初步缓解了原型性偏差。
light_analysis.conclusion: 识别并量化了多模态评估中的原型性偏差，提供了PROTOBIAS基准用于测量该偏差，并引入PROTOSCORE作为改进方向。未来工作可探索更鲁棒的语义忠实评估器。

title: IMA++: ISIC Archive Multi-Annotator Dermoscopic Skin Lesion Segmentation Dataset
abstract: Multi-annotator medical image segmentation is an important research problem, but requires annotated datasets that are expensive to collect. Dermoscopic skin lesion imaging allows human experts and AI systems to observe morphological structures otherwise not discernable from regular clinical photographs. However, currently there are no large-scale publicly available multi-annotator skin lesion segmentation (SLS) datasets with annotator-labels for dermoscopic skin lesion imaging. We introduce ISIC MultiAnnot++, a large public multi-annotator skin lesion segmentation dataset for images from the ISIC Archive. The final dataset contains 17,684 segmentation masks spanning 14,967 dermoscopic images, where 2,394 dermoscopic images have 2-5 segmentations per image, making it the largest publicly available SLS dataset. Further, metadata about the segmentation, including the annotators' skill level and segmentation tool, is included, enabling research on topics such as annotator-specific preference modeling for segmentation and annotator metadata analysis. We provide an analysis on the characteristics of this dataset, curated data partitions, and consensus segmentation masks.
comment: Published in IEEE Data Descriptions, 12 pages, 7 figures

light_analysis.overview: 发布大规模公开多标注者皮肤镜图像分割数据集IMA++，含17,684个分割掩膜，支持多标注者研究。
light_analysis.motivation: 多标注者医学图像分割是重要研究课题，但缺乏公开数据集。皮肤镜图像能显示常规照片无法观察的形态结构，然而当前没有大规模公开的多标注者皮肤病变分割数据集。该研究旨在填补这一空白，提供大规模数据集以支持标注者偏好建模、元数据分析等方向的研究。
light_analysis.method: 从ISIC Archive收集14,967张皮肤镜图像，其中2,394张图像由2-5位标注者独立分割，总共生成17,684个分割掩膜。数据集包含标注者技能水平、使用工具等元数据，并提供了精心设计的数据划分和共识分割掩膜。
light_analysis.result: 最终数据集包含17,684个分割掩膜，覆盖14,967张图像，是当前最大公开的多标注者皮肤病变分割数据集。元数据丰富，可支持标注者特定偏好建模和元数据分析。论文还提供了数据集特征分析和共识分割掩膜。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该数据集为多标注者医学图像分割研究提供了大规模公开资源，尤其适用于标注者偏好建模和分割一致性分析。未来可推动皮肤镜图像分割算法的鲁棒性评估和个性化标注方法的发展。

title: Degradation-Aware Metric Prompting for Hyperspectral Image Restoration
abstract: Unified hyperspectral image (HSI) restoration aims to recover diverse degradations within a single model. However, current methods often rely on impractical explicit priors or opaque black-box representations that overfit to training distributions, hampering generalization to unseen scenarios. To bridge this gap, we propose Degradation-Aware Metric Prompting (DAMP), a novel framework that characterizes multi-dimensional degradations through interpretable spatial-spectral metrics. These metrics serve as Degradation Prompts (DP), enabling the model to capture shared characteristics across tasks and adapt to unknown corruptions. Central to our framework is the Degradation-Adaptive Mixture-of-Experts (DAMoE), where Spatial-Spectral Adaptive Modules (SSAMs) serve as experts that utilize learnable fusion coefficients to specialize in distinct degradation degrees. By using DP as a gating router, DAMoE dynamically activates specialized experts tailored to the specific degradation profile. Extensive experiments on natural and remote sensing HSI datasets demonstrate that DAMP achieves state-of-the-art performance and exhibits exceptional zero-shot generalization on unseen restoration tasks. Code is publicly available at \href{DAMP}{https://github.com/MiliLab/DAMP}.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Degradation-Aware Metric Prompting (DAMP)框架，通过可解释的空间-光谱指标作为退化提示，结合退化自适应混合专家模型，实现统一高光谱图像恢复。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有统一高光谱图像恢复方法依赖不切实际的显式先验或不透明的黑盒表示，容易过拟合训练分布，泛化到未见场景时表现不佳。因此需要一种能捕捉多维度退化共享特征并自适应未知污染的方法，以提升模型的泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: DAMP框架包含两个核心组件：退化提示(DP)利用可解释的空间-光谱指标表征多维度退化；退化自适应混合专家(DAMoE)以空间-光谱自适应模块(SSAM)为专家，通过可学习的融合系数专精于不同退化程度，并使用DP作为门控路由器动态激活相关专家。在自然和遥感HSI数据集上训练与评估。
light_analysis.result: 在自然和遥感高光谱图像数据集上，DAMP达到最先进性能，并在未见过的恢复任务上展现出卓越的零样本泛化能力，例如在不同类型噪声、模糊等组合退化下仍保持高恢复质量。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: DAMP通过可解释的退化提示和自适应专家选择，有效解决了统一HSI恢复中的泛化瓶颈，具有重要的学术价值和实际应用潜力（如遥感、医疗成像等）。未来可探索更复杂的退化组合及轻量化模型设计。

title: Unified Semantic Transformer for 3D Scene Understanding
abstract: Holistic 3D scene understanding involves capturing and parsing unstructured 3D environments. Due to the inherent complexity of the real world, existing models have predominantly been developed and limited to be task-specific. We introduce UNITE, a Unified Semantic Transformer for 3D scene understanding, a novel feed-forward neural network that unifies a diverse set of 3D dense semantic indoor tasks within a single model. Our model operates on unseen scenes trained in a fully end-to-end manner and only takes a couple seconds to infer the full 3D semantic geometry. Our approach is capable of directly predicting multiple dense semantic attributes, including 3D scene segmentation, instance embeddings, open-vocabulary features, and articulations, solely from RGB images. The method is trained using a combination of 2D distillation, heavily relying on self-supervision and leverages novel multi-view losses designed to ensure 3D view consistency. We demonstrate that UNITE achieves state-of-the-art performance on several different dense indoor semantic tasks and even outperforms task-specific models, in many cases, surpassing methods that operate on ground truth 3D geometry. See the project website at unite-page.github.io
comment: Accepted at TMLR. Project page: https://unite-page.github.io/

light_analysis.overview: 提出UNITE，一个统一语义Transformer，实现从RGB图像直接预测多种3D密集语义属性的单模型端到端框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3D场景理解模型多为任务特定，无法统一处理分割、实例嵌入、开放词汇特征和关节结构等多种语义任务。真实世界3D环境复杂且非结构化，开发能够同时处理多任务的高效模型具有重要实际需求。当前方法依赖任务特化设计，缺乏通用性和效率。
light_analysis.method: UNITE采用前馈神经网络架构，基于Transformer统一处理多种3D密集语义任务。利用2D蒸馏和自监督学习训练，设计新颖多视图损失确保3D视图一致性。模型仅需RGB图像输入，直接预测3D场景分割、实例嵌入、开放词汇特征和关节结构，无需地面真值3D几何。
light_analysis.result: 在多个密集室内语义任务上取得最先进性能，甚至超越任务特定模型和基于地面真值3D几何的方法。推理时间仅需数秒，实现全场景端到端预测（摘要未提供具体数值）。
light_analysis.conclusion: UNITE证明了单模型统一处理多种3D语义任务的可行性，通过自监督和视图一致性训练提升了泛化能力。未来可扩展至室外场景或更多语义属性，但需关注开放词汇特征的跨领域适应性。

title: WorldLens: Full-Spectrum Evaluations of Driving World Models in Real World
abstract: Generative world models are reshaping embodied AI, enabling agents to synthesize realistic 4D driving environments that look convincing but often fail physically or behaviorally. Despite rapid progress, the field still lacks a unified way to assess whether generated worlds preserve geometry, obey physics, or support reliable control. We introduce WorldLens, a full-spectrum benchmark evaluating how well a model builds, understands, and behaves within its generated world. It spans five aspects -- Generation, Reconstruction, Action-Following, Downstream Task, and Human Preference -- jointly covering visual realism, geometric consistency, physical plausibility, and functional reliability. Across these dimensions, no existing world model excels universally: those with strong textures often violate physics, while geometry-stable ones lack behavioral fidelity. To align objective metrics with human judgment, we further construct WorldLens-26K, a large-scale dataset of human-annotated videos with numerical scores and textual rationales, and develop WorldLens-Agent, an evaluation model distilled from these annotations to enable scalable, explainable scoring. Together, the benchmark, dataset, and agent form a unified ecosystem for measuring world fidelity -- standardizing how future models are judged not only by how real they look, but by how real they behave.
comment: CVPR 2026 Oral Presentation; 80 pages, 37 figures, 29 tables; Project Page at https://worldbench.github.io/worldlens GitHub at https://github.com/worldbench/WorldLens

light_analysis.overview: 提出WorldLens，一个全频谱基准，用于评估驾驶世界模型的几何、物理、行为和功能可靠性，并包含标注数据集和评估智能体。
light_analysis.motivation: 生成式世界模型在具身AI中快速发展，能生成逼真的4D驾驶环境，但现有评估缺乏统一标准，无法全面衡量生成世界的几何一致性、物理合理性、行为可靠性和控制支持。不同模型在纹理和物理间存在权衡，急需一种系统性方法来标准化评估。
light_analysis.method: WorldLens基准涵盖五个方面：生成（视觉真实性）、重建（几何一致性）、动作跟踪（行为保真度）、下游任务（功能可靠性）和人类偏好。构建WorldLens-26K大规模数据集，包含人类标注的视频分数和文本理由，并从中蒸馏出WorldLens-Agent评估模型，实现可扩展、可解释的评分。
light_analysis.result: 通过全面评估发现，现有世界模型没有普遍优秀的：纹理强的模型常违反物理，几何稳定的模型缺乏行为保真度。WorldLens提供了标准化评估框架，能够区分不同模型在各维度的表现，并与人类判断对齐。
light_analysis.conclusion: WorldLens统一了驾驶世界模型评估标准，不仅关注视觉逼真度，更强调行为真实性。其基准、数据集和评估智能体构成完整生态系统，有助于指导未来模型开发，提升其在具身AI中的实际应用价值。局限性可能在于数据集规模和场景多样性，未来可扩展至更多交互任务。

title: Interpreto: An Explainability Library for Transformers
abstract: Interpreto is an open-source Python library for interpreting HuggingFace language models, from early BERT variants to LLMs. It provides two complementary families of methods: attribution methods and concept-based explanations. The library bridges recent research and practical tooling by exposing explanation workflows through a unified API for both classification and text generation. A key differentiator is its end-to-end concept-based pipeline (from activation extraction to concept learning, interpretation, and scoring), which goes beyond feature-level attributions and is uncommon in existing libraries. See GitHub: https://github.com/FOR-sight-ai/interpreto and the demo website: https://for-sight-ai.github.io/interpreto-demo/.
comment: Accepted to ACL 2026 System Demonstration. Equal contribution: Poché and Jourdan

light_analysis.overview: 一个开源的Transformer可解释性库，提供归因和概念解释方法，包含端到端概念基础管道。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有可解释性库主要关注特征级归因，缺乏从激活提取到概念学习、解释和评分的完整管道。同时，对文本生成模型的解释支持不足。Interpreto旨在桥接最新研究与实用工具，通过统一API支持分类和文本生成任务的解释。
light_analysis.method: Interpreto提供两类方法：属性方法（如注意力归因）和基于概念的解释。其关键创新是端到端的概念基础管道，包括激活提取、概念学习、概念解释和评分，超越单纯特征归因。库基于HuggingFace transformers，支持BERT到LLM，通过统一API适用于分类和文本生成。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验数据。但指出该库通过开源发布和演示网站展示了其实用性，相比现有库（如Captum、LIT）独特之处在于概念级别解释和端到端流程。具体性能指标未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: Interpreto作为开源库，填补了Transformer模型可解释性工具在概念级解释和端到端管道方面的空白。学术价值在于整合最新研究，实际应用价值为从业者提供易用工具，未来可扩展支持更多模型类型和解释方法。

title: SpaceTools: Tool-Augmented Spatial Reasoning via Double Interactive RL
abstract: Vision Language Models (VLMs) demonstrate strong qualitative visual understanding, but struggle with metrically precise spatial reasoning required for embodied applications. The agentic paradigm promises that VLMs can use a wide variety of tools that could augment these capabilities, such as depth estimators, segmentation models, and pose estimators. Yet it remains an open challenge how to realize this vision without solely relying on handcrafted prompting strategies or enforcing fixed, predefined tool pipelines that limit VLMs' ability to discover optimal tool-use patterns. Reinforcement Learning could overcome this gap, but has so far been limited to reasoning with a single visual tool due to the large search space in multi-tool reasoning. We introduce Double Interactive Reinforcement Learning (DIRL), a two-phase training framework where VLMs learn to coordinate multiple tools through interactive exploration and feedback. In the teaching phase, we combine demonstrations from a single tool specialist trained via interactive RL with traces from a frontier model using all tools. In the exploration phase, the model further refines multi-tool coordination through continued RL. Our model, SpaceTools, with tool-augmented spatial reasoning ability, achieves state-of-the-art performance on spatial understanding benchmarks (RoboSpatial-Home, BLINK, BOP-ASK) and demonstrates reliable real-world manipulation using a 7-DOF robot as a tool. DIRL provides substantial improvements over the vanilla SFT (+12% on RoboSpatial) and RL (+16% on RoboSpatial) baselines. Project page: https://spacetools.github.io/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出双交互强化学习框架DIRL，让视觉语言模型学会协调多个工具进行精确空间推理，实现SOTA性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型在定性视觉理解上表现良好，但在需要度量的精确空间推理方面存在不足。现有方法依赖手工提示或固定工具流程，限制了VLM发现最优工具使用模式的能力。强化学习可以解决这一问题，但由于多工具推理的搜索空间大，以往仅限于单一视觉工具。
light_analysis.method: 提出双交互强化学习（DIRL）两阶段训练框架。教学阶段：结合从单个工具专家（通过交互RL训练）的演示和前沿模型使用所有工具的轨迹。探索阶段：模型通过持续RL进一步细化多工具协调。得到的SpaceTools模型具备工具增强的空间推理能力。
light_analysis.result: 在空间理解基准（RoboSpatial-Home, BLINK, BOP-ASK）上达到SOTA性能，并展示了使用7自由度机器人作为工具的可靠真实世界操控。DIRL相比普通SFT提升12%（RoboSpatial），相比RL提升16%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出了DIRL框架，有效实现多工具协调的空间推理，具有学术价值和实际应用潜力。未来可探索更多工具类型和复杂场景。

title: Understanding the Effects of Distractors on Reasoning Vision-Language Models
abstract: How does irrelevant information (i.e., distractors) affect test-time scaling in vision-language models (VLMs)? Prior work on text-only language models has shown that textual distractors can intensify inverse scaling, causing models to reason longer but less effective reasoning traces. In this work, we investigate whether similar phenomena arise in multimodal settings. We introduce Idis (Images with distractors), a visual question-answering dataset that systematically varies distractors along semantic and numerical dimensions. Our analyses reveal that visual distractors affect reasoning VLMs in a fundamentally different way from textual distractors: although inverse scaling still emerges, visual distractors reduce accuracy without increasing reasoning length. We further show that attribute counts extracted from reasoning traces provide key insights into how distractors interact with reasoning length and accuracy. As a sanity check, we propose a simple prompting strategy that mitigates distractor-driven predictions in reasoning vision-language models.

light_analysis.overview: 研究视觉干扰物对推理型视觉语言模型测试时缩放的影响，发现其降低准确率但不增加推理长度，并提出缓解策略。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有文本语言模型研究表明，文本干扰物会导致反向缩放（推理变长但效果更差）。然而，视觉干扰物在多模态环境中的影响尚不清楚。理解视觉干扰物的作用机制对于提升视觉语言模型的鲁棒性和推理效率至关重要。本文旨在填补这一空白，系统研究视觉干扰物对推理型VLM的影响。
light_analysis.method: 引入Idis数据集，系统变化干扰物的语义和数值维度。通过分析推理轨迹中的属性计数，揭示视觉干扰物如何影响推理长度和准确率。提出一种简单的提示策略，以缓解干扰物驱动的预测。
light_analysis.result: 实验发现视觉干扰物对推理型VLM的影响与文本干扰物根本不同：虽然同样出现反向缩放，但视觉干扰物降低准确率而不增加推理长度。属性计数分析为干扰物与推理长度、准确率的交互提供了关键见解。提示策略有效缓解了干扰物驱动的不良预测。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了视觉干扰物在推理型VLM中的独特作用机制，强调了多模态环境下干扰物影响的差异性。提出的简单提示策略具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的抗干扰训练方法，并推广至更多模态和任务。

title: Evaluating the Performance of Deep Learning Models in Whole-body Dynamic 3D Posture Prediction During Load-reaching Activities
abstract: This study aimed to explore the application of deep neural networks for whole-body human posture prediction during dynamic load-reaching activities. Two time-series models were trained using bidirectional long short-term memory (BLSTM) and transformer architectures. The dataset consisted of 3D full-body plug-in gait dynamic coordinates from 20 normal-weight healthy male individuals each performing 204 load-reaching tasks from different load positions while adapting various lifting and handling techniques. The model inputs consisted of the 3D position of the hand-load position, lifting (stoop, full-squat and semi-squat) and handling (one- and two-handed) techniques, body weight and height, and the 3D coordinate data of the body posture from the first 25% of the task duration. These inputs were used by the models to predict body coordinates during the remaining 75% of the task period. Moreover, a novel method was proposed to improve the accuracy of the previous and present posture prediction networks by enforcing constant body segment lengths through the optimization of a new cost function. The results indicated that the new cost function decreased the prediction error of the models by approximately 8% and 21% for the arm and leg models, respectively. We indicated that utilizing the transformer architecture, with a root-mean-square-error of 41.4 mm, exhibited approximately 58% more accurate long-term performance than the BLSTM-based model. This study merits the use of neural networks that capture time series dependencies in 3D motion frames, providing a unique approach for understanding and predict motion dynamics during manual material handling activities.
comment: 11 pages, 6 figures, 7 tables, This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种增强深度神经网络预测人体动态姿态准确性的方法，通过强制恒定体段长度优化新代价函数，并对比BLSTM和Transformer架构在全身3D姿态预测中的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 在手动搬运活动中，准确预测人体动态3D姿态对工效学分析和安全评估至关重要。现有时间序列模型如BLSTM虽能捕获时序依赖，但长期预测精度不足，且未考虑体段长度恒定的生理约束，导致预测姿态不自然。本研究通过引入体段长度约束优化代价函数，并探索Transformer架构在动态姿态预测中的潜力，旨在提升预测的准确性和生物学合理性。
light_analysis.method: 使用双向长短期记忆网络(BLSTM)和Transformer两种时间序列模型。数据集包含20名健康男性，每人执行204次不同负载位置的搬运任务，记录全身3D坐标。模型输入包括手-负载位置、举升技术（弯腰、全蹲、半蹲）、操作方式（单手/双手）、体重身高及前25%任务周期的姿态坐标，输出预测后75%周期的坐标。创新在于提出新的代价函数，通过优化强制体段长度恒定，减少姿态畸变误差。
light_analysis.result: 新代价函数使手臂和腿部模型的预测误差分别降低约8%和21%。Transformer架构在长期预测中均方根误差(RMSE)为41.4 mm，比BLSTM模型的性能提升约58%。实验表明Transformer能更有效捕获3D运动帧中的时序依赖，显著提高姿态预测的长期准确性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究验证了深度神经网络在动态人体姿态预测中的有效性，通过体段长度约束和Transformer架构提升了预测精度，为手动搬运活动中的运动动力学分析与人体工效学评估提供了新方法。未来可扩展至不同人群和更复杂任务场景，并探索实时预测应用。

title: Relative Energy Learning for LiDAR Out-of-Distribution Detection
abstract: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is a critical requirement for reliable autonomous driving, where safety depends on recognizing road obstacles and unexpected objects beyond the training distribution. Despite extensive research on OOD detection in 2D images, direct transfer to 3D LiDAR point clouds has been proven ineffective. Current LiDAR OOD methods struggle to distinguish rare anomalies from common classes, leading to high false-positive rates and overconfident errors in safety-critical settings. We propose Relative Energy Learning (REL), a simple yet effective framework for OOD detection in LiDAR point clouds. REL leverages the energy gap between positive (in-distribution) and negative logits as a relative scoring function, mitigating calibration issues in raw energy values and improving robustness across various scenes. To address the absence of OOD samples during training, we propose a lightweight data synthesis strategy called Point Raise, which perturbs existing point clouds to generate auxiliary anomalies without altering the inlier semantics. Evaluated on SemanticKITTI and the Spotting the Unexpected (STU) benchmark, REL consistently outperforms existing methods by a large margin. Our results highlight that modeling relative energy, combined with simple synthetic outliers, provides a principled and scalable solution for reliable OOD detection in open-world autonomous driving.

light_analysis.overview: 提出相对能量学习（REL）框架和Point Raise数据合成方法，有效提升LiDAR点云分布外检测的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动驾驶安全依赖对分布外障碍物和意外物体的识别，但现有2D分布外检测方法直接迁移至3D LiDAR点云效果不佳。当前LiDAR分布外检测方法难以区分罕见异常与常见类别，导致高假阳性率和过度自信错误，在安全关键场景中不可靠。因此需要一种针对LiDAR点云的高效分布外检测方案。
light_analysis.method: 基于相对能量学习（REL），利用正负logits之间的能量差距作为相对评分函数，缓解原始能量值的校准问题，提升跨场景鲁棒性。同时提出Point Raise数据合成策略，通过扰动点云生成辅助异常样本，无需改变内点语义即可模拟分布外样本，解决训练时缺乏异常数据的问题。
light_analysis.result: 在SemanticKITTI和Spotting the Unexpected（STU）基准上，REL方法显著优于现有方法，大幅降低了假阳性率并提高了检测精度。具体性能提升规模未明确数值，但摘要强调“by a large margin”，表明效果显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: 建模相对能量并结合简单合成异常，为开放世界自动驾驶提供了可扩展的分布外检测方案。该工作平衡了有效性与实用性，未来可进一步优化数据合成策略或拓展至其他3D感知任务。

title: Optimizing Diversity and Quality through Base-Aligned Model Collaboration
