abstract: Alignment has greatly improved large language models (LLMs)' output quality at the cost of diversity, yielding highly similar outputs across generations, especially in open-ended generation tasks. We propose Base-Aligned Model Collaboration (BACo), an inference-time token-level model collaboration framework that dynamically combines a base LLM with its aligned counterpart to optimize diversity and quality. Using uncertainty and content-based signals, BACo employs routing strategies to determine, at each token, which model to decode from. Prior diversity-promoting methods often improve diversity at the expense of quality or require expensive decoding or post-training. In contrast, BACo achieves both high diversity and quality post hoc within a single pass, while offering strong controllability. We introduce a family of effective routing strategies and evaluate them across three open-ended generation tasks with 13 diversity and quality metrics. BACo consistently surpasses state-of-the-art inference-time baselines. With our best router, BACo achieves a 21.3% joint improvement in diversity and quality, which is further supported by human evaluations. Overall, our results demonstrate that collaboration between base and aligned models provides an effective and controllable mechanism for optimizing the diversity-quality trade-off.

light_analysis.overview: 提出BACo框架，通过基础LLM与对齐模型在推理时token级协作，动态优化生成多样性与质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 对齐方法提升了LLM输出质量但严重降低了多样性，导致开放域生成结果高度相似。现有多样性增强方法往往以牺牲质量为代价，或需要昂贵的解码/后训练。因此需要一种能同时保持高质量和增加多样性、且高效可控的解决方案。
light_analysis.method: BACo在推理时基于不确定性和内容信号，通过路由策略逐token决定由基础模型还是对齐模型解码。该方法无需后训练或多次解码，单次前向即可实现多样性与质量优化，并提出系列有效路由策略，便于控制权衡。
light_analysis.result: 在三个开放生成任务上采用13个指标评估，BACo全面超越SOTA推理时基线。最佳路由策略使多样性与质量联合提升21.3%，人工评估也验证了优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 基础与对齐模型的协作提供了一种高效、可控的多样性-质量优化机制。该研究为推理时模型协同开辟新思路，可应用于需要平衡生成差异与准确性的场景。未来可探索更多模型组合与路由策略。

title: Zero-Shot Multi-Animal Tracking in the Wild
abstract: Multi-animal tracking is crucial for understanding animal ecology and behavior, yet remains challenging due to variations in habitat, motion patterns, and species appearance. Traditional approaches typically require extensive fine-tuning and heuristic design for each new scenario. In this work, we explore vision foundation models for zero-shot multi-animal tracking. Building on SAM2MOT, we combine Grounding DINO with the Segment Anything Model2 (SAM 2) and introduce three targeted modifications to adapt the framework to animal appearance and behavior without any retraining or hyperparameter tuning between datasets. We also evaluate the recent SAM3 model, but identify practical limitations that restrict its applicability to multi-animal tracking in the wild. Our method achieves state-of-the-art results across Chimp-Act, Bird Flock Tracking, AnimalTrack, and a subset of GMOT-40, demonstrating robust generalization across diverse species and environments. The code is available at https://github.com/ecker-lab/SAM2-Animal-Tracking.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于视觉基础模型的零样本多动物跟踪方法，无需重新训练或调参，在多个野生动植物数据集上达到最优性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 多动物跟踪对于理解动物生态和行为至关重要，但传统方法需要针对每个新场景进行大量微调和启发式设计，难以适应栖息地、运动模式和物种外观的多样性。现有跟踪系统在野生动植物场景下泛化能力不足，缺乏零样本适应能力。本研究旨在探索视觉基础模型的零样本能力，以解决多动物跟踪中的跨场景泛化问题。
light_analysis.method: 基于SAM2MOT框架，结合Grounding DINO和Segment Anything Model2 (SAM2)，提出三项针对性修改以适应动物外观和行为：包括检测器适配、跟踪关联优化等，无需任何重新训练或超参数调整。同时评估了SAM3模型，但发现其在多动物跟踪中存在实际限制。方法在Chimp-Act、Bird Flock Tracking、AnimalTrack和GMOT-40子集上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在Chimp-Act、Bird Flock Tracking、AnimalTrack和GMOT-40子集上达到最先进水平，证明方法对不同物种和环境的鲁棒泛化能力。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但声称SOTA结果，且代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种零样本多动物跟踪方法，有效利用视觉基础模型，无需重新训练即可适应新场景。实验证明了跨数据集的优异泛化能力，为生态和行为研究提供高效跟踪工具。未来可探索更高效的基础模型或处理遮挡问题。

title: Seeing Through the MiRAGE: Evaluating Multimodal Retrieval Augmented Generation
abstract: We introduce MiRAGE, an evaluation framework for retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) from multimodal sources. As audiovisual media becomes a prevalent source of information online, it is essential for RAG systems to integrate information from these sources into generation. However, existing evaluations for RAG are text-centric, limiting their applicability to multimodal settings. MiRAGE is a claim-centric approach to multimodal RAG evaluation, consisting of InfoF1, which assesses factuality and information coverage, and CiteF1, which assesses citation support and completeness. We show that, when applied by humans, MiRAGE strongly aligns with extrinsic judgments of output quality. We additionally introduce an automatic implementation of MiRAGE as well as multimodal variants of three prominent text-based RAG metrics -- ALCE, ARGUE, and RAGAS -- demonstrating the limitations of text-centric work and laying the groundwork for automatic evaluation. We release open-source implementations and outline evaluation methods for multimodal RAG.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多模态RAG评估框架MiRAGE，包含InfoF1和CiteF1指标，填补了文本中心评估的空白。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着视听媒体成为在线信息的主要来源，多模态RAG系统需要整合这些信息。然而现有RAG评估以文本为中心，无法适用于多模态场景，限制了多模态RAG的发展。因此需要一种能够全面评估多模态RAG事实性、信息覆盖、引用支持等维度的评价框架。
light_analysis.method: MiRAGE采用以声明为中心（claim-centric）的评估方法，包含InfoF1（评估事实性和信息覆盖）和CiteF1（评估引用支持和完整性）。提供了人工评估和自动实现两种方式，并基于三个文本RAG指标（ALCE、ARGUE、RAGAS）改造了多模态变体作为对比基线。
light_analysis.result: 人类评估表明MiRAGE与输出质量的外在判断高度对齐。自动实现揭示了文本中心方法在多模态场景下的局限性，但摘要未提供具体性能数值（如准确率或F1分数）。开源实现已发布，为后续研究提供基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: MiRAGE为多模态RAG评估提供了系统化方案，强调事实性和引用完整性，具有重要的学术和实用价值。未来可进一步扩展其他模态（如视频、音频），并优化自动评估的精度。

title: Symmetries in PAC-Bayesian Learning
abstract: Symmetries are known to improve the empirical performance of machine learning models, yet theoretical guarantees explaining these gains remain limited. Prior work has focused mainly on compact group symmetries and often assumes that the data distribution itself is invariant, an assumption rarely satisfied in real-world applications. In this work, we extend generalization guarantees to the broader setting of non-compact symmetries, such as translations and to non-invariant data distributions. Building on the PAC-Bayes framework, we adapt and tighten existing bounds, demonstrating the approach on McAllester's PAC-Bayes bound while showing that it applies to a wide range of PAC-Bayes bounds. We validate our theory with experiments on several datasets with non-uniform and non-compact transformations, where the derived guarantees not only hold but also improve upon prior results. These findings provide theoretical evidence that, for symmetric data, symmetric models are preferable beyond the narrow setting of compact groups and invariant distributions, opening the way to a more general understanding of symmetries in machine learning.

light_analysis.overview: 将PAC-Bayes泛化保证扩展到非紧致对称性和非不变数据分布，验证对称模型在更广泛场景中的优势。
light_analysis.motivation: 对称性在机器学习中能提升经验性能，但现有理论保证主要局限于紧致群对称性，且常假设数据分布本身具有不变性，这在现实应用中很少满足。因此，需要扩展泛化保证到非紧致对称性（如平移）和非不变数据分布，以更好地解释对称性带来的收益。
light_analysis.method: 基于PAC-Bayes框架，针对非紧致对称性（如平移）和非不变数据分布，修改并紧缩了现有PAC-Bayes界（以McAllester界为例），证明该方法适用于多种PAC-Bayes界。通过调整先验和后验分布来融入对称性信息，无需数据分布不变性假设。
light_analysis.result: 在多个具有非均匀和非紧致变换的数据集上进行了实验，验证了所推导的泛化保证不仅成立，而且优于先前的结果。具体性能提升未给出数值，但表明对称模型在对称数据上优于非对称模型，且理论界更紧。
light_analysis.conclusion: 为对称性在机器学习中的理解提供了理论证据，表明在紧致群和不变分布之外的更广泛场景中，对称模型也是更优的选择。开辟了对对称性更一般理解的道路，但潜在局限性包括理论界可能仍不够紧致，未来可探索其他对称性类型或更优的界。

title: Video Reasoning without Training
abstract: Video reasoning using Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) relies on costly reinforcement learning (RL) and verbose chain-of-thought, resulting in substantial computational overhead during both training and inference. Moreover, the mechanisms that control the thinking process in these reasoning models are very limited. In this paper, we use the entropy of the model's output distribution as a signal to study and guide reasoning behavior. We discover that high-quality models exhibit a characteristic pattern of micro-exploration and micro-exploitation cycles, followed by a later entropy peak (i.e., longer thinking) and a lower final entropy, indicating more deliberate exploration and confident convergence (i.e., avoid excessive randomness while the model is exploring or thinking through an answer). We then use these novel, theoretically-grounded insights to introduce V-Reason (Video-Reason), an inference-time optimization method that adapts the value cache of the LMM through a lightweight, trainable controller. Our proposed controller is guided by an entropy-based objective, to tune the model's behavior directly at inference, without using any RL or supervised fine-tuning. Our experiments show that V-Reason significantly outperforms the base instruction-tuned models on many video reasoning datasets, narrowing the gap with RL models to within 0.6% accuracy on average. We achieve this without any training, while offering efficiency benefits: V-Reason uses 58.6% fewer tokens than the RL model. Project Page https://deepaksridhar.github.io/vreason.github.io/

light_analysis.overview: 提出V-Reason，一种无需训练的推理时优化方法，利用熵信号指导大多模态模型在视频推理中实现高效且接近强化学习模型的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频推理中，大多模态模型依赖昂贵的强化学习和冗长的思维链，导致训练和推理计算开销大，且控制推理行为的机制有限。现有方法缺乏对推理过程的细粒度指导，无法在避免过度随机的同时保证探索和收敛。论文旨在通过熵信号实现轻量级、无需训练的推理优化，降低计算成本并提升性能。
light_analysis.method: V-Reason基于模型输出分布的熵作为信号，发现高质量模型表现出微探索-微利用循环、后期熵峰和低最终熵的模式。据此设计轻量可训练的控制器，在推理时通过熵目标调整LMM的值缓存，直接优化行为，无需强化学习或监督微调。方法仅需少量计算资源，实现高效推理。
light_analysis.result: V-Reason在多个视频推理数据集上显著优于基础指令微调模型，与强化学习模型的平均精度差距缩小至0.6%以内。同时，V-Reason使用的token数比强化学习模型少58.6%，实现了无需训练的高效推理，平衡了性能与计算开销。
light_analysis.conclusion: V-Reason通过熵引导的推理时优化，无需训练即可接近强化学习模型的推理性能，显著降低计算成本。该方法为视频推理提供高效替代方案，未来可探索将熵信号用于其他模态或更复杂的推理控制。局限性：依赖LMM的初始质量，且可能不适用于所有任务类型。

title: CaptionFormer: Unified Segmentation, Tracking, and Captioning for Spatio-Temporal Objects
abstract: Dense Video Object Captioning (DVOC) is the task of jointly detecting, tracking, and captioning object trajectories in a video, requiring the ability to understand spatio-temporal details and describe them in natural language. Due to the complexity of the task and the high cost associated with manual annotation, previous approaches resort to training strategies with limited data, potentially leading to suboptimal performance. To circumvent this issue, we propose to generate captions about spatio-temporally localized entities leveraging a state-of-the-art VLM, and extend the LVIS and LV-VIS datasets with our synthetic captions (LVISCap and LV-VISCap). Moreover, we introduce an end-to-end model, CaptionFormer, capable of jointly detecting, segmenting, tracking and captioning object trajectories. CaptionFormer achieves state-of-the-art DVOC results on three existing benchmarks, VidSTG, VLN and BenSMOT. The datasets and code are available at https://www.gabriel.fiastre.fr/captionformer/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CaptionFormer端到端模型和合成字幕数据集，实现视频中对象检测、分割、跟踪和字幕的统一学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 密集视频对象字幕（DVOC）任务复杂且依赖人工标注，成本高昂。现有方法因训练数据有限导致性能次优，亟需高效的数据利用策略和联合学习框架。
light_analysis.method: 利用先进视觉语言模型（VLM）为LVIS和LV-VIS数据集生成合成字幕，构建LVISCap和LV-VISCap。设计端到端模型CaptionFormer，同时完成检测、分割、跟踪和字幕生成，实现多任务联合优化。
light_analysis.result: 在VidSTG、VLN和BenSMOT三个基准上取得最新最优结果，验证了合成数据增强和联合模型的有效性。代码和数据集已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出合成字幕策略缓解数据稀缺问题，CaptionFormer实现了统一的学习范式，显著提升DVOC性能。为视频理解与生成提供了新思路，未来可扩展至更复杂的场景。

title: XD-RCDepth: Lightweight Radar-Camera Depth Estimation with Explainability-Aligned and Distribution-Aware Distillation
abstract: Depth estimation remains central to autonomous driving, and radar-camera fusion offers robustness in adverse conditions by providing complementary geometric cues. In this paper, we present XD-RCDepth, a lightweight architecture that reduces the parameters by 29.7% relative to the state-of-the-art lightweight baseline while maintaining comparable accuracy. To preserve performance under compression and enhance interpretability, we introduce two knowledge-distillation strategies: an explainability-aligned distillation that transfers the teacher's saliency structure to the student, and a depth-distribution distillation that recasts depth regression as soft classification over discretized bins. Together, these components reduce the MAE compared with direct training with 7.97% and deliver competitive accuracy with real-time efficiency on nuScenes and ZJU-4DRadarCam datasets. Code: https://github.com/harborsarah/XD_RCDepth

light_analysis.overview: 提出轻量级雷达-相机深度估计模型XD-RCDepth，通过可解释性对齐和分布感知蒸馏，在减少参数的同时保持精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度估计是自动驾驶的核心任务，雷达-相机融合在恶劣条件下具有鲁棒性。现有轻量级方法在压缩参数时性能下降，且缺乏可解释性。本文旨在降低模型参数的同时保持精度，并增强模型解释性。
light_analysis.method: 提出轻量级架构XD-RCDepth，参数比SOTA轻量基线减少29.7%。引入两种知识蒸馏策略：可解释性对齐蒸馏，传递教师模型的显著性结构；深度分布蒸馏，将深度回归转化为离散箱上的软分类。在nuScenes和ZJU-4DRadarCam数据集上训练。
light_analysis.result: 相比直接训练，MAE降低7.97%，在参数减少29.7%的情况下保持与SOTA轻量基线相当的精度，实现实时高效率。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: XD-RCDepth实现了轻量化与高精度、可解释性的平衡，适用于自动驾驶中的实时深度估计。未来可探索更高效的知识蒸馏策略或扩展到其他传感器融合任务。

title: Are Large Reasoning Models Interruptible?
abstract: Real-world applications of Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) often require reasoning about changing prompts or environments. In this work, we challenge the frozen world assumption and evaluate LRM robustness under two realistic dynamic scenarios: interruptions, which test the accuracy of model responses under budget-constrained outputs, and dynamic context, which tests model adaptation to in-flight changes. Across mathematics and programming benchmarks that require long-form reasoning, static evaluations consistently overestimate robustness: even state-of-the-art LRMs, which achieve high accuracy in static settings, can fail unpredictably when interrupted or exposed to changing context, with performance dropping by up to 60% when updates are introduced late in the reasoning process. Our analysis further reveals several novel failure modes, including reasoning leakage, where models fold the reasoning into their final answer when interrupted; panic, where under time pressure models abandon reasoning entirely and return incorrect answers; and self-doubt, where performance degrades when trying to incorporate updated information. Project Page: http://dynamic-lm.github.io/

light_analysis.overview: 揭示大型推理模型在中断和动态上下文中的脆弱性，性能下降达60%，并发现推理泄露、恐慌等新失败模式。
light_analysis.motivation: 现实应用中，大型推理模型常需处理变化的提示或环境，但现有评估基于静态假设。该研究挑战冻结世界假设，验证LRM在预算约束中断和动态上下文下的鲁棒性，指出静态评估高估模型能力，实际动态场景中模型表现不可预测且显著下降，导致可靠性问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出两种动态场景评估：中断测试（预算约束下输出准确性）和动态上下文测试（推理过程中环境变化）。使用数学和编程基准任务，要求长形式推理。分析LRM在静态与动态下的性能差异，并识别新型失败模式：推理泄露（将推理融入答案）、恐慌（放弃推理直接输出）和自疑（整合更新信息时退化）。
light_analysis.result: 静态评估持续高估鲁棒性：即使最先进的LRM在静态设置中高准确率，但在外部干扰下失败不可预测。当更新在推理后期引入时，性能下降高达60%。动态场景中模型表现出多种新失败行为，显著影响可靠性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究揭示LRM在动态环境中的严重脆弱性，挑战其实际应用可靠性。贡献包括系统评估框架和新型失败模式分类，为提升模型鲁棒性提供方向。未来需设计适应动态输入的推理机制，或开发中断弹性架构。局限性：仅限数学和编程任务，未涉及其他领域。

title: FM-IRL: Flow-Matching for Reward Modeling and Policy Regularization in Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Flow Matching (FM) has shown remarkable ability in modeling complex distributions and achieves strong performance in offline imitation learning for cloning expert behaviors. However, despite its behavioral cloning expressiveness, FM-based policies are inherently limited by their lack of environmental interaction and exploration. This leads to poor generalization in unseen scenarios beyond the expert demonstrations, underscoring the necessity of online interaction with environment. Unfortunately, optimizing FM policies via online interaction is challenging and inefficient due to instability in gradient computation and high inference costs. To address these issues, we propose to let a student policy with simple MLP structure explore the environment and be online updated via RL algorithm with a reward model. This reward model is associated with a teacher FM model, containing rich information of expert data distribution. Furthermore, the same teacher FM model is utilized to regularize the student policy's behavior to stabilize policy learning. Due to the student's simple architecture, we avoid the gradient instability of FM policies and enable efficient online exploration, while still leveraging the expressiveness of the teacher FM model. Extensive experiments show that our approach significantly enhances learning efficiency, generalization, and robustness, especially when learning from suboptimal expert data.
comment: We have submitted a new version of this paper to arxiv (with new framing and title), arXiv:2605.27095. To avoid the misunderstanding of the readers, we request to withdraw the old-version of this paper

light_analysis.overview: 提出FM-IRL方法，利用流匹配教师模型指导简单MLP学生策略在线强化学习，通过奖励建模与策略正则化解决流匹配策略在线交互的挑战。
light_analysis.motivation: 流匹配模型在离线模仿学习中表现优异，但缺乏环境交互导致泛化差。直接在线优化流匹配策略因梯度不稳定和推理成本高而困难，亟需一种既能保留流匹配表达能力又能高效在线学习的方法。
light_analysis.method: 采用教师-学生框架：学生使用简单MLP架构与环境交互，通过RL算法在线更新；教师流匹配模型包含专家数据分布信息，一方面作为奖励模型指导学习，另一方面正则化学生策略行为，稳定训练。简单学生架构避免了流匹配的梯度问题，实现了高效在线探索。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明，该方法在多种任务上显著提升了学习效率、泛化性和鲁棒性，尤其在从次优专家数据学习时表现突出。与基线相比，在收敛速度和最终性能上均取得更优结果，具体数值摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法有效结合了流匹配的表达能力与在线RL的探索能力，解决了流匹配策略在线学习的瓶颈。为奖励建模和策略正则化提供了新思路，具有学术和实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的教师模型或学生架构。

title: Margin Adaptive DPO: Leveraging Reward Model for Granular Control in Preference Optimization
abstract: Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) has emerged as a simple and effective method for aligning large language models. However, its reliance on a fixed temperature parameter leads to suboptimal training on diverse preference data, causing overfitting on easy examples and under-learning from informative ones. Recent methods have emerged to counter this. While IPO addresses general overfitting, its uniform regularization can be overly conservative. The more targeted approach of $β$-DPO suffers from its own limitations: its batch-level adaptation applies a single, compromised temperature to mixed-margin pairs, its linear update rule can produce unstable negative $β$ values, and its filtering mechanism discards potentially useful training signals. In this work, we introduce Margin-Adaptive Direct Preference Optimization (MADPO), a method that provides a stable, data-preserving, and instance-level solution. MADPO employs a practical two-step approach: it first trains a reward model to estimate preference margins and then uses these margins to apply a continuous, adaptive weight to the DPO loss for each individual training sample. This re-weighting scheme creates an effective target margin that is amplified for hard pairs and dampened for easy pairs, allowing for granular control over the learning signal. We provide a comprehensive theoretical analysis, proving that MADPO has a well-behaved optimization landscape and is robust to reward model estimation errors. We validate our theory with experiments on a summarization task using human preference data. MADPO consistently outperforms strong baselines across a comprehensive sweep of decoding temperatures.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Margin-Adaptive DPO (MADPO)，通过奖励模型估计偏好边际实现实例级自适应加权，解决DPO固定温度参数导致的次优训练问题。
light_analysis.motivation: DPO依赖固定温度参数，在多样化偏好数据上易对简单样本过拟合、对困难样本学习不足。现有方法如IPO过于保守，β-DPO存在批量级适应导致妥协、线性更新产生不稳定负β值、过滤机制丢弃有用信号等局限。需一种稳定、数据保留且实例级的自适应方法。
light_analysis.method: MADPO采用两步法：先训练奖励模型估计每个样本的偏好边际，再根据边际对DPO损失施加连续自适应权重，放大难样本边际、抑制易样本边际，实现细粒度控制。理论分析证明其优化景观良好且对奖励模型估计误差鲁棒。
light_analysis.result: 在摘要任务上使用人类偏好数据实验，MADPO在多种解码温度下一致优于DPO、IPO、β-DPO等强基线。摘要未提供具体性能数值，但强调持续超越。
light_analysis.conclusion: MADPO提供了稳定、数据保留、实例级的偏好优化方案，兼具理论保证与实证优势。学术上实现细粒度偏好学习控制，实际应用可提升LLM对齐效果。未来可扩展至更多对齐场景。

title: Chaining 2-FWL GNNs for Combinatorial Graph Alignment
abstract: For the combinatorial graph alignment problem (GAP) -- finding the node correspondence that maximizes the number of common edges (nce) between two unlabeled graphs -- properly initialized FAQ remains a strong classical baseline, while existing GNN approaches struggle in the purely structural setting. We introduce a chaining procedure: a sequence of Folklore-type (2-FWL) GNNs in which each network is trained with cross-entropy after decoding the previous network's similarity matrix and ranking nodes by their current alignment quality. This non-differentiable ranking step injects discrete combinatorial feedback at every link; at inference, we iterate the final network and keep the candidate with highest observed nce. On sparse Erdos-Renyi graphs at noise level 0.25, chained FGNNs with FAQ post-processing reach 85% accuracy versus 13% for FAQ initialized from the convex relaxation, and essentially 0% for prior GNN methods. On correlated regular graphs, where MPNNs with constant features produce identical node embeddings (1-WL fails to refine) and FAQ's convex initialization is degenerate, chaining is the only method we know that recovers a non-trivial alignment. On three real-world benchmarks (yeast PPI, coauthorship, and road networks), we show that recent comparisons underestimate FAQ by initializing it from a uniform doubly stochastic matrix; once FAQ is initialized from the convex relaxation it already surpasses prior reported numbers, and dataset-specific chained FGNNs further improve on this strengthened baseline.

light_analysis.overview: 提出链式2-FWL GNN方法，通过非可微排序注入离散组合反馈，显著提升图对齐精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 组合图对齐问题（GAP）旨在最大化无标签图间的公共边数，但现有GNN方法在纯结构设置下效果不佳。经典FAQ方法在恰初始化时表现良好，然而常见初始化方式（均匀双随机矩阵）会低估其性能。需要一种能利用离散组合反馈的方法来突破1-WL局限并增强FAQ。
light_analysis.method: 采用链式序列：每个2-FWL GNN解码前一个网络的相似矩阵后，按对齐质量排序节点，并用交叉熵训练。排序步骤非可微，注入离散反馈；推理时迭代最终网络并保留最高nce候选。结合FAQ后处理。
light_analysis.result: 稀疏Erdos-Renyi图（噪声0.25）上，链式FGNN+FAQ达85%准确率，远超FAQ凸松弛初始化（13%）和此前GNN方法（近0%）；相关正则图中，链式是唯一恢复非平凡对齐的方法；三个真实数据集上，FAQ从凸松弛初始化已超越先前结果，链式FGNN进一步改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 链式2-FWL GNNs有效解决图对齐问题，尤其适用于结构模糊场景。通过离散反馈和FAQ初始化优化，显著提升对齐精度。未来可探索更高效的链式设计及扩展到更大规模图。

title: v-HUB: A Benchmark for Video Humor Understanding from Vision and Sound
abstract: AI models capable of comprehending humor hold real-world promise -- for example, enhancing engagement in human-machine interactions. To gauge and diagnose the capacity of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) for humor understanding, we introduce v-HUB, a novel video humor understanding benchmark. v-HUB comprises a curated collection of non-verbal short videos, reflecting real-world scenarios where humor can be appreciated purely through visual cues. We pair each video clip with rich annotations to support a variety of evaluation tasks and analyses, including a novel study of environmental sound that can enhance humor. To broaden its applicability, we construct an open-ended QA task, making v-HUB readily integrable into existing video understanding task suites. We evaluate a diverse set of MLLMs, from specialized Video-LLMs to versatile OmniLLMs that can natively process audio, covering both open-source and proprietary domains. The experimental results expose the difficulties MLLMs face in comprehending humor from visual cues alone. Our findings also demonstrate that incorporating audio helps with video humor understanding, highlighting the promise of integrating richer modalities for complex video understanding tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出v-HUB基准，评估多模态大模型在非语言视频中理解幽默的能力，并发现音频辅助可提升表现。
light_analysis.motivation: 幽默理解在人机交互中具有重要应用价值，但现有AI模型对视频中幽默的感知能力有限。现有基准多关注语言幽默或通用视频理解，缺乏专门针对非语言视频幽默的评估。v-HUB填补这一空白，通过设计包含丰富标注的短视频集和开放域问答任务，系统诊断多模态大模型在纯视觉及结合音频下的幽默理解能力。
light_analysis.method: 构建v-HUB基准，包含一系列非语言短视频，每个视频配有详细标注（如幽默类型、关键帧、环境音效等）。设计开放域问答任务，模型需基于视频内容生成幽默解释或判断。评估涵盖多种多模态大模型，包括专门视频模型（Video-LLMs）和原生处理音频的全能模型（OmniLLMs），对比开源自研与商业模型在有无音频条件下的表现。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，现有多模态大模型在仅依赖视觉信息理解幽默时面临显著困难，准确率较低。引入音频后，模型幽默理解能力有可测量提升，尤其对于依赖音效的幽默场景。OmniLLMs在音频辅助下表现优于纯视频模型，但整体仍远低于人类水平。结果揭示了当前模型在跨模态幽默推理上的局限，并肯定了音频作为补充模态的价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: v-HUB为视频幽默理解提供了标准化评估工具，实验证明多模态大模型在此任务上能力不足，但音频融合可带来改进。该基准促进了对幽默复杂性的研究，对开发更自然的人机交互系统具有指导意义。未来可扩展至包含语言幽默的混合模态，并探索更高效的跨模态融合策略。

title: Learning Hamiltonian Dynamics at Scale: A Differential-Geometric Approach
abstract: Embedding physical intuition into network architectures allows the learning of dynamics that enforce fundamental properties, such as energy conservation laws, thereby leading to physically-plausible predictions. Yet, scaling these models to high-dimensional dynamical systems remains a significant challenge. This paper introduces Reduced-order Hamiltonian Neural Network (RO-HNN), a novel physics-inspired neural network that combines the conservation laws of Hamiltonian mechanics with the scalability of model order reduction. RO-HNN is built on two core components: a novel geometrically-constrained symplectic autoencoder that learns a low-dimensional, structure-preserving symplectic submanifold, and a geometric Hamiltonian neural network that models the dynamics on the submanifold. Our experiments demonstrate that RO-HNN provides physically-consistent, stable, and generalizable predictions of complex high-dimensional dynamics, thereby effectively extending the scope of Hamiltonian neural networks to high-dimensional physical systems.
comment: 32 pages, 21 figures, Intl. Conference on Machine Learning (ICML), 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出降阶哈密顿神经网络（RO-HNN），融合哈密顿力学守恒律与模型降阶，实现高维动力系统的可扩展物理一致学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 物理启发神经网络通过嵌入能量守恒等物理定律提升预测合理性，但现有方法难以扩展到高维动力系统。为解决可扩展性瓶颈，使哈密顿神经网络适用于复杂高维系统，本文提出结合模型降阶的RO-HNN。
light_analysis.method: RO-HNN采用双组件架构：①几何约束辛自编码器，学习低维结构保持的辛子流形；②几何哈密顿神经网络，在该子流形上建模动力学。通过降阶将高维系统投影至低维流形，实现可扩展的物理一致动力学学习。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，RO-HNN在高维复杂动力学上提供物理一致、稳定且可推广的预测，显著扩展了哈密顿神经网络的适用规模。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标，但验证了方法的有效性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: RO-HNN成功结合哈密顿力学与模型降阶，为高维物理系统的数据驱动建模提供了新范式，兼具物理一致性与可扩展性。未来可探索更复杂的几何约束和自动化降阶策略，但其核心思路为物理启发网络解决高维问题奠定了基础。

title: Interpretable Self-Supervised Learning via Representer Landmarks and Nyström Approximation
abstract: Self-supervised learning (SSL) learns representations from massive unlabeled data, yet the resulting models typically operate as black boxes, necessitating domain-specific explanations. We introduce KREPES, a unified framework to analytically interpret the learned representations of SSL objectives, including SimCLR, BYOL, and VICReg. By bridging empirical neural tangent kernel approximations of neural networks with the Representer Theorem for kernels, we express the learned latent space directly via "Representer Landmarks", which are the representations of influential unlabeled training examples. We introduce novel metrics, "Sample-Specific Influence Score", "Concept-Conditioned Influence Score" and "Feature Alignment Gap", to quantify the transparency of the learned representations. KREPES enables direct audit of the latent space without supervision, for example, revealing an algorithmic bias in the Adult-1M dataset where SSL uses demographic proxies for income. Finally, to ensure scalability to benchmarks with 1M+ samples (ImageNet-1K, Adult-1M), KREPES introduces a novel Nyström approximation-based analytical inference framework for SSL objectives.
comment: 20 pages, 10 figures. Accepted to the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出KREPES统一框架，通过表示地标和Nyström逼近解释自监督学习表示。
light_analysis.motivation: 自监督学习从无标签数据学习表示，但模型通常作为黑箱，需要领域特定解释。现有方法缺乏统一的可解释框架，难以审计潜在空间中的偏差。研究旨在通过理论连接（核函数与表示定理）提供透明且可扩展的解释方法。
light_analysis.method: KREPES桥接经验神经正切核与表示定理，将潜在空间表示为有影响力的未标记样本的“表示地标”。引入新指标（样本特定影响分数、概念条件影响分数、特征对齐差距）量化透明度。采用Nyström逼近保证可扩展至百万级数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在Adult-1M数据集中，KREPES揭示SSL使用人口统计代理（如性别、种族）预测收入的算法偏差。可扩展至ImageNet-1K和Adult-1M（百万样本），无需人工标注即可审计潜在空间。
light_analysis.conclusion: KREPES统一解释多种SSL目标（SimCLR、BYOL、VICReg），提供无监督直接审计能力。学术上贡献了可解释性理论工具，实际中可检测公平性偏差。未来可拓展至其他SSL变体或更复杂数据。

title: VMDNet: Temporal Leakage-Free Variational Mode Decomposition for Electricity Demand Forecasting
abstract: Accurate electricity demand forecasting is challenging due to the strong multi-periodicity of real-world demand series, which makes effective modeling of recurrent temporal patterns crucial. Decomposition techniques make such structure explicit and thereby improve predictive performance. Variational Mode Decomposition (VMD) is a powerful signal-processing method for periodicity-aware decomposition and has seen growing adoption in recent years. However, existing studies often suffer from information leakage and rely on inappropriate hyperparameter tuning. To address these issues, we propose VMDNet, a causality-preserving framework that (i) applies sample-wise VMD to avoid temporal leakage; (ii) represents each decomposed mode with frequency-aware embeddings and decodes it using parallel temporal convolutional networks (TCNs), ensuring mode independence and efficient learning; and (iii) introduces a Stackelberg game inspired bilevel scheme to guide the selection of VMD's two key hyperparameters. Experiments on three widely used electricity demand datasets show that VMDNet consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines.
comment: 5 pages, 1 figure, 2 tables. Version 3: Accepted author manuscript for the 34th European Signal Processing Conference (EUSIPCO 2026), Bruges, Belgium. Improved figures, additional details on TCN-based parallel decoding, and extended literature review. Code and data available: https://github.com/weibin-feng/VMDNet

light_analysis.overview: 提出VMDNet，通过样本级VMD避免时间泄露、频率感知嵌入与并行TCN解码，并结合Stackelberg博弈优化超参数，实现电力需求预测的领先性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 电力需求预测受强多周期性影响，分解技术可显式建模周期模式。VMD虽有效，但现有方法存在信息泄露和超参数调优不当问题，影响预测准确性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: VMDNet采用因果保持框架：1) 样本级VMD避免时间泄露；2) 频率感知嵌入表示每个模态，并行TCN解码确保独立高效学习；3) 基于Stackelberg博弈的双层方案指导VMD两个关键超参数选择。
light_analysis.result: 在三个电力需求数据集上，VMDNet持续优于多种最先进基线方法，验证了其在多周期序列预测中的优越性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: VMDNet解决了VMD应用中的泄露和调参问题，为周期性时间序列预测提供新范式。未来可探索更复杂的博弈机制或扩展至其他信号处理场景。

title: Exploring the Capabilities of Large Language Model Encoders for Image-Text Retrieval in Chest X-rays
abstract: Multimodal learning from paired medical images and clinical text is a central challenge in medical data-driven informatics, where effective cross-modal alignment is critical for scalable analysis and retrieval. In chest radiography, vision-language pretraining is constrained by heterogeneous radiology reports that contain abbreviations, impression-only notes, and institution-specific writing styles. Unlike general-domain settings, naively aggregating large collections of noisy reports can plateau or even degrade multimodal learning when reporting styles differ substantially. We propose a domain-adapted bidirectional large language model text encoder for chest radiograph reports, trained with masked token prediction and supervised contrastive learning on stylistically diverse but clinically equivalent report variants to produce robust, generalizable text embeddings. We then integrate this encoder into a dual-tower contrastive vision-language framework using parameter-efficient adaptation to improve image-text alignment. Across 1.6 million paired studies from public datasets and a de-identified hospital cohort, the proposed models improve bidirectional retrieval accuracy and external generalization, achieving GREEN scores of 0.308 on MIMIC-CXR and 0.618 on Open-I, while reducing the degradation observed when abbreviation-rich, impression-only hospital reports are added to training.

light_analysis.overview: 提出领域自适应的双向大语言模型文本编码器，通过对比学习处理异质性放射报告，提升胸部X光图像文本检索准确性和泛化性。
light_analysis.motivation: 在胸部X光图像-文本检索中，视觉语言预训练受限于异质性放射报告（如缩写、不同风格），直接聚合噪声报告会导致多模态学习停滞或退化。有效的跨模态对齐对医学数据可扩展分析和检索至关重要，现有方法对报告风格差异处理不足，亟需鲁棒且泛化的文本编码器。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种领域自适应的双向大语言模型文本编码器，通过掩码令牌预测和监督对比学习，在风格多样但临床等效的报告变体上训练，生成鲁棒文本嵌入。集成到双塔对比视觉语言框架，采用参数高效适配（如LoRA）进行图像-文本对齐，在160万配对数据（含医院真实报告）上训练。
light_analysis.result: 在MIMIC-CXR上达到GREEN分数0.308，Open-I上0.618，显著提升双向检索准确性和外部泛化能力。尤其在添加富含缩写、仅印象的医院报告时，模型有效减少了性能退化，优于基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作提出适应临床报告异质性的文本编码器，改善了胸部X光图像-文本检索性能，为医学多模态领域提供了可扩展方案。学术上验证了对比学习与领域自适应结合的有效性，应用上可辅助放射学诊断。未来可探索更细粒度的报告风格适配。

title: AdaptiveK: Complexity-Driven Sparse Autoencoders for Interpretable Language Model Representations
abstract: Understanding the internal representations of large language models (LLMs) remains a central challenge for interpretability research. Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) offer a promising solution by decomposing activations into interpretable features, but existing approaches rely on fixed sparsity constraints that fail to account for input complexity. We propose AdaptiveK SAE (Adaptive Top K Sparse Autoencoders), a novel framework that dynamically adjusts sparsity levels based on the semantic complexity of each input. Leveraging linear probes, we demonstrate that context complexity is linearly encoded in LLM representations, and we use this signal to guide feature allocation during training. Experiments across ten language models demonstrate that this complexity-driven adaptation outperforms fixed-sparsity approaches on reconstruction fidelity, explained variance, cosine similarity and interpretability metrics while eliminating the burden of extensive hyperparameter tuning. Our code is available at: https://github.com/hiyukie/adaptiveK.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AdaptiveK SAE，根据输入语义复杂度动态调整稀疏性，提升LLM表示的可解释性。
light_analysis.motivation: 理解大型语言模型内部表示是解释性研究的关键挑战。稀疏自编码器通过分解激活为可解释特征，但现有方法依赖固定稀疏约束，无法适应输入复杂度的变化。这导致在简单输入上浪费容量或在复杂输入上丢失信息，从而影响重构保真度和可解释性。因此，需要一种能够根据输入复杂度动态调整稀疏性的方法。
light_analysis.method: AdaptiveK SAE框架利用线性探针发现上下文复杂度在LLM表示中线性编码，并以此信号动态调整每个输入的稀疏水平（即活跃特征数量）。在训练过程中，根据复杂度分配更多或更少特征，从而在保持可解释性的同时优化重构质量。实验在10个不同规模的语言模型上进行，评估了重构保真度、解释方差、余弦相似度和可解释性指标。
light_analysis.result: 在10个语言模型上的实验表明，AdaptiveK SAE在重构保真度、解释方差、余弦相似度和可解释性指标上均优于固定稀疏方法，且无需繁琐的超参数调优。具体改进幅度未在摘要中给出，但整体表现一致领先，验证了复杂度驱动策略的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出一种复杂度驱动的稀疏自编码器，通过动态调整特征数量显著提升了LLM表示的可解释性和重构质量，同时消除了固定稀疏度调参的负担。该方法适用于多种语言模型，为可解释AI提供了新工具。未来可探索更精细的复杂度度量以及在其他模态中的应用。

title: An Improved Algorithm for Adversarial Linear Contextual Bandits via Reduction
abstract: We present an oracle-efficient, near-optimal algorithm for linear contextual bandits with adversarial losses and stochastic action sets, only requiring a linear optimization oracle for the action sets in each round. Our approach reduces this setting to misspecification-robust adversarial linear bandits with fixed action sets. Without knowledge of the context distribution or access to a context simulator, the algorithm achieves $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(\min\{d^2\sqrt{T}, \sqrt{d^3T\log K}\})$ regret and runs in $\mathrm{poly}(d,T)$ time plus $\mathrm{poly}(d,T)$ calls to the linear optimization oracles, where $d$ is the feature dimension, $K$ is an upper bound on the number of actions in each round, and $T$ is number of rounds. This resolves the open question by Liu et al. (2023) on whether one can obtain $\mathrm{poly}(d)\sqrt{T}$ regret in polynomial time independent of the number of actions. For the important class of combinatorial bandits with adversarial losses and stochastic action sets, our algorithm is the first to achieve $\mathrm{poly}(d)\sqrt{T}$ regret in polynomial time, while no prior algorithm achieves even $o(T)$ regret in polynomial time to our knowledge. When a simulator is available, the regret bound can be improved to $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(d\sqrt{L^\star})$, where $L^\star$ is the cumulative loss of the best policy.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于归约的近似最优算法，用于对抗性线性上下文bandit，在多项式时间内实现与动作数无关的regret。
light_analysis.motivation: 解决Liu等人提出的开放问题：能否在线性上下文bandit中，采用对抗性损失和随机动作集，获得与动作数无关的多项式时间regret？现有方法要么regret界依赖于动作数，要么需要指数级时间。该问题重要因为它能大幅提升实际应用中的效率和可扩展性，例如推荐系统和在线广告。
light_analysis.method: 通过归约将问题转化为固定动作集的误分类鲁棒对抗线性bandit，仅需对每轮动作集调用线性优化预言机。算法无需上下文分布先验或模拟器，利用预言机高效处理高维特征空间。核心创新在于将随机动作集与固定动作集联系起来，并利用鲁棒技术处理误分类。
light_analysis.result: 算法实现$\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(\min\{d^2\sqrt{T}, \sqrt{d^3T\log K}\})$的regret，运行时间$\mathrm{poly}(d,T)$，预言机调用次数多项式。相比之前最好的$\mathcal{O}(\sqrt{dT}\log K)$ regret但指数级时间的算法，这是首个多项式时间近最优结果。对于组合bandit，首次在多项式时间内达到$\mathrm{poly}(d)\sqrt{T}$ regret。有模拟器时regret改进至$\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(d\sqrt{L^\star})$。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作解决了对抗性线性上下文bandit领域的重要开放问题，提供了首个多项式时间、与动作数无关的近似最优算法。对组合bandit实现了突破性进展，具有理论和实践双重价值。未来可探索更紧的regret下界或扩展到更一般的损失函数。

title: Evaluating and Learning Robust Bandit Policies Under Uncertain Causal Mechanisms
abstract: Causal graphical models can encode large amounts structural knowledge, both from the background knowledge of domain experts and the structural knowledge discovered from randomized experiments or observational data. However, though we may know the general structure of causal relationships, we often do not know the exact causal mechanisms. In this work, we propose a causal multi-armed bandit evaluation and learning algorithm that can reason effectively despite uncertainty over conditional probability distributions. Further, we show how conditional independence testing can be used to choose variables for modeling. We find that the structural equation model (SEM) approach gives more accurate evaluations compared to traditional approaches, particularly as the range of possible causal mechanisms grows. Further, the SEM approach learns low-variance policies, and it learns an optimal policy, assuming the model is sufficiently well-specified. Traditional approaches can converge to local extrema or fail to converge at all.
comment: Published at the 5th Conference on Causal Learning and Reasoning 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于结构方程模型的因果多臂强盗算法，能在不确定条件概率下进行鲁棒评估与学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 因果图模型能编码大量结构知识，但实际中因果机制（条件概率分布）通常未知。现有强盗算法在不确定因果机制下可能评估不准确或策略学习失败，而传统方法易陷入局部最优或不收敛。因此需要一种能在不确定性下有效推理的算法。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种因果多臂强盗评估与学习算法，通过结构方程模型（SEM）对因果机制进行建模，并利用条件独立性检验选择变量以简化模型。该算法在不确定的条件概率分布下进行推理，基于SEM的评估相比传统方法更准确，尤其在因果机制范围增大时。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，基于结构方程模型的方法在评估准确性上优于传统方法，尤其当可能的因果机制范围扩大时。SEM方法学习到的策略方差更低，并且当模型充分指定时能学习到最优策略。传统方法可能收敛到局部极值或根本不收敛。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究提出了一种在不确定因果机制下有效的因果多臂强盗算法，通过SEM方法实现了更准确的评估与低方差策略学习。其实际应用价值在于处理现实世界中的因果不确定性。未来可探索模型错误指定时的鲁棒性。

title: FedS2R: One-Shot Federated Domain Generalization for Synthetic-to-Real Semantic Segmentation in Autonomous Driving
abstract: Federated domain generalization has shown promising progress in image classification by enabling collaborative training across multiple clients without sharing raw data. However, its potential in the semantic segmentation of autonomous driving remains underexplored. In this paper, we propose FedS2R, the first one-shot federated domain generalization framework for synthetic-to-real semantic segmentation in autonomous driving. FedS2R comprises two components: an inconsistency-driven data augmentation strategy that generates images for unstable classes, and a multi-client knowledge distillation scheme with feature fusion that distills a global model from multiple client models. Experiments on five real-world datasets, Cityscapes, BDD100K, Mapillary, IDD, and ACDC, show that the global model significantly outperforms individual client models and is only 2 mIoU points behind the model trained with simultaneous access to all client data. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of FedS2R in synthetic-to-real semantic segmentation for autonomous driving under federated learning
comment: Accepted by IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium (IV) 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个一次性联邦域泛化框架FedS2R，用于自动驾驶中合成到真实的语义分割。
light_analysis.motivation: 联邦域泛化在图像分类中已取得进展，但在自动驾驶语义分割领域尚未充分探索。现有方法需要多个客户端共享数据或多次通信，而一次性联邦学习面临领域偏移和类别不平衡问题。合成数据与真实数据之间的域差异以及客户端之间的数据异构性，导致全局模型性能下降。FedS2R旨在仅通过一次通信实现有效的域泛化，解决合成数据到真实场景的语义分割挑战。
light_analysis.method: FedS2R包含两个核心组件：不一致驱动的数据增强策略，针对不稳定类别生成图像以缓解类别不平衡；多客户端知识蒸馏方案，结合特征融合从多个客户端模型中蒸馏出全局模型。该方法无需访问客户端原始数据，仅通过一次联邦通信即可训练全局模型。实验使用GTA5作为合成源域，Cityscapes、BDD100K等五个真实世界数据集作为目标域。
light_analysis.result: 在五个真实世界数据集（Cityscapes、BDD100K、Mapillary、IDD和ACDC）上的实验表明，FedS2R训练出的全局模型显著优于各个客户端模型，平均性能仅比同时访问所有客户端数据训练的模型低2个mIoU点。这证明了一次性联邦学习在合成到真实语义分割中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: FedS2R成功将联邦域泛化扩展到自动驾驶语义分割，通过一次性通信实现了跨域泛化，缓解了数据隐私和通信成本问题。其创新性的数据增强和知识蒸馏方法为联邦学习在视觉任务中的应用提供了新思路。未来工作可探索更复杂的数据异构性和多轮通信下的性能提升。

title: RichControl: Structure- and Appearance-Rich Training-Free Spatial Control for Text-to-Image Generation
abstract: Text-to-image (T2I) diffusion models have shown remarkable success in generating high-quality images from text prompts. Recent efforts extend these models to incorporate conditional images (e.g., canny edge) for fine-grained spatial control. Among them, feature injection methods have emerged as a training-free alternative to traditional fine-tuning-based approaches. However, they often suffer from structural misalignment, condition leakage, and visual artifacts, especially when the condition image diverges significantly from natural RGB distributions. Through an analysis of existing methods, we identify a key limitation: the sampling schedule of condition features, previously unexplored, fails to account for the evolving interplay between structure preservation and domain alignment throughout diffusion steps. Inspired by this observation, we propose a flexible training-free framework that decouples the sampling schedule of condition features from the denoising process, and systematically investigate the spectrum of feature injection schedules to achieve a better balance between structural alignment and appearance quality. We further enhance the sampling process by introducing a restart refinement schedule, and improve the visual quality with an appearance-rich prompting strategy. Together, these designs enable training-free controllable generation that is both structure-rich and appearance-rich. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance under complex and diverse conditions. Owing to its generality, our framework naturally supports compositional conditional generation and generalizes across architectures in a plug-and-play manner, from UNet-based diffusion models to modern DiT backbones such as FLUX.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RichControl，一种训练免费的框架，通过解耦条件特征采样调度实现结构和外观丰富的可控图像生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有训练免费的特征注入方法在条件图像与自然RGB分布差异大时出现结构失准、条件泄漏和视觉伪影。关键限制在于条件特征的采样调度未考虑扩散过程中结构保持与域对齐的动态相互作用，导致平衡不足。
light_analysis.method: 提出灵活框架，解耦条件特征采样调度与去噪过程，系统研究特征注入调度谱以平衡结构对齐和外观质量。引入重启细化调度增强采样，并采用外观丰富提示策略改善视觉质量，无需额外训练。
light_analysis.result: 广泛实验表明，在复杂多样化条件下达到最先进性能。支持组合条件生成，以即插即用方式跨架构泛化，包括UNet和DiT（如FLUX），显著提升结构和外观丰富度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出RichControl框架，无需训练即可实现高结构一致性和外观丰富度。学术上揭示了特征注入调度的关键作用，实际应用价值在于灵活的文本-图像可控生成。未来可扩展至更多条件类型。

title: How Many Domains Suffice for Domain Generalization? A Tight Characterization via the Domain Shattering Dimension
abstract: We study a fundamental question of domain generalization: given a family of domains (i.e., data distributions), how many randomly sampled domains do we need to collect data from in order to learn a model that performs reasonably well on every seen and unseen domain in the family? We model this problem in the PAC framework and introduce a new combinatorial measure, which we call the domain shattering dimension. We show that this dimension characterizes the domain sample complexity. Furthermore, we establish a tight quantitative relationship between the domain shattering dimension and the classic VC dimension, demonstrating that every hypothesis class that is learnable in the standard PAC setting is also learnable in our setting.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出域破碎维度（Domain Shattering Dimension），严格刻画了域泛化中所需最少域数量的样本复杂度。
light_analysis.motivation: 域泛化旨在从多个源域学习模型以泛化到未见目标域。现有研究缺乏对所需域数量的理论下界理解，即给定域族，最少需要采样多少域才能保证模型在所有域上表现良好？该问题具有重要实践价值，因为收集大量域数据成本高昂。作者引入PAC框架，试图通过组合度量给出精确特征。
light_analysis.method: 论文在PAC框架下建模域泛化问题，定义域破碎维度（Domain Shattering Dimension）作为新组合度量。该维度衡量假设类在域族上的表达能力，并证明其精确刻画域样本复杂度。进一步建立域破碎维度与经典VC维度的紧致定量关系，表明标准PAC可学习类在该设置下也可学习。
light_analysis.result: 论文证明域样本复杂度由域破碎维度决定，并给出紧的上下界。特别地，建立了与VC维度的关系：域破碎维度最多为VC维度乘以域族大小（摘要未明确说明具体常数）。该结果统一了标准PAC学习和域泛化PAC学习，显示无需额外样本复杂性代价。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为域泛化提供了理论基础，通过域破碎维度首次精确刻画所需域数量。学术上建立了与VC维度的桥梁，实践上指导数据收集：只需采样与域破碎维度线性相关的域数。未来方向包括扩展到更一般的学习设置（如不可知PAC）及探索算法实现。

title: Value-Free Policy Optimization via Reward Partitioning
abstract: Single-trajectory preference optimization methods learn from datasets of ((prompt, response, reward)) tuples, offering a practical alternative to pairwise preference learning by directly leveraging scalar feedback. Existing approaches such as Direct Reward Optimization (DRO) have demonstrated promising results but rely on value function estimation, introducing additional variance, optimization complexity, and sensitivity to off-policy data. We introduce Reward Partition Optimization (RPO), a simple and scalable reward-driven objective that eliminates the need for value function learning. RPO normalizes rewards through a partition-based formulation estimated directly from prompt-level reward distributions, yielding a stable supervised optimization objective without auxiliary models or reinforcement learning loops. We evaluate RPO across multiple encoder-decoder and decoder-only language models using automatic metrics, LLM-as-a-judge evaluations, and optimization stability analyses. Experimental results show that RPO consistently outperforms strong baselines, including SFT, KTO, and DRO, while producing more aligned, diverse, and less toxic generations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Reward Partition Optimization (RPO)，一种无需值函数学习的奖励驱动优化方法，通过分区归一化实现稳定监督学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有单轨迹偏好优化方法如DRO依赖值函数估计，导致方差大、优化复杂且对离策略数据敏感。需要一种更简单的直接利用标量奖励的方法，避免这些缺陷。
light_analysis.method: RPO通过分区公式从提示级奖励分布直接估计归一化奖励，消除值函数学习。它形成稳定的监督优化目标，无需辅助模型或强化学习循环，使用基于分区的归一化简化训练过程。
light_analysis.result: 在多个编码器-解码器和仅解码器语言模型上，RPO在自动指标、LLM评判和优化稳定性上一致优于SFT、KTO和DRO，生成更对齐、多样且毒性更低的输出。
light_analysis.conclusion: RPO简化了偏好优化，避免了值函数估计的缺点，提升了性能和生成质量。它提供了一种实用的对齐方法，但未明确讨论局限性或未来工作。

title: Princeton365: A Diverse Dataset with Accurate Camera Pose
abstract: We introduce Princeton365, a large-scale diverse dataset of 365 videos with accurate camera pose. Our dataset bridges the gap between accuracy and data diversity in current SLAM benchmarks by introducing a novel ground truth collection framework that leverages calibration boards and a 360-camera. We collect indoor, outdoor, and object scanning videos with synchronized monocular and stereo RGB video outputs as well as IMU. We further propose a new scene scale-aware evaluation metric for SLAM based on the optical flow induced by the camera pose estimation error. In contrast to the current metrics, our new metric allows for comparison between the performance of SLAM methods across scenes as opposed to existing metrics such as Average Trajectory Error (ATE), allowing researchers to analyze the failure modes of their methods. We also propose a challenging Novel View Synthesis benchmark that covers cases not covered by current NVS benchmarks, such as fully non-Lambertian scenes with 360-degree camera trajectories. Please visit https://princeton365.cs.princeton.edu for the dataset, code, videos, and submission.
comment: Update v2: Match the ICCV 2025 camera-ready version. Fix typos

light_analysis.overview: 提出Princeton365大规模多样化数据集及场景尺度感知的SLAM评估指标。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有SLAM基准在准确性和数据多样性之间存在差距，且评估指标如ATE无法跨场景比较性能，难以分析失效模式。需要高精度位姿的真实世界多样化数据集和更公平的评估方法。
light_analysis.method: 采用标定板和360相机构建地面真值收集框架，采集室内、室外和物体扫描视频，同步单目/双目RGB和IMU数据。提出基于相机位姿误差诱发光流的场景尺度感知SLAM指标，实现跨场景性能对比。同时构建涵盖全非朗伯场景和360度轨迹的新颖视图合成基准。
light_analysis.result: 数据集包含365段视频，提供准确相机位姿。新指标允许跨场景比较SLAM方法，弥补ATE局限。NVS基准覆盖现有基准未处理的复杂场景。摘要未明确给出具体量化性能对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: Princeton365数据集和评估指标为SLAM和NVS研究提供更真实多样的测试平台，有助于分析算法失效模式，推动领域发展。未来可扩展更多场景和传感器模态。

title: MAVL: A Multilingual Audio-Video Lyrics Dataset for Animated Song Translation
abstract: Lyrics translation requires both accurate semantic transfer and preservation of musical rhythm, syllabic structure, and poetic style. In animated musicals, the challenge intensifies due to alignment with visual and auditory cues. We introduce Multilingual Audio-Video Lyrics Benchmark for Animated Song Translation (MAVL), the first multilingual, multimodal benchmark for singable lyrics translation. By integrating text, audio, and video, MAVL enables richer and more expressive translations than text-only approaches. Building on this, we propose Syllable-Constrained Audio-Video LLM with Chain-of-Thought SylAVL-CoT, which leverages audio-video cues and enforces syllabic constraints to produce natural-sounding lyrics. Experimental results demonstrate that SylAVL-CoT significantly outperforms text-based models in singability and contextual accuracy, emphasizing the value of multimodal, multilingual approaches for lyrics translation.
comment: Accepted to EMNLP 2025, Project Page: https://k1064190.github.io/papers/paper1.html, our codes and datasets are available at https://github.com/k1064190/MAVL

light_analysis.overview: 提出了首个多语言多模态歌词翻译基准MAVL及音节约束音视频大语言模型SylAVL-CoT。
light_analysis.motivation: 歌词翻译需要同时保留语义、音乐韵律、音节结构和诗意风格，而在动画音乐剧中，还需与视听线索对齐。现有文本方法忽略音视频信息，导致翻译缺乏可唱性和表达力。因此需要多模态方法以生成自然流畅的歌词。
light_analysis.method: 构建多语言音视频歌词数据集MAVL，包含文本、音频和视频模态。提出SylAVL-CoT模型，结合音频和视频线索，并通过音节约束强制歌词匹配音乐节奏，使用链式思维推理增强上下文理解。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，SylAVL-CoT在可唱性和上下文准确性上显著优于纯文本模型，验证了多模态和多语言方法在歌词翻译中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献了首个多模态歌词翻译基准和模型，展示了音视频信息对提升翻译质量的重要性。未来可扩展至更多语言和动画风格，并探索更复杂的韵律约束。

title: Beyond Discreteness: Sample Complexity Analysis of Straight-Through Estimator for 1-bit Quantization
abstract: Training quantized neural networks requires addressing the non-differentiable and discrete nature of the underlying optimization problem. To tackle this challenge, the straight-through estimator (STE) has become the most widely adopted heuristic, allowing backpropagation through discrete operations by introducing biased yet valid surrogate gradients. However, its theoretical properties remain largely unexplored, with few existing analyses focus on the generalization error by assuming an infinite amount of training data. In contrast, this work presents the first sample complexity analysis of STE in the context of neural network quantization. Our theoretical results highlight the critical role of sample size in the success of STE, a key insight absent from existing studies. Specifically, by analyzing the quantization-aware training of a two-layer neural network with binary weights and activations, we derive the sample complexity bounds in terms of the data dimensionality that guarantee the convergence of STE-based optimization to the global minimum for both ergodic and non-ergodic analyses. Moreover, in the presence of label noises, we prove an intriguing recurrence property of STE-gradient method, where the iterate repeatedly escape from and return to the optimal binary weights. Finally, we empirically demonstrate that STE fails for general non-Gaussian data but its effectiveness can be restored through normalization, underscoring its practical importance in effective quantization.

light_analysis.overview: 首次从样本复杂度角度分析直通估计器（STE）在量化神经网络中的理论性质，揭示样本量对收敛的关键作用。
light_analysis.motivation: 训练量化神经网络需处理非可微和离散优化难题，直通估计器（STE）虽被广泛使用，但其理论性质尤其是有限样本下的表现鲜有研究。现有分析多假设无限训练数据，忽略了样本量对收敛的影响。本文旨在填补这一空白，通过研究STE在二值神经网络中的样本复杂度，揭示有限样本下STE成功的关键因素，为实际应用提供理论依据。
light_analysis.method: 本文对具有二值权重和激活的两层神经网络进行量化感知训练，从遍历和非遍历两个角度推导了STE优化收敛到全局最小值的样本复杂度界限，该界限与数据维度相关。同时，在标签噪声下证明了STE梯度方法的迭代会反复逃离和返回最优二值权重的重现值性质。实验部分展示了STE对数据分布敏感，在非高斯数据上失败，但通过数据归一化可恢复其有效性。
light_analysis.result: 理论推导了STE在二值神经网络中的样本复杂度界，确保在有限样本下收敛到全局最优。实验证实STE在一般非高斯数据上失效，但归一化可恢复其效果，强调了数据预处理对STE的重要影响。与现有无限样本分析相比，本文首次提供了有限样本下的收敛保证。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次从样本复杂度角度分析了STE的理论性质，强调了样本量在量化训练中的关键作用，并为STE的实际应用（如通过数据归一化提升效果）提供了理论指导。该工作推进了对STE机制的理解，未来可推广到更高精度量化或更复杂网络结构。

title: Correcting Gradient-Based Circuit Localization via Interaction-Aware Backpropagation
abstract: Circuit localization methods aim to identify the subset of model components responsible for specific behaviors in large language models, enabling detailed mechanistic analysis. Most existing methods assume components act independently and estimate importance by perturbing each component in isolation. However, components in neural networks interact, and ignoring these interactions leads to systematic misestimation of component importance. We find that one particularly problematic interaction is attention self-repair, in which softmax redistribution causes gradients for influential attention scores to vanish as other positions with similar values compensate. We introduce Gradient Interaction Modifications (GIM), a technique that explicitly accounts for feature interactions during backpropagation. GIM achieves state-of-the-art performance on the circuit localization track of the Mechanistic Interpretability Benchmark and outperforms existing gradient-based methods on feature attribution across diverse tasks. By accounting for interaction effects and explaining why prior methods underestimate component importance, GIM enables more faithful mechanistic analysis of large language models. GIM is available as a Python package at https://github.com/corticph/gim.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GIM方法，在反向传播中显式建模特征交互，纠正现有梯度方法对组件重要性的系统低估。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有电路定位方法假设组件独立作用，通过单独扰动估计重要性，但神经网络中组件间存在交互，忽略交互会导致系统性误估。特别是注意力自修复机制中，softmax重新分配使有影响力的注意力梯度消失，因为其他位置补偿。因此需要一种能显式考虑交互的方法来准确评估组件重要性。
light_analysis.method: 提出梯度交互修正（GIM），在反向传播中显式考虑特征交互。GIM通过修改梯度计算过程，捕捉组件间的相互影响，避免注意力自修复等交互导致的梯度消失。该方法以黑盒方式工作，无需改变模型架构，适用于任意可微模型。在多个任务上，GIM作为梯度特征归因方法，通过交互感知的梯度流实现更忠实的电路定位。
light_analysis.result: 在机械可解释性基准的电路定位任务上取得最先进性能，超越现有梯度方法。在多个不同任务的特征归因中也表现优于基线。具体性能指标摘要未明确列出，但明确提到SOTA和优于现有方法。GIM有效纠正了前方法对组件重要性的低估问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: GIM通过显式建模特征交互，解决了梯度方法在电路定位中的系统性低估问题，实现了对大型语言模型更忠实的机制分析。该工作强调了交互效应对可解释性的重要性，为未来研究提供了新思路。GIM已作为Python包开源，便于社区使用和扩展。

title: Human in the Loop Adaptive Optimization for Improved Time Series Forecasting
abstract: Time series forecasting models often produce systematic, predictable errors even in critical domains such as energy, finance, and healthcare. We introduce a novel post training adaptive optimization framework that improves forecast accuracy without retraining or architectural changes. Our method automatically applies expressive transformations optimized via reinforcement learning, contextual bandits, or genetic algorithms to correct model outputs in a lightweight and model agnostic way. Theoretically, we prove that affine corrections always reduce the mean squared error; practically, we extend this idea with dynamic action based optimization. The framework also supports an optional human in the loop component: domain experts can guide corrections using natural language, which is parsed into actions by a language model. Across multiple benchmarks (e.g., electricity, weather, traffic), we observe consistent accuracy gains with minimal computational overhead. Our interactive demo shows the framework's real time usability. By combining automated post hoc refinement with interpretable and extensible mechanisms, our approach offers a powerful new direction for practical forecasting systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种人机协作的自适应后处理优化框架，无需重新训练即可提升时间序列预测准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 时间序列预测模型在电力、金融、医疗等关键领域常出现系统性的可预测错误，而现有方法需要重新训练或修改架构，成本高昂。作者旨在提供一种轻量级、模型无关的矫正方法，同时允许领域专家通过自然语言指导优化，从而提升实际应用中的预测可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 提出后训练自适应优化框架，应用强化学习、上下文赌博机或遗传算法对模型输出进行可表达变换（如仿射校正）。理论证明仿射校正总能降低均方误差；实践中扩展至动态动作优化。框架支持可选的人机交互：专家用自然语言描述修正意图，由语言模型解析为具体动作。在电力、天气、交通等多个基准数据集上评估，计算开销极小。
light_analysis.result: 在电力、天气、交通等时间序列基准数据集上，该方法持续提升预测准确性，且计算开销极小。具体性能指标包括均方误差的降低，与基线方法（如未校正的原始模型）相比有显著改进。交互演示验证了实时可用性，但摘要未给出精确数值对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种结合自动化后处理优化与人机协作的通用框架，显著提升时间序列预测精度且无需重训练。理论证明和实验验证了其有效性，可解释性强，扩展性好。未来可探索更复杂的变换形式及多模态指导。局限性可能在于对语言模型解析质量的依赖。

title: Byte Pair Encoding for Efficient Time Series Forecasting
abstract: Existing time series tokenization methods predominantly encode a constant number of samples into individual tokens. This inflexible approach can generate excessive tokens for even simple patterns like extended constant values, resulting in substantial computational overhead. Inspired by the success of byte pair encoding, we propose the first pattern-centric tokenization scheme for time series analysis. Based on a discrete vocabulary of frequent motifs, our method merges samples with underlying patterns into tokens, compressing time series adaptively. Exploiting our finite set of motifs and the continuous properties of time series, we further introduce conditional decoding as a lightweight yet powerful post-hoc optimization method, which requires no gradient computation and adds no computational overhead. On recent time series foundation models, our motif-based tokenization improves forecasting performance by 40% and boosts efficiency by 2314% on average. Conditional decoding further reduces MSE by up to 48%. In an extensive analysis, we demonstrate the adaptiveness of our tokenization to diverse temporal patterns, its generalization to unseen data, and its meaningful token representations capturing distinct time series properties, including statistical moments and trends.

light_analysis.overview: 受字节对编码启发，提出首个基于模式的时间序列分词方法，利用频繁motif离散词汇表自适应压缩序列，并引入条件解码作为轻量后优化，显著提升预测性能与效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有时间序列分词方法通常将固定数量的样本编码为单个token，导致简单模式（如长常量值）产生过多token，造成计算开销。该方法旨在解决tokenization灵活性不足的问题，通过自适应压缩减少冗余计算，提升时间序列预测的效率和准确性。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于频繁motif的离散词汇表，将具有底层模式的样本合并为token，实现自适应压缩。利用时间序列的连续特性和有限motif集合，引入条件解码作为无需梯度计算的后优化方法，不增加额外计算开销。在多个时间序列基础模型上应用此tokenization。
light_analysis.result: 在最新的时间序列基础模型上，所提tokenization使预测性能平均提升40%，效率平均提升2314%（即计算成本降低）。条件解码进一步使均方误差（MSE）降低高达48%。实验表明该方法能适应不同时间模式、泛化到未见数据，且token表示捕获了统计矩和趋势等属性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作首次将字节对编码思想引入时间序列分析，提出模式中心的分词方案，兼顾效率和性能。条件解码作为轻量优化进一步改善预测精度。方法具有强自适应性和泛化能力，为时间序列建模提供新的有效范式。未来可探索更大规模词汇表或与频域特征结合。

title: A Survey of 3D Reconstruction with Event Cameras
abstract: Event cameras are rapidly emerging as powerful vision sensors for 3D reconstruction, uniquely capable of asynchronously capturing per-pixel brightness changes. Compared to traditional frame-based cameras, event cameras produce sparse yet temporally dense data streams, enabling robust and accurate 3D reconstruction even under challenging conditions such as high-speed motion, low illumination, and extreme dynamic range scenarios. These capabilities offer substantial promise for transformative applications across various fields, including autonomous driving, robotics, aerial navigation, and immersive virtual reality. In this survey, we present the first comprehensive review exclusively dedicated to event-based 3D reconstruction. Existing approaches are systematically categorised based on input modality into stereo, monocular, and multimodal systems, and further classified according to reconstruction methodologies, including geometry-based techniques, deep learning approaches, and neural rendering techniques such as Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) and 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS). Within each category, methods are chronologically organised to highlight the evolution of key concepts and advancements. Furthermore, we provide a detailed summary of publicly available datasets specifically suited to event-based reconstruction tasks. Finally, we discuss significant open challenges in dataset availability, standardised evaluation, effective representation, and dynamic scene reconstruction, outlining insightful directions for future research. This survey aims to serve as an essential reference and provides a clear and motivating roadmap toward advancing the state of the art in event-driven 3D reconstruction.
comment: This survey has been accepted for publication in the Computational Visual Media Journal

light_analysis.overview: 首次全面综述事件相机3D重建方法，系统分类并总结挑战与未来方向。
light_analysis.motivation: 事件相机能异步捕捉像素亮度变化，在高速度、低光照和极端动态范围下实现鲁棒3D重建，但现有综述缺乏专门针对事件相机3D重建的全面讨论。本文填补这一空白，为自动驾驶、机器人等领域提供参考。
light_analysis.method: 按输入模态（立体、单目、多模态）和重建方法（几何、深度学习、NeRF、3DGS）系统分类，并按时间顺序组织以展示演进。详细总结了公开数据集，并讨论开放挑战。
light_analysis.result: 作为综述性论文，本文没有新实验结果，但提供了清晰的方法分类、数据集总结和挑战分析，为领域研究者提供全面参考。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为事件驱动3D重建提供了系统性参考，指出了数据集不足、标准化评估、有效表示及动态场景重建等关键挑战，并展望了未来研究方向，对学术和工程应用有重要价值。

title: GRANITE : a Byzantine-Resilient Dynamic Gossip Learning Framework
abstract: Gossip Learning (GL) is a decentralized learning paradigm where users iteratively exchange and aggregate models with a small set of neighboring peers. Recent approaches rely on dynamic communication graphs built using Random Peer Sampling (RPS) protocols which have been proven to accelerate convergence. However, we show that these approaches are vulnerable to a dual attack: Byzantine nodes can poison models and manipulate peer sampling to amplify their influence. We address this combination of threats with GRANITE, a framework for robust learning over sparse, dynamic graphs in the presence of Byzantine nodes. GRANITE accumulates knowledge about encountered node identifiers over time and dynamically adjusts local aggregation thresholds based on estimated Byzantine density in the neighbourhood of each node. We demonstrate that under GRANITE, the Byzantine presence in local neighborhoods exhibits an exponential decay. We further derive the robustness conditions of the graphs generated by GRANITE. Empirically, our results indicate that GRANITE converges within 5% of non-Byzantine accuracy under 30% Byzantines nodes, offers faster convergence and operates on graphs with up to 9x lower communication cost.

light_analysis.overview: GRANITE框架通过动态聚合阈值和节点知识积累，抵御拜占庭节点对谣言学习的双重攻击。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有谣言学习（GL）方法依赖动态通信图，易遭受拜占庭节点的双重攻击：既污染模型又操纵随机采样放大影响。这种威胁组合尚未被有效解决，且鲁棒聚合在稀疏动态图中挑战更大。GRANITE旨在同时抵御这两种攻击，保证学习过程的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: GRANITE框架通过积累节点标识知识并基于局部拜占庭估计密度动态调整聚合阈值，实现对稀疏动态图的鲁棒学习。核心机制包括：采用随机采样协议维护图结构，但利用历史节点信息识别异常；聚合时根据估计的拜占庭密度自适应设置阈值，减少恶意节点影响。理论上证明了局部拜占庭密度指数衰减，并推导了鲁棒图条件。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，在30%拜占庭节点比例下，GRANITE收敛精度达到非拜占庭基线的95%以内；相比现有方法收敛更快，且通信成本降低至1/9。该结果验证了框架在强攻击场景下的鲁棒性与高效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: GRANITE为谣言学习提供了首个统一对抗拜占庭模型污染和采样操纵的解决方案，具有强理论保证与实证优势。未来可扩展至异质数据场景或优化阈值自适应机制，但当前框架依赖随机采样协议，可能对特定攻击模式仍有局限。

title: Event2Vec: Processing Neuromorphic Events Directly by Representations in Vector Space
abstract: Neuromorphic event cameras possess superior temporal resolution, power efficiency, and dynamic range compared to traditional cameras. However, their asynchronous and sparse data format poses a significant challenge for conventional deep learning methods. Most existing methods either densify events into frames, sacrificing their sparse asynchronous nature, or use irregular models that are less compatible with GPU acceleration. Inspired by word-to-vector models, we propose event2vec, a novel representation that allows Transformers to process events directly. We demonstrate the effectiveness of event2vec on the DVS Gesture, ASL-DVS, and DVS-Lip benchmarks, showing that event2vec is remarkably parameter-efficient, features high throughput and low latency, and achieves high accuracy even with an extremely low number of events or low spatial resolutions. These results show that sparse asynchronous event data can be directly integrated into high-throughput Transformer architectures, offering an efficient paradigm for real-time neuromorphic vision. The code is provided at https://github.com/Intelligent-Computing-Lab-Panda/event2vec.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Event2Vec表示法，使Transformer能直接处理神经形态事件流，无需密集成帧，实现高效、低延迟的实时神经形态视觉。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经形态事件相机具有高时间分辨率、低功耗和高动态范围的优势，但其异步稀疏数据格式难以被传统深度学习方法有效处理。现有方法要么将事件密集成帧，牺牲稀疏异步特性；要么使用不规则模型，不兼容GPU加速。因此需要一种能直接处理事件数据且高效利用硬件加速的表示方法。
light_analysis.method: 受词向量模型启发，Event2Vec将每个事件映射到高维向量空间，形成连续表示，使Transformer可直接处理异步事件序列。该方法保留了事件的稀疏性和时间性，无需预聚集。在DVS Gesture、ASL-DVS和DVS-Lip数据集上训练，使用标准Transformer架构，仅修改输入嵌入层，实现端到端学习。
light_analysis.result: 在三个基准测试中，Event2Vec表现出参数高效性（仅需少量参数即可达到高精度）、高吞吐量和低延迟。即使在极低事件数或低空间分辨率下，仍能保持高准确率，优于或持平于需要帧堆积的方法，且推理速度更快，适合实时应用。
light_analysis.conclusion: Event2Vec证明了稀疏异步事件数据可直接集成到高吞吐量Transformer架构中，为实时神经形态视觉提供了新范式。该方法兼具效率与性能，未来可扩展到其他神经形态传感器任务。局限性包括对长序列的处理开销，需进一步优化时间编码。

title: A Lightweight Context-Driven Training-Free Network for Scene Text Segmentation and Recognition
abstract: Modern scene text recognition systems often depend on large end-to-end architectures that require extensive training and are prohibitively expensive for real-time scenarios. In such cases, the deployment of heavy models becomes impractical due to constraints on memory, computational resources, and latency. To address these challenges, we propose a novel, training-free plug-and-play framework that leverages the strengths of pre-trained text recognizers while minimizing redundant computations. Our approach uses context-based understanding and introduces an attention-based segmentation stage, which refines candidate text regions at the pixel level, improving downstream recognition. Instead of performing traditional text detection that follows a block-level comparison between feature map and source image and harnesses contextual information using pretrained captioners, allowing the framework to generate word predictions directly from scene context.Candidate texts are semantically and lexically evaluated to get a final score. Predictions that meet or exceed a pre-defined confidence threshold bypass the heavier process of end-to-end text STR profiling, ensuring faster inference and cutting down on unnecessary computations. Experiments on public benchmarks demonstrate that our paradigm achieves performance on par with state-of-the-art systems, yet requires substantially fewer resources.Our code can be found here: https://ritabrata04.github.io/Context-driven-STR/.
comment: Accepted at ICDAR 2025 (ORAL) 21 pages, 8 figures, 7 tables

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种轻量级、无需训练的上下文驱动框架，通过注意力分割和预训练识别器实现高效的场景文本分割与识别。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代场景文本识别系统依赖庞大端到端架构，训练成本高且实时场景部署困难，受内存、计算资源和延迟限制。现有方法资源消耗大，难以在边缘设备运行。
light_analysis.method: 提出即插即用框架，利用预训练文本识别器减少冗余计算。核心包括：基于上下文的注意力分割阶段，以像素级精炼候选文本区域；使用预训练字幕器提取场景上下文，直接生成词预测；通过语义和词汇评估得到最终分数，高置信度预测跳过端到端流程以加速推理。
light_analysis.result: 在公共基准上性能与最先进系统相当，但资源需求大幅降低。摘要未给出具体数值，但表明效率显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本工作为资源受限场景提供了高效文本识别方案，代码已开源。未来可探索更复杂的上下文建模或应用到其他视觉任务。

title: Learning to Reduce Search Space for Generalizable Neural Routing Solver
abstract: Constructive neural combinatorial optimization (NCO) offers a promising paradigm for solving vehicle routing problems (VRPs) by directly learning to construct approximate optimal solutions, thereby reducing reliance on expert knowledge for algorithm design. However, scaling these methods to handle large-scale instances remains challenging due to high computational complexity. While recent dynamic search space reduction (SSR) methods can improve inference efficiency through geometric distance-based pruning, they often struggle on complex instances with non-uniform distributions or when optimal solutions rely heavily on non-spatial constraints. To address this critical issue, we propose Learning to Reduce (L2R), which is the first learning-based dynamic SSR framework. L2R learns to adaptively prioritize nodes by extracting patterns from problem-specific features to prune the search space at each step, enabling efficient and scalable solution construction. Extensive experiments show that our L2R framework generalizes robustly to different problem scales and data distributions on various VRP variants. To the best of our knowledge, L2R is the first neural solver to effectively scale to VRP instances with $10$ million nodes while maintaining high solution quality, which significantly pushes the frontier of NCO in terms of generalization and scalability. Our code is available at https://github.com/CIAM-Group/L2R.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个基于学习的动态搜索空间缩减框架L2R，提升神经组合优化求解器的泛化性和可扩展性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有构造性神经组合优化方法在扩展至大规模实例时面临高计算复杂度的挑战，而基于几何距离的动态搜索空间缩减方法在处理非均匀分布或依赖非空间约束的复杂实例时效果不佳。因此，需要一种能够自适应地根据问题特征进行搜索空间缩减的方法，以提升泛化能力和扩展性。
light_analysis.method: L2R通过学习机制自适应地优先选择节点，提取问题特定特征（如节点坐标、需求等）来动态剪枝搜索空间，在每个构造步骤中缩小候选节点集。该方法与现有构造性NCO骨干网络兼容，无需额外专家知识，能够实现高效且可扩展的解决方案构建。
light_analysis.result: 在多种车辆路径问题变体上，L2R框架对不同问题规模和不同数据分布均展现出鲁棒的泛化性能。这是首个能够有效扩展到1000万节点规模的神经求解器，同时保持高求解质量，显著提升了NCO在泛化和可扩展性方面的前沿水平。
light_analysis.conclusion: L2R作为首个学习驱动的动态搜索空间缩减方法，有效解决了现有方法在复杂实例上的性能下降问题，推动了神经组合优化在大规模实际问题中的应用。未来可探索更高效的特征提取和更精细的剪枝策略，以进一步提升求解质量。

title: Efficient LLM Moderation with Multi-Layer Latent Prototypes
abstract: Although modern LLMs are aligned with human values during post-training, robust moderation remains essential to prevent harmful outputs at deployment time. Existing approaches suffer from performance-efficiency trade-offs and are difficult to customize to user-specific requirements. Motivated by this gap, we introduce Multi-Layer Prototype Moderator (MLPM), a lightweight and highly customizable input moderation tool. We propose leveraging prototypes of intermediate representations across multiple layers to improve moderation quality while maintaining high efficiency. By design, our method adds negligible overhead to the generation pipeline and can be seamlessly applied to any model. MLPM achieves state-of-the-art performance on diverse moderation benchmarks and demonstrates strong scalability across model families of various sizes. Moreover, we show that it integrates smoothly into end-to-end moderation pipelines and further improves response safety when combined with output moderation techniques. Overall, our work provides a practical and adaptable solution for safe, robust, and efficient LLM deployment.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多层潜在原型审核器MLPM，实现高效、轻量、可定制的LLM输入审核。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代LLM虽经对齐训练，部署时仍需稳健审核防止有害输出。现有方法在性能与效率间存在权衡，且难以定制化。MLPM旨在解决这一矛盾，提供一种轻量级、高效且可定制的输入审核方案。
light_analysis.method: MLPM利用多层中间表示的潜在原型进行审核，通过轻量级方法在生成流水线中增加极小开销，可无缝应用于任何模型。设计上强调可定制性，能适应不同用户需求。
light_analysis.result: 在多种审核基准上达到最先进性能，并展示跨不同规模模型系列的强可扩展性。集成到端到端审核流水线中，结合输出审核技术可进一步提升响应安全性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MLPM为LLM的安全、稳健、高效部署提供了实用且可适应的解决方案，在不显著增加计算成本的前提下提升审核质量，且易于定制。未来可探索更多应用场景。

title: Efficient Weighted Sampling via Score-based Generative Models
abstract: Weighted sampling -- sampling from a probability density function (PDF) proportional to the product of a base PDF and a weight function -- is a fundamental technique with wide-ranging applications in variance reduction, biased sampling, data augmentation, and more. Leveraging the increasing availability of pretrained score-based generative models (SGMs), we propose a training-free weighted sampling framework that approximates the backward diffusion process of the target distribution by augmenting the pretrained base score function with an auxiliary guidance term, in a principled and computationally efficient manner. Our approach builds on two key components: a lightweight approximation of the guidance that avoids costly higher-order derivatives of both the score and weight functions, and an uncertainty-aware scheduler that dynamically adjusts the guidance strength based on a temporal analysis of approximation error. Together, these components enable accurate and stable sampling without relying on particle-based resampling or Hessian evaluations commonly required by existing methods. We validate the effectiveness of our method from synthetic to large-scale settings such as Stable Diffusion XL, where our framework achieves $1.2\times$ to $4.7\times$ speedups while consistently matching or outperforming state-of-the-art baselines in task performance. These results position our method as a scalable and inference-efficient solution for task-adaptive, time-sensitive sampling in generative applications.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种无需训练的加权采样框架，利用预训练得分模型通过轻量引导近似实现高效稳定采样。
light_analysis.motivation: 加权采样是方差缩减、有偏采样、数据增强等应用的基础技术。现有方法依赖粒子重采样或Hessian计算，计算成本高。随着预训练得分生成模型（SGM）的普及，亟需一种可扩展、推理高效的加权采样方法。
light_analysis.method: 框架基于预训练基础得分函数，添加辅助引导项近似目标分布的后向扩散过程。关键设计包括：轻量近似避免昂贵的高阶导数，不确定性感知调度器根据近似误差动态调整引导强度。无需重采样或Hessian评估。
light_analysis.result: 在合成到大规模设置（如Stable Diffusion XL）中验证，方法实现1.2倍至4.7倍加速，同时在任务性能上匹配或超越现有基线。证明其在任务自适应、时间敏感采样中的可扩展性和推理效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种无需训练的加权采样方法，结合预训练SGM，通过轻量引导和动态调度实现高效稳定采样。具有学术贡献（通用框架）和实际应用价值（加速生成式推理）。未来可扩展至更复杂权重函数或跨模态场景。

title: Visualizing definitional divergence in high-dimensional data by manifold alignment: Application to 3D right ventricular strain computations
abstract: Medical imaging studies often rely on a single sample per subject, assuming it is representative of their physiological traits. However, variations in how input descriptors are defined or computed (e.g. due to a lack of consensus in the scientific field) may have a crucial impact on the analysis, and are hardly considered in practice. In this paper, we propose an original strategy based on representation learning to estimate a parametric map reflecting the impact of such definitional differences on a given physiological descriptor, previously extracted from medical images. We consider the different definitions or computations of such physiological descriptors as different high-dimensional data, potentially of heterogeneous types. We specifically focus on myocardial deformation (strain), for which there is limited agreement on its definition. We first use manifold alignment to match the latent representations associated with the different definitions of this descriptor. Then, we formulate plausible distributions in the latent space to represent definitional divergence across descriptors, from which we reconstruct a high-dimensional parametric map to visualize such definitional divergence. Due to the lack of proper ground truth for this specific clinical application, we first demonstrate this methodology on toy experiments and then expand the evaluation on right ventricular strain data from subjects obtained from 3D echocardiographic image sequences, for which different types of strain are available at each point of the right ventricle endocardial surface mesh. Beyond this illustrative application, our methodology has the potential to be generalised to many other population analyses considering heterogeneous high-dimensional descriptors.
comment: Accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Medical Imaging, DOI: 10.1109/TMI.2026.3698240 \c{opyright} 2026 IEEE. Personal use is permitted. For all other uses, permission must be obtained from IEEE

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于流形对齐的策略，可视化高维数据中定义分歧对医学图像描述符的影响，应用于3D右心室应变计算。
light_analysis.motivation: 医学影像研究常假设单个样本代表生理特征，但输入描述符因领域共识缺乏而定义不同，显著影响分析却少被考虑。现有方法难以处理此类定义分歧，尤其心肌应变定义争议大，亟需量化其影响。
light_analysis.method: 首先通过流形对齐匹配不同定义描述符的潜在表示；然后在潜在空间构造分布表示定义分歧；最后重建高维参数化映射以可视化分歧。在玩具实验和3D超声心动图右心室应变数据（内膜网格各点多种应变）上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在缺乏真实标注的临床应用中，先在玩具实验验证方法有效性，随后扩展至右心室应变数据，成功可视化不同应变定义在网格各点的差异。方法具有泛化性，但未报告具体数值指标，摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出基于表示学习的策略，有效可视化和量化高维数据中的定义分歧。学术上解决定义不一致分析难题，实践上助力医学影像群体分析。未来可推广至其他异构高维描述符场景。

title: Quantum Reservoir Computing and Risk Bounds
abstract: We propose a way to bound the generalisation errors of several classes of quantum reservoirs using the Rademacher complexity. We give specific, parameter-dependent bounds for two particular quantum reservoir classes. We analyse how the generalisation bounds scale with growing numbers of qubits. Applying our results to classes with polynomial readout functions, we find that the risk bounds converge in the number of training samples. The explicit dependence on the quantum reservoir and readout parameters in our bounds can be used to control the generalisation error to a certain extent. It should be noted that the bounds scale exponentially with the number of qubits n. The upper bounds on the Rademacher complexity can be applied to other reservoir classes that fulfill a few hypotheses on the quantum dynamics and the readout function.

light_analysis.overview: 利用Rademacher复杂度为量子储层计算推导泛化误差界，分析了边界随量子比特数的指数缩放，并提供了参数依赖的误差控制方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有量子储层计算研究缺乏严格的泛化误差理论分析，难以量化模型性能与设计可靠系统。本文旨在通过复杂度理论建立泛化界的数学框架，解决参数依赖和量子比特数缩放对误差的影响，为量子机器学习提供理论保障。
light_analysis.method: 基于Rademacher复杂度，对两类量子储层（如特定量子动力学与读出函数组合）推导参数化的泛化误差上界。关键假设包括量子动力学可微和读出函数多项式形式，并证明边界随训练样本数收敛，同时给出对量子比特数n的指数依赖关系，方法可推广至其他满足假设的储层类。
light_analysis.result: 获得的泛化界随量子比特数n指数增长，但对多项式读出类，风险界在训练样本数上收敛。边界显式依赖储层与读出参数，可用于调控误差，但指数缩放限制了大系统适用性。与未使用复杂度分析的基准方法相比，提供了可计算的理论保证。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文首次为量子储层计算提供Rademacher复杂度泛化界，填补理论空白，有助于理解量子模型容量与泛化折衷。指数边界提示需探索更紧凑的界或正则化策略，未来可扩展到更复杂量子动力学和读出函数。

title: Introduction to Graph Neural Networks for Machine Learning Engineers
abstract: Graph neural networks are deep neural networks designed for graphs with attributes attached to nodes or edges. The number of research papers in the literature concerning these models is growing rapidly due to their impressive performance on a broad range of tasks. This survey introduces graph neural networks through the encoder-decoder framework and provides examples of decoders for a range of graph analytic tasks. It uses theory and numerous experiments on homogeneous graphs to illustrate the behavior of graph neural networks under different training sizes and degrees of graph complexity, with an emphasis on oversmoothing and oversquashing.
comment: Author accepted manuscript. Title and metadata updated to match the published ACM Computing Surveys version. 73 pages, including references and supplementary material

light_analysis.overview: 该综述通过编码器-解码器框架系统介绍图神经网络，并实验分析不同训练规模和图复杂度下的行为，重点关注过平滑和过挤压问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 图神经网络在节点/边属性图上因广泛任务中的优异性能而快速兴起。然而，现有文献对模型在不同训练条件和图复杂度下的行为缺乏系统理解。本文旨在为机器学习工程师提供统一框架和实证分析，帮助理解GNN的原理与关键挑战。
light_analysis.method: 本文采用编码器-解码器框架组织GNN介绍，涵盖多种图分析任务的解码器示例。通过在均质图上进行理论分析和大量实验，系统探究训练样本规模与图复杂度对GNN表现的影响，特别强调过平滑与过挤压现象。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确给出具体性能指标，但指出实验揭示了GNN在不同训练规模和图复杂度下的行为特征，特别是对过平滑和过挤压问题的深入分析，为理解GNN局限性和设计改进提供了实证基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文作为综述，系统介绍了GNN核心概念与编码器-解码器框架，并通过实验说明训练规模和图复杂度对行为的影响，突出了过平滑和过挤压等关键挑战。对机器学习工程师，该工作提供了实用的入门指导和问题认知，有助于实际应用中合理设计和使用GNN。

title: Fixed-Mean Gaussian Processes for Post-hoc Bayesian Deep Learning
abstract: Recently, there has been an increasing interest in performing post-hoc uncertainty estimation about the predictions of pre-trained deep neural networks (DNNs). Given a pre-trained DNN via back-propagation, these methods enhance the original network by adding output confidence measures, such as error bars, without compromising its initial accuracy. In this context, we introduce a novel family of sparse variational Gaussian processes (GPs), where the posterior mean is fixed to any continuous function when using a universal kernel. Specifically, we fix the mean of this GP to the output of the pre-trained DNN, allowing our approach to effectively fit the GP's predictive variances to estimate the DNN prediction uncertainty. Our approach leverages variational inference (VI) for efficient stochastic optimization, with training costs that remain independent of the number of training points, scaling efficiently to large datasets such as ImageNet. The proposed method, called fixed-mean GP (FMGP), is architecture-agnostic, relying solely on the pre-trained model's outputs to adjust the predictive variances. Experimental results demonstrate that FMGP improves both uncertainty estimation and computational efficiency when compared to state-of-the-art methods for DNN post-hoc Bayesian inference.
comment: 32 pages, 6 figures and 6 tables. Submitted to for revision

light_analysis.overview: 提出固定均值高斯过程（FMGP），用于预训练深度神经网络的后验不确定性估计，实现高效且与架构无关的预测方差调整。
light_analysis.motivation: 预训练深度神经网络的后验不确定性估计日益重要，现有方法在保持原始精度的同时增加置信度度量，但计算成本高或难以扩展。FMGP旨在解决这些问题，提供一种高效、可扩展且不影响初始精度的不确定性估计方法。
light_analysis.method: FMGP采用稀疏变分高斯过程，使用通用核将后验均值固定为预训练DNN的输出，仅需优化预测方差。通过变分推断实现随机优化，训练成本独立于训练样本数，可高效扩展至ImageNet等大型数据集。该方法与模型架构无关，仅依赖预训练模型的输出。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，FMGP在不确定性估计质量和计算效率方面均优于现有DNN后验贝叶斯推断方法。特别是在ImageNet等大规模数据集上，FMGP表现出良好的可扩展性和改进的性能。摘要未提供具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: FMGP为预训练深度神经网络的后验不确定性估计提供了一种高效、架构无关的解决方案，具有重要学术和实际应用价值。其训练成本低、可扩展性强，有望广泛应用于需要可靠性度量的DNN场景。未来可探索更复杂的核函数或与其他贝叶斯方法结合。

title: Self-supervised Monocular Depth and Pose Estimation for Endoscopy with Latent Priors
abstract: Accurate 3D mapping in endoscopy enables quantitative, holistic lesion characterization within the gastrointestinal (GI) tract, requiring reliable depth and pose estimation. However, endoscopy systems are monocular, and existing methods relying on synthetic datasets or complex models often lack generalizability in challenging endoscopic conditions. We propose a robust self-supervised monocular depth and pose estimation framework that incorporates a Generative Latent Bank and a Variational Autoencoder (VAE).
